Democracy Docket: New Ruling Cuts Off Key Tool to Protect Minority Voters| | |
---
**Voters desperately need a "_private right to action_ " to protect their rights.** All that phrase means is that we, the people, can bring forward a lawsuit ourselves when we see wrongdoing in our elections. **These 8th Circuit decisions strip us of that** \-- in a world where most legal action around voting rights comes from groups like ours and our partners, not from the U.S. Department of Justice (DOJ). And we've got at least these four years of DOJ's Civil Rights division facing internal attacks from a hostile presidential administration that doesn't just believe conspiracy theories, but spreads them. **[There's so much at risk, Team. RUSH $25 or more right now so we have the resources we need to fight rulings like this one and protect our right to vote across the country>>](https://click.everyaction.com/k/113210330/563016860/-1725532854?refcode=081225_2&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAwNy8xLzg5MjE1IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjBkNWIxZTdhLWQ4NzctZjAxMS04ZGM5LTYwNDViZGVkOGNjYSIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=OXo-pFkXZI9_q7VsyKioNL0giAlJsiCUp7cV-lixLgo=)**

| | Folks: An update from the federal 8th Circuit on**one of the most dangerous anti-voter rulings we’ve seen in years**. A federal appeals court recently cut off a key avenue for private groups and individuals to bring racial discrimination claims under the Voting Rights Act (VRA). The ruling, which applies in seven states, further weakens the ability of our civil rights law to protect voters, and could lead to the Supreme Court settling the issue. This goes back to an initial ruling from 2023, the impact of which is pretty simple to understand: That voters and voting rights organizations can no longer sue to overturn unjust laws under the Voting Rights Act. According to the 8th Circuit, and now confirmed on appeal, only the Department of Justice (DoJ) has the legal standing to sue states over voting laws. With former Florida AG Pam Bondi -- a "big lie" spreading MAGA acolyte -- serving as Attorney General, **it's clear that the DOJ is not going to protect voting rights over the next four years.** **[Team, we have to fight this ruling and make sure voters and advocacy groups have the right to defend voting rights in court. Please pitch in $25 or whatever you can to make every vote count, either at the ballot box or in court>>](https://click.everyaction.com/k/113210333/563016885/-1725532854?refcode=081225_2&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAwNy8xLzg5MjE1IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjBkNWIxZTdhLWQ4NzctZjAxMS04ZGM5LTYwNDViZGVkOGNjYSIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=OXo-pFkXZI9_q7VsyKioNL0giAlJsiCUp7cV-lixLgo=)**

| | This is all about the legal term "private right of action". The 8th Circuit says it doesn't exist. That means the pro-voting lawsuits we've seen in states like Wisconsin, Georgia, Florida, and others nationwide wouldn't be possible anymore if the Supreme Court backs up this ruling. **We won’t sugarcoat this:** This could be a crushing blow to many voting rights organizations across the country, ourselves included. If this new appellate ruling is not overturned by the Supreme Court, it could unravel all of the great work pro-voting organizations are doing across the country — and allow dozens of unjust, unconstitutional voter restrictions to stand. Attacks like this on what remains of the Voting Rights Act are going to get worse over the next few years. **As voter suppression laws become increasingly targeted and oppressive** , our work to combat them must become smarter, stronger, and more accessible to everyone. **[We can't do this alone. Help defend our right to vote with $25 or however much you can today and make every voice heard in our elections>>](https://click.everyaction.com/k/113210340/563016892/-1725532854?refcode=081225_2&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAwNy8xLzg5MjE1IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjBkNWIxZTdhLWQ4NzctZjAxMS04ZGM5LTYwNDViZGVkOGNjYSIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=OXo-pFkXZI9_q7VsyKioNL0giAlJsiCUp7cV-lixLgo=)**

Integrity First Voter Action Project is dedicated to expanding ballot access and increasing voter participation across the country.

Since the Supreme Court gutted key provisions in the Voting Rights Act, extreme politicians have taken advantage to pass harsh laws that restrict access to the ballot box. These restrictions particularly affect disadvantaged communities and people of color. It’s our goal to bring awareness to these laws wherever they may crop up and organize voters to take action to ensure the right to vote is available to everyone in their states and communities. [**Your support is crucial to our efforts. Will you donate today to help us protect voting rights?**](https://click.everyaction.com/k/113210346/563016957/-1022832091?refcode=081225_2&amount=20&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAwNy8xLzg5MjE1IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjBkNWIxZTdhLWQ4NzctZjAxMS04ZGM5LTYwNDViZGVkOGNjYSIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=OXo-pFkXZI9_q7VsyKioNL0giAlJsiCUp7cV-lixLgo=)

name: Adam Schiff
subject: Corrupt
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY DR. RAUL RUIZ FOR CONGRESS COMMITTEE
body:
While Washington remains gridlocked, Dr. Raul Ruiz is committed to serving and helping constituents with the problems they have with the federal government and cutting red tape. If you’d like to unsubscribe, click here. [https://secure.ngpvan.com/p/dAfRehWDrkq5GdVTndjWgA2?unsubscribedata=fVxWixHxKH7AHvoH4MbKul%2FhRPt21EdFm4DuErB%2B3wAZ%2FOGXiQ89gOVqOoscAVDU5w9Y4bfb%2Bc6Hs7agiPevYs6dD68t88gqcE%2BSXy0es5jSwU%2Bo8d9nP87hwqdSn5afHMiCqEG4J439yOJGAoYtXcnOzzc0E6QU8MlZybex0iZjAWh%2Bl1Krw74CUkaQBbmbWc476jyAvlZf%2Bjxv4ecuj6ZVqU2NWgzpHsW1fALQ1RwZr3OFNxd7ZXkSwBGpBi9uUQ5lGAvfXfH3UJqUUISE%2Bl903S1qSMywvP23A1HB27RyRLWeDSwU6cUXciBYKk3Ae15MvLpq32qlyqQrU0t3z9cCScOwgGOB%2B%2B7Ga5qIQSc7QQUoRGApXb%2FmPbiAqezOgrRBCpCfhL3f3K68TnQcQ0O07CxfuBI99YgzlTuj53VOd71s7dtxdvoxh7MGJQkU]

# [#]
This is Adam Schiff. I have some important news to share with you, team:Attorney General Pam Bondi has reportedly asked a corrupt DOJ official named Ed Martin to lead a baseless investigation against me.

Ed Martin, if you don’t remember, was the Interim U.S. Attorney for the District of Columbia. A former defense lawyer for violent insurrectionists, he was patently unfit for that office — or any other — and I put a hold on his nomination, and successfully helped kill it.

Ed Martin is exactly the type of loyal attack dog Donald Trump adores. As Interim U.S. Attorney, he threatened perceived “enemies” of the Trump administration, fired January 6th prosecutors for simply doing their jobs, urged the opening of criminal cases without evidence, and used the powers of his office to deter free speech. Career prosecutors quit rather than follow his unethical edicts.

Before he was nominated to be a U.S. Attorney, Ed Martin had zero prosecutorial experience. Instead, he spent his time defending insurrectionists who broke into the Capitol on January 6 and advancing bogus claims of election fraud. He is close friends with an avowed neo-Nazi, appearing with and praising him repeatedly.

Because of all of that, we were able to stop Ed Martin’s dangerous nomination.

When his nomination was defeated, Attorney General Pam Bondi appointed Martin to lead a “weaponization” task force at the Justice Department to go after the president’s enemies. I was at the top of the list.

And now, Ed Martin is investigating me and carrying out not just the president’s political retribution, but his own, as well.

This is going to get ugly. But I will not be deterred from speaking out, fighting back, and holding Trump accountable every single day. Will you have my back and split a contribution between me and Dr. Raul Ruiz to help me fight back against Ed Martin and his sham investigation?

If you’d like to unsubscribe, click here. [] [#] This is Adam Schiff. I have some important news to share with you, team:Attorney General Pam Bondi has reportedly asked a corrupt DOJ official named Ed Martin to lead a baseless investigation against me. Ed Martin, if you don’t remember, was the Interim U.S. Attorney for the District of Columbia. A former defense lawyer for violent insurrectionists, he was patently unfit for that office — or any other — and I put a hold on his nomination, and successfully helped kill it. Ed Martin is exactly the type of loyal attack dog Donald Trump adores. As Interim U.S. Attorney, he threatened perceived “enemies” of the Trump administration, fired January 6th prosecutors for simply doing their jobs, urged the opening of criminal cases without evidence, and used the powers of his office to deter free speech. Career prosecutors quit rather than follow his unethical edicts. Before he was nominated to be a U.S. Attorney, Ed Martin had zero prosecutorial experience. Instead, he spent his time defending insurrectionists who broke into the Capitol on January 6 and advancing bogus claims of election fraud. He is close friends with an avowed neo-Nazi, appearing with and praising him repeatedly. Because of all of that, we were able to stop Ed Martin’s dangerous nomination. When his nomination was defeated, Attorney General Pam Bondi appointed Martin to lead a “weaponization” task force at the Justice Department to go after the president’s enemies. I was at the top of the list. And now, Ed Martin is investigating me and carrying out not just the president’s political retribution, but his own, as well. This is going to get ugly. name: John Fetterman
subject: hands off our unions
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Fetterman for PA
body:
| | |
---
[](https://act.johnfetterman.com/go/50482?refcode=jtk210-fr-fl&t=1&akid=10249%2E434096%2ENmpU53)
Hey Derek, John here.
I’ve always been 💯 pro-union for folks in PA + across the country. **The Union Way of Life is *sacred***. You don’t mess with it. You always fight for it.
And you know I've said **I won't ever back down** if anyone tries to destroy the Union Way of Life. _Even_ if that person is the president of the United States.
Well, right now Trump’s out there trying to cancel union contracts and gut union rights for **hundreds of thousands** of federal workers.
That includes _nearly 20,000 VA employees_ in Pennsylvania alone.
These are folks who serve our veterans. Who keep our country running. I'm all for making the VA more efficient, but the union workers shouldn't be caught up in this political bullsh*t.
This is union busting, plain and simple. 🤬
**So my team and I are setting a rapid-response goal of $20,000 to hit by midnight because we need to make a hell of a lot of noise about this – and we need to do it now. We need to show Trump that this movement has teeth. Real grassroots power.**
🙏 [**So I’m asking: Derek, will you chip in now to sound the alarm about Trump's anti-union crusade and stand up for the hardworking folks at the VA?**](https://act.johnfetterman.com/go/50482?refcode=jtk210-fr-fl&t=2&akid=10249%2E434096%2ENmpU53)
_If you've saved payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_ | | | [DONATE $5 NOW](https://act.johnfetterman.com/go/50491?refcode=jtk210-fr-fl&t=3&akid=10249%2E434096%2ENmpU53)

John ✊

We know this fight takes real commitment, but if we stand united, we cannot be ignored. | | | | | | | We stopped her once. We can do it again – but only if we stand united, loud, and visible. See you at the rally, Oregon GOP | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | We are dedicated to promoting conservative values, protecting individual freedoms, and building a prosperous future for all Oregonians. From state and local governments to the federal level, we are fighting for a better Oregon – defending parental rights, reducing taxes, ensuring safe communities, and standing against government overreach. Join us in our mission to uphold the principles that make our state and nation strong. >>> | | | | | | | | | | | Stay up to date with the latest campaign updates and Oregon news by following us on social media! | | | | | | | | | | The fight for Oregon is far from over and 2025 is our chance to stop the damage and turn things around.Democrats are pushing a disastrous agenda of bigger government, fewer freedoms, and zero accountability. name: Senator Vincent Hughes
subject: 23 Senate Democrats Are Ready to Vote for SEPTA Funding
body:
If you are having trouble viewing this message or would like to share it on a social network, you can [view the message online](http://enews.senatorhughes.com/mail/util.cfm?gpiv=2100170470.172386.76&gen=1).
| Share On | [](http://enews.senatorhughes.com/mail/util.cfm?mailaction=share&piv=2100170470.172386.76&snid=2)
---|---
[](http://enews.senatorhughes.com/mail/util.cfm?mailaction=clickthru&gpiv=2100170470.172386.76&gen=1&mailing_linkid=15193)
**23 Senate Democrats Are Ready to Vote for SEPTA Funding** _**Senator Hughes was out in the district at the 52nd St. station and Bala station to share an update on funding for SEPTA, roads, bridges, and mass transit across PA.**_ [](http://enews.senatorhughes.com/mail/util.cfm?mailaction=clickthru&gpiv=2100170470.172386.76&gen=1&mailing_linkid=15194) **Here's What to Know **
* SEPTA has said funding needs to be passed by Thursday, August 14th, or service cuts will go into place
* The state House has passed this transportation funding [FIVE times](http://enews.senatorhughes.com/mail/util.cfm?mailaction=clickthru&gpiv=2100170470.172386.76&gen=1&mailing_linkid=15195)\- both Democrats and Republicans voted for it in the House
* The Senate Republicans have been holding this funding up for months now
* Senate Democrats are ready with 23 votes to get this funding done, we just need 3 Republicans to join us

[](http://enews.senatorhughes.com/mail/util.cfm?mailaction=clickthru&gpiv=2100170470.172386.76&gen=1&mailing_linkid=15195) **Get Involved ** We need everyone involved in this push to get transportation funding done. Visit [TransitforAllPA.org](http://enews.senatorhughes.com/mail/util.cfm?mailaction=clickthru&gpiv=2100170470.172386.76&gen=1&mailing_linkid=15196) to learn how you can reach out to lawmakers, connect with community members, and take action to make sure Pennsylvania's buses, trains, roads, and bridges are funded and working for you, the people! [](http://enews.senatorhughes.com/mail/util.cfm?mailaction=clickthru&gpiv=2100170470.172386.76&gen=1&mailing_linkid=15197) **Stay Connected** Follow us on [Facebook](http://enews.senatorhughes.com/mail/util.cfm?mailaction=clickthru&gpiv=2100170470.172386.76&gen=1&mailing_linkid=15198), [Instragram](http://enews.senatorhughes.com/mail/util.cfm?mailaction=clickthru&gpiv=2100170470.172386.76&gen=1&mailing_linkid=15199), [TikTok](http://enews.senatorhughes.com/mail/util.cfm?mailaction=clickthru&gpiv=2100170470.172386.76&gen=1&mailing_linkid=15200), [X](http://enews.senatorhughes.com/mail/util.cfm?mailaction=clickthru&gpiv=2100170470.172386.76&gen=1&mailing_linkid=15185), and [Bluesky](http://enews.senatorhughes.com/mail/util.cfm?mailaction=clickthru&gpiv=2100170470.172386.76&gen=1&mailing_linkid=15187) to stay informed about the latest Pennsylvania news about transportation funding and other big issues that impact you. [](http://enews.senatorhughes.com/mail/util.cfm?mailaction=clickthru&gpiv=2100170470.172386.76&gen=1&mailing_linkid=15188)

name: Newsom Rocks
subject: Trump is “playing with fire”
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY ISAIAH MARTIN FOR CONGRESS
body:
[https://prod.cdn.everyaction.com/images/van/NGP/NGP59/1/109386/images/IRM_wrapper-email.jpg]
friend, hey — it’s Isaiah Martin.
Donald Trump is still rigging congressional maps in red states to lock in GOP power before a single vote is cast in 2026.
It’s the classic wannabe dictator playbook: change the rules so you can’t lose, and hope the people don’t notice until it’s too late.
But people are noticing. And they’re fighting back.
California Gov . Gavin Newsom just issued Trump a warning in a blistering letter:
“You are playing with fire, risking the destabilization of our democracy .”
Newsom made it clear: If Republicans redraw maps in red states, California will redraw maps to cancel them out. Blue states across the country are lining up for a bare-knuckle match to defend fair representation.
This isn’t politics as usual. If Trump succeeds here, he’ll have the power to rig Congress for the next decade, and there won’t be enough elections left to vote him out.
We can’t let that happen. Not in Texas. Not in California. Not anywhere.
Now is the moment to fight back against Trump’s redistricting power grab.
Chip in now to stop Trump’s rigged maps [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/klemail_imartin?]

subject: Join Dr. Mattmann and I discussing Ai, Data, and Space this Thursday 8/14
body:
Please share with friends and family | | | [](https://v8k6.engage.squarespace-mail.com/r?m=689be07b7ed9b73bd14837f3&u=https%3A%2F%2Fwww.tropictundra.com%2F%3Fss_source%3Dsscampaigns%26ss_campaign_id%3D689bdfb5a561bc74dd9aafcd%26ss_email_id%3D689be07b7ed9b73bd14837f3%26ss_campaign_name%3DJoin%2BDr.%2BMattmann%2Band%2BI%2Bdiscussing%2BAi%252C%2BData%252C%2Band%2BSpace%2Bthis%2BThursday%2B8%252F14%2B%26ss_campaign_sent_date%3D2025-08-13T00%253A47%253A16Z&w=658ac75703428575b106784b&c=b_689bdfb5a561bc74dd9aafcd&l=en-US&s=7BTjWIbIwFFsr8-h0fawh-nmlMY%3D)
---
|
---
|
---
#### **Join Dr. Mattmann**[**@chrismattmann**](https://v8k6.engage.squarespace-mail.com/r?m=689be07b7ed9b73bd14837f3&u=https%3A%2F%2Fx.com%2Fchrismattmann&w=658ac75703428575b106784b&c=b_689bdfb5a561bc74dd9aafcd&l=en-US&s=p5waMkNmd0xZg9RVmHGBsLyeZNQ%3D)**and**[**@907Honest**](https://v8k6.engage.squarespace-mail.com/r?m=689be07b7ed9b73bd14837f3&u=https%3A%2F%2Fx.com%2F907Honest&w=658ac75703428575b106784b&c=b_689bdfb5a561bc74dd9aafcd&l=en-US&s=EGQCCow8sRdJPyVt4SvBvvUHIr8%3D)**discussing Ai, Data, and Space this Thursday 8/14 at 3pm PST or 2pm Alaska time. See more on his website**[**https://mattmann.ai**](https://v8k6.engage.squarespace-mail.com/r?m=689be07b7ed9b73bd14837f3&u=https%3A%2F%2Ft.co%2Fe7Ky2Sk5kv&w=658ac75703428575b106784b&c=b_689bdfb5a561bc74dd9aafcd&l=en-US&s=obxzfvdhqXrjfx221c-bCe233vg%3D)**Dr. Mattmann biography is extensive - Inaugural Chief Data and Artificial Intelligence Officer (CDAIO) at the University of California, Los Angeles (UCLA), a first of its kind position in the UC system. 24 years at**[**@NASAJPL**](https://v8k6.engage.squarespace-mail.com/r?m=689be07b7ed9b73bd14837f3&u=https%3A%2F%2Fx.com%2FNASAJPL&w=658ac75703428575b106784b&c=b_689bdfb5a561bc74dd9aafcd&l=en-US&s=veVtbfghO48cuOKCZDTX7GmDEAw%3D)**.**
#### **Principal scientist (first in the area of "Data Science") and internationally recognized expert in data science, cybersecurity, AI, informatics to multiple domains including Space Science, Earth and Planetary Science, and other industries. At JPL, conceived and architected and implemented the next generation of Earth Science ground data systems using open source and Apache software from 2005-2009. Delivered and operational on OCO/OCO2 and ACOS, NPP Sounder PEATE, SMAP and developed pipeline to infuse tech across NASA ROSES research ACCESS, AIST and other efforts.**
---
#### [**We will be meeting via X Spaces, here is a link to the Space**](https://v8k6.engage.squarespace-mail.com/r?m=689be07b7ed9b73bd14837f3&u=https%3A%2F%2Fx.com%2Fi%2Fspaces%2F1BdGYZjLdXQJX&w=658ac75703428575b106784b&c=b_689bdfb5a561bc74dd9aafcd&l=en-US&s=oToSuJbXesFdzpPFT3po-H1Hvq4%3D)
---
|
---
### **Alaska District 27: Anatomy of a Takedown**
---
### **The Decisive Factor: Party vs. Incumbent**
**David Eastman's landslide primary victory should have guaranteed his re-election. However, the Alaska GOP establishment intervened, prioritizing control over conservative principles and orchestrating an unprecedented takedown of their own incumbent.**
#### **Unprecedented Financial Intervention**
The Alaska GOP took the highly unusual step of giving $3,000 directly to Jubilee Underwood's campaign to be used against their own incumbent, David Eastman. This financial backing signaled a clear party-led effort to unseat him.
#### **Ideology Betrayed**
Eastman, holding a perfect 100% conservative rating, was cast aside. The party establishment labeled him "toxic" and a block to "party unity," effectively punishing the most ideologically-aligned conservative in the state legislature.
#### **Establishment Control Over Principles**
The party's actions reveal a prioritization of maintaining establishment control over supporting conservative principles. By backing a more compliant challenger, they ensured the removal of a dissenting voice, regardless of his conservative credentials.
#### **Ranked-Choice Voting as a Tool**
Ranked-Choice Voting (RCV) created the environment for this outcome. It allowed the establishment to back a single challenger without fear of splitting the vote, effectively weaponizing the system to sideline a principled dissenter and ensure a preferred outcome.
---
---
|
---
---
|
---
#### **America First Policy Institute Update**
---
**My first videos with AFPI are now sitting with their executives for approval. We are now taking my Anti-RCV Education to three additional States (Michigan, Minnesota, and Georgia). All of the videos we created to STOP RCV last year in Idaho, Oregon, Arizona, South Dakota, Nevada, and Colorado in 2024, we have now made available free of charge to AFPI, they will now be spending their own money pushing my content across the country. Targeting places where RCV is still being pushed.****My work with AFPI will produce RCV education to millions of people, I have RCV simulators that show in real time the election changes and the redistribution of votes. I explain each step so everyone can understand it. I have made these simulators available in 15 languages that are most used in each State. I am also going to be showing my movie about RCV “Frozen Odds” in multiple states next year at multiple events in each state.****My goal is simple, the complete and utter elimination of RCV in American Elections (Considering 17 States have banned it in 3 years and 7 states rejected it at the ballot in 2024, I would like to think we are on the right track).****I would like to thank all of my 6,000 newsletter subscribers, my nearly 10,000 followers on X, and my 6,400 followers on Linkedin for sharing my messages and helping me generate over 12 million views just on my X account in the last two years. I have also sent out over 650,000 emails from 2023-2025.**
---
**My partnership with America First Policy Institute has already grown beyond the initial scope. My original idea was to help in Michigan, now my work is going to be used in Michigan, Minnesota, and Georgia. Talk about Amazing, the multi-state collaboration and ability to bring my movie “Frozen Odds” to show all over the country all to stop the spread of RCV Ranked Choice Voting. Big thank you to all the supporters and followers, volunteers, and donors. I have taken upon myself to educate America about the dangers of RCV.****On top of this, one of my amazing newsletter subscribers donated a large sum of money to AFPI to support our efforts, I never asked for any money for this project, but AFPI is a 501(c)3 organization and our efforts will be under the education umbrella. If you would like to donate to them, here is their information. I am not affilated to them and I am not being paid in anyway by AFPI.**[**https://www.americafirstpolicy.com/**](https://v8k6.engage.squarespace-mail.com/r?m=689be07b7ed9b73bd14837f3&u=https%3A%2F%2Fwww.americafirstpolicy.com&w=658ac75703428575b106784b&c=b_689bdfb5a561bc74dd9aafcd&l=en-US&s=5QLY_JMzHTl_A24mIccHK5vAwvE%3D)**They have done amazing work in many states, I originally started working with them in Arizona fighting against RCV in 2023 and 2024. They specifically asked me to work with them on creating content and help distribute content across multiple states. Pretty amazing experience.****I want to extend a huge thank you to all the movie supporters, golden ticket holders, angel ticket holders, my petition volunteers, my volunteer leads that are spread across the whole state, and all the amazing people who voted on my repeal of RCV in 2024. I am just getting started and your funding of my movies, your time helping collect signatures, and your continued support have led us to this point. The point where we eliminate RCV from every state before they have a chance to even do a petition to get it. So far 17 states have banned RCV in 3 years, it took them 20+ years to get 2 states to use it. We are winning, keep up the pressure.**
---
---
|
---
**My organization Izon Education**[**@907Honest**](https://v8k6.engage.squarespace-mail.com/r?m=689be07b7ed9b73bd14837f3&u=https%3A%2F%2Fx.com%2F907Honest&w=658ac75703428575b106784b&c=b_689bdfb5a561bc74dd9aafcd&l=en-US&s=EGQCCow8sRdJPyVt4SvBvvUHIr8%3D)**are working on big educational projects with America First Policy Institute even to go as far as to fly me to DC for an interview.**[**@A1Policy**](https://v8k6.engage.squarespace-mail.com/r?m=689be07b7ed9b73bd14837f3&u=https%3A%2F%2Fx.com%2FA1Policy&w=658ac75703428575b106784b&c=b_689bdfb5a561bc74dd9aafcd&l=en-US&s=cBC5oXPPwTBIJ-CE7y1bQ7KKWWM%3D)**I am excited to collaborate and help educate Michigan about all the issues with Ranked Choice Voting. Including animated videos, RCV Election Simulators in 30+ languages, RCV guidebooks also in 30+ languages, both of my books ( free of charge and copyright free ) and so much more. Plan to show my movie “Frozen Odds” all over Michigan next year with the help of America First Policy Institute.**
---
---
|
---
**“Frozen Odds” and “The Permanent Short” are both on schedule, plan to release a short version of “Frozen Odds” next month and “The Permanent Short” will come out in October when the PFD is deposited.**
---
**“Frozen Odds” has expanded beyond Alaska, it will now be a series about America’s fight against RCV, with filming taking place in each state with the people who faced RCV. Currently Michigan is facing an RCV ballot measure aimed at 2026, I have partnered with multiple national organizations to make sure “Frozen Odds” will be shown to thousands of people in 2025 and 2026. Alaska’s message is powerful and I am thankful for all the people who have contributed to take this film to this stage.**
---
---
|
---
## **907Honest** **=** **Tropic Tundra**
---

---
### **Breaking: Court deals final blow to Kendall lawsuit over ranked-choice voting repeal petition**
---
---
| [](https://v8k6.engage.squarespace-mail.com/r?m=689be07b7ed9b73bd14837f3&u=https%3A%2F%2Fmustreadalaska.com%2Fbreaking-court-deals-final-blow-to-kendall-lawsuit-over-ranked-choice-voting-repeal-petition%2F&w=658ac75703428575b106784b&c=b_689bdfb5a561bc74dd9aafcd&l=en-US&s=WR3xKqLNwvVYpXNhyAo0M_NzbfI%3D)
---
**A short explanation of the court win above, this case was decided last September 2024, but the Supreme Court ruling in our favor at the time, said the final order would come at a later time. That happened at the end of June. More to Come this week.**
---
### The Fight for Fair Elections: A Personal Mission
When I began the effort to repeal Ranked Choice Voting (RCV) in Alaska, I knew it would be a challenge. But I was determined not to let our electoral process be twisted into a confusing system that leaves voters disempowered.My commitment went beyond Alaska. I wrote **three books** and created a **30-part animated video series** to expose the truth about RCV, distributing thousands of copies and making the videos free nationwide. I've also spent countless hours collaborating with grassroots leaders across the country, helping establish organizations now fighting RCV. My websites, **RCValert.org** and **RemoveRCV.com** , offer years of research, resources, and tools like RCV Election Simulators.This fight is personal. My own grandfather, a wise and hardworking man, couldn't understand the ranked choice ballot. If someone with his common sense was confused, I knew there was a fundamental flaw. That moment spurred me to draft Alaska's repeal initiative.We didn't have billionaire funding or political party backing. What we had was unwavering determination and the support of over **700 dedicated Alaskan volunteers**. We knocked on doors, braved the cold, and gathered over **42,000 signatures** —far exceeding the requirement—all without help from political insiders.I've also traveled nationwide, warning states like Idaho, Oregon, Arizona, and Florida about RCV's manipulative nature, funded by out-of-state billionaires.As expected, the political establishment fought us. The attorney who brought RCV to Alaska even sued to prevent our repeal initiative from appearing on the ballot. But we prevailed in both the Alaska Superior Court and the Alaska Supreme Court. They outspent us by a staggering **one hundred to one** , with millions flowing in from out-of-state organizations like Unite America and the Sixteen Thirty Fund, supported by figures like George Soros and Hansjorg Wyss.On Election Day, I was immensely proud. Not only had I fought RCV in Alaska for years, but seven other states where I'd been active decisively rejected it. Those rejections alone cost the pro-RCV lobby nearly **$150 million** between 2020 and 2024. Here in Alaska, despite our small population, it took nearly three weeks to get election results—a clear example of RCV's confusion and delay.Our repeal effort in Alaska came agonizingly close, falling short by just 743 votes after nearly three weeks of counting. But my resolve is unbroken. This fight is a warning to the entire country. We must maintain simple, clear, and honest elections, demanding voter ID and keeping out-of-state special interests out.I am incredibly proud of what we achieved in Alaska. We showed the nation what ordinary, hardworking people can accomplish when they stand firm. The fight isn't over—not in Alaska, and not anywhere freedom-loving Americans call home.**Stand with us! Let's protect our elections for Alaska and for America.**
---

|

**Exciting News, My team and I have been hired to manage and deliver the Eaglexit project for Eagle River and Chugiak. The objective is to break Eagle River and Chugiak into their own borough.****The phase approach is:****1\. Education / Volunteer Training / Building****2\. Gather signatures for Petition / Education****3\. GOTV (Get Out The Vote) / Education****Our team at**[**http://PetitionEngine.com**](https://v8k6.engage.squarespace-mail.com/r?m=689be07b7ed9b73bd14837f3&u=https%3A%2F%2Ft.co%2Fq3ow7fFBOA&w=658ac75703428575b106784b&c=b_689bdfb5a561bc74dd9aafcd&l=en-US&s=5-vbafXNHRQuFYUh4RTi5lDIn_I%3D)**, is proud to manage and deliver the full-scale rollout of Eaglexit for Eagle River and Chugiak. Let’s make history.**[**https://eaglexit.com**](https://v8k6.engage.squarespace-mail.com/r?m=689be07b7ed9b73bd14837f3&u=https%3A%2F%2Ft.co%2FCwYOkRQoPB&w=658ac75703428575b106784b&c=b_689bdfb5a561bc74dd9aafcd&l=en-US&s=w2pCeRskF3GH0hr4yyX4UIw3Gag%3D)

Targeting places where RCV is still being pushed.My work with AFPI will produce RCV education to millions of people, I have RCV simulators that show in real time the election changes and the redistribution of votes. I explain each step so everyone can understand it. I have made these simulators available in 15 languages that are most used in each State. I am also going to be showing my movie about RCV “Frozen Odds” in multiple states next year at multiple events in each state.My goal is simple, the complete and utter elimination of RCV in American Elections (Considering 17 States have banned it in 3 years and 7 states rejected it at the ballot in 2024, I would like to think we are on the right track).I would like to thank all of my 6,000 newsletter subscribers, my nearly 10,000 followers on X, and my 6,400 followers on Linkedin for sharing my messages and helping me generate over 12 million views just on my X account in the last two years. I have also sent out over 650,000 emails from 2023-2025. My partnership with America First Policy Institute has already grown beyond the initial scope. My original idea was to help in Michigan, now my work is going to be used in Michigan, Minnesota, and Georgia. Talk about Amazing, the multi-state collaboration and ability to bring my movie “Frozen Odds” to show all over the country all to stop the spread of RCV Ranked Choice Voting. Big thank you to all the supporters and followers, volunteers, and donors. I have taken upon myself to educate America about the dangers of RCV.On top of this, one of my amazing newsletter subscribers donated a large sum of money to AFPI to support our efforts, I never asked for any money for this project, but AFPI is a 501(c)3 organization and our efforts will be under the education umbrella. If you would like to donate to them, here is their information. I am not affilated to them and I am not being paid in anyway by AFPI. have done amazing work in many states, I originally started working with them in Arizona fighting against RCV in 2023 and 2024. They specifically asked me to work with them on creating content and help distribute content across multiple states. Pretty amazing experience.I want to extend a huge thank you to all the movie supporters, golden ticket holders, angel ticket holders, my petition volunteers, my volunteer leads that are spread across the whole state, and all the amazing people who voted on my repeal of RCV in 2024. I am just getting started and your funding of my movies, your time helping collect signatures, and your continued support have led us to this point. The point where we eliminate RCV from every state before they have a chance to even do a petition to get it. So far 17 states have banned RCV in 3 years, it took them 20+ years to get 2 states to use it. We are winning, keep up the pressure. | My organization Izon Education working on big educational projects with America First Policy Institute even to go as far as to fly me to DC for an interview. am excited to collaborate and help educate Michigan about all the issues with Ranked Choice Voting. Including animated videos, RCV Election Simulators in 30+ languages, RCV guidebooks also in 30+ languages, both of my books ( free of charge and copyright free ) and so much more. Plan to show my movie “Frozen Odds” all over Michigan next year with the help of America First Policy Institute. | “Frozen Odds” and “The Permanent Short” are both on schedule, plan to release a short version of “Frozen Odds” next month and “The Permanent Short” will come out in October when the PFD is deposited. “Frozen Odds” has expanded beyond Alaska, it will now be a series about America’s fight against RCV, with filming taking place in each state with the people who faced RCV. Currently Michigan is facing an RCV ballot measure aimed at 2026, I have partnered with multiple national organizations to make sure “Frozen Odds” will be shown to thousands of people in 2025 and 2026. Alaska’s message is powerful and I am thankful for all the people who have contributed to take this film to this stage. | 907Honest = Tropic Tundra | Breaking: Court deals final blow to Kendall lawsuit over ranked-choice voting repeal petition | A short explanation of the court win above, this case was decided last September 2024, but the Supreme Court ruling in our favor at the time, said the final order would come at a later time. That happened at the end of June. More to Come this week. The Fight for Fair Elections: A Personal Mission When I began the effort to repeal Ranked Choice Voting (RCV) in Alaska, I knew it would be a challenge. But I was determined not to let our electoral process be twisted into a confusing system that leaves voters disempowered.My commitment went beyond Alaska. I wrote three books and created a 30-part animated video series to expose the truth about RCV, distributing thousands of copies and making the videos free nationwide. I've also spent countless hours collaborating with grassroots leaders across the country, helping establish organizations now fighting RCV. My websites, RCValert.org and RemoveRCV.com , offer years of research, resources, and tools like RCV Election Simulators.This fight is personal. My own grandfather, a wise and hardworking man, couldn't understand the ranked choice ballot. If someone with his common sense was confused, I knew there was a fundamental flaw. That moment spurred me to draft Alaska's repeal initiative.We didn't have billionaire funding or political party backing. What we had was unwavering determination and the support of over 700 dedicated Alaskan volunteers. We knocked on doors, braved the cold, and gathered over 42,000 signatures —far exceeding the requirement—all without help from political insiders.I've also traveled nationwide, warning states like Idaho, Oregon, Arizona, and Florida about RCV's manipulative nature, funded by out-of-state billionaires.As expected, the political establishment fought us. The attorney who brought RCV to Alaska even sued to prevent our repeal initiative from appearing on the ballot. But we prevailed in both the Alaska Superior Court and the Alaska Supreme Court. They outspent us by a staggering one hundred to one , with millions flowing in from out-of-state organizations like Unite America and the Sixteen Thirty Fund, supported by figures like George Soros and Hansjorg Wyss.On Election Day, I was immensely proud. Not only had I fought RCV in Alaska for years, but seven other states where I'd been active decisively rejected it. Those rejections alone cost the pro-RCV lobby nearly $150 million between 2020 and 2024. Here in Alaska, despite our small population, it took nearly three weeks to get election results—a clear example of RCV's confusion and delay.Our repeal effort in Alaska came agonizingly close, falling short by just 743 votes after nearly three weeks of counting. But my resolve is unbroken. This fight is a warning to the entire country. We must maintain simple, clear, and honest elections, demanding voter ID and keeping out-of-state special interests out.I am incredibly proud of what we achieved in Alaska. We showed the nation what ordinary, hardworking people can accomplish when they stand firm. The fight isn't over—not in Alaska, and not anywhere freedom-loving Americans call home.Stand with us! Let's protect our elections for Alaska and for America. More News | Exciting News, My team and I have been hired to manage and deliver the Eaglexit project for Eagle River and Chugiak. The objective is to break Eagle River and Chugiak into their own borough.The phase approach is:1\. Education / Volunteer Training / Building2\. Gather signatures for Petition / Education3\. GOTV (Get Out The Vote) / EducationOur team at, is proud to manage and deliver the full-scale rollout of Eaglexit for Eagle River and Chugiak. Let’s make history. | | Phil Izon 12110 Business Blvd Ste 6 PMB 113 Eagle River United States | ---|---

name: Team Pramila
subject: We’re SO CLOSE to buying 100 backpacks for Seattle kids!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Pramila for Congress
body:
Last week we announced a goal of buying 100 backpacks for kids in need across Seattle as they prepare to head back to school.
#
Hey Peter, Team Pramila here with one final update on our back-to-school drive!
[](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/pj-email-20250812-2?refcode=em20250812-5331&amount=3&refcode2=5331_420207_-G8W1O&akid=5331%2E420207%2E-G8W1O)
_Team Pramila sorting supplies and packing bags with FamilyWorks!_
Last week, we announced a goal of buying 100 backpacks for kids in need across Seattle as they prepare to head back to school. At $50 per bag, that means we need to raise $5,000 to make it happen.
**So far we’ve raised $4,368 with the help of this grassroots community, which means we’re just $632 away from reaching our goal.**
[**Can we count on you to pitch in $3 or whatever you can so we can buy the last dozen backpacks we need to reach 100?**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/pj-email-20250812-2?refcode=em20250812-5331&amount=3&refcode2=5331_420207_-G8W1O&akid=5331%2E420207%2E-G8W1O)
Every dollar you donate to this email will go straight to buying critical school supplies for kids in need.
**[Contribute](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/pj-email-20250812-2?amount=3&refcode=em20250812-5331&refcode2=5331_420207_-G8W1O&akid=5331%2E420207%2E-G8W1O)**
Thank you so much for helping to make this happen!
— Team Pramila

---
[](https://www.facebook.com/pramila.jayapal) | [](https://twitter.com/pramilajayapal) | [](https://www.instagram.com/pramilajayapal/)
Email us: info@pramilaforcongress.com
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way we keep in touch with people like you, and small-dollar contributions sustain our movement for transformative change. To contribute by check, please address to Pramila for Congress, PO Box 21912, Seattle, WA 98111.

* [Update My Personal Information](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/signup/did-your-info-change/?t=1&akid=5331%2E420207%2E-G8W1O)
* [Unsubscribe](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=2&akid=5331%2E420207%2E-G8W1O)

| Hi there, We are California Strong because we stand together — united by our shared values of justice, equality, opportunity, and resilience. _Here’s what that means in action:_ **We create opportunity for everyone** : Powering our economy with good-paying jobs and fighting for a California where success isn’t just for the wealthy or well-connected few. **We protect the services people rely on** : This ranges from Social Security and Medicare to veterans’ benefits and public education. While Trump and Republicans slash essential benefits in their Big Ugly Bill, we keep up the fight. **We defend democracy and freedom** : Including reproductive rights, the right to vote, and the right to live free from discrimination. _And every time these values are under attack, California Democrats refuse to agonize, we organize._ Because when we organize and fight for our values, we win. That’s what makes us California Strong. But listen, there are hard costs associated with all of our programs. _That’s why part of being California Strong also involves fueling our movement with grassroots support from people like you._ **[Will you chip in today to power the California Democratic Party’s work to defend our values and flip the U.S. House? clean_body: California Democrats refuse to agonize, we organize. | = | Hi there, We are California Strong because we stand together — united by our shared values of justice, equality, opportunity, and resilience. Here’s what that means in action: We create opportunity for everyone : Powering our economy with good-paying jobs and fighting for a California where success isn’t just for the wealthy or well-connected few. We protect the services people rely on : This ranges from Social Security and Medicare to veterans’ benefits and public education. While Trump and Republicans slash essential benefits in their Big Ugly Bill, we keep up the fight. We defend democracy and freedom : Including reproductive rights, the right to vote, and the right to live free from discrimination. And every time these values are under attack, California Democrats refuse to agonize, we organize. Because when we organize and fight for our values, we win. That’s what makes us California Strong. But listen, there are hard costs associated with all of our programs. That’s why part of being California Strong also involves fueling our movement with grassroots support from people like you. = = = = = = Thank you! \- CADEM | | = Our Democratic leaders are working hard to make California a better place to live. From fighting for good-paying jobs, combating climate change, to expanding healthcare access so all Californians can lead safe, healthy, prosperous lives — California’s Democratic leaders turn progressive ideas into meaningful action. **“Texas Democrats to return home for second special session, ABC13 sources confirm,”** via KTRK**** \-- "ABC13 has confirmed with multiple sources that House Democrats will return to Texas.

Eyewitness News has not confirmed the date, but we do know that Democrats believe they've accomplished their mission by killing the first special session and by raising national awareness about the mid-decade redistricting effort.
[Give a gift subscription](https://link.mail.beehiiv.com/ss/c/u001.I1SrFegGmlMGz_iuURJ4UFjICob-V1zboA41Sv859QUcSg1ysvDqFwz1PIx0N4YM/4j0/vDM1LvF6S_2bvu2aS4UaNw/h13/h001.yPcKqfg7CynRVLPy2WoWiRFEsv-APgacmLagcNWw17w)
It is unclear which day they will be in Austin at the Capitol, but they stress that they will push for Hill Country flooding relief to be the priority.

This comes as the House went another session without a quorum on Tuesday, with just 95 members present for the second day in a row. Texas House Speaker **Dustin Burrows** said that assuming there is no quorum on Friday, the session will end, and a new one will begin.

Hours later, the Senate actually passed a new map that benefits Republicans ahead of the 2026 midterm elections. It's the same map that passed out of committee in the House and precipitated more than 50 House Democrats to break quorum.

Democrats in the Senate walked out in protest, but a quorum remained. Sources told ABC13 that Senate Democrats will not break quorum." Eyewitness News has not confirmed the date, but we do know that Democrats believe they've accomplished their mission by killing the first special session and by raising national awareness about the mid-decade redistricting effort. It is unclear which day they will be in Austin at the Capitol, but they stress that they will push for Hill Country flooding relief to be the priority. This comes as the House went another session without a quorum on Tuesday, with just 95 members present for the second day in a row. Texas House Speaker Dustin Burrows said that assuming there is no quorum on Friday, the session will end, and a new one will begin. Hours later, the Senate actually passed a new map that benefits Republicans ahead of the 2026 midterm elections. It's the same map that passed out of committee in the House and precipitated more than 50 House Democrats to break quorum. Democrats in the Senate walked out in protest, but a quorum remained. Sources told ABC13 that Senate Democrats will not break quorum." | FREE SUBSCRIPTIONS HAVE ENDED : As of July 11, 2022, we have moved to a paywall for free subscribers. name: GOP Presidential
subject: These Are The Rolls-Royce Of Hearing Aids (And Under $100)
body:
Shoppers are going nuts over these low cost hearing aids that are virtually invisible. Discover how these affordable hearing aids are changing the lives of people everyday.

| With New Wireless Charging Hearing Aids now priced under **$100,** old time hearing aid retail stores are furious!
---
[](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2z9ug1jgl74cq07vjd1o8poee62qhsrhhqpr7bll8_rp22sh2s8i6epb5c1jm9oj6cph2bs)
| The biggest names in retail hearing aids like Miracle Ear, Siemens and Oticon have been around for nearly 100 years. And their outdated retail model, and outrageous pricing game has largely stayed the same -- and gone on for too long consumers say. Especially in tough economic times, people no longer can, or want, to pay $5,000 to $10,000 for hearing aids that you can get for $100 -- offering the same crisp, clear hearing, and even wireless charging. Not to mention, traditional, old fashioned hearing aid companies require customers to make an appointment to visit a hearing aid retail center in order to get what they need at sky high prices. But now, one company has disrupted the hearing aid industry and ushered in a New Era of Hearing Aids with a way to get high-quality hearing aids with NO visit, and without spending thousands of dollars. [Oricle](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zrathi7kc4akb45jtqte031oonplurgmgi6geml0_rp22sh2s8i6epb5c1jm9oj6cph2bs) Hearing's goal was to merge quality with affordability in the world of hearing aids. And to help people discover the joy of clear conversations without the hefty price tag.
---
| [](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zec2dvmvd73cts9hi1jtgfaknud7aebt49veoeig_rp22sh2s8i6epb5c1jm9oj6cph2bs) | | People often ask if $100 hearing aids can really be as good as $5,000 prescription hearing aids. An Oricle spokesman said, "Our hearing aids don't have all the bells and whistles of $5,000 hearing aids, but they DO provide all the features you NEED to improve your hearing. And they cost 95% less than prescription hearing aids. But best of all, they work WELL for our 150,000+ customers. And if anyone doesn't like them, they can return them for a refund." [Oricle](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zhoqcnv3l7ennfnjpjbv88h9ubf9263egm8ak2mo_rp22sh2s8i6epb5c1jm9oj6cph2bs) now has a reputation for unrivaled sound excellence along with something new, convenient and fast USB wireless charging. So you can charge them at home, in the car, on a plane or anywhere you need some more battery life. And [Oricle](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2z9k3enrbogjgpncf4l1jalmbtslvbrqcpfs7qa3g_rp22sh2s8i6epb5c1jm9oj6cph2bs) hearing aids have an impressive, fast-charging, 20-hour, all-day battery life so most people simply choose to charge them at night while they sleep. That way, they never run out of sound and avoid "battery life anxiety." With [Oricle's](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zk5p6vm77lgpnnr2v7pjn3dep28d3r891c2ofbe0_rp22sh2s8i6epb5c1jm9oj6cph2bs) revolutionary technology, anyone who needs hearing help can rediscover the joy of hearing every word with perfect clarity. Thanks to their advanced capabilities, [Oricle](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2za1k28eqobsuq4ihajdf1ruc251l1e1s07htk6o8_rp22sh2s8i6epb5c1jm9oj6cph2bs) users can now have consistent and superior audio clarity. And there's no need for a doctor or hearing test to hear every word in unmatched comfort. Here is what some of the hundreds of thousands of people say who have used [Oricle](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zmkvm8e25843mbe88hv4m40j2lgukkv42gjbkr68_rp22sh2s8i6epb5c1jm9oj6cph2bs) Hearing Aids, and can now hear again without spending thousands of dollars: "I'm so grateful! I got tired of hearing loved ones telling me to talk louder, I said that's it we're buying these! A miracle I tell you. They are as good as any of her friends $2000+ hearing aids. Now she tells me I talk too loud and says she can hear me just fine. She is happy and I am relieved! Even if you can afford the big priced hearing aids, you have to try these!" - Sarah Smith "This is the best hearing aid for the money. I was skeptical because of the low price. I had misplaced my other set I got from Costco for $2500. So I decided to give these a try in hopes I would find my lost Costco set. After using the Oricle set, they are so much better! Even if I find my Costco set, I'll never use them again." - Ryan Miller "Outstanding hearing aid value (It's about time!) My wife says these are comparable to her behind- the-ear hearing aids of which she lost 3 sets. Because she wears a hat most of the time as well as glasses, she continually knocks them off so she stopped wearing them because of the hassle and expense of losing them as well as the batteries always having to be replaced." - Keith Williams
---

Their patented, comfortable design is as small as possible, while keeping the best sound quality -- To fit any ear size. And [Oricle](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2z63cc59tbta7vdbeqeu25s0omc29b7jr226bn9hg_rp22sh2s8i6epb5c1jm9oj6cph2bs) hearing aids ship fast from their U.S.-based location in Tampa, Florida. Right now, [Oricle](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2z28g588eemmvjgrmg7eflvsgu43q3d3bm71srvr8_rp22sh2s8i6epb5c1jm9oj6cph2bs) is offering a huge, limited-time promotional discount for their wireless charging hearing aids. This promotion is only for a limited time, and regular prices will return once the current inventory runs out. You can only get the [Oricle](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zk82fiatkmb5236u27mkkn5ked5rv5m4hg11dodg_rp22sh2s8i6epb5c1jm9oj6cph2bs) Hearing Aids online, and not in stores. They ship from the U.S. so you'll get your order fast. And the online reviews are amazing. Most people have nothing but great things to say about them. Which gives people confidence in buying them, knowing they aren't going to break after a week. [Oricle](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zgmml48vpg9bk6h0miggvsu5hadrjkr8ihulrd6g_rp22sh2s8i6epb5c1jm9oj6cph2bs) is so confident in their product that they offer a 30-day money back guarantee. So anyone who doesn't absolutely love them, can simply send them for a full refund. With high demand, supplies are limited. name: Hillsdale College via Your America News
subject: Now Available: “Supply-Side Economics and American Prosperity with Arthur Laffer”
body:
I am excited to announce that Hillsdale’s online teaching series, “Supply-Side Economics and American Prosperity with Arthur Laffer,” is now available to own as a DVD box set.

This sponsored message from Your America News is on behalf of Hillsdale College
| | | [](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2zaih0adsr24mstdck4nfj7ba8t61e5pkt9n4qav0_rp22sh2s8i6epb5c1jm9oj1c1h2bs)
---
| | [](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2z4scv4jsu65intj4v51hc8miurqhu68sg3vk0ij8_rp22sh2s8i6epb5c1jm9oj1c1h2bs) Dear Fellow American,

I am excited to announce that Hillsdale's online teaching series, ["Supply-Side Economics and American Prosperity with Arthur Laffer,"](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2ze22iphh5nuv8bea32ul9es89b4505hir1vac04o_rp22sh2s8i6epb5c1jm9oj1c1h2bs) is now available to own as a DVD box set.

In this series, you will discover how taxation, regulation, money, government spending, and trade influence our decisions and impact our lives. Joined by Steve Forbes, Stephen Moore, Larry Kudlow, Amity Shlaes, Brian Domitrovic, and Larry P. Arnn, Dr. Laffer explains how supply-side economics holds the key to unleashing American prosperity once again.

But we need the support of citizens like you to promote this series to millions of Americans along with our other nationwide outreach.

Will you partner with us to promote this free online teaching series from Hillsdale College and expand other educational outreach efforts on behalf of liberty? Your tax-deductible donation will help us to enroll thousands of Americans in this series.

And for a donation of $100 or more, we will send you this beautiful DVD box set of "Supply-Side Economics and American Prosperity with Arthur Laffer."

**To help support this course and get your copy of "Supply-Side Economics and American Prosperity with Arthur Laffer" on DVD, click the link below:**

[https://secured.hillsdale.edu/hillsdale/supply-side-economics-support-dvd](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2zl33tt9kf78t1entj7jg6u9ulunvmjpic06638i8_rp22sh2s8i6epb5c1jm9oj1c1h2bs)

I hope you enjoy this teaching series. Thank you for your support.

Warm Regards,

Jeremiah Regan, Ph.D.
Executive Director of Online Learning
Hillsdale College
---
| |
---

Pop Acta Media | Your America
---

But we need the support of citizens like you to promote this series to millions of Americans along with our other nationwide outreach. Will you partner with us to promote this free online teaching series from Hillsdale College and expand other educational outreach efforts on behalf of liberty? Your tax-deductible donation will help us to enroll thousands of Americans in this series. And for a donation of $100 or more, we will send you this beautiful DVD box set of "Supply-Side Economics and American Prosperity with Arthur Laffer." To help support this course and get your copy of "Supply-Side Economics and American Prosperity with Arthur Laffer" on DVD, click the link below: I hope you enjoy this teaching series. Thank you for your support. Warm Regards, Jeremiah Regan, Ph.D. Executive Director of Online Learning Hillsdale College | | Pop Acta Media | Your America PO Box 461 Fort Collins, CO 80522 |

name: American Action News
subject: These Are The Rolls-Royce Of Hearing Aids (And Under $100)
body:
Shoppers are going nuts over these low cost hearing aids that are virtually invisible. Discover how these affordable hearing aids are changing the lives of people everyday.

| With New Wireless Charging Hearing Aids now priced under **$100,** old time hearing aid retail stores are furious!
---
[](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z13iprp48c29oio8nqtskoibd3dom0qjp28sniv8_rp22sh2s8i6epb5c1ge0p32c5h2bs)
| The biggest names in retail hearing aids like Miracle Ear, Siemens and Oticon have been around for nearly 100 years. And their outdated retail model, and outrageous pricing game has largely stayed the same -- and gone on for too long consumers say. Especially in tough economic times, people no longer can, or want, to pay $5,000 to $10,000 for hearing aids that you can get for $100 -- offering the same crisp, clear hearing, and even wireless charging. Not to mention, traditional, old fashioned hearing aid companies require customers to make an appointment to visit a hearing aid retail center in order to get what they need at sky high prices. But now, one company has disrupted the hearing aid industry and ushered in a New Era of Hearing Aids with a way to get high-quality hearing aids with NO visit, and without spending thousands of dollars. [Oricle](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zfm9hi4nbkbihkhl3gufchpk96vrhtdbcng8fkpo_rp22sh2s8i6epb5c1ge0p32c5h2bs) Hearing's goal was to merge quality with affordability in the world of hearing aids. And to help people discover the joy of clear conversations without the hefty price tag.
---
| [](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z73lf03hqj10aacnval6gkmp66fkgv7d3che73r0_rp22sh2s8i6epb5c1ge0p32c5h2bs) | | People often ask if $100 hearing aids can really be as good as $5,000 prescription hearing aids. An Oricle spokesman said, "Our hearing aids don't have all the bells and whistles of $5,000 hearing aids, but they DO provide all the features you NEED to improve your hearing. And they cost 95% less than prescription hearing aids. But best of all, they work WELL for our 150,000+ customers. And if anyone doesn't like them, they can return them for a refund." [Oricle](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zh1k42d9vmve8jrsnq8kedbj3roiddh5guchddc8_rp22sh2s8i6epb5c1ge0p32c5h2bs) now has a reputation for unrivaled sound excellence along with something new, convenient and fast USB wireless charging. So you can charge them at home, in the car, on a plane or anywhere you need some more battery life. And [Oricle](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z0k4p5ihj7vojc4punv33f0sbq8phppco32dqm4g_rp22sh2s8i6epb5c1ge0p32c5h2bs) hearing aids have an impressive, fast-charging, 20-hour, all-day battery life so most people simply choose to charge them at night while they sleep. That way, they never run out of sound and avoid "battery life anxiety." With [Oricle's](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zl50sr5f6594h5u3g9ik0t7trje4onnsum48vi08_rp22sh2s8i6epb5c1ge0p32c5h2bs) revolutionary technology, anyone who needs hearing help can rediscover the joy of hearing every word with perfect clarity. Thanks to their advanced capabilities, [Oricle](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z3ej2lqetob779rkhaiilbto0qssj88mu7c1te18_rp22sh2s8i6epb5c1ge0p32c5h2bs) users can now have consistent and superior audio clarity. And there's no need for a doctor or hearing test to hear every word in unmatched comfort. Here is what some of the hundreds of thousands of people say who have used [Oricle](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zltrp9ad3bc736r1325p1tcj2ppttmmr9aha8fl0_rp22sh2s8i6epb5c1ge0p32c5h2bs) Hearing Aids, and can now hear again without spending thousands of dollars: "I'm so grateful! I got tired of hearing loved ones telling me to talk louder, I said that's it we're buying these! A miracle I tell you. They are as good as any of her friends $2000+ hearing aids. Now she tells me I talk too loud and says she can hear me just fine. She is happy and I am relieved! Even if you can afford the big priced hearing aids, you have to try these!" - Sarah Smith "This is the best hearing aid for the money. I was skeptical because of the low price. I had misplaced my other set I got from Costco for $2500. So I decided to give these a try in hopes I would find my lost Costco set. After using the Oricle set, they are so much better! Even if I find my Costco set, I'll never use them again." - Ryan Miller "Outstanding hearing aid value (It's about time!) My wife says these are comparable to her behind- the-ear hearing aids of which she lost 3 sets. Because she wears a hat most of the time as well as glasses, she continually knocks them off so she stopped wearing them because of the hassle and expense of losing them as well as the batteries always having to be replaced." - Keith Williams
---
[](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z9h4mu9lg8kl65sja2knb2g4sq2s0362pdo6hgpg_rp22sh2s8i6epb5c1ge0p32c5h2bs)

| [Oricle](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2za1h0l1oelvfu1hf4sjqriomfuv3t8i3hcgai098_rp22sh2s8i6epb5c1ge0p32c5h2bs) now offers something giant hearing aid companies cannot, better affordable hearing in seconds. Advanced [Oricle](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z1adr94n2baujq2ejo2kak5kfqc5n86mba0pgpeo_rp22sh2s8i6epb5c1ge0p32c5h2bs) engineering offers people who need a hearing boost a lifetime of better hearing with advanced features like ... Perfect Volume Tuning ... Premium Sound ... Superior [Oricle](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zdugkkut12bpsgd358fkosumdtls9alhhh81ddno_rp22sh2s8i6epb5c1ge0p32c5h2bs) Chip Technology ... and Comfortable Fit Wear. Their patented, comfortable design is as small as possible, while keeping the best sound quality -- To fit any ear size. And [Oricle](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z53ap1n8qqsdc87cj8q02bfcafge7q0hcpbnf05g_rp22sh2s8i6epb5c1ge0p32c5h2bs) hearing aids ship fast from their U.S.-based location in Tampa, Florida. Right now, [Oricle](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z6a03kkb1i690hl3qjg4kemcgrje17n9pcg0vhlg_rp22sh2s8i6epb5c1ge0p32c5h2bs) is offering a huge, limited-time promotional discount for their wireless charging hearing aids. This promotion is only for a limited time, and regular prices will return once the current inventory runs out. It's important to know that there are many cheap knock offs that looks like the [Oricle](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z6v49dgpkv9ft8el2g18ajligba14munmvci8d90_rp22sh2s8i6epb5c1ge0p32c5h2bs) Hearing Aids, or promise performance and hearing quality, but can't back it up. You can only get the [Oricle](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z31kb14nqjob2kelkg0in2psig1st62ih5h8ltd0_rp22sh2s8i6epb5c1ge0p32c5h2bs) Hearing Aids online, and not in stores. They ship from the U.S. so you'll get your order fast. And the online reviews are amazing. Most people have nothing but great things to say about them. Which gives people confidence in buying them, knowing they aren't going to break after a week. [Oricle](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zgfr3lecg5nqk2de0k7v95vt0u82h82u83dc8kro_rp22sh2s8i6epb5c1ge0p32c5h2bs) is so confident in their product that they offer a 30-day money back guarantee. So anyone who doesn't absolutely love them, can simply send them for a full refund. With high demand, supplies are limited. This offer won't last for long, so be sure to follow the link below to claim your NOW before supplies run out. [Try yours today! ](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zebv1v085h4a69ohha4jsagh24mm3in7r6894120_rp22sh2s8i6epb5c1ge0p32c5h2bs)
---

# **[Wisconsin woman flies overseas to meet love interest, later plots to assassinate his rival — and international manhunt begins](http://trk.libertyledger._i6OXnPLCEh5vUF5pe5LlA)**
---
Aimee Betro — a 45-year-old from West Allis, Wisconsin — in September 2018 met a 31-year-old British man who used the name "Dr. Ice" on a dating app, according to the Daily Mail.Betro traveled to London on Christmas Day 2018, where she met that man — Mohammed Nazir — and reportedly spent a night with him. While Betro left the U.K. and returned to the United States, the pair continued to communicate.'Where are you hiding? Stop playing hide and seek, you are lucky it jammed.'Betro returned to Great Britain in August 2019, according to reports.
[**Read More**](http://trk.libertyledger._i6OXnPLCEh5vUF5pe5LlA)

[](https://republicanpartyofwisconsin.cmail19.com/t/y-l-qttbjk-didthutlhu-r/) Patriot, Today is National Poll Worker Recruitment Day, and we need YOUR help ensuring safe and secure elections! With the 2026 midterm elections looming and ongoing concerns about election administration, we must build an even stronger network of trained poll workers who can monitor processes, verify procedures, and protect against potential fraud or mismanagement. However, these efforts require resources--training programs, outreach materials, and support for volunteers--that we can't sustain without the generous contributions of supporters like YOU. [DONATE NOW TO SECURE OUR ELECTIONS](https://republicanpartyofwisconsin.cmail19.com/t/y-l-qttbjk-didthutlhu-y/) Ensuring the integrity of our elections is paramount to preserving our democracy, and poll workers are the frontline defenders in that effort.**Your[donation today](https://republicanpartyofwisconsin.cmail19.com/t/y-l-qttbjk-didthutlhu-j/) will directly fund our Election Integrity initiatives,** equipping more Wisconsinites to stand on the front lines of election integrity. Whether it's $25 to cover training materials for one volunteer, $50 to support local outreach events, or $100 to expand our network statewide, every contribution makes a difference in defending our republic.Together, we can ensure that Wisconsin's elections remain secure and that Republican values prevail.Thank you for your unwavering support and commitment to our cause.

-Team WisGOPP.S. Every dollar counts in the fight for safe and secure elections. # Elon Musk Warns of America’s $36 Trillion Dollar Debt Bomb
# The system is crumbling, protect your wealth or suffer the fallout.
---
Elon Musk has avoided two major financial crises before. He pulled Tesla and SpaceX back from the brink of collapse and built two of the most valuable companies in history.

Now, he’s sounding the alarm about America’s $36 trillion debt time bomb that could destroy the fabric of our society.

While head of the Department of Government Efficiency (DOGE) under President Trump, Musk exposed just how bad things are:

✅ Runaway government spending has pushed national debt to unsustainable levels
✅ The Federal Reserve’s rate hikes are squeezing the economy, making inflation irreversible
✅ The stock market is on shaky ground, putting traditional 401(k)s, IRAs, and TSPs at risk

With Trump back in charge, major spending cuts are coming. While necessary, these cuts may send shockwaves through Wall Street, creating unpredictable market turbulence.

That’s why financial elites aren’t waiting to react, they're moving their wealth now.

For the everyday American who’s worked hard to build their nest egg, Trump preserved a IRS loophole that allows you to protect your retirement savings before billions in American wealth are lost.

name: Hillsdale College via American Action News
subject: Now Available: “Supply-Side Economics and American Prosperity with Arthur Laffer”
body:
I am excited to announce that Hillsdale’s online teaching series, “Supply-Side Economics and American Prosperity with Arthur Laffer,” is now available to own as a DVD box set.

This sponsored message from American Action News is on behalf of Hillsdale College
| | | [](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z81icfovro7o0iiapkghe2vs1a2a6vutkqfdof50_rp22sh2s8i6epb5c1ie0o34cth2bs)
---
| | [](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zmuc49lkn3lkbqodd0ob8r063u0nerd95e086060_rp22sh2s8i6epb5c1ie0o34cth2bs) Dear Fellow American,

I am excited to announce that Hillsdale's online teaching series, ["Supply-Side Economics and American Prosperity with Arthur Laffer,"](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zsc19du6qbg8i30kd9fakrad7n6vhsd0p1kpelug_rp22sh2s8i6epb5c1ie0o34cth2bs) is now available to own as a DVD box set.

In this series, you will discover how taxation, regulation, money, government spending, and trade influence our decisions and impact our lives. Joined by Steve Forbes, Stephen Moore, Larry Kudlow, Amity Shlaes, Brian Domitrovic, and Larry P. Arnn, Dr. Laffer explains how supply-side economics holds the key to unleashing American prosperity once again.

But we need the support of citizens like you to promote this series to millions of Americans along with our other nationwide outreach.

Will you partner with us to promote this free online teaching series from Hillsdale College and expand other educational outreach efforts on behalf of liberty? Your tax-deductible donation will help us to enroll thousands of Americans in this series.

And for a donation of $100 or more, we will send you this beautiful DVD box set of "Supply-Side Economics and American Prosperity with Arthur Laffer."

**To help support this course and get your copy of "Supply-Side Economics and American Prosperity with Arthur Laffer" on DVD, click the link below:**

[https://secured.hillsdale.edu/hillsdale/supply-side-economics-support-dvd](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z6p2athpn974o8bd5q08it9supigss373n2513vo_rp22sh2s8i6epb5c1ie0o34cth2bs)

I hope you enjoy this teaching series. Thank you for your support.

Warm Regards,

Jeremiah Regan, Ph.D.
Executive Director of Online Learning
Hillsdale College

name: Paul Dans, Candidate for U.S. Senate
subject: Lindsey Graham betrayed MAGA for the last time
body:
I wrote project 2025, now I’m running for Senate!

| | | | [](https://go.vbtrb.com/r/aXAS/?__vbtrk=MzEwMTQ4OjEwMjk5MDQwNjpuZXdzbGV0dGVy&_uax=MzEwMTQ4OjEwMjk5MDQwNg&ct)
---
Fellow patriot, South Carolina deserves a senator who fights for _you_ \- not the D.C. swamp.
**[I’m Paul Dans, architect of Project 2025, and I’m running to unseat Lindsey Graham in the 2026 Republican primary.](https://go.vbtrb.com/r/aXAS/?__vbtrk=MzEwMTQ4OjEwMjk5MDQwNjpuZXdzbGV0dGVy&_uax=MzEwMTQ4OjEwMjk5MDQwNg&ct)**
For too long, Graham has betrayed our values - backing Biden’s judges, pushing endless wars, and cozying up to the establishment while South Carolina conservatives boo him at Trump rallies. It’s time for his "Sunset Boulevard".

[FIRE LINDSEY GRAHAM](https://go.vbtrb.com/r/aXAS/?__vbtrk=MzEwMTQ4OjEwMjk5MDQwNjpuZXdzbGV0dGVy&_uax=MzEwMTQ4OjEwMjk5MDQwNg&ct)
Friend, at Project 2025, I built a blueprint to shrink government, secure our borders, and put America First.
Now, I’m bringing that fight to the U.S. Senate to deliver President Trump’s agenda and restore South Carolina’s voice. But I can’t do it alone, our grassroots campaign needs your support to take on Graham’s war chest and the D.C. insiders protecting him.

**The Problem** :Lindsey Graham’s been in Washington for 30 years, voting for Obama and Biden judges (over 200 confirmed!), cheerleading foreign wars, and failing South Carolina voters. In 2023, he was booed off the stage at a Trump rally in Pickens. He’s out of touch, and his donors are the swamp - not the people.****
****
**The Solution** :You. By donating today, you’re fueling a movement to replace Graham with a Senator who’ll fight for secure borders, lower taxes, and America First policies. Every dollar powers our team to knock doors, rally voters, and spread the word across South Carolina.

[](https://go.vbtrb.com/r/aXAS/?__vbtrk=MzEwMTQ4OjEwMjk5MDQwNjpuZXdzbGV0dGVy&_uax=MzEwMTQ4OjEwMjk5MDQwNg&ct)
[JOIN TEAM DANS](https://go.vbtrb.com/r/aXAS/?__vbtrk=MzEwMTQ4OjEwMjk5MDQwNjpuZXdzbGV0dGVy&_uax=MzEwMTQ4OjEwMjk5MDQwNg&ct)
This isn’t just about one election, it’s about taking back our party from RINOs and building a Senate that stands with President Trump.
**[In 2024, South Carolina sent a message by backing Trump overwhelmingly. Now, let’s finish the job by electing a Senator who’ll do the same.](https://go.vbtrb.com/r/aXAS/?__vbtrk=MzEwMTQ4OjEwMjk5MDQwNjpuZXdzbGV0dGVy&_uax=MzEwMTQ4OjEwMjk5MDQwNg&ct)**

**_[Your support today sends a clear signal: the swamp’s days are numbered, and South Carolina’s future is bright](https://go.vbtrb.com/r/aXAS/?__vbtrk=MzEwMTQ4OjEwMjk5MDQwNjpuZXdzbGV0dGVy&_uax=MzEwMTQ4OjEwMjk5MDQwNg&ct)_****.**

_For America_ ,

**Paul Dans** Candidate for U.S. Senate, South Carolina
[](https://go.vbtrb.com/r/aXAS/?__vbtrk=MzEwMTQ4OjEwMjk5MDQwNjpuZXdzbGV0dGVy&_uax=MzEwMTQ4OjEwMjk5MDQwNg&ct)

body:
U.S. consumer prices rose [2.7% in July from a year earlier](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJyk0D2OpDAUBODTmAzkXwyBg12tyHrTCZHBz_Baxm7Z7u7h9iMmmAtMXFKpvvq4zTeLAeP23x5gqk9zhHcJUCvk-f4MJ0YfbMUU4_NYIJcFSi0zp1y1dGiZmJ3FcM6yccYDcBANGKaVonpUnDa74RqUXLxmng5O90yDHaTwnukRoFdLg-ZqowMTjFLFhs5C3-vF98xp5rwVRFJwWFPu7glj3cGHM70gd2s6mmD2Wh-FiD-ET4RPdlkvQbelKyZ8-vssGKEUwqcfSwufD1gruBbjmsEWcG0JuO01nO2lJnwqNeWTiAkdEf8Yl3KgchybbNzjjSFg6TWRdDsshu8h9VfvvQz_CgAA__8D14UX), slightly below forecasts and unchanged from June, while core inflation increased 3.1% with housing costs leading gains.
