clean_body: Once again Trump is targeting a majority-Democratic city | | | Friend, News broke Monday morning that Donald Trump plans to deploy the National Guard to Washington, D.C. Once again, he is targeting a majority-Democratic city, bypassing local leaders, and using federal troops as a show of force. We’ve seen this before. Earlier this year, Trump sent National Guard troops and active-duty Marines into Los Angeles without Governor Gavin Newsom’s consent. A federal judge ruled that action unconstitutional and outside his legal authority. The case is still in the courts, yet Trump is doubling down. Congress must act immediately. Lawmakers have both the constitutional power and the responsibility to check a lawless executive. They must launch oversight hearings, subpoena all related documents, and pass legislation to strictly limit domestic troop deployments. ** In D.C., Trump's threats go even further. He has talked about evicting unhoused residents, hinted at stripping the city’s Home Rule, and smeared the capital as "totally out of control." This is about punishing political opponents and intimidating voters—not solving real problems. Deploying the military against American citizens is a line we cannot allow any president to cross. It erodes the separation of powers, undermines local authority, and violates the principles behind the Posse Comitatus Act. ** Thanks for everything you do. Josh | | Sent via . To update your email address, change your name or address, or to stop receiving emails from Democrats.com, please .

friend, hey — it’s Isaiah Martin.
Texas Republicans set up a “tip line” to rat out Democratic lawmakers who left the state to stop Trump’s rigged maps.
They were expecting... serious calls.
What they got instead?
* Loch Ness monster sightings
* UFO abductions
* Elvis working at a Buc-ee’s in Waco
* And rumors that Donald Trump is on “the list”
I’m once again URGING the public NOT to call 1-866-786-5972 to share your “tips.”
Please. Don’t.
Here’s the thing: While the prank calls are hilarious, the reason this tip line exists is not. Texas Republicans are threatening to arrest Democratic lawmakers for protecting democracy . That’s not a joke. That’s an authoritarian power grab.
We’re fighting it in the legislature, in the courts, and in the streets, but we also need to fight it in the campaigns that will decide who writes the laws next year.
Chip in today, and let’s make sure the only number Texas Republicans are dialing is the unemployment office.

From _[The New Republic](https://link.sbstck.com/redirect/a4540267-ac52-4ccd-8762-a567bfca6f2d?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)_ :
There was a moment, around this time last year, when it felt like things might turn out okay for us. The Democratic Party had a new nominee for president, Kamala Harris, and she was saying a lot of the right things. At a time when voters were clearly upset about affordability, Harris started off her campaign with talk of cracking down on price gouging and other policies to rein in corporate corruption. By late summer, some journalists were [asking](https://link.sbstck.com/redirect/d93093be-ba56-4797-9112-58362122c6de?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) questions such as, "The Populist Mantle Is Harris's for the Taking: But Does She Want It?"
Alas, to our daily horror, she didn't want that mantle. Her campaign pivoted away from economic populism and [embraced](https://link.sbstck.com/redirect/d3b7e3e5-972a-4925-ae1b-f6578893ec61?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) the corporate-friendly centrism of Harris's [closest advisors](https://link.sbstck.com/redirect/a06e5c9d-97c9-4d2b-ba3b-42bd0cf2ab71?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg), like her brother-in-law and Uber chief legal officer Tony West. According to [reporting](https://link.sbstck.com/redirect/a06e5c9d-97c9-4d2b-ba3b-42bd0cf2ab71?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) from _The New York Times_ , West aggressively pushed the campaign to stop attacking big business, and Harris agreed, often asking her staff, "Has Tony seen this?" before reviewing her economic speeches.
Thanks for reading All right, then, I'll go to hell! Subscribe for free to receive new posts.
[Subscribed](https://substack.com/redirect/2/eyJlIjoiaHR0cHM6Ly9hYXJvbnJlZ3VuYmVyZy5zdWJzdGFjay5jb20vYWNjb3VudCIsInAiOjE3MDgyODMwNywicyI6NDk4MTE3MCwiZiI6dHJ1ZSwidSI6OTA1MDExOTIsImlhdCI6MTc1NTA5MTYxNywiZXhwIjoyMDcwNjY3NjE3LCJpc3MiOiJwdWItMCIsInN1YiI6ImxpbmstcmVkaXJlY3QifQ.Lmw99F0RK0ZFfrxzy8igrlbTiw9ZTedZXEwLAyefKHM?)
This shift was clear in Harris's policy moves, like watering down her price-gouging crackdown and walking back proposals to tax the rich [following](https://link.sbstck.com/redirect/48023adc-d7a5-4206-94de-ebc42f2a51e8?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) pressure from her biggest donors. It was clear in her rhetoric, as she curtailed her earlier messaging on standing up to corporate elites and [went all-in](https://link.sbstck.com/redirect/525443b9-c42a-4e7f-a87d-9ebfaeddef0e?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) on a bipartisan theme of defending democracy. In October, Harris campaigned [more often](https://link.sbstck.com/redirect/4c7af925-8746-4433-9cf6-e740b510bf49?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) with Republican Liz Cheney than any other surrogate, and had more appearances with billionaire Mark Cuban than labor leaders like United Auto Workers president Shawn Fain. And you can trace this shift in the [polling](https://link.sbstck.com/redirect/52e5c863-0099-4775-85d9-89a69c6d5e4b?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)--Harris's numbers rose during her initial embrace of populist themes and fell following her corporate-appeasing pivot.
And then she lost the election, [losing ground](https://link.sbstck.com/redirect/d592e13e-c163-4762-b088-56041fb77539?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) across the working class and [becoming](https://link.sbstck.com/redirect/7003b2c1-1c57-4c0f-a858-3bb9d01cbd67?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) the first Democratic presidential nominee in decades to receive more support from Americans in the top third of the income bracket than those in the bottom two-thirds. That is why there has been broad agreement--and by broad, I mean even [David Brooks](https://link.sbstck.com/redirect/3a00c543-b83c-40cf-b953-5690601e05da?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) is in this camp--that if Democrats want to defeat MAGA Republicans, they need to stop embracing anodyne, corporate-approved messaging and start giving people something to vote _for_. If you don't believe it, compare the current approval rating of the [Democratic Party](https://link.sbstck.com/redirect/439ec998-c014-4c73-855f-d738225c4c90?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) (-32) with that of [Bernie Sanders](https://link.sbstck.com/redirect/5a54b09e-dc9b-436d-a1bc-368827dbc97b?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) (+11). That's a _43-point difference_.
Unfortunately, many members of the Democratic establishment remain firmly opposed to this hard-learned principle. The antipathy toward populism has been most apparent lately in the New York City mayoral race, where Zohran Mamdani remains unendorsed by leading Democrats despite winning the party's nomination and facing off against two general election candidates who are now [collaborating](https://link.sbstck.com/redirect/3bf64b80-d446-4104-a74a-1c1d3a08526c?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) with Trump. But it's in relation to the party's top campaign apparatuses--the Democratic Senatorial Campaign Committee (DSCC) and the Democratic Congressional Campaign Committee (DCCC)--that this refusal to learn the lessons of 2024 could be most catastrophic to the party's prospects in next year's midterm elections.
Because again and again, in must-win House and Senate races, rather than embracing candidates that are proving their capacity to spark grassroots Democratic enthusiasm and tap into the populist ferment of the American public, establishment leaders are working to tilt the scales in favor of exactly the kind of uninspiring corporatists that dug the party's current hole.
We're seeing this play out very clearly in the Senate race in Michigan. Dr. Abdul El-Sayed, backed by Bernie Sanders, is a full-throated progressive populist. State Senator Mallory McMorrow is running as a D.C. outsider. Both are charismatic communicators and strong grassroots fundraisers; despite refusing to take corporate PAC money, they [raised](https://link.sbstck.com/redirect/58a9449d-1245-4353-913e-1bcfb4310c01?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) $1.8 and $2.1 million, respectively, in the last quarter.
So naturally the Democratic establishment is pushing hard for a third candidate, with [reports](https://link.sbstck.com/redirect/4d9e46a3-84a3-4e4b-b514-afbe83b9e015?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) that Senate Minority Leader Chuck Schumer and Senator Kirsten Gillibrand, the chair of the DSCC, are privately encouraging donors to line up behind Congresswoman Haley Stevens.
Stevens is [not charismatic](https://link.sbstck.com/redirect/20fde7e3-0583-4b56-9a7d-8428106d73f1?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) in person. She is not an effective communicator online; her social media posts [regularly](https://link.sbstck.com/redirect/033806a1-b359-4130-9dd8-05086bdcd32e?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) get single-digits engagement. She's not a strong fundraiser; she raised [less than](https://link.sbstck.com/redirect/58a9449d-1245-4353-913e-1bcfb4310c01?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) either McMorrow or El-Sayed, with just $1.3 million in new contributions last quarter, despite being the only candidate in the race taking money from corporations. And she's taking a lot of it, with hundreds of thousands of dollars from nearly [100 different corporate PACs](https://link.sbstck.com/redirect/ef398a4e-f0b1-446b-bb80-d789d2a42343?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) representing Wall Street (Goldman Sachs, the American Bankers Association), fossil fuels (Dupont, Dow, the American Chemistry Council), insurance (UnitedHealth, Cigna, Blue Cross Blue Shield), utilities (Cox, Verizon, DTE), Big Tech (Google, Microsoft), retailers (Walmart, Home Depot), Big Sugar, and many, many others
Unlike McMorrow and El-Sayed, who both oppose offensive weapons shipments to Israel, Stevens is firmly in the pocket of the American Israel Public Affairs Committee: She raised [more money](https://link.sbstck.com/redirect/50d1fb97-e451-476f-895a-971309c399bc?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) from AIPAC than she did in small dollar unitemized contributions. This could be an electoral albatross in any state, given Americans' nearly [two-to-one opposition](https://link.sbstck.com/redirect/587824b3-46bf-4186-aa0f-9ff5162f1cfb?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) to Israel's genocide in Gaza. But in Michigan, the state with the largest number of Arab-American voters, who famously [abandoned Democrats](https://link.sbstck.com/redirect/5c6da5a2-a946-4818-b91f-394ecdfa3028?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) in the last election, choosing Stevens is an even riskier bet. And yet, that's exactly the bet that Democrats like Schumer and Gillibrand are seemingly making.
Similar stories are playing out in the battle for the House. A prime example is California's 22nd district, currently represented by GOP Congressman David Valadao, one of the most vulnerable Republicans in the country. This is a heavily Latino district that swung to Trump after Biden won it by 13 points in 2020. And [Randy Villegas](https://link.sbstck.com/redirect/2bc5a84e-06ff-4136-925a-3c11ce33b49a?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg), who launched a campaign against Valadao earlier this year, would seem to be a perfect fit for it. A working-class educator and local elected official, Villegas is the son of Mexican immigrants who speaks compellingly about the issues his community faces. Though he "hesitates to put any labels" (like progressive or leftist) on himself, he is clearly running as an economic populist. "I think we need to have candidates who are willing to say that they're going to stand up against corporate greed, that they are going to stand against corruption in government, and that they are going to stand against billionaires that are controlling the strings right now," [he said](https://link.sbstck.com/redirect/8931c0a8-f400-41c0-8b47-1eeadbb9ba94?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) in April. And he's demonstrated his viability, raising a quarter of a million dollars in the last quarter without taking any corporate PAC money.
So how did the DCCC respond to Villegas's momentum? By convincing state Assemblymember Jasmeet Bains--arguably California's most conservative Democratic legislator, whose blatant shilling for the fossil fuel industry earned her the [moniker](https://link.sbstck.com/redirect/a6f43463-ef2c-4ef5-b843-13f1d60bbe96?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) "Big Oil Bains"--to get in the race. Bains [announced](https://link.sbstck.com/redirect/cb599b95-a08e-481d-b622-5797c635594a?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) her candidacy in mid-July, several months after the San Joaquin Valley Sun [reported](https://link.sbstck.com/redirect/7746aad2-0324-4545-9283-c9f71e80612e?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) that the DCCC was recruiting her.
On paper, Bains has some strengths. In particular, she is a medical doctor, which provides a useful framing device for criticizing Valadao's vote for the healthcare cuts in [Trump's murderous budget bill](https://link.sbstck.com/redirect/3bc044c2-9798-4a52-bcac-8dd999687772?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg). But in a working-class district like CA-22, Bain's record of protecting corporate profits over regular people could be a serious liability. She was the only California Democrat to [vote "no" on a bill](https://link.sbstck.com/redirect/343ebad5-29b3-4eaa-9cc6-e3292d400570?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) to curb price gouging in the oil industry. The Big Oil lobbying group Western States Petroleum Association, which opposed the bill, rewarded Bains with max out contribution a couple months after the vote. Bains was also the only Democrat to vote [against](https://link.sbstck.com/redirect/1d87c725-0f40-4781-b0dc-389b2e6fe3ee?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) a bill to hold oil companies accountable for finished oil wells they refuse to plug, and to vote [against](https://link.sbstck.com/redirect/41ec3c7d-2464-46a6-87ae-7e3159ecb0e9?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) allocating $1.5 billion for wildfire prevention--just five months before wildfires would devastate Southern California. In a district with huge numbers of renters, she voted [against](https://link.sbstck.com/redirect/5f925081-2768-4bdb-a872-0bac839bab8d?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) increased protections for tenants.
So in a race that will be defined by whether Democrats can effectively attack the incumbent for raising costs on his working class Latino constituents by voting for the Trump budget bill's corporate handouts, the Democratic establishment is stepping in to block a working class Latino candidate perfectly suited to making that case in favor of the California Democrat with perhaps the most obvious record of voting to let corporations raise costs on regular people.
This critique isn't about ideology. It's about winning. Like Harris and her advisors, the [historically unpopular](https://link.sbstck.com/redirect/256a3719-bd6a-4ef1-8de4-f80cf996e410?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) leaders of the Democratic Party are operating off a failed model that prioritizes a candidate's approval by corporate interests over their ability to channel the populist frustrations being expressed by Americans across the political spectrum. By refusing to absorb the lessons of 2024, this establishment is now imperiling Democrats' chances in 2026--and thereby threatening to condemn all of us to at least two more years of unchecked authoritarian rule. In this moment of existential threat to our democracy and our world, we simply cannot afford such slow learning.

clean_body: By refusing to learn the lessons of 2024, party leaders are imperiling our chances in the midterms and beyond | | ---|---|--- | | | Forwarded this email? ? for more By refusing to learn the lessons of 2024, party leaders are imperiling our chances in the midterms and beyond | | | Aug 13 | | | | | | | | | | | | From : There was a moment, around this time last year, when it felt like things might turn out okay for us. The Democratic Party had a new nominee for president, Kamala Harris, and she was saying a lot of the right things. At a time when voters were clearly upset about affordability, Harris started off her campaign with talk of cracking down on price gouging and other policies to rein in corporate corruption. By late summer, some journalists were questions such as, "The Populist Mantle Is Harris's for the Taking: But Does She Want It?" Alas, to our daily horror, she didn't want that mantle. Her campaign pivoted away from economic populism and the corporate-friendly centrism of Harris's , like her brother-in-law and Uber chief legal officer Tony West. According to from The New York Times , West aggressively pushed the campaign to stop attacking big business, and Harris agreed, often asking her staff, "Has Tony seen this?" before reviewing her economic speeches. Thanks for reading All right, then, I'll go to hell! Subscribe for free to receive new posts. ? This shift was clear in Harris's policy moves, like watering down her price-gouging crackdown and walking back proposals to tax the rich pressure from her biggest donors. It was clear in her rhetoric, as she curtailed her earlier messaging on standing up to corporate elites and on a bipartisan theme of defending democracy. In October, Harris campaigned with Republican Liz Cheney than any other surrogate, and had more appearances with billionaire Mark Cuban than labor leaders like United Auto Workers president Shawn Fain. And you can trace this shift in the numbers rose during her initial embrace of populist themes and fell following her corporate-appeasing pivot. And then she lost the election, across the working class and the first Democratic presidential nominee in decades to receive more support from Americans in the top third of the income bracket than those in the bottom two-thirds. That is why there has been broad agreement--and by broad, I mean even is in this camp--that if Democrats want to defeat MAGA Republicans, they need to stop embracing anodyne, corporate-approved messaging and start giving people something to vote for. If you don't believe it, compare the current approval rating of the (-32) with that of (+11). That's a 43-point difference. Unfortunately, many members of the Democratic establishment remain firmly opposed to this hard-learned principle. The antipathy toward populism has been most apparent lately in the New York City mayoral race, where Zohran Mamdani remains unendorsed by leading Democrats despite winning the party's nomination and facing off against two general election candidates who are now with Trump. But it's in relation to the party's top campaign apparatuses--the Democratic Senatorial Campaign Committee (DSCC) and the Democratic Congressional Campaign Committee (DCCC)--that this refusal to learn the lessons of 2024 could be most catastrophic to the party's prospects in next year's midterm elections. Because again and again, in must-win House and Senate races, rather than embracing candidates that are proving their capacity to spark grassroots Democratic enthusiasm and tap into the populist ferment of the American public, establishment leaders are working to tilt the scales in favor of exactly the kind of uninspiring corporatists that dug the party's current hole. We're seeing this play out very clearly in the Senate race in Michigan. Dr. Abdul El-Sayed, backed by Bernie Sanders, is a full-throated progressive populist. State Senator Mallory McMorrow is running as a D.C. outsider. Both are charismatic communicators and strong grassroots fundraisers; despite refusing to take corporate PAC money, they $1.8 and $2.1 million, respectively, in the last quarter. So naturally the Democratic establishment is pushing hard for a third candidate, with that Senate Minority Leader Chuck Schumer and Senator Kirsten Gillibrand, the chair of the DSCC, are privately encouraging donors to line up behind Congresswoman Haley Stevens. Stevens is in person. She is not an effective communicator online; her social media posts get single-digits engagement. She's not a strong fundraiser; she raised either McMorrow or El-Sayed, with just $1.3 million in new contributions last quarter, despite being the only candidate in the race taking money from corporations. And she's taking a lot of it, with hundreds of thousands of dollars from nearly representing Wall Street (Goldman Sachs, the American Bankers Association), fossil fuels (Dupont, Dow, the American Chemistry Council), insurance (UnitedHealth, Cigna, Blue Cross Blue Shield), utilities (Cox, Verizon, DTE), Big Tech (Google, Microsoft), retailers (Walmart, Home Depot), Big Sugar, and many, many others Unlike McMorrow and El-Sayed, who both oppose offensive weapons shipments to Israel, Stevens is firmly in the pocket of the American Israel Public Affairs Committee: She raised from AIPAC than she did in small dollar unitemized contributions. ---

U.S. Attorney for the District of Columbia **[Jeanine Pirro erupted at a reporter](https://substack.com/redirect/f98552e2-57ce-4b73-ab9a-5b763d0a5fcb?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)** at the end of her Tuesday press conference for saying that crime in Washington D.C. is going down, challenging President Trump's motivation for deploying the National Guard in the city.
**[Watch her tear this reporter apart:](https://substack.com/redirect/f98552e2-57ce-4b73-ab9a-5b763d0a5fcb?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)**
[](https://substack.com/redirect/f98552e2-57ce-4b73-ab9a-5b763d0a5fcb?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
"What changed?" the reporter asked Pirro.
"It's never enough!!" she answered, enraged by the question, before telling the reporter to try telling families of violent crime victims that the crime rate has dropped.
While it's true crime has dropped in D.C. in recent years, **[the city remains the 4th most dangerous city in the nation](https://substack.com/redirect/c0a2960c-bb2f-4cd0-813c-9c6ebb8f945a?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)** based on homicide rates. D.C. saw 27.3 murders per 100,000 residents in 2024, which is roughly 6x more murders per capita than New York City.
[Click To Watch Video](https://substack.com/redirect/f98552e2-57ce-4b73-ab9a-5b763d0a5fcb?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
* * *
**[Together with Mode Mobile](https://substack.com/redirect/a0ea6406-a4f8-4426-84fb-66769d568dfa?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)**
# **This stock soared 2,900%. Is it in your portfolio?**
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/a0ea6406-a4f8-4426-84fb-66769d568dfa?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
When you top Deloitte's "Fastest-Growing Software Companies" list and earn 50M+ customers, people notice.
No wonder **[Mode Mobile's stock is up over 2,900%](https://substack.com/redirect/a0ea6406-a4f8-4426-84fb-66769d568dfa?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)**[.](https://substack.com/redirect/a0ea6406-a4f8-4426-84fb-66769d568dfa?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
Mode is completely rethinking the $500B smartphone industry, letting users earn and save money simply by using their phones. Their customers have earned and saved over $325M, generating $75M in revenue and an **[eye-popping 32,481% 3-year revenue growth](https://substack.com/redirect/a0ea6406-a4f8-4426-84fb-66769d568dfa?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)**.
Over 50K people have invested, as they leverage partnerships with **Best Buy and Walmart** to reach even more of the world's 7 billion smartphone users.
With their Nasdaq ticker $MODE reserved, you have a limited time to invest in Mode before their potential IPO.
**🚨[Their offering is nearly full - along with the chance to become a shareholder at $0.30/share](https://substack.com/redirect/a0ea6406-a4f8-4426-84fb-66769d568dfa?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)**[.](https://substack.com/redirect/a0ea6406-a4f8-4426-84fb-66769d568dfa?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
[Learn More](https://substack.com/redirect/a0ea6406-a4f8-4426-84fb-66769d568dfa?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
* * *
# 23 arrests on first day of DC takeover, Mayor Bowser admits she has "no choice" but to comply with Trump
National Guard troops**[deployed to the nation's capital Tuesday](https://substack.com/redirect/52c2c731-4400-4a8e-b830-b7316e1a278e?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)** as part of President Donald Trump's federal crackdown on crime in Washington, D.C., with authorities arresting 23 suspects and seizing six illegal firearms on the first day of the operation.
[](https://substack.com/redirect/e8414425-e521-4507-a6f6-01ea84bff0e3?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
* **Trump invoked federal control over D.C. police using Home Rule Act** \- President Trump placed the Metropolitan Police Department under federal control for up to 30 days on Monday, utilizing authority granted by the District of Columbia's Home Rule Act to combat crime in the capital.
* **First day operations resulted in 23 arrests and weapons seizures** \- Federal and local authorities arrested 23 suspects on charges including homicide, weapons violations, lewd acts, and stalking, while also seizing six illegal firearms during the initial crackdown efforts.
"These are just a few examples -- we are just getting started. Federal partners joined local police and arrested 23 in total," FBI Director Kash Patel wrote on X. "When you let good cops be cops they can clean up our streets and do it fast. More to come. Your nation's Capital WILL be safe again."
* **D.C. Mayor Bowser focuses on coordination despite limited authority** \- Mayor Muriel Bowser met with federal officials to discuss strategy and ensure proper utilization of additional law enforcement resources, acknowledging her administration had "no choice but to comply and adapt" to Trump's federal takeover of local policing.

### Related Video: Asking DC liberals - Should Trump take over DC?
[](https://substack.com/redirect/a3fd5f0e-39f9-4728-884f-6e9973edb1fa?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)

name: GIFFORDS
subject: Jeanine Pirro just said…
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Giffords PAC; not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee
body:
#

Wow...
Fox News host reject — and Donald Trump’s U.S. Attorney for D.C. — Jeanine Pirro just held a press conference trying to defend Trump deploying the National Guard to our nation’s capital.
**When a reporter tried to hold Trump accountable for gutting gun violence prevention programs, she stormed off.**
[](https://go.giffords.org/go/14457?c0=giffords-em-aug25.6hMzIw&refcode=em250813-1-b&t=1&akid=10780%2E3935704%2Eg7BL8O)
Facts are facts, whether Jeanine Pirro likes it or not.
Just months ago, the Trump administration cut HUNDREDS of millions of dollars to local gun violence prevention and crime reduction programs.
_These programs work. By gutting federal funding, Trump’s actions are costing lives._
**GIFFORDS is on the front lines working to hold the Trump administration accountable and stop gun violence in our communities — but we can’t do it without you.**
[**If you agree that we need to stop gun violence, will you donate $3 to GIFFORDS PAC right now? Let’s send a message to Jeanine Pirro, Donald Trump, and extremist Republicans everywhere that they can’t hide from the truth.**](https://go.giffords.org/go/14457?c0=giffords-em-aug25.6hMzIw&refcode=em250813-1-b&t=2&akid=10780%2E3935704%2Eg7BL8O)

name: DemsGive
subject: The latest on Texas redistricting
disclaimer_text: Paid for and authorized by Protect Our Democracy Fund
body:
Governor and lawmakers remain at odds over new maps
| | | | | [ ](https://ctrk.klclick.com/l/01K2HVK2VXZWCY2E7Z2GBPJF1F_0)
---
| | | | Hey Peter, The Texas redistricting standoff is not over. After more than a week out of state, House Democrats are now deciding how much longer to continue their walkout to block a Republican map that could shift up to five U.S. House seats. Republicans say they will keep calling special sessions until the map passes. Democrats say they will return only if the governor puts people over politics. It is a pivotal moment, and the outcome could shape representation in Texas for the next decade. [**Read the full story**](https://ctrk.klclick.com/l/01K2HVK2VXZWCY2E7Z2GBPJF1F_1)[](https://ctrk.klclick.com/l/01K2HVK2VXZWCY2E7Z2GBPJF1F_2) More soon, Andy
DemsGive.org
---
|
---

body:

Patriot, they alarm me.
The modern Democratic Party is the Party of **[cultural Marxists, radical anti-Semites, and Hamas sympathizers.](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zi7a30k5qaenn71kqb7ljh6r0btt7bq86shoi2sg_rp22sh2s8i6epb5chg61o32c9h2bs)**

We **CANNOT** allow them to regain a grip on power in Washington.

Battleground states like North Carolina, Georgia, and my home state of Texas are going to be ground zero in our fight to keep the Senate Majority from the far-Left. In order to win these states, we need accurate, up-to-date voter information from grassroots patriots like **[YOU.](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zq3u5bcltdivboe3enbkge5ij2m9e8q8uj295s5g_rp22sh2s8i6epb5chg61o32c9h2bs)**

body:
Texas Democrats have always believed in something bigger than power. We believe in people. | | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/jaworskifortexas.com/heart-of-tx-dems?e=5d8d80652b)

| | , Texas Democrats have always believed in something bigger than power. We believe in people. We believe every Texan deserves the dignity of affordable health care, a good education, clean air and water, and the freedom to make personal decisions without government interference. That’s what Joe Jaworski is fighting for in his campaign for Attorney General: **a Texas that works for everyone, not just the well-connected**. While Republicans weaponize the law for political gain, Joe is running to restore integrity to the office and to put progressive values into action. He’s not afraid to take on injustice, whether it’s voter suppression, environmental destruction, or attacks on reproductive rights. **This campaign is about bringing the heart of the Democratic Party to the front lines of justice in Texas.** [**Will you help fuel this fight with a grassroots donation today? Chip in now >>>**](https://jaworskifortexas.us17.list-manage.com/track/click?u=2e1f50319ad85f5f9e5c11ac9&id=87e6509fea&e=5d8d80652b) Together, we can turn the page and write a new chapter for Texas. In solidarity, Team Jaworski

Peter,

President Trump is working around the clock to **MAKE AMERICA GREAT AGAIN!**

Not even a year since his inauguration, America is already stronger than ever.

Peter,

On November 4th, three justices face their PA Supreme Court retention elections — and the outcome will shape Pennsylvanians’ rights for generations to come.

Peter, the MAGA machine is targeting this Court because **our justices refused to let them wreck our democracy.** These three justices were essential in securing our right to vote in free and fair elections.

With less than 100 days until we hit the polls, we can’t afford to let our foot off the gas. [Your donation of $10 could be the difference in protecting the Court — will you join us?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/113244652/563127436/-1357903355?amount=10&source=EM_NBI_PADM_20250813_FR_courts_0_1MO_PaDems_NA_NA_1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDQ3MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3ZjVhMzhmZC01MTc4LWYwMTEtYjQ4MS02MDQ1YmRmZThlOWMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=0VmSEV_k4tr8LiRSYqcF2qSl5xQT0wfP_JuRgn44ol4=) | | **[PROTECT PENNSYLVANIA’S COURT](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/113244653/563127437/-1357903355?amount=10&source=EM_NBI_PADM_20250813_FR_courts_0_1MO_PaDems_NA_NA_1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDQ3MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3ZjVhMzhmZC01MTc4LWYwMTEtYjQ4MS02MDQ1YmRmZThlOWMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=0VmSEV_k4tr8LiRSYqcF2qSl5xQT0wfP_JuRgn44ol4=)**

body:
The Trump administration has made countless attacks against our veterans and active-duty service members.
Hi Peter – it’s U.S. Congressman Mark Takano.
Over the past six months, the Trump administration has made countless attacks against our veterans and active-duty service members.
Just last month, it was announced that the Department of Veterans Affairs would be cutting 30,000 positions come September – _the largest staffing cut in VA history._
**These staffing cuts will have catastrophic effects on our veterans and their abilities to access vital services. Ultimately, our veterans will suffer from this decision.**
This decision showcases a disappointing and shocking dismissal of the dedicated workforce that helps serve our nation’s veterans.
**[Please join me in the fight now to protect our veterans' services by splitting a donation between my campaign and Heartland Patriots.](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/93355?refcode=em20250813-9240&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1&akid=9240%2E614464%2E-VyUNP)**

clean_body: | | | Here's the thing, team: Kamala Harris emailed you. Chuck Schumer emailed you. Kirsten Gillibrand emailed you. Cory Booker emailed you. Jon Ossoff emailed you. Chris Murphy emailed you. And now I've emailed you, too! We all emailed YOU because Trump's abuses of power are getting more and more nuts every day, and Republicans are just sitting on their easy chairs letting him do it! We HAVE to take back the Senate from those jokers ASAP, because nothing \-- not a damn thing -- is gonna be OK again until we do. But even though all of these Democratic all-stars warned you just how freakin' HUGE the stakes are, we're STILL short of our $125,000 mid-month fundraising goal to answer their calls! I promise you, there's only one way to fight someone like Trump: By building an unbreakable coalition of Democrats ready to do whatever it takes to win. We need your help to fight for the Senate. name: Official Democratic Headquarters
subject: NEWS: Republicans roll back more funding for public media
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the Democratic National Committee, www
body:
This isn’t only an attack on the media — this is an attack on all of us.
---
Derek, have you seen this? [](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em-dnc-august-2025?refcode=em_20250813_4287_fr&amount=3&refcode2=4287_22930333_Pt891M&akid=4287%2E22930333%2EPt891M) House Republicans recently approved Trump’s plan to gut public media. **This isn’t only an attack on public media, Derek, this is an attack on all of us.** Communities across the country rely on public news, radio, and broadcasting to access local and national news, children’s education and entertainment, and even emergency alerts. In fact, when North Carolina faced widespread power, cellular, and internet outages due to Hurricane Helene, public radio was one of the _only_ avenues communities could count on for emergency alerts and updates. **Cutting funding for public media means that millions will lose access to these critical resources.** But Democrats are not backing down without a fight. House Democrats voted together against the funding cut and will continue working to ensure Americans have access to the alerts, news, and educational resources they need. **And at the DNC, we’re organizing cross-country and investing in state parties to elect more Democrats who will continue to fight to protect public media and act as a check against Trump’s disastrous agenda.** [**Derek, if this fight matters to you, please consider pitching in $3 or whatever you can to the DNC today so we can keep building the resources we need to win back Congress:**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em-dnc-august-2025?refcode=em_20250813_4287_fr&amount=3&refcode2=4287_22930333_Pt891M&akid=4287%2E22930333%2EPt891M) _If you 've stored your info with ActBlue, we'll process your contribution instantly._ | | | **[Donate $3](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em-dnc-august-2025?express_lane=true&amount=3&refcode=em_20250813_4287_fr&refcode2=4287_22930333_Pt891M&akid=4287%2E22930333%2EPt891M)**

subject: We have a lot of data now, and it paints a difficult picture

body:

Decided by just 3%. One recent poll found that after undecided voters heard these false attacks without a fact-check, _they swung heavily in Ciattarelli's direction._ **Here's what this all means: we are in an incredibly competitive race, and we will only win it if we work night and day to get our message out all across New Jersey. And that's exactly what my team and I plan to do.** We need to get out of the usual Democratic comfort zone and show up everywhere so that voters can actually hear what we have to say. We need to blanket the state with our plan for lowering costs and making daily life easier for New Jersey families. # [Don't let Trump Destroy the Smithsonian](https://default.salsalabs.org/Taf4d4fb9-7d3a-4e81-9216-b09c43ad1a2c/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)

---
| | | The Smithsonian is a national treasure, with people coming from all over the country and even the world to see it. But the White House is [now demanding](https://default.salsalabs.org/Tcd0f55c7-9c71-405d-851b-03628f1c68a0/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) the Smithsonian change its exhibits to align with Trump's wishes. Which is a big problem, because Trump is a blithering idiot who lies nonstop, and doesn't believe in science. [**Add your name, demand that Trump back off, and that the Smithsonian reject his changes.**](https://default.salsalabs.org/T13133ab0-9902-4772-a456-a72910b3854b/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)

| | [READ IN APP](https://open.substack.com/pub/endlessurgency/p/the-real-reason-trump-federalized?utm_source=email&redirect=app-store&utm_campaign=email-read-in-app)
---

Donald Trump is politically weak right now. And when Trump's weak, he does what he always does--tries to change the terrain and bait Democrats into a fight on his terms. He's a master at this, and a lot of Dems love to take that bait.
Last week's Republican media fixation on Sydney Sweeney's jeans? That was a stunt to distract from the Epstein cover-up, which is hurting him with his own base. This week's move to federalize DC police and flood the city with National Guard and FBI agents? Another stunt--this time to spark a national fight over crime and bury brutal economic numbers. It's as transparent as it gets. And right now? It's not working.
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/b0e88c3f-7fac-47e2-a692-3f1ba02792de?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
_**[I'm committed to keeping Endless Urgency free for everyone--but I rely on paid subscribers (starting at just $8/month) to keep it going. If you find value in the work, consider becoming a paid subscriber:](https://substack.com/redirect/cbe8f3d5-de8c-4052-a4d2-66400c6c9784?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)**_
[Upgrade to paid](https://substack.com/redirect/cbe8f3d5-de8c-4052-a4d2-66400c6c9784?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
We're barely a week removed from the Bureau of Labor Statistics telling us we've got the worst job market since Trump's last presidency. It was so bad he fired the person in charge, blaming her for being a "communist Biden supporter." Now we've got new data this morning showing prices are still climbing--core inflation is 3.1%--and Trump's tariffs are only just starting to take effect.
In these moments, it's critical to zoom in and look at what's actually happening on the ground: the conversations taking place at the dinner table, and the voices of small business owners--who employ half of the U.S. workforce.
Take the story of Beth Benike that's been making the rounds on TikTok. An Army veteran and founder of Busy Baby, she built a successful, independent Minnesota business making baby placemats, where she sourced her materials from China. In May, Trump's 145% tariff suddenly added $230,000 to import her existing inventory--money she didn't have. Products sat stranded in China. Beth, who had invested her life into her business and mortgaged her home, now had only weeks of stock left and was staring down losing both her business and her house. Despite pleading with both Democrats and Republicans to listen to her and actually give a shit, only one side of the aisle stood by her. Beth had to resort to a GoFundMe to survive. That's not right.
Multiply Beth's story by tens of thousands of small businesses nationwide who are struggling. These struggles ripple through entire local economies, costing jobs and ruining lives in communities across our country.
_**[I'm committed to keeping Endless Urgency free for everyone--but I rely on paid subscribers (starting at just $8/month) to keep it going. If you find value in the work, consider becoming a paid subscriber:](https://substack.com/redirect/cbe8f3d5-de8c-4052-a4d2-66400c6c9784?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)**_
[Upgrade to paid](https://substack.com/redirect/cbe8f3d5-de8c-4052-a4d2-66400c6c9784?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
Now that we've re-grounded ourselves in reality--instead of Trump's gaslighting narratives--we can pivot back to Trump's latest distraction: federalizing the DC police.
Inside Democratic circles, the big question is: do we engage him on DC crime? Do we meet him head-on when he's clearly lying? My answer: no. Not because it isn't serious--it's a gross abuse of power--but because it's mostly a stunt. It's the same playbook he used in Los Angeles: escalate, send in troops, look "tough," distract from bad news.
On immigration, sure--there's ground to fight on. Democrats can and should make the case for why our policies will keep Americans safe without sacrificing our humanity. Same reason I backed shining a spotlight on Trump's wrongful deportations--people saw him go too far.
But DC crime is a different story. Trump's approval is sliding fast--53% down to 44% in CBS, with other polls putting him in the 30s. His die-hards will keep pretending he's Chairman Mao with "the best economy ever," but voters aren't buying it. Their lived reality doesn't match his spin: rising costs, shrinking opportunity, and no path to prosperity.
_**[I'm committed to keeping Endless Urgency free for everyone--but I rely on paid subscribers (starting at just $8/month) to keep it going. If you find value in the work, consider becoming a paid subscriber:](https://substack.com/redirect/cbe8f3d5-de8c-4052-a4d2-66400c6c9784?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)**_
[Upgrade to paid](https://substack.com/redirect/cbe8f3d5-de8c-4052-a4d2-66400c6c9784?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
This doesn't mean silence. We should absolutely call this what it is--an outrageous escalation, an abuse of power, and an assault on DC residents' rights. But it cannot derail the core issues that will win the midterms:
**The economy** --jobs, inflation, the fact Trump's making both worse.
**Health care** --he's kicking 20 million Americans off coverage by signing the Republican budget so billionaires can get another tax break. Trump is committing theft of the safety net we all dutifully pay into--promising to privatize Social Security that we pay forward, so we can benefit from it when we need it.
**Corruption** --his administration is a swamp no president has ever matched. If Democrats can focus here, we win. When they chase his distractions instead, we lose.
If Democrats stay disciplined on those three while elevating strong, fresh candidates in battleground races, we have a path to victory. People ask, "Why don't Democrats do anything?" The answer: because without power, we can't. And the only way to get it is to win over enough median voters in swing districts, even with gerrymandering stacked against us.
That means hammering the everyday questions voters actually live with: Can I buy a house? Start a family? Retire with dignity? Feel safe in my community? Trump wants the election on crime, safety, immigration--his turf. We win when it's about the economy, inflation, and how his policies make life harder.
When we're back in power, we can expose his corruption, hold him accountable for the Epstein cover-up, pass real fixes, and--yes--finally make DC a state so this crap can't happen again. If Democrats get full control and still don't make DC a state, I might light the whole thing on fire myself. Seven hundred thousand people are being treated like props in a political stunt.
But right now? We can't afford to get dragged into a fight that helps him. It's dangerous, it's ugly, but it's a trap. Stay focused--on the economy, health care, and corruption. Voters want stability and leaders who actually give a damn about them, who listen to their struggles, and who proactively respond with real solutions.
Trump wants the election about crime, safety, and immigration--his turf. We win when it's about the economy, inflation, and how his policies make life harder. Don't let Trump dictate the terms. That's how we lost in 2016 and 2024. He couldn't pull it off in 2020 because COVID swallowed everything--and he botched it spectacularly. We can't wait for a crisis to save us again. Eyes on the ball. Stay focused. Stay grounded. Win on the things that actually touch people's lives and mirror their lived experience.

name: Judicial Watch Corruption Chronicles
subject: Judicial Watch Urges Supreme Court to Keep Fifth Circuit Ban on Counting Ballots Received After Election Day
body:
Judicial Watch announced that, on behalf of the Libertarian Party of
Mississippi, it filed a brief with the Supreme Court of the United
States that opposes the State of Mississippi’s attempt to
overturn the U.S. Court of Appeals for the Fifth Circuit’s
decision, which struck down a law allowing ballots received after
Election Day to be counted (Michael Watson, Mississippi Secretary of
State v. Republican National Committee, et al.,(No. 24-1260)).

[alt_text]

[*****]
August 13, 2025

United States that opposes the State of Mississippi’s attempt to
overturn the U.S. Court of Appeals for the Fifth Circuit’s
decision, which struck down a law allowing ballots received after
Election Day to be counted (Michael Watson, Mississippi Secretary of
State v. Republican National Committee, et al.,(No. 24-1260)).

body:
**⚠️10,000 URGENT SIGNATURES NEEDED: BAN CONGRESS FROM TRADING STOCKS ⚠️**

Add your name to support Senator Gillibrand’s push to ban stock trading by members of Congress, their families and the executive branch. | | [SIGN YOUR NAME >>](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/113250153/563144021/-266423418?refcode=LOC_EM_PET_2025.08.13_Stock-Ban_B1_F1_S1_C1_45AC_N-T0&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTkvMS83MjcyMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2YWY3OGI5My01Nzc4LWYwMTEtYjQ4MS02MDQ1YmRmZThlOWMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=AWJDo7JkR0SuZCze8mH5JxUrDNr6S0phdTPJ_UAPFGA=&emci=4d19c5b5-6874-f011-8dc9-6045bda9d96b&emdi=6af78b93-5778-f011-b481-6045bdfe8e9c&ceid=7659029)
---
Last month, a key Senate committee advanced a _bipartisan_ bill to **ban members of Congress, their families, and the president and vice president from owning or trading individual stocks.**
_But then Donald Trump stepped in because the bill would hold him accountable. And all but ONE Republican voted to kill it.**They failed.**_
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/113250154/563144022/-266423418?refcode=LOC_EM_PET_2025.08.13_Stock-Ban_B1_F1_S1_C1_45AC_N-T0&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTkvMS83MjcyMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2YWY3OGI5My01Nzc4LWYwMTEtYjQ4MS02MDQ1YmRmZThlOWMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=AWJDo7JkR0SuZCze8mH5JxUrDNr6S0phdTPJ_UAPFGA=&emci=4d19c5b5-6874-f011-8dc9-6045bda9d96b&emdi=6af78b93-5778-f011-b481-6045bdfe8e9c&ceid=7659029)
Senator Kirsten Gillibrand has been fighting for stock reform for years.
**She wrote and passed the original _STOCK Act_ to increase transparency in Congress — and she hasn’t stopped there. She’s been pushing to fully ban trading for lawmakers, their families and federal judges because public service should never be about personal profit.**
_The good news?_ Momentum is growing. The public is overwhelmingly in favor of banning congressional stock trading.
_The bad news?_ GOP leaders are siding with Trump and their own self-interest instead of the American people.
It’s time for us to step in:[**_Add your name to support Senator Gillibrand’s push to ban stock trading by members of Congress, their families and the executive branch._**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/113250155/563144023/-266423418?refcode=LOC_EM_PET_2025.08.13_Stock-Ban_B1_F1_S1_C1_45AC_N-T0&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTkvMS83MjcyMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2YWY3OGI5My01Nzc4LWYwMTEtYjQ4MS02MDQ1YmRmZThlOWMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=AWJDo7JkR0SuZCze8mH5JxUrDNr6S0phdTPJ_UAPFGA=&emci=4d19c5b5-6874-f011-8dc9-6045bda9d96b&emdi=6af78b93-5778-f011-b481-6045bdfe8e9c&ceid=7659029)
| [SIGN YOUR NAME >>](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/113250156/563144024/-266423418?refcode=LOC_EM_PET_2025.08.13_Stock-Ban_B1_F1_S1_C1_45AC_N-T0&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTkvMS83MjcyMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2YWY3OGI5My01Nzc4LWYwMTEtYjQ4MS02MDQ1YmRmZThlOWMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=AWJDo7JkR0SuZCze8mH5JxUrDNr6S0phdTPJ_UAPFGA=&emci=4d19c5b5-6874-f011-8dc9-6045bda9d96b&emdi=6af78b93-5778-f011-b481-6045bdfe8e9c&ceid=7659029)

This is a fight for public trust, basic ethics and a government that works for the people — not for profit.
Let’s send a clear message: We’re watching. And we demand better.
Thanks for speaking out,
Team Gillibrand

clean_body: ⚠️10,000 URGENT SIGNATURES NEEDED: BAN CONGRESS FROM TRADING STOCKS ⚠️ Add your name to support Senator Gillibrand’s push to ban stock trading by members of Congress, their families and the executive branch. | | Last month, a key Senate committee advanced a bipartisan bill to ban members of Congress, their families, and the president and vice president from owning or trading individual stocks. But then Donald Trump stepped in because the bill would hold him accountable. And all but ONE Republican voted to kill it.They failed. Senator Kirsten Gillibrand has been fighting for stock reform for years. She wrote and passed the original STOCK Act to increase transparency in Congress — and she hasn’t stopped there. She’s been pushing to fully ban trading for lawmakers, their families and federal judges because public service should never be about personal profit. The good news? Momentum is growing. The public is overwhelmingly in favor of banning congressional stock trading. The bad news? GOP leaders are siding with Trump and their own self-interest instead of the American people. It’s time for us to step in: | This is a fight for public trust, basic ethics and a government that works for the people — not for profit. Let’s send a clear message: We’re watching. And we demand better. Thanks for speaking out, Team Gillibrand * =

subject: The top Republican pollster just sounded the alarm for 2026

body:
The good news? It’s not the issues...
| **_A SECURE MEMO FROM HOUSE GOP LEADERSHIP_**
---
**Authorized by:**
---
[](http://links.conservativesfordjt.com/u/click?_t=05b03ef2209247bcbdad7fd5099cd670&_m=5a2ff9a061ea4976867b7da7ef963894&_e=QNna1emWO0ow7-H0DPUJ6OM1HmfdHzvbCH1haTWuhHiYf-e-owkN4ruefNNcx8kNKwwS9dcxdLo4jMVtylMVW785gp2ayTHP5wE8C_EuAJoCWqtcSMNnhhyfHrL2RliFIxwCLQdZj18CT6gINDvzUGMGB0KRVRkzq9QfrCTnai9g2L461mbD5yVWdD6ph0T91ellCRuaOxTEacYqcsJ89ovs-TaZN20BRBawsjG7VFa5ezPNeHSMVqL__u-vjOI7YUu_xNMxlKBXXCXW2VUMt8_HxaMPN7V358ok_9C3R25SK813iOjIPxhvy63JCJ9bw18pZlnitRif_ONOjTVd0U8UPw1RY8FNLcbeFZVm_He9m4uMHgFTVeFzx6_Q1eAX20WoIfqFnOrnq_3Oz4H75MOdozTahD_9-rKw_QzavR_9QEsWBIWYA0r3y4H8IR0BuqWE7ZLwlFMXFjN1EhUuuTslp62bhg2AbLK6XuQscNBWXZpQf-op0AT2_aTKpCxP0YaBdJh2HRGOoYIvs3i8X6Bsusd7Gdn8GQY5XZJAgHrk-sNWWd2Rr__tVfCw5BddKT3xHx3027Mk-6RLBePVmolkEF4SAvtIQEFuM7JB5hE%3D)
---
Friend,
---
When I gave up my nomination to become Ambassador to the United Nations in order to remain in Congress and pass the President’s “Big Beautiful Bill,” I vowed to make sure that he keeps his House majority in the midterms.
---
**Given the massive sacrifice I made, you can bet I’m going ALL IN to make sure the President can enact as much of his America First agenda into law as possible...**
---
_...And he can’t do that without a Republican majority in Congress for _**ALL FOUR YEARS**_ of his second presidential term! _
---
That is why I was so alarmed when I saw new polling that shows us trailing the Democrats by **_3 POINTS_** on the generic ballot poll.
---
And I’m not the only one who’s sounding the alarm...
---
**_Trump pollster sounds alarm for Republicans in 2026_**
[Source: _NJ.com_]
---
The good news is that I don’t believe we’re losing on the issues. Polling shows the Democrats have a record-low approval rating as they move further and further to the Left!
---
Instead, there are two things that show up in the polling that worry me: **__Voter apathy and being outspent by the Democrats’ political machine.__**
---
The latest reports show House Democrats are already raising record-breaking amounts of cash from lobbyists and special interests to _BUY_ the midterms, and it’s only going to get worse as we get closer to Election Day.
---
But I have the solution to both of those problems...
---
**In my capacity as Chairwoman of House Republican Leadership, I’ve approved a _500% MATCH_ for top grassroots conservatives to help us raise the funds we need to get every last Republican voter to the polls in the midterms and go toe-to-toe with the Democrats on the airwaves. **
---
If we do that, it won’t be a matter of merely defending our House majority – it will be a matter of how many more Democrat seats we FLIP!
---
[**So please, make a contribution of ANY amount to take advantage of this 500% matching opportunity and help us DEFEND the President’s House Majority._ **](http://links.conservativesfordjt.com/u/click?_t=05b03ef2209247bcbdad7fd5099cd670&_m=5a2ff9a061ea4976867b7da7ef963894&_e=QNna1emWO0ow7-H0DPUJ6OM1HmfdHzvbCH1haTWuhHiYf-e-owkN4ruefNNcx8kNKwwS9dcxdLo4jMVtylMVW785gp2ayTHP5wE8C_EuAJoCWqtcSMNnhhyfHrL2RliFIxwCLQdZj18CT6gINDvzUGMGB0KRVRkzq9QfrCTnai9g2L461mbD5yVWdD6ph0T91ellCRuaOxTEacYqcsJ89gb4p2OoJmzvQ6bKAwNMjXfpg9uDeTpSRhkmGqdzeLZVjCKw0j6ZO28eSlhD9UrwQnk6gSlQnVPpWrgPLrYpHSdCX-ZQsVKNszZARvQ42xCuIcEWN7Ny9ATDMmVWtJSFpJhAX5QAG6gMrR6RoiCdTGpTV4m_wCncTokGkR6qbTIL9S__CMOwdA30bozNLiXEnj7xBrWPbGxdTfrppOy7KpYE9JIDtVPCDfD6Jf4LTm8ScrwvITfbRmAodT8vZbOdrbp8hcaHKVq5_QsZj0jhfWbcfvGIMQBYHrC2D-YY8ujQjg_GibYqtUnGdK2YHcyZ3ZFx0BukqRjRLxK6r6WmGLp-59BGhl2nP4PlzV1id4JQp35zDTf3ybTcsVeE0UgVwnVm0Hn9P9puj64BfUnaPFY%3D)

In my capacity as Chairwoman of House Republican Leadership, I’ve approved a 500% MATCH for top grassroots conservatives to help us raise the funds we need to get every last Republican voter to the polls in the midterms and go toe-to-toe with the Democrats on the airwaves. If we do that, it won’t be a matter of merely defending our House majority – it will be a matter of how many more Democrat seats we FLIP! Thank you, Rep. Elise Stefanik Chairwoman of House Republican Leadership Paid for by Team Elise, a joint fundraising committee authorized by and composed of Elise for Congress and E-PAC. www.elisestefanik.com PO Box 500 Glens Falls, NY 12801

Peter,

_**“Asshole. Buffoon. Mofo. Wannabe Hitler. Gangster. Vile villain.”**_

Those are just a few words Rep. Jasmine Crockett used to describe President Trump. But let’s be honest: those insults aren’t just about him. They’re about you. About me. About anyone who leans conservative, wears a uniform, or believes in this country’s founding values.

They think we’re backward. They believe we are in the way. And worst of all, they think we’ll take it.

**As a former Navy SEAL Officer and Marine Corps veteran, I’ve faced far worse than name-calling. I’ve deployed to over 70 countries. I’ve led warriors into battle. I’ve endured life-threatening missions.** And the most important lesson I’ve learned? Quiet professionalism always wins the day.

_[](http://links.itsourgreatamerica.com/u/click?_t=442fb7cf105f4725a8bda0b6bcffc1bd&_m=c8d5b79870bb452bbb5409049ccb8c28&_e=cbQGluZpfE_Ag4fJzi_X3y4f8b4DTMe717vpzS8HSJRoia5UbnxeMkVd7_sn1dBniNOzu7g2aM5nh-JVIamqwRyyEidTyghf7R76lUudt0Ue5WjqHdXHBiXJgS2GujUftMOxgk0lRQGVJR6QjjKR-dZiBSwWkcLldw6fVPk0ujyG6l_-2VDwvjeZLD9ok6UV9IvxFac4D5sXjY-oft8K_IDF1A6HqgoN2hVChhV2GWH5Nfv05Otg5BEQXsglzpUrtO58dzyXotg-Ehn1GQEUt088IKZ2N7Lrrnlzl3PJOqksPxD207MIyDvVSPyWVfC-Bsr-K9S2c-Jti39fcaJnVTIyHtx4x181zFycuj2fbyYrhKeoWhv9_f63HBhcit0PJFTRV6SzHJpe2wI5-9jrSF4cSDSBHuqbs_AEt5EvOvpkEp6hvj7eCikXg0HQw7bZrIOUxslUc7gYtLps-7fo5pl-Jfnwao-yoHPsgbJLczF7zgb5bP0dOda7pp4zGnbYlwcs8rnCXsQtGdsD8IXpv0xmrRA-o7l0sOWtXDGF0q4yJzk-bkLDlE2AxAXJNmxzAUOvw1FgdTE_JL56tQa82cyo5mx9HBGJ1n8desdqlbUuofeWi5wW2f0ZK_W3lWNUaSVT2qbg77Ji24P6tlK0IJU113L8lptGeBjuqFIPLqBM9dVfOh6VhjGzUEp5Zf_qKQoQlqpRXDb4JPOKANs_WjkllRq6MsntPu4RlXPczTAlw1Si-MvHgthsb2hf2C5S)_
That’s why I’m running for U.S. Senate in Minnesota — not to yell or mock, but to**fight with discipline, humility, and relentless purpose.**

I didn’t plan on entering politics. But the more I came home from deployment, the more I saw a Minnesota I didn’t recognize. Tim Walz’s lieutenant governor — the person I’m running against — isn’t just radically out of step with our values; she embodies the same hard-left extremism that’s trying to rewrite our entire society.

While Walz called for calm in 2020, she was preparing a lawsuit against the Minneapolis Police. As crime soared and businesses burned, she blamed the people trying to hold the line. These are the people in charge now — and they’re not moderating.

**You can close this email and forget my name. Or you can help send the second Navy SEAL to the U.S. Senate — someone trained for chaos, unafraid of the fight, and grounded in service, not ego. **

**[Will you chip in $1, $5, or even $50 to help me win this battle?](http://links.itsourgreatamerica.com/u/click?_t=442fb7cf105f4725a8bda0b6bcffc1bd&_m=c8d5b79870bb452bbb5409049ccb8c28&_e=cbQGluZpfE_Ag4fJzi_X3y4f8b4DTMe717vpzS8HSJRoia5UbnxeMkVd7_sn1dBniNOzu7g2aM5nh-JVIamqwRyyEidTyghf7R76lUudt0Ue5WjqHdXHBiXJgS2GujUftMOxgk0lRQGVJR6QjjKR-dZiBSwWkcLldw6fVPk0ujyG6l_-2VDwvjeZLD9ok6UV9IvxFac4D5sXjY-oft8K_IDF1A6HqgoN2hVChhV2GWH5Nfv05Otg5BEQXsglzpUrtO58dzyXotg-Ehn1GQEUtwoXWFsfsq9-gjIC242wWDb4i7DHjgusOev6bmYXXokbv9-5h7Dj_mAEBllKT91l2iqXhsNJzFZ2wTGsIBs5tls1yt8Osf3N45VjFemfayi67E7-22FZlvavb7cujmSmVIjAo4O6od8-c1E6jkcjagNlRXDWPaA-bbPXSZYsEURroiOl3M1sf-tttskkUAjOcpgvBmv4xRZEvMZWvhq1YjzA4Kcc4yROp58AMLnMF8gK5-fuw64m5O9kvZwOmNgVurJr5gxG8VADWkdptbTun2EQhXWff2W2Hp-JoIU1vh10IjXuUgZFF58qxN4pVFR7ay48C01ZzGSXoy7I5-Acnx7sJA8ZcXZA9wqUnPafLgrOTREYWJZjbqoGbnX6FWrZWhflZ59VeQ-vuQ-QBTdGdXE5qc-jts-_sgeV4wbCOxjf1V_fCZb5S1xwXMUw8K7fuaooyOh5RSv5v7xIoXcWgK8PiuWVvpPhFOADhbYO7Ue_)**

I grew up playing hockey. **I joined the Marine Corps on my 18th birthday in October 2001, less than two months after 9/11.** I served because I love this country, wanted to make my mom proud, and knew I had something to give. Twenty-four years later, I still feel that calling. It’s just a different kind of battlefield.

This won’t be easy. Minnesota hasn’t gone red in a presidential election since 1976. And I know I’m the underdog — just a regular guy from Minnesota who’s been asked to do extraordinary things one more time. With your help, I know we can flip this Senate seat for the Republican Party - but that will require you getting involved TODAY. And you have a choice.

__ I’ve earned advanced degrees from Harvard and Johns Hopkins. I’ve trained in nuclear deterrence. I’ve worked across cultures, built teams under pressure, and led calmly when it mattered most. But none of that compares to the challenge ahead of me now — earning your trust and building a movement powerful enough to flip this seat.

**I’m not asking for a blank check. I’m asking for a chance.**

[**CONTRIBUTE WHAT YOU CAN →**](http://links.itsourgreatamerica.com/u/click?_t=442fb7cf105f4725a8bda0b6bcffc1bd&_m=c8d5b79870bb452bbb5409049ccb8c28&_e=cbQGluZpfE_Ag4fJzi_X3y4f8b4DTMe717vpzS8HSJRoia5UbnxeMkVd7_sn1dBniNOzu7g2aM5nh-JVIamqwRyyEidTyghf7R76lUudt0Ue5WjqHdXHBiXJgS2GujUftMOxgk0lRQGVJR6QjjKR-dZiBSwWkcLldw6fVPk0ujyG6l_-2VDwvjeZLD9ok6UV9IvxFac4D5sXjY-oft8K_IDF1A6HqgoN2hVChhV2GWH5Nfv05Otg5BEQXsglzpUrtO58dzyXotg-Ehn1GQEUt21u7K5M5arvasWfa1OnzC1tGfyPNvahziP7C8k-obgOKpGtEe7tnylObSpouZqHi5tD2ULTm_8BlRh5rPh6iP9frO02WYSdpdrEmNlkt702OOoHA17JPRMpcgd9XfPGfNB2q8FXEo9wm0hpVUOd4DPrzsvQAkwLGuBswhV99hjF3X5vGWNttSu_h7xRJSUB8SN-74msZbpei2oq_jrINPV6Wqdw02UxVrogQRKopOSAtKOoiRuWi-BJ1X7yh0it4bRbYUWvx-T-NMdL1BPG4ihtINC_wtx972O8aIABfH0MVjwcScGnN3lev9bnlwfdBYpKtsKNbnTtm1rkYiXWnjnPw1FqFg56VsXoEYsC7ksja4BRr8zO7P5bCU87VwWkPCUJUx2CRnlVjwZssBcrtKi4lTxw7COLpakIJ-qJp-RhUf125J80PwtX2Bx5fAeSrk-E1NJX-VpDQ1WirE2EXW-59_DuZYhvAj2N8_jqRn7m)
Because we still live in a country worth defending. Respect and results still matter. And I believe people like you are ready to fight — not with insults, but with action.

[](http://links.itsourgreatamerica.com/u/click?_t=442fb7cf105f4725a8bda0b6bcffc1bd&_m=c8d5b79870bb452bbb5409049ccb8c28&_e=cbQGluZpfE_Ag4fJzi_X3y4f8b4DTMe717vpzS8HSJRoia5UbnxeMkVd7_sn1dBniNOzu7g2aM5nh-JVIamqwRyyEidTyghf7R76lUudt0Ue5WjqHdXHBiXJgS2GujUftMOxgk0lRQGVJR6QjjKR-dZiBSwWkcLldw6fVPk0ujyG6l_-2VDwvjeZLD9ok6UV9IvxFac4D5sXjY-oft8K_IDF1A6HqgoN2hVChhV2GWH5Nfv05Otg5BEQXsglzpUrtO58dzyXotg-Ehn1GQEUt2OVX8TbNC0XVO2vsZ09ZPQdGRT2he7iUyt2d6LYUNf1cTxSJH6KBWg2uURU-NwJd4wix2KKN9ndIwY4n5nEUswQwwLSbzqYrAiISrvmoFpAJGaHU-SPqHvljsOXzNVUJSaQfId68pBpAalIs13z_1XsCqSqBGVVmWDWcgnfrTlqXrr5l-5XiuerCuOGLbAkXZm5Q7l-sko4x8S4ibYWr-sqtsq0lHxZ5Hp05zi3BqAe2SD9CjjydjUiaO212KiUqQbtyB7cehgOjkXJB5Va05avEobaxaLRNnUYVATHt0w1GE4RI2rt2CFtSzfDRllmz-JUiShpdLzBGWDVqqZqlaW1dpZIU7twMvLBBdvhzYjQRZTor2rWgGLehGAlwQY8aUuqzuqavqixHmmPfjYNW7dw2VgpRwkyZ9-LDrchv9vvcVxrFhJA6b0TeQtO3TZrfzYBLzfO0ExZ3YBw62kWUJaCUkTHf7FRFpGTbtzvRec2)

name: Jim Jordan
subject: Buckle up
body:

Fellow Conservative,

Congress is like a battlefield—thrilling, mission-driven, and full of conflict. At least no one's shooting at us here. Well, not with guns, anyway.

The out-of-touch fake news "reporters" at Politico decided they would target the most dangerous men in DC: Navy SEALs.

We all ran for office because we were still hungry to protect and fight for our country. The war may be over for us, but we can't abandon the part of our lives that made us who we are. We were part of an elite unit on the front lines, and Congress is somewhere else we can be out front doing something special for our country.

_**Yet the liberal news corporations, who _desperately_ want to keep the status quo, _attacked us_ for wanting to take on the Swamp establishment and business-as-usual going on in our government.**_

All of us –**Navy SEALs Tim Sheehy, Eli Crane, and Ryan Zinke** – are teaming up to stop career politicians and lazy bureaucrats, but we're up against more than just the DC establishment. We're up against the liberal media, RINOs, and revenge-seeking Democrats.

**We need you, Fellow Conservative to keep us on the frontlines, bucking the corrupt status quo! **[](http://links.conservativesdefendingfreedom.com/u/click?_t=91d01aa68bbe4105984439520ca0f0af&_m=fd733c0e83d448108dcbf17424fcac6b&_e=WhEvKdtj9-of0V6rGoLDoPc-2LAhVKIsjghNMVaiz1aOFlkcUMaUekn_hWPT5NI1P5l1WO_ZjsxwimMMVsK6s_DeOkpsnXU2bxX4ai7wrFvRM3ROndDokidmb21DuaNVIKTi4T6tgefnNWyGOg6me2zMeCdaaHsWR9V3g84Z5n_8n6Ww9W78o2942EFHL3vftwpTzKmnfOwws4PUdBJM9gAdPcrPP6EqNYPExFgMvMkZX_GWigoMt_gn4i6lO_bnoXNKuqZkptdcOqj4ncP_nSQ-ZL2_aU5vHI7KvLcG1hx8RfzWq1y4aRWvSw7mGSHdN6sYjCBR1yliSeg3jaYccQClXFfiqtX880iglb5YKHsT11Uu1Q8PjKgzADt8Es6_Uihn12tfouIH6wIxewKygyaaZ3nd8pYA145hP719oGiz73iediJqbsV6Yk8FeqziGrF7H4KMooaawevRTStW6D8VyLjBSR3KKuEUPbihnVEqSsE9oH1x7Tf564kvulOnKNh0HdhKDGYZHJbHXue7hR7RBNwXsJwiP6RFNf8uelYaWwPTy6oulYz1R3lDfn-Zm1437S7YJVuV7pAeiB8jOBxxXjotPrTa6K-ieYsa5iuwE5DJqa6T6xhWgjIqSri0cOVg8LcjDBdBWL_kLWz2dbN-fq_sLjBWmh-77LU5TNzcmldFaZpL1AnaAEKLFtZYHiKStSsDl_dMp4_qoiPbag%3D%3D)

clean_body: They’re targeting the most dangerous men in DC: Navy SEALs. | Fellow Conservative, Congress is like a battlefield—thrilling, mission-driven, and full of conflict. At least no one's shooting at us here. Well, not with guns, anyway. The out-of-touch fake news "reporters" at Politico decided they would target the most dangerous men in DC: Navy SEALs. We all ran for office because we were still hungry to protect and fight for our country. The war may be over for us, but we can't abandon the part of our lives that made us who we are. We were part of an elite unit on the front lines, and Congress is somewhere else we can be out front doing something special for our country. Yet the liberal news corporations, who desperately want to keep the status quo, attacked us for wanting to take on the Swamp establishment and business-as-usual going on in our government. All of us –Navy SEALs Tim Sheehy, Eli Crane, and Ryan Zinke – are teaming up to stop career politicians and lazy bureaucrats, but we're up against more than just the DC establishment. We're up against the liberal media, RINOs, and revenge-seeking Democrats. We need you, Fellow Conservative to keep us on the frontlines, bucking the corrupt status quo! -> If the media wants to attack us for having a "warrior mentality" - the mentality to do whatever it takes to achieve a mission... -> If the media wants to attack us for supporting President Trump's MAGA movement - the movement that says we can make America great... -> If the media wants to attack us for taking on the government corruption, fraud, and waste - which has been exposed by Trump's DOGE department... ....Then they don't understand WHY Donald J. Trump and ALL of us were elected! As SEALs, we all shoot straight with each other. We're going to shoot straight with you, too: This hit piece was horsesht and part of a larger conspiracy to silence us. If they can silence us, they can sure as hell silence you. Thank you so much for your time, Tim Sheehy Eli Crane Ryan Zinke Three Navy SEALs Serving in Congress | " "I SERVED AS A NAVY SEAL, BUILT ONE OF THE LARGEST AERIAL FIREFIGHTING COMPANIES IN AMERICA CREATING OVER 200 MONTANA JOBS, AND STARTED A VETERAN-LED CATTLE RANCHING AND FEEDING OPERATION. WHETHER IT WAS IN WAR OR BUSINESS, I SEE PROBLEMS AND SOLVE THEM. AMERICA NEEDS CONSERVATIVE LEADERS WHO LOVE OUR COUNTRY. I'M RUNNING FOR THE U.S. SENATE BECAUSE OUR CAMPAIGN IS ABOUT SERVICE, DUTY, AND COUNTRY -- NOT POLITICS AS USUAL." * | PAID FOR BY TIM SHEEHY FOR MONTANA Use of Tim Sheehy, Eli Crane, and Ryan Zinke's military rank, job titles, and photographs in uniform does not imply endorsement by the Department of the Navy or the Department of Defense.

Pete Hegseth has aligned himself with this self-described Christian nationalist. | | |

| | [](https://click.everyaction.com/k/113251564/563148274/862233165?refcode=EM_F_250813Women_N_JZ_90DO_12_G_N_LOGO&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAwNy8xLzg4NDk1IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjlmYzEyNmYyLTU5NzgtZjAxMS1iNDgxLTYwNDViZGZlOGU5YyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=KTqIgake83jsWygsXuJhRfBXp5kbDteWV6HEdcLsK9Q=)

_“Women are the kind of people that people are meant to come out of.”

“I would support the 19th Amendment to be repealed.”

“Families should vote as a household, with the husband and father casting the vote.” _

**These are all quotes from a massively influential pastor and self-described Christian nationalist named Douglas Wilson. In a recent interview with _CNN_ , Wilson admitted that he would like America to become a patriarchal society where men are dominant and women are expected to submit to their husbands. The interview has been shared widely, and we’re linking to a clip below so you can see it for yourself. **

But while many people are sharing the interview because it is flagrant and disturbing, Defense Secretary Pete Hegseth reposted it with the text, "All of Christ for All of Life."

Chief Pentagon spokesman Sean Parnell told _NPR_ that Hegseth is a "proud member of a church affiliated with the Congregation of Reformed Evangelical Churches," **which was founded by Wilson.**
---
[](https://click.everyaction.com/k/113251566/563148275/862233165?refcode=EM_F_250813Women_N_JZ_90DO_12_G_N_P1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAwNy8xLzg4NDk1IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjlmYzEyNmYyLTU5NzgtZjAxMS1iNDgxLTYwNDViZGZlOGU5YyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=KTqIgake83jsWygsXuJhRfBXp5kbDteWV6HEdcLsK9Q=)
---
We have been sounding the alarm, as many of Trump’s appointees and policymakers in the MAGA movement have made it clear that they support these ideologies. These aren’t just comments by random trolls on the internet. These are the strongly held beliefs of powerful men who are the ones writing policy about our bodies, our safety, our well-being, and our _**_rights_**_.

But here’s the thing: **The _best defense_ against this anti-woman movement is to elect pro-choice, pro-women women to political offices across the country. **

When Wilson was asked if he believes women should be allowed to have leadership roles in government, he answered, “No.”

What other policies should we expect to see from the men in power who follow the teachings of this church? At Her Bold Move, we refuse to wait around and find out...

[**We MUST continue to elect pro-choice, pro-WOMEN women up and down the ballot to block chauvinistic, misogynistic officials from threatening our hard-fought rights as women. If you are as disturbed by this interview as we are, chip in $20.26 or more today to join us in this fight. →**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/hbm-women/?refcode=EM_F_250813Women_N_JZ_90DO_12_G_N_L1&amount=20.26)

Team, I recently introduced a resolution calling on the Senate to recognize Black Women’s Equal Pay Day! On average, Black women only make _**66 cents**_ for every dollar a white man makes. This economic disparity leaves Black women and their loved ones behind — **and it’s unacceptable. ** In one of the wealthiest countries in the world, Black women shouldn’t have to work almost _**seven months longer**_ just to earn what white men do. My Democratic colleagues in the Senate and I are committed to finding solutions that will close that gap and create a more equitable economy. [**If you’re with me in the fight for equal pay, will you please add your name today to endorse my Black Women’s Equal Pay Day resolution? I need 150 people from your state to sign on by 11:59 PM to show that Americans are committed to fighting for equality, so please don’t wait! **](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/113251861/563149035/1826092479?source=LOC_EM_PET_2025.08.13_Equal-Pay_B1_F1_S1_C1_U1_N-T1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85Mjg3NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3N2E3MGY1Zi01YTc4LWYwMTEtYjQ4MS02MDQ1YmRmZThlOWMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=zIQacWO1G6KTVlJYpuEYkRB7O9zSk11bUAFJvpBCFg4=&emci=e773da63-8e74-f011-8dc9-6045bda9d96b&emdi=77a70f5f-5a78-f011-b481-6045bdfe8e9c&ceid=11913588) | | [**SUPPORT EQUAL PAY TODAY »**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/113251863/563149037/1826092479?source=LOC_EM_PET_2025.08.13_Equal-Pay_B1_F1_S1_C1_U1_N-T1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85Mjg3NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3N2E3MGY1Zi01YTc4LWYwMTEtYjQ4MS02MDQ1YmRmZThlOWMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=zIQacWO1G6KTVlJYpuEYkRB7O9zSk11bUAFJvpBCFg4=&emci=e773da63-8e74-f011-8dc9-6045bda9d96b&emdi=77a70f5f-5a78-f011-b481-6045bdfe8e9c&ceid=11913588)

Friend,

The truth is clear: Senator Ghazala Hashmi’s record is one of radical policies, extreme votes, and a relentless push to make Virginia look like California or New York.

This isn’t hyperbole. **Her record proves it:**

* **Gun grab:** She voted to ban the firearms Virginians use to protect their homes and even tried to slap on a 5 day waiting period to purchase one. (SB 1181, SB 880, SB 891)

* **Abortion and gender sanctuary:** She tried to make Virginia a safe haven for abortion-on-demand and irreversible gender procedures — even for minors. (SB 278)

* **California-style energy control:** She backed a scheme that would let Richmond bureaucrats manage your thermostat while your bills skyrocket. (SB 1100)

* **Campus chaos:** She ran one-sided hearings to protect radical protestors while ignoring Jewish students’ safety.

We cannot afford her extremism.

**That’s why John Reid is stepping up.**

John is a commonsense voice for the people — a leader who will fight back against the Democrats’ radical ideas, restore balance in Richmond, and put Virginia families first. He’ll protect our constitutional rights, push back against runaway energy costs, and stand for safe, accountable communities.

But to defeat Ghazala Hashmi, John Reid needs us in his corner right now.
**This race will be close — every dollar counts.**

clean_body: | | | | What Virginia Democrats aren't saying... Friend, The truth is clear: Senator Ghazala Hashmi’s record is one of radical policies, extreme votes, and a relentless push to make Virginia look like California or New York. This isn’t hyperbole. Her record proves it: Gun grab: She voted to ban the firearms Virginians use to protect their homes and even tried to slap on a 5 day waiting period to purchase one. (SB 1181, SB 880, SB 891) Abortion and gender sanctuary: She tried to make Virginia a safe haven for abortion-on-demand and irreversible gender procedures — even for minors. (SB 278) California-style energy control: She backed a scheme that would let Richmond bureaucrats manage your thermostat while your bills skyrocket. (SB 1100) Campus chaos: She ran one-sided hearings to protect radical protestors while ignoring Jewish students’ safety. We cannot afford her extremism. That’s why John Reid is stepping up. John is a commonsense voice for the people — a leader who will fight back against the Democrats’ radical ideas, restore balance in Richmond, and put Virginia families first. He’ll protect our constitutional rights, push back against runaway energy costs, and stand for safe, accountable communities. But to defeat Ghazala Hashmi, John Reid needs us in his corner right now. This race will be close — every dollar counts. | | | The stakes could not be higher. With your support, we can reject an out-of-touch radical with a proven fighter for Virginia’s values. Let’s send a clear message: Virginians won’t be silenced, controlled, or ignored. For Virginia, The Republican Party of Virginia P.S. John Reid is ready to fight for you — but he can’t do it alone. Rush your donation today and help take back our Commonwealth. | \- PAID FOR AND AUTHORIZED BY THE REPUBLICAN PARTY OF VIRGINIA
