name: Chrissy Houlahan
subject: August Update for Derek
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Chrissy Houlahan for Congress
body:
| | | [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/113253448/563153310/-1072566757?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDIvMS82NDkxMyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzMDgyYTE5MC01ZTc4LWYwMTEtYjQ4MS02MDQ1YmRmZThlOWMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=9VxXQ3oLSRD4G-C2-iyXxoLlOczcA5URsa-wbhfrXpA=&emci=5a987fa5-7574-f011-8dc9-6045bda9d96b&emdi=3082a190-5e78-f011-b481-6045bdfe8e9c&ceid=21278485)
---
| | **A NOTE FROM CHRISSY**
---
| | **Obama's message to democrats **
---
At a recent fundraiser in New Jersey, Barack Obama had a message to Democrats. He said **toughen up, don’t despair, have courage, focus on winning races, defend core values,** and**push back** against actions that undermine our democracy.

Yes to all of that. As a party, we need to stay true to the middle class values that have delivered so much progress over the decades. And we need to support candidates who can win. The time to do that is now. There are state and local elections this November and midterms next year. Stay involved, stay engaged, and stay committed and we bring the MAGA control of our government to an end.

**I'm committed to doing everything I can to defend my seat in 2026 and help flip the House blue, and I'm grateful to have you by my side. **
---
| | **A WIN FOR EDUCATION**
---
After withholding $7 million in funds already promised to PA-06, the Department of Education recently said it would release billions of dollars to schools across the country. I want to personally thank Pennsylvania educators and families who took action in calling their representatives, Governor Shapiro, and Democratic Attorneys General for filing suit against this illegal action.

This is a major win for our kids – but our fight to defend public education from Trump and the GOP's attacks continues.
---
| | **VOTING BY MAIL IN PENNSYLVANIA**
---
**Have you registered to vote by mail? **

If you're planning to vote by absentee or mail-in ballot in the November 2025 election, you need to register to do that. If there’s a chance you won’t be able to get to your local polling location on November 4,**I encourage you to visit[vote.pa.gov](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/113253456/563153315/-338555275?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDIvMS82NDkxMyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzMDgyYTE5MC01ZTc4LWYwMTEtYjQ4MS02MDQ1YmRmZThlOWMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=9VxXQ3oLSRD4G-C2-iyXxoLlOczcA5URsa-wbhfrXpA=&emci=5a987fa5-7574-f011-8dc9-6045bda9d96b&emdi=3082a190-5e78-f011-b481-6045bdfe8e9c&ceid=21278485) and sign up now.**

Here are a few important dates to keep in mind:

**Last day to register to vote:** Oct. 20, 2025
**Last day to request a mail-in or absentee ballot:** Oct. 28, 2025
**General Election Day:** Nov. 4, 2025
---
| | **VOLUNTEERS NEEDED IN CHESTER AND BERKS**
---
If you're looking for an opportunity to get more engaged with Pennsylvania campaigns and elect strong Democrats into office, look no further: **The Chester County Democratic Committee (CCDC) and the Berks County Democratic Committee (Berks Dems) are looking for volunteers! **

Whether it's door knocking, making phone calls, or setting up campaign events, you can join us and help make a difference in the coming elections.

To volunteer in Chester County: Visit [**chescodems.org**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/113253466/563153324/1543550354?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDIvMS82NDkxMyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzMDgyYTE5MC01ZTc4LWYwMTEtYjQ4MS02MDQ1YmRmZThlOWMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=9VxXQ3oLSRD4G-C2-iyXxoLlOczcA5URsa-wbhfrXpA=&emci=5a987fa5-7574-f011-8dc9-6045bda9d96b&emdi=3082a190-5e78-f011-b481-6045bdfe8e9c&ceid=21278485), call 610-692-5811, or email office@chescodems.org.

To volunteer in Berks County: Visit [**berks-dems.org**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/113253477/563153334/24127657?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDIvMS82NDkxMyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzMDgyYTE5MC01ZTc4LWYwMTEtYjQ4MS02MDQ1YmRmZThlOWMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=9VxXQ3oLSRD4G-C2-iyXxoLlOczcA5URsa-wbhfrXpA=&emci=5a987fa5-7574-f011-8dc9-6045bda9d96b&emdi=3082a190-5e78-f011-b481-6045bdfe8e9c&ceid=21278485), or call 610-376-2304.
---
Thank you for your support, Derek.

There's work to be done,

Chrissy
| | [Contribute](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/113253480/563153346/685235109?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk1156-ot-nd&recurring=0&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDIvMS82NDkxMyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzMDgyYTE5MC01ZTc4LWYwMTEtYjQ4MS02MDQ1YmRmZThlOWMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=9VxXQ3oLSRD4G-C2-iyXxoLlOczcA5URsa-wbhfrXpA=)

Devon, PA 19333

name: Lena Moffitt, Evergreen
subject: TAKE ACTION against this authoritarian move to dismantle climate protections
disclaimer_text: paid for by Evergreen Action
body:
Remind EPA that it works for us, not corporate polluters
| | | | [](https://actnow.evergreenaction.com/s/3872351/87SdQ4wZ) |
---|---|---
| EPA’s job is to protect people and our environment from dangerous pollution. But Trump and Administrator Zeldin are abdicating this responsibility by launching a creeping authoritarian attempt to reverse the legal and scientific foundation for cutting climate pollution.

We can’t let EPA abandon its mission and America’s future just to please Big Oil billionaires. [**Speak out against this dangerous move by submitting a public comment today.**](https://actnow.evergreenaction.com/s/3872352/87SdQ4wZ) [TAKE ACTION](https://actnow.evergreenaction.com/s/3872353/87SdQ4wZ)
---
---
| Friend—

As part of its ongoing plan to render our federal government incapable of protecting and supporting American workers and families, the Trump regime is making a reckless attack on climate action.

It recently released a dangerous plan to overturn a fundamental legal and scientific finding that gives the Environmental Protection Agency (EPA) the authority to regulate climate pollution.

This could lead to an unregulated free-for-all for corporations to release dangerous climate pollution from cars, trucks, power plants, and oil and gas operations.

In other words, **corporate polluters will be free to do as they please and profit at the expense of American families, who will be left to deal with more climate-fueled disasters, more preventable deaths, and higher energy costs.** It would be total chaos, which is why we need to do everything we can to prevent Trump and his EPA from getting away with it.

We have until **September 15** to flood EPA with the voices of the people. We need to remind EPA Administrator Lee Zeldin that the agency is accountable to the law of this land and doesn’t serve the fossil fuel industry. EPA serves to protect people and the health of our environment. [**Will you send EPA a message today to say that it serves the American people—not the fossil fuel industry—and demand the agency does its job?**](https://actnow.evergreenaction.com/s/3872354/87SdQ4wZ) |
---
[SUBMIT A COMMENT](https://actnow.evergreenaction.com/s/3872355/87SdQ4wZ)
---
---
| The EPA has _ONE job_ : to protect the American people and our shared environment from dangerous pollution. But Trump and EPA are abandoning that mission to shield polluters from accountability—at whatever the cost to our climate, health, and future—in a creeping move of authoritarianism that is reckless, baseless, and unlawful.

And let me be clear: This isn’t just an attack on climate action.

➡️ It’s an **assault on science, truth, and our very livelihoods** , which depend on clean water and breathable air.

➡️ It’s a **massive handout to Trump’s corporate polluter pals** who helped get him elected.

➡️ And it’s an **effort to make climate denial the official policy of the federal government** , opening the door to higher energy bills, dirtier air, and deadlier disasters.

But we know that no amount of denial is going to stop the extreme heat waves, wildfires, droughts, and storms that will only get worse the longer we delay our transition away from dirty fossil fuels. **That’s why it’s critical we raise our voices right now to**[**tell EPA NOT to finalize this dangerous proposal that will worsen climate change and endanger public health.**](https://actnow.evergreenaction.com/s/3872356/87SdQ4wZ) |
---
[SUBMIT A COMMENT](https://actnow.evergreenaction.com/s/3872357/87SdQ4wZ)
---
---
| Thanks for taking action today. |
---
| | |
---
### Lena Moffitt
Executive Director
Evergreen Action
---
---
* * *
---
| _Evergreen is building the ambitious, actionable policy roadmap for an all-out mobilization to defeat climate change—and to create millions of jobs in a thriving, just, and inclusive clean energy future. None of this would be possible without your support._ |
---
[DONATE](https://actnow.evergreenaction.com/s/3872358/87SdQ4wZ)
---
---
---
| | [ ](https://evergreenaction.com/?utm_source=digital_template&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=evergreen&utm_content=footer)
---
Follow Evergreen Action on Bluesky and LinkedIn.
---

---|---

---

name: Nancy Pelosi
subject: please please please
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Nancy Pelosi for Congress
body:
---

name: The Real Texas PAC
subject: Trump targets YOU - look!!
body:
Donald Trump just signed an executive order targeting ActBlue — the platform that powers nearly every grassroots Democratic campaign in America.
He’s not going after billionaires or corporate PACs. He’s going after us — the small-dollar donors who power progressive candidates and movements.
This is a direct attack on the heart of our democracy. And if we don’t fight back now, he’ll keep going. Chip in NOW to stand against this blatant act of authoritarian rule >>> [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/rtp-abeo?refcode=071825_3]
CHIP IN NOW TO DEFEND ACTBLUE AGAINST TRUMP >>> [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/rtp-abeo?refcode=071825_3]
Trump has launched a direct attack on the grassroots. And if we don’t fight back now, there's no telling how far he'll take this.
Rush $7 to defend ActBlue and protect the future of small-dollar democracy: [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/rtp-abeo?refcode=071825_3]
CHIP IN NOW TO DEFEND ACTBLUE AGAINST TRUMP >>> [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/rtp-abeo?refcode=071825_3]
Imagine this:
You chip in $5 to support a pro-choice woman running for Congress. Or a first-time statehouse challenger. Or a school board candidate fighting book bans.
Now imagine the President of the United States signs an executive order to investigate — and dismantle — the platform you used to make that donation.
Not a right-wing conspiracy theory. Not a hypothetical.
That just happened.
Donald Trump is abusing executive power to go after ActBlue — the secure, trusted platform that powers nearly every grassroots Democratic campaign in the country.
He’s not targeting dark money. He’s not going after billionaire-funded super PACs. He’s coming after you — the small-dollar donors who fuel this movement.
We launched a $25,000 emergency fund to defend the platform that keeps this movement alive — but we’re still $13,000 short. And time is running out. If we don’t speak up, they’ll silence us. Chip in $7 or more to help us fight back before it’s too late: [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/rtp-abeo?refcode=071825_3]
If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation to The Real Texas PAC will go through immediately: DONATE $5 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/rtp-twosenateseats?express_lane=true&refcode=071825_3&amount=5]

Contributions or gifts to The Real Texas PAC are not tax deductible. Contributions from corporations, labor organizations, treasury funds, and federal government contractors are prohibited. Only U.S. citizens or legal permanent residents are eligible to contribute. An Individual can contribute up to $5,000 to The Real Texas PAC per calendar year. Married couples may together give a total of $10,000 per calendar year. Federal political action committees (PACs) can contribute up to $5,000 per calendar year. The first $5,000 contributed in a calendar year from federally permissible sources will be deposited in The Real Texas PAC's contribution account. name: Abigail Spanberger
subject: Two polls
body:
Peter, it’s
Abigail Spanberger. In the span of one day, two outlets released polls for
my race for Virginia Governor.

The first had me running way ahead of my opponent. The second had us
neck-and-neck.

Now, what these polls tell us is that there are a lot of undecided voters
out there, and the campaign that's able to raise the money necessary to
reach these folks will win. We launched our first TV and digital ads of
the general election, and your support will help us keep those ads
running.

So, I'm asking you directly,
Peter:

[ https://secure.actblue.com/donate/wes-em-20250813-1?refcode=em-20250813-1&refcode2=452_1086043_kRSGMG&akid=452%2E1086043%2EkRSGMG ]Will you split a contribution of any amount between my campaign and Wes
Moore ahead of our mid-month fundraising deadline? The money we raise can
pay for the ads and organizers that will lead us to victory on November
4th.

[ https://secure.actblue.com/donate/wes-em-20250813-1?amount=10&refcode=em-20250813-1&refcode2=452_1086043_kRSGMG&akid=452%2E1086043%2EkRSGMG ]Donate $10 ››

Thanks for all you do,

Abigail

[ https://secure.actblue.com/donate/wes-em-20250813-1?refcode=em-20250813-1&refcode2=452_1086043_kRSGMG&akid=452%2E1086043%2EkRSGMG ]Spanberger

name: Deb Haaland
subject: Trump and MAGA Republicans are ripping away critical investments
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR AND AUTHORIZED BY DEB FOR NEW MEXICO
body:
Trump wants us to accept less. I believe we deserve more.
# [](https://act.debhaaland.com/go/133?t=1&akid=3773%2E400544%2EwjnMqF)
**Every time I think of how Donald Trump and MAGA Republicans in DC are ripping away critical investments from New Mexico, I feel furious.**
And a recent article in the _New York Times_ detailed it all:
* They’re freezing _$100 million_ in university research
* They’re yanking over _$60 million_ from health programs
* And they’re set to cause _huge disruptions_ in our public schools

Every one of these cuts means lost jobs, closed classrooms, and hardworking New Mexicans who won’t be able to access the health care they need.
And nothing about this situation is hypothetical. **These cuts are already hitting home right now** , while New Mexicans across the state brace for even more to come in the near future.
It feels like everything we’ve fought for and won over the last few years is on the line. But we’ve been here before.
During Trump’s first term, I stood up to him as one of New Mexico’s representatives in Congress, and I’m ready to do it again as our next governor.
**But here’s the truth: Standing up to Trump’s draconian budget cuts will take all of us.[That’s why I’m asking you to chip in $5 or anything you can to power our grassroots campaign today.](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em_ms_dh_20250813_1_cuts?amount=5&refcode=em20250813-3773&refcode2=3773_400544_wjnMqF&akid=3773%2E400544%2EwjnMqF)**
Every dollar you donate will help us reach more voters, share what’s at stake, and mobilize this grassroots movement to protect New Mexico’s future.
Trump wants us to believe that we should just accept less — less funding, less opportunity, and less hope for a better future. But I believe we deserve more. And together, we can make sure we get it.
[**So if you can, please chip in $5 today. Together, we can win this race and stand up to Donald Trump and his MAGA allies in Congress.**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em_ms_dh_20250813_1_cuts?amount=5&refcode=em20250813-3773&refcode2=3773_400544_wjnMqF&akid=3773%2E400544%2EwjnMqF)

Be fierce,
Deb

clean_body: Trump wants us to accept less. I believe we deserve more. Every time I think of how Donald Trump and MAGA Republicans in DC are ripping away critical investments from New Mexico, I feel furious. And a recent article in the New York Times detailed it all: They’re freezing $100 million in university research They’re yanking over $60 million from health programs And they’re set to cause huge disruptions in our public schools Every one of these cuts means lost jobs, closed classrooms, and hardworking New Mexicans who won’t be able to access the health care they need. And nothing about this situation is hypothetical. These cuts are already hitting home right now , while New Mexicans across the state brace for even more to come in the near future. It feels like everything we’ve fought for and won over the last few years is on the line. But we’ve been here before. During Trump’s first term, I stood up to him as one of New Mexico’s representatives in Congress, and I’m ready to do it again as our next governor. But here’s the truth: Standing up to Trump’s draconian budget cuts will take all of us. Every dollar you donate will help us reach more voters, share what’s at stake, and mobilize this grassroots movement to protect New Mexico’s future. Trump wants us to believe that we should just accept less — less funding, less opportunity, and less hope for a better future. But I believe we deserve more. And together, we can make sure we get it. Be fierce, Deb

name: Mike Van Someren
subject: I have an exciting announcement to make
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Mike Van Someren for WI
body:
And I want you to be the first to know | | | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/d7e3d8820480/i-am-running-for-congress-10140904?e=356c0699dd)
---
| | |
---
| | | Hi Peter,

I know what you’re thinking, “Not another political email”. I understand that reflex, but let me (re)-introduce myself first, and maybe I can show you why I’m not just another politician asking for your support. **First, I wanted you to be the first to know that today, I have officially announced my campaign for Wisconsin’s 33rd State Senate district. **

I’m running as a Democrat because I firmly believe we are at a crossroads—not just in politics, but in how we treat one another, how we grow our economy, and how we hold power accountable. All across this state, people are working hard and playing by the rules, and still falling behind. Not because these people have done anything wrong, but because too often the rules are written by people who never intend to follow them.

I get the struggle folks are feeling. I was born and raised in a working-class family. From the age of five, I wanted to be a truck driver just like my dad; safe to say, running for office was never part of my plan. However, after graduating from Marquette University Law School, I’ve spent my legal career helping small businesses, individuals, and nonprofits get their fair share of the American dream. I’ve seen firsthand how hard middle-class people in our state struggle just to pay the bills. We can and we must do better.

This change isn’t going to be easy, and it’s going to take all of us, **together**. We’ve waited long enough. If we don’t act now—boldly, honestly, and collectively—we risk missing our best chance to build a government that actually works for all of us.
---
| **My opponent, Senator Chris Kapenga, is part of the problem.** Rather than focus on real solutions for everyday working people, he would rather protect the status quo—pointing fingers to distract from his own failures. He is an entrenched incumbent with a huge campaign war chest.

So today, I’m announcing my campaign, and I am asking for your help. You can **[donate here](https://MikeVanSomeren.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a8d3e4f455e56b0d81700f39a&id=3f8a357bb6&e=356c0699dd)** or click the button below.
---
| [DONATE NOW](https://MikeVanSomeren.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a8d3e4f455e56b0d81700f39a&id=1dbfc725cd&e=356c0699dd "DONATE NOW")
---
| We’re going to need all the help we can get. Please follow me on my **[website](https://MikeVanSomeren.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a8d3e4f455e56b0d81700f39a&id=ea5b325331&e=356c0699dd)** ,**[TikTok](https://MikeVanSomeren.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a8d3e4f455e56b0d81700f39a&id=4df6fd058e&e=356c0699dd)**, **[Facebook](https://MikeVanSomeren.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a8d3e4f455e56b0d81700f39a&id=fabe5393a5&e=356c0699dd)** ,**** and**[X](https://MikeVanSomeren.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a8d3e4f455e56b0d81700f39a&id=b45c2e67f9&e=356c0699dd)**, to stay up to date on the latest and greatest with my campaign. While I will keep you all updated on the campaign, I promise you will not see daily, weekly, or even monthly emails from me or my campaign asking for money. We’re going to do things differently.

I am humbled by your support and look forward to working together to flip this seat. Let's get to work!

Sincerely,
Mike Van Someren
---

A single dollar may not seem like much, but in a grassroots campaign like this, it makes a real difference. We’re asking for:
**$1 to fight for consumers.** Coloradans deserve a fair economy, but irresponsible companies just don’t play fair. That’s why I sued Kroger and Albertsons to stop a merger that would drive up grocery prices for families, stood up to Google’s monopolistic practices that threaten competition, and now I’m fighting to protect the Consumer Financial Protection Bureau.
**$1 to stand up to Big Pharma.** I fought back against pharmaceutical companies’ greed by securing almonst $900 million from Big Pharma for opioid treatment and prevention, suing a big drug company for unethical payments to healthcare providers, and cracking down on counterfeit weight-loss drugs that put people’s health at risk.
**$1 to defend our Constitution.** I sued the Trump administration when they tried to destroy birthright citizenship, gave DOGE unauthorized access to Americans’ private data, illegally froze federal funding, and mistreated federal workers. And I’ll keep fighting to defend the rule of law and protect Colorado.
So yes, friend, $1 really can make a difference! Especially when we all stand together.
[_**That’s why we’re hoping everyone reading this email pitches in just $1 (or more!) today. name: Sarah Kline
subject: Peter], this heat has me thinking…
body:
https://secure.everyaction.com/54vTBw8U4ke31SqSLD2lig2?am=20&amtOpts=&recurringAm=20&recurringAmtOpts=&is_optimized_ask=true&contactdata=eNrTMqalBJ2U/6FRZHl9CrcrjUYEyTYwbcDa5Xt+6Gz86RkljODMhZ1IZBk+Nq9qh5E4pSbEMQrpWB1IKqlZRH/P5MuLnCAln/PAgxPT9KfqsjTdC+dFyHIkHxSooBhD [https://secure.everyaction.com/54vTBw8U4ke31SqSLD2lig2?am=20&amtOpts=&recurringAm=20&recurringAmtOpts=&is_optimized_ask=true&contactdata=eNrTMqalBJ2U/6FRZHl9CrcrjUYEyTYwbcDa5Xt+6Gz86RkljODMhZ1IZBk+Nq9qh5E4pSbEMQrpWB1IKqlZRH/P5MuLnCAln/PAgxPT9KfqsjTdC+dFyHIkHxSooBhD]
Dear Peter,
Every summer I’m reminded of one scary truth: this will likely be the coolest summer for the rest of our lives. Summer can be a reminder of the urgency of the climate crisis for a lot of us in Oregon, from the increasing number of scorching heatwaves to life-threatening wildfires. There is no time to waste – our lawmakers need to act now, but as we saw during this year’s session, they missed their opportunity.
Even though session is over, we must keep up the pressure and continue showing our lawmakers how much we care about our climate and environment. Will you join our Sustainer Circle, with other dedicated climate fighters, to make an impact that will protect Oregon’s climate and natural legacy for generations to come? [https://secure.everyaction.com/54vTBw8U4ke31SqSLD2lig2] You can join with a monthly gift of whatever amount is right for you, and the first 20 new monthly donors will get an exclusive OLCV magnet!
Make an impact [https://secure.everyaction.com/54vTBw8U4ke31SqSLD2lig2?am=20&amtOpts=&recurringAm=20&recurringAmtOpts=&is_optimized_ask=true&contactdata=eNrTMqalBJ2U/6FRZHl9CrcrjUYEyTYwbcDa5Xt+6Gz86RkljODMhZ1IZBk+Nq9qh5E4pSbEMQrpWB1IKqlZRH/P5MuLnCAln/PAgxPT9KfqsjTdC+dFyHIkHxSooBhD]
The fight is still ongoing even when we aren’t in session, and holding our elected officials accountable with the upcoming Environmental Scorecard is just one crucial part in ensuring our state leaders defend Oregon values and push back on federal climate attacks. https://secure.everyaction.com/54vTBw8U4ke31SqSLD2lig2?am=20&amtOpts=&recurringAm=20&recurringAmtOpts=&is_optimized_ask=true&contactdata=eNrTMqalBJ2U/6FRZHl9CrcrjUYEyTYwbcDa5Xt+6Gz86RkljODMhZ1IZBk+Nq9qh5E4pSbEMQrpWB1IKqlZRH/P5MuLnCAln/PAgxPT9KfqsjTdC+dFyHIkHxSooBhD [https://secure.everyaction.com/54vTBw8U4ke31SqSLD2lig2?am=20&amtOpts=&recurringAm=20&recurringAmtOpts=&is_optimized_ask=true&contactdata=eNrTMqalBJ2U/6FRZHl9CrcrjUYEyTYwbcDa5Xt+6Gz86RkljODMhZ1IZBk+Nq9qh5E4pSbEMQrpWB1IKqlZRH/P5MuLnCAln/PAgxPT9KfqsjTdC+dFyHIkHxSooBhD]
Some days it feels hard to keep believing and fighting for climate action with all that we are seeing from the current administration such as attacks on our clean air and public lands, but this is exactly the moment we can’t stop believing. A monthly gift has an even greater impact on our work, as ongoing gifts allow us to save on administrative and stewardship costs, so we can put more of your gift directly to climate action. clean_body: [] Dear Peter, Every summer I’m reminded of one scary truth: this will likely be the coolest summer for the rest of our lives. Summer can be a reminder of the urgency of the climate crisis for a lot of us in Oregon, from the increasing number of scorching heatwaves to life-threatening wildfires. There is no time to waste – our lawmakers need to act now, but as we saw during this year’s session, they missed their opportunity. Even though session is over, we must keep up the pressure and continue showing our lawmakers how much we care about our climate and environment. Will you join our Sustainer Circle, with other dedicated climate fighters, to make an impact that will protect Oregon’s climate and natural legacy for generations to come? [] You can join with a monthly gift of whatever amount is right for you, and the first 20 new monthly donors will get an exclusive OLCV magnet! Make an impact [] The fight is still ongoing even when we aren’t in session, and holding our elected officials accountable with the upcoming Environmental Scorecard is just one crucial part in ensuring our state leaders defend Oregon values and push back on federal climate attacks. [] Some days it feels hard to keep believing and fighting for climate action with all that we are seeing from the current administration such as attacks on our clean air and public lands, but this is exactly the moment we can’t stop believing. A monthly gift has an even greater impact on our work, as ongoing gifts allow us to save on administrative and stewardship costs, so we can put more of your gift directly to climate action. [] Make an impact [] Additionally, our Sustainer Circle members receive exclusive benefits like a subscription to the monthly Sustainer E-Newsletter, insider access to the OLCV Election Report and Environmental Scorecard, and opportunities to take action on urgent and important issues. A monthly gift can be a small amount that’s easier for you to manage each month, making donating more accessible for you, while deepening your impact. I’ll keep it simple: smaller monthly gifts can have an even greater impact than larger one time donations! Will you start your monthly gift today and be one of the first 20 new members of OLCV’s Sustainer Circle? [] I look forward to having you join us, [] Sarah Kline (she/they) OLCV Communications & Membership Coordinator [] [] [] [] Oregon League of Conservation Voters 1110 SE Alder Suite 220 Portland, OR 97214 United States If you believe you received this message in error or wish to no longer receive email from us, please unsubscribe: .

name: Center for Reproductive Rights
subject: Trump just cut off your ability to speak out against his abortion ban
body:
They're trying to silence us | | [](https://click.everyaction.com/k/113258828/563172726/2141984067?sourceid=1150846&utm_campaign=26emeus-0802aax-on&utm_medium=ea&utm_source=email&utm_content=comment&amtOpts=&recurringAmtOpts=&am=&recurringAm=&is_optimized_ask=true&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9DRlJSL0NGUlIvMS85NTk4MiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwNDFiZDdjNi02Nzc4LWYwMTEtYjQ4MS02MDQ1YmRmZThlOWMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=ljM0HwGHvxsSMabCB9IBP2NZlcEC6Zv1rGNgB1P6ZEs=&emci=be4793df-b377-f011-8dc9-6045bded8cca&emdi=041bd7c6-6778-f011-b481-6045bdfe8e9c&ceid=954237) | [](https://click.everyaction.com/k/113258829/563172727/2141984067?sourceid=1150846&utm_campaign=26emeus-0802aax-on&utm_medium=ea&utm_source=email&utm_content=comment&amtOpts=&recurringAmtOpts=&am=&recurringAm=&is_optimized_ask=true&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9DRlJSL0NGUlIvMS85NTk4MiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwNDFiZDdjNi02Nzc4LWYwMTEtYjQ4MS02MDQ1YmRmZThlOWMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=ljM0HwGHvxsSMabCB9IBP2NZlcEC6Zv1rGNgB1P6ZEs=&emci=be4793df-b377-f011-8dc9-6045bded8cca&emdi=041bd7c6-6778-f011-b481-6045bdfe8e9c&ceid=954237)

Peter,

We just found out that Trump's General Services Administration cut off the connection that let you send comments through our site to [**regulations.gov**](https://click.everyaction.com/k/113258830/563172728/1152959552?sourceid=1150846&utm_campaign=26emeus-0802aax-on&utm_medium=ea&utm_source=email&utm_content=comment&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9DRlJSL0NGUlIvMS85NTk4MiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwNDFiZDdjNi02Nzc4LWYwMTEtYjQ4MS02MDQ1YmRmZThlOWMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=ljM0HwGHvxsSMabCB9IBP2NZlcEC6Zv1rGNgB1P6ZEs=&emci=be4793df-b377-f011-8dc9-6045bded8cca&emdi=041bd7c6-6778-f011-b481-6045bdfe8e9c&ceid=954237).

[**This is nothing less than censorship**](https://click.everyaction.com/k/113258831/563172729/1152959552?sourceid=1150846&utm_campaign=26emeus-0802aax-on&utm_medium=ea&utm_source=email&utm_content=comment&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9DRlJSL0NGUlIvMS85NTk4MiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwNDFiZDdjNi02Nzc4LWYwMTEtYjQ4MS02MDQ1YmRmZThlOWMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=ljM0HwGHvxsSMabCB9IBP2NZlcEC6Zv1rGNgB1P6ZEs=&emci=be4793df-b377-f011-8dc9-6045bded8cca&emdi=041bd7c6-6778-f011-b481-6045bdfe8e9c&ceid=954237)—a direct attempt to silence thousands of voices. More than 2,400 of our supporters have already spoken out against the proposed rule, and we will not back down.

First, the Trump administration moved to ban abortion care for veterans and their families—even in cases of rape, incest, or medical emergencies.

**Now, they're trying to shut us up and shut down our ability to fight back.** But they can't stop us.

[**Even if you've already submitted your comment, please head directly to regulations.gov to re-submit, ensuring it's counted accurately and making your voice impossible to ignore.**](https://click.everyaction.com/k/113258832/563172730/1152959552?sourceid=1150846&utm_campaign=26emeus-0802aax-on&utm_medium=ea&utm_source=email&utm_content=comment&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9DRlJSL0NGUlIvMS85NTk4MiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwNDFiZDdjNi02Nzc4LWYwMTEtYjQ4MS02MDQ1YmRmZThlOWMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=ljM0HwGHvxsSMabCB9IBP2NZlcEC6Zv1rGNgB1P6ZEs=&emci=be4793df-b377-f011-8dc9-6045bded8cca&emdi=041bd7c6-6778-f011-b481-6045bdfe8e9c&ceid=954237) | [**SUBMIT COMMENT**](https://click.everyaction.com/k/113258833/563172731/1152959552?sourceid=1150846&utm_campaign=26emeus-0802aax-on&utm_medium=ea&utm_source=email&utm_content=comment&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9DRlJSL0NGUlIvMS85NTk4MiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwNDFiZDdjNi02Nzc4LWYwMTEtYjQ4MS02MDQ1YmRmZThlOWMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=ljM0HwGHvxsSMabCB9IBP2NZlcEC6Zv1rGNgB1P6ZEs=&emci=be4793df-b377-f011-8dc9-6045bded8cca&emdi=041bd7c6-6778-f011-b481-6045bdfe8e9c&ceid=954237 "SUBMIT COMMENT")
---
Personalized comments make a bigger impact. **The government may count identical submissions as just one, so we strongly encourage you to share your thoughts in your own words.** It doesn’t need to be long! As long as it’s personal to you. Need inspiration? You could write about:
* How this policy would harm veterans
* Why veterans deserve the full spectrum of health care
* A personal story about veteran access to reproductive health care
* A personal story about access to abortion care and counseling

**[Here's a first line to get you started:_Abortion is essential health care, and veterans deserve better. I urge you to carefully consider the impact of this proposed regulation because..._](https://click.everyaction.com/k/113258834/563172732/1152959552?sourceid=1150846&utm_campaign=26emeus-0802aax-on&utm_medium=ea&utm_source=email&utm_content=comment&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9DRlJSL0NGUlIvMS85NTk4MiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwNDFiZDdjNi02Nzc4LWYwMTEtYjQ4MS02MDQ1YmRmZThlOWMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=ljM0HwGHvxsSMabCB9IBP2NZlcEC6Zv1rGNgB1P6ZEs=&emci=be4793df-b377-f011-8dc9-6045bded8cca&emdi=041bd7c6-6778-f011-b481-6045bdfe8e9c&ceid=954237)**

We have until September 3 to flood the VA with public comments and stop this ban before it becomes law.

[**Tell the VA: Veterans deserve full access to reproductive health care.**](https://click.everyaction.com/k/113258835/563172733/1152959552?sourceid=1150846&utm_campaign=26emeus-0802aax-on&utm_medium=ea&utm_source=email&utm_content=comment&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9DRlJSL0NGUlIvMS85NTk4MiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwNDFiZDdjNi02Nzc4LWYwMTEtYjQ4MS02MDQ1YmRmZThlOWMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=ljM0HwGHvxsSMabCB9IBP2NZlcEC6Zv1rGNgB1P6ZEs=&emci=be4793df-b377-f011-8dc9-6045bded8cca&emdi=041bd7c6-6778-f011-b481-6045bdfe8e9c&ceid=954237)

Thank you for taking action,

Center for Reproductive Rights

name: Heidi Ganahl
subject: The Mountain Minute: 8/13/2025
body:
Six cities sue Colorado over zoning and parking laws as state stays silent
| | | | [](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)
---
**PRESENTED BY[ROCKYMOUNTAINVOICE.COM](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)**
| | Hey folks,
ICYMI, Rocky Mountain Voice just dropped one of our most ambitious projects yet—a deep-dive series exposing how regulatory warfare was deployed by municipalities and the state to effectively shut down a family-owned oil company’s core assets. The [Rule 211 Gamble](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.) unpacks the unprecedented legal maneuver, [Bled Dry by the State](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.) details the years-long regulatory siege, and [The Man Polis Vowed to Destroy](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.) tells the personal story of CEO Kevin Kauffman’s final fight for truth and legacy. **It’s a must-read for anyone concerned about government overreach, property rights, and the future of Colorado’s energy industry.**
🎙️ Check out today's Mountain Minute podcast [here](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.), or watch on [YouTube](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.) or [Rumble](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)! Here is a summary of today's top stories:
🏔️ **Here in Colorado...** Denver City Council [narrowly rejected ranked choice voting](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.), keeping the current election system. Six Front Range cities—including Arvada, Aurora, and Greenwood Village—are [suing the state over new zoning and parking laws](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.) they say violate Home Rule, override local authority, and impose one-size-fits-all mandates. Denver International Airport has [paused its controversial nuclear storage plan](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.) after community backlash, and the VanWinkle Ranch [vows to rebuild](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.) after a wildfire. [Housing sales in Denver are slowing](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.) even as inventory hits its highest level since 2011, and the state has filed a pre-Big Bill application it says could [protect provider payments](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.).
**🇺🇸 On the National Stage...** The Teamsters union is shifting strategy, [funding Republican candidates](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.) alongside Democrats in a move that could reshape labor’s political clout. A whistle-blower claims Rep. Adam Schiff sanctioned [leaks of classified information to undermine President Trump](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.), fueling concerns about politicized intelligence. Meanwhile, the Texas House is frozen for a second week as [more than 50 Democrats remain out of state](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.) to block a GOP-led redistricting plan.
This is the Mountain Minute for Wednesday, August 13, 2025.
– Team RMV
---
|
---
**TODAY'S TOP STORIES**
**[Six cities sue Colorado over zoning and parking laws as state stays silent](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)** BY JEN SCHUMANN, [ROCKY MOUNTAIN VOICE](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)
[](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)
“As of this writing we have not heard back from the State.”

That’s how Greenwood Village Mayor George Lantz summed up the status of a lawsuit the six Front Range cities filed in May against the state of Colorado, Gov. Jared Polis, the Department of Local Affairs and its executive director, Maria De Cambra. The case targets two 2024 laws—HB 24-1313 and HB 24-1304—that, according to the cities, trample Colorado’s constitutional guarantee of Home Rule.
The mayors say the fight is about constitutional rights, not political turf wars. “Contrary to some criticisms, the current fight is not based on party politics... Our residents deserve to have a voice about land use in their own communities and neighborhoods,” they wrote in a joint open July 14 letter signed by all six mayors.
“There is a story behind every neighborhood that you love. Informed by vision and built with precision by the generations that came before, our cities are the products of decades of thoughtful planning and intentional effort,” the letter says.
**[READ MORE](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)**
|
---
**[Denver City Council Rejects Ranked Choice Voting in Narrow Vote](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)** [AXIOS DENVER](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)
* Denver City Council voted 7–6 against placing ranked choice voting on the November ballot, keeping the city’s current election system in place.
* Supporters argued the method could increase turnout, save money, and boost candidate engagement, while opponents cited evidence it hasn’t saved money elsewhere and could disenfranchise voters.
* Councilmember Kevin Flynn led the opposition, pointing to research showing ranked choice voting’s potential downsides during candidate eliminations.

**[READ MORE](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)**
|
---
The Rocky Mountain Voice is a 501(c)(3) that exists to promote informed civic engagement and the principles of self-governance through enterprise reporting on public policy, politics, government, and culture throughout the state of Colorado. The only way we can continue to spread truth is with your support!
[DONATE TO ROCKY MOUNTAIN VOICE](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)
|
---
**[Colorado Filed a Pre-Big Bill Application that Could Save Provider Payments](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)** [THE COLORADO SUN](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)
* Colorado’s Department of Health Care Policy and Financing submitted a state directed payments program application to the federal government just before new limits in the One Big Beautiful Bill took effect, aiming to secure “legacy” status and avoid funding caps.
* If approved, the program could bring in up to $378 million annually for hospitals statewide, but it won’t offset projected federal funding losses of $2.5 billion by 2032 from changes to the hospital provider fee.
* Additional Medicaid cuts from new work requirements and administrative rules could slash another $3 billion in federal dollars, making Medicaid funding a top priority for the upcoming legislative special session.

**[READ MORE](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)**
|
---
** ONLY ON ROCKY MOUNTAIN VOICE ⤵️ **
**[Garbo: The Dangerous Hubris of Deputizing Non-Citizens to Police Americans](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)**
**[](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)****BY C. J. GARBO****| COMMENTARY | AUGUST 11** _Since 2016, various jurisdictions in Colorado began allowing non-citizens – specifically lawful permanent residents and in some cases, DACA recipients – to serve as police officers. This is not a progressive step forward, but rather, it is a profound public policy misstep. It is the height of hubris to assume that someone who is not a full citizen of this country should be vested with the authority to police those who are._
__

**[As businesses flee downtown Denver, Johnston points to falling homicide rate](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)**
**[](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)****BY SHAINA COLE | LOCAL | AUGUST 11** _Mayor Mike Johnston has been pointing to a 44% drop in homicides in the first half of 2025, calling it proof his crime plan is making a difference. The figure is a sharp improvement from last year, but it’s recent and doesn’t show where things stood before the pandemic. In the city’s core, the gains are harder to find._
__

**[O’Donnell: Colorado isn’t creating jobs—it’s creating unemployment](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)**
**[](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)****BY MIKE O'DONNELL | COMMENTARY | AUGUST 11** _January 2023 was a changeover month of sorts in the United States because it marked a division between the taxpayer subsidized COVID economy and the less subsidized post-COVID economy._
__

name: Chris Brooks, LCV
subject: 🚨URGENT: Trump’s EPA seeks to undermine virtually all climate rules, will claw back $7 billion for solar projects
body:
To view this mail in a browser, copy https://links.messages.lcv.org/servlet/MailView?ms=MTI4MDYxOTkS1&r=NjA3MDU0MTAzNTc3S0&j=MjI4MDE1ODEwMgS2&mt=1&rt=0 into your browser.
DEVELOPING — following an announcement that Trump’s EPA will eliminate the
foundation of all of its rules to fight climate change, they are now ALSO moving
to claw back $7 billion in funds set aside for solar projects in low-income
communities and communities of color throughout the country. The Trump administration just declared war on long-established climate science. We’re fighting back, and we need your support. https://links.messages.lcv.org/els/v2/RZbkcRL- During one of the hottest summers humans have ever experienced on our planet,
with communities still struggling to recover from recent hurricanes, floods, and
wildfires, EPA Administrator Lee Zeldin is officially moving to end the landmark
Endangerment Finding. This is the EPA’s science-based determination that greenhouse gases are harmful
to public health because they cause climate change, serving as a foundation for
all federal rules limiting greenhouse gases like carbon and methane. If Zeldin succeeds, it will be one of the most far-reaching and dangerous
actions of this presidency. Now, the EPA has also announced it will rescind over $7 billion in funding for
its Solar for All program, which provides access to cheap, affordable clean
energy for low-income communities — all just to prop up dirty, polluting fossil
fuels. The environmental movement needs to respond, and we need to be LOUD. We’re
launching an urgent campaign to raise $20,000 by the end of this month to
mobilize a public outcry, expose the damage these decisions will do, and hold
anti-environment extremists accountable. We need your help. Will you renew your LCV membership today to help keep this work moving forward? $5 is all is takes >> https://links.messages.lcv.org/els/v2/Ap9dcp- RENEW YOUR MEMBERSHIP FOR JUST $5 >> https://links.messages.lcv. The Trump administration intends to use the repeal of the Endangerment Finding
as grounds to ignore science and reverse the law to roll back climate
protections, despite numerous court rulings saying they can’t and overwhelming
scientific evidence about climate change’s devastating impact on people’s lives.
Here’s what it could mean for your family, your health, and your future: More harmful pollution in the air we breathe. Asthma attacks, heart disease, and respiratory illnesses could rise, especially in communities near highways and power plants.
Climate-heating emissions could skyrocket. Climate-fueled disasters like hurricanes, wildfires, and extreme heat will become more powerful and more frequent.
Polluters could do as they please. Oil, gas, and coal companies could be free to pump as much carbon and methane into the atmosphere as they please, with zero accountability. We cannot allow polluters to write the rules, Peter. Please, renew today for just $5 to help us go to the mat defending the Endangerment Finding and everything it protects >> https://links.messages.lcv.org/els/v2/~ Chris Brooks
Vice President of Membership
League of Conservation Voters This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. If this isn't the best email address at which to reach you,update your contact information https://www.pages08.net/leagueofconservationvoters/forms/ContactInformation?spMailingID=12806199&spUserID=NjA3MDU0MTAzNTc3S0&spJobID=MjI4MDE1ODEwMgS2&spReportId=MjI4MDE1ODEwMgS2.Click here to unsubscribe https://www.pages08.net/leagueofconservationvoters/forms/Unsubscribe?spMailingID=12806199&spUserID=NjA3MDU0MTAzNTc3S0&spJobID=MjI4MDE1ODEwMgS2&spReportId=MjI4MDE1ODEwMgS2 from our supporter list.Send us any comments, criticisms, or feedback here mailto:feedback@lcv.org?subject=, or just reply to this email! Thanks for your support.

740 15th St NW, Suite 700
Washington, DC 20005
202-785-8683 DONATE https://links.messages.lcv.

Climate-fueled disasters like hurricanes, wildfires, and extreme heat will become more powerful and more frequent. Polluters could do as they please. Oil, gas, and coal companies could be free to pump as much carbon and methane into the atmosphere as they please, with zero accountability. We cannot allow polluters to write the rules, Peter. Please, renew today for just $5 to help us go to the mat defending the Endangerment Finding and everything it protects >> Chris Brooks Vice President of Membership League of Conservation Voters This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. If this isn't the best email address at which to reach you,update your contact information here to unsubscribe from our supporter list.Send us any comments, criticisms, or feedback here mailto:feedback@lcv.org?subject=, or just reply to this email! Thanks for your support. 740 15th St NW, Suite 700 Washington, DC 20005 202-785-8683 DONATE

name: Election Protection Team via Our Revolution
subject: Trump’s Plan to Steal the Midterms – Time to FIGHT
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Our Revolution click here to unsubscribe
body:
[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/33547?t=1011&refcode=email-20250813f_v&akid=9168%2E5885482%2EdVYQC3 ]Our Revolution logo

Peter Willis,

Donald Trump has launched a complex, multi-pronged scheme to steal our
elections. And forcing through redistricting in places like Texas to rig
the midterms in his favor is just the tip of the iceberg.

Trump is also working overtime to rewrite the rules – weaponizing
executive orders, ordering a new Census designed to slash Democratic
representation, and launching direct attacks on the infrastructure we rely
on, like targeting ActBlue to choke off grassroots funding.

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/33547?source=email-20250813f&t=1061&akid=9168%2E5885482%2EdVYQC3 ]Headline: Donald J. Trump is the leading threat to US election
integrity

The evidence is clear, detailed, and deeply alarming. If we don’t act
right now, Trump will succeed in rigging our democracy before our eyes.
Which is why we are massively growing our Citizen Action Team in every
district across the country, mobilizing people to fight back on all fronts
– legislative, grassroots, AND electoral.

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/33547?t=1057&amount=22&amounts=9%2C22%2C27%2C46%2C66&refcode=email-20250813fnd&firstname=Peter%20Willis&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&akid=9168%2E5885482%2EdVYQC3 ]The ONLY way forward is with massive resistance from the grassroots and
pressure on every lever of power. Will you chip in $10, $27, or whatever
you can today to help us build Our Revolution’s resistance in every
congressional district?

If you've stored your payment information with ActBlue Express, your
donation to Our Revolution will process immediately.

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/33547?t=1042&express_lane=true&amount=9&refcode=email-20250813fnd&amounts=9%2C22%2C27%2C46%2C66&firstname=Peter%20Willis&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&akid=9168%2E5885482%2EdVYQC3 ]CHIP IN $9 [ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/33547?t=1043&express_lane=true&amount=22&refcode=email-20250813fnd&amounts=9%2C22%2C27%2C46%2C66&firstname=Peter%20Willis&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&akid=9168%2E5885482%2EdVYQC3 ]CHIP IN $22

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/33547?t=1047&express_lane=true&amount=66&refcode=email-20250813fnd&amounts=9%2C22%2C27%2C46%2C66&firstname=Peter%20Willis&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&akid=9168%2E5885482%2EdVYQC3 ]CHIP IN $66 [ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/33547?t=1048&amount=9&refcode=email-20250813fnd&amounts=9%2C22%2C27%2C46%2C66&firstname=Peter%20Willis&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&akid=9168%2E5885482%2EdVYQC3 ]CHIP IN OTHER AMOUNT

Trump has gutted the nation’s election security agency, purged its
experts, and pushed extreme measures like forcing Americans to show a
passport to vote – documents millions don’t have. His administration is
demanding unprecedented access to state voter rolls and even trying to
strip federal approval from voting machines used nationwide, putting the
very foundation of our democracy at risk.

That’s just the beginning as he also works overtime to force
Republican-led states to redraw their Congressional maps – spreading lies
that he’s “entitled” to more seats.

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/33547?source=email-20250813f&t=1060&akid=9168%2E5885482%2EdVYQC3 ]Bernie tweet about Trump claiming he is 'entitled' to five more
Congressional seats in Texas.

Trump’s strategy banks on us being slow, divided, or caught off guard. But
we see what’s coming. We know how to win – by unifying a massive coalition
NOW, and making sure every voice is heard.

We are rapidly growing the size of our Citizen Action Teams across the
country, block by block, state by state. We’re recruiting, training, and
turning out thousands of new volunteers. But to do this, we need immediate
resources.

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/33547?t=1054&amount=22&refcode=email-20250813fnd&amounts=9%2C22%2C27%2C46%2C66&firstname=Peter%20Willis&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&akid=9168%2E5885482%2EdVYQC3 ]This is the moment to go all in. Every dollar you give today will be put
directly into the fight to stop Trump – funding teams, data tools, voter
outreach, and more. Can you chip in now and help power our movement to
stop Trump’s scheme to steal our democracy?

When we organize, we win.

Our Revolution

disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY SHARICE FOR CONGRESS
body:
National Republicans are prepared to throw some of the nastiest, most personal attacks Sharice’s way

[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/113259529/563174817/-240735101?refcode=email-header&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDIvMS82NTc1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyMDQ4NzA3My02OTc4LWYwMTEtYjQ4MS02MDQ1YmRmZThlOWMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=qy7DN6DP2YwzDY6Ur-nsSlsAMi6RoRrh4zWQVcIH9Dc=) Hey there, we’ll get right to it: Sharice Davids is one of just a handful of LGBTQ+ voices in Congress — which means National Republicans are going to throw some of the nastiest, most personal attacks her way. **It’s vital that we get our fundraising on a good track to fight back against these smears and make sure every voter across KS-03 hears Sharice’s message when it counts. Will you please chip in before our next fundraising deadline on Friday night to help us catch up to our goal?** | | [Donate →](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/113259530/563174818/212706120?refcode=email_081325_mmfr1&amounts=5,25,50,100,250,500,1000&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDIvMS82NTc1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyMDQ4NzA3My02OTc4LWYwMTEtYjQ4MS02MDQ1YmRmZThlOWMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=qy7DN6DP2YwzDY6Ur-nsSlsAMi6RoRrh4zWQVcIH9Dc=)

National Republicans are frustrated enough that there’s a single Democrat representing Kansas in DC. But a Democrat who is unafraid to stand up to Donald Trump and his attacks on the LGBTQ+ community? **That makes them _furious_.**
They think, since she represents a so-called red state, Sharice should be running away from who she is. That she should stay quiet when the Trump Administration declares war on the livelihoods of LGBTQ+ folks across the country.
**Well, that’s not how Sharice does things. Never has been, never will be.** In Congress, she’s been one of the loudest, most outspoken voices to defend the freedom to love and the freedom to live as your authentic self — and she always will be.
Listen, we know we’ve been a little more aggressive than usual lately when it comes to these emails, and we’re sorry to bug you again.
But this is why. Given all the unfair, shameful attacks coming Sharice’s way — and the stakes of this race when it comes to the direction of the country — we hope you can understand why we have to work as hard as we are to meet our fundraising goal.
[_**As we prepare for yet another competitive, expensive re-election campaign, we need your help to make sure the National GOP’s ugly attacks don’t break through. name: Dan Goldman
subject: SIGN ON: End the reckless trade war
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Dan Goldman for New York**
body:
Trump’s trade war is killing small businesses. |
#
---
Donald Trump’s trade war is killing small businesses, Peter. Last week, I visited small businesses across New York City to hear from business owners about how Trump’s reckless tariffs are impacting them. I met with the owners of Black-owned businesses in Park Slope, where I heard from one restaurant owner who said Trump's tariffs have driven up the cost of her ingredients so much that her profits have tanked from 30% to flat. **That’s unacceptable.** Small businesses are the backbone of our city’s economy, and while large companies can weather the tariff tax, small businesses simply can’t. New Yorkers’ livelihoods are on the line. Donald Trump promised on the campaign trail that he would help working Americans thrive. To no one’s surprise, **he lied. ** **[As I keep up the work to ensure small businesses in New York City get the resources they need to thrive, please sign my petition today calling for an end to Trump’s reckless trade war:](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/113259705/563175312/-1681733334?refcode=AU_DSG_EG_GEN_PET_AC_20250813_PM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85NDA4NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3ZDA1ZGViYi02OTc4LWYwMTEtYjQ4MS02MDQ1YmRmZThlOWMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=XpYUQonRrwaJ43W3XPJwkK6n550tHV6RxrKywZs3b2A=&emci=95a7c5d4-4d78-f011-b481-6045bdfe8e9c&emdi=7d05debb-6978-f011-b481-6045bdfe8e9c&ceid=13556823)** | [ADD YOUR NAME](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/113259706/563175313/-1681733334?refcode=AU_DSG_EG_GEN_PET_AC_20250813_PM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85NDA4NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3ZDA1ZGViYi02OTc4LWYwMTEtYjQ4MS02MDQ1YmRmZThlOWMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=XpYUQonRrwaJ43W3XPJwkK6n550tHV6RxrKywZs3b2A=&emci=95a7c5d4-4d78-f011-b481-6045bdfe8e9c&emdi=7d05debb-6978-f011-b481-6045bdfe8e9c&ceid=13556823)

| Trump's second term is way worse than we thought it would be and it feels surreal, almost like a dream. It's hard to imagine how we got here and even harder to imagine how we stop this nightmare. Now we have a chance and we need to act before it gets worse.
This November, MAGA is attempting to capture the PA Supreme Court Election to ensure that Pennsylvania goes permanently red.
If Trump seizes this court, it will allow him to rig the 2028 presidential election in the most important swing state in the country by having the court toss out Democrat ballots--all but securing a third term.
Terrifyingly, national Democrats are asleep at the wheel and barely anything is being said, let alone being done at the national level about this high stakes election. MAGA on the other hand is working overtime, covertly pouring millions of dollars into voter registration and so far they are winning. In fact, if the election were held today, MAGA would win.
That is why Defend Our Courts is trying to shake awake Democrats across the country to come to PA's aid-- we absolutely cannot allow Trump to take this court or his path to a third term will be all but inevitable.

Fellow Conservative,

Congress is like a battlefield—thrilling, mission-driven, and full of conflict. At least no one's shooting at us here. Well, not with guns, anyway.

The out-of-touch fake news "reporters" at Politico decided they would target the most dangerous men in DC: Navy SEALs.

We all ran for office because we were still hungry to protect and fight for our country. The war may be over for us, but we can't abandon the part of our lives that made us who we are. We were part of an elite unit on the front lines, and Congress is somewhere else we can be out front doing something special for our country.

_**Yet the liberal news corporations, who _desperately_ want to keep the status quo, _attacked us_ for wanting to take on the Swamp establishment and business-as-usual going on in our government.**_

All of us –**Navy SEALs Tim Sheehy, Eli Crane, and Ryan Zinke** – are teaming up to stop career politicians and lazy bureaucrats, but we're up against more than just the DC establishment. We're up against the liberal media, RINOs, and revenge-seeking Democrats.

We were part of an elite unit on the front lines, and Congress is somewhere else we can be out front doing something special for our country. Yet the liberal news corporations, who desperately want to keep the status quo, attacked us for wanting to take on the Swamp establishment and business-as-usual going on in our government. All of us –Navy SEALs Tim Sheehy, Eli Crane, and Ryan Zinke – are teaming up to stop career politicians and lazy bureaucrats, but we're up against more than just the DC establishment. We're up against the liberal media, RINOs, and revenge-seeking Democrats. We need you, Fellow Conservative to keep us on the frontlines, bucking the corrupt status quo! -> If the media wants to attack us for having a "warrior mentality" - the mentality to do whatever it takes to achieve a mission... -> If the media wants to attack us for supporting President Trump's MAGA movement - the movement that says we can make America great... -> If the media wants to attack us for taking on the government corruption, fraud, and waste - which has been exposed by Trump's DOGE department... ....Then they don't understand WHY Donald J. Trump and ALL of us were elected! As SEALs, we all shoot straight with each other. We're going to shoot straight with you, too: This hit piece was horsesht and part of a larger conspiracy to silence us. If they can silence us, they can sure as hell silence you. Thank you so much for your time, Tim Sheehy Eli Crane Ryan Zinke Three Navy SEALs Serving in Congress | " "I SERVED AS A NAVY SEAL, BUILT ONE OF THE LARGEST AERIAL FIREFIGHTING COMPANIES IN AMERICA CREATING OVER 200 MONTANA JOBS, AND STARTED A VETERAN-LED CATTLE RANCHING AND FEEDING OPERATION. WHETHER IT WAS IN WAR OR BUSINESS, I SEE PROBLEMS AND SOLVE THEM. AMERICA NEEDS CONSERVATIVE LEADERS WHO LOVE OUR COUNTRY. I'M RUNNING FOR THE U.S. SENATE BECAUSE OUR CAMPAIGN IS ABOUT SERVICE, DUTY, AND COUNTRY -- NOT POLITICS AS USUAL." * | PAID FOR BY TIM SHEEHY FOR MONTANA Use of Tim Sheehy, Eli Crane, and Ryan Zinke's military rank, job titles, and photographs in uniform does not imply endorsement by the Department of the Navy or the Department of Defense.

name: Gavin Newsom
subject: Co-sign my letter to Trump
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY CAMPAIGN FOR DEMOCRACY PAC
body:
I sent a letter today directly to Donald Trump.

Team —
I just sent a letter directly to Donald Trump. He started this ridiculous redistricting back-and-forth and he can stop it.
If he tells Texas and other red states to stand down, California will too. If he does not, then we are going to fight fire with fire and go directly to the ballot to neutralize his efforts to rig the 2026 election.
You can find my letter below. **I hope you'll read it and add your name as a co-signer.**
It's a small and simple act, but it'll send a powerful message of how committed we are to making sure Trump doesn't rig the next election.
**[Add your name as a co-signer to my letter to Trump.](https://act.gavinnewsom.com/signup/em-trump-letter/?source=em-250811-trump-letter&t=1&akid=2440%2E4767699%2Epe6JBi)**
[ADD YOUR NAME](https://act.gavinnewsom.com/signup/em-trump-letter/?source=em-250811-trump-letter&t=2&akid=2440%2E4767699%2Epe6JBi)
\- Gavin Newsom
* * *
August 11, 2025
President Donald J. Trump The White House
1600 Pennsylvania Ave NW,
Washington, DC 20500

Re: Calling Off Mid-Decade Redistricting Efforts
Dear Mr. President,
I am writing to ask you to call on the governor of Texas and other red states, who are acting on your request to draw new congressional maps through an unprecedented, mid-decade hyper-partisan gerrymander to rig the upcoming midterm elections, to stop those efforts.
You are playing with fire, risking the destabilization of our democracy, while knowing that California can neutralize any gains you hope to make. This attempt to rig congressional maps to hold onto power before a single vote is cast in the 2026 election is an affront to American democracy.
This is not what the Founders envisioned, and California cannot stand idly by as this power grab unfolds. I do not do this lightly, as I believe legislative district maps should be drawn by independent, citizen-led efforts, as we have done in California for the last two decades.
If you will not stand down, I will be forced to lead an effort to redraw the maps in California to offset the rigging of maps in red states. But if the other states call off their redistricting efforts, we will happily do the same. And American democracy will be better for it.
Sincerely,
Gavin Newsom
Governor of California
* * *
**[Add your name as a co-signer to my letter to Trump.](https://act.gavinnewsom.com/signup/em-trump-letter/?source=em-250811-trump-letter&t=3&akid=2440%2E4767699%2Epe6JBi)**
[ADD YOUR NAME](https://act.gavinnewsom.com/signup/em-trump-letter/?source=em-250811-trump-letter&t=4&akid=2440%2E4767699%2Epe6JBi)

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com . Email is a very important way we communicate with supporters like you, but if you want to, you can [ unsubscribe here](https://act.gavinnewsom.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe?t=5&akid=2440%2E4767699%2Epe6JBi).
PAID FOR BY CAMPAIGN FOR DEMOCRACY PAC
1787 Tribute Road, Suite K
Sacramento, CA 95815

name: Jocelyn Benson
subject: The maps should serve voters, not politicians.
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY JOCELYN BENSON FOR GOVERNOR
body:
# [](https://act.jocelynbenson.com/go/203?t=1&akid=608%2E181023%2E8KDiSu)
Team,
What’s happening in Texas right now is outrageous: Republicans in Texas are redrawing the maps mid-election to hand Donald Trump a stronger majority in the House of Representatives.
Let’s be clear: **This isn’t just anti-democratic — it’s un-American.**
I’ve always believed that elections should be fair and transparent. That’s why, as Secretary of State, I’ve fought hard to ensure that Michigan is a national model for protecting voting rights and rejecting partisan gerrymandering.
Here in Michigan, we eliminated gerrymandering _by putting voters in charge_ — through a citizen-led independent redistricting commission. And it works. Our maps are fairer. Our process is more transparent. And voters, not politicians, are at the center of it.
But anti-democratic, unpatriotic attacks are ramping up across the country, and we need to meet this moment.
If you believe in fair maps, in free and fair elections, in a democracy that actually represents the people, I need you with me right now.
[**Will you chip in $10 or more to help me keep defending our democracy and push back on Republican power grabs across the country?**](https://act.jocelynbenson.com/go/269?c0=jmb-em-q32025.plcv4o&refcode=AU_JMB_FR_GEN_GEN_AC_20250813_PM2_V1_S1&t=2&akid=608%2E181023%2E8KDiSu)

[ANOTHER AMOUNT](https://act.jocelynbenson.com/go/239?c0=jmb-em-q32025.A5XsW4&refcode=AU_JMB_FR_GEN_GEN_AC_20250813_PM2_V1_S1&t=8&akid=608%2E181023%2E8KDiSu)
---
Together, we will make sure the power of the people _stays in people’s hands,_ not just in the hands of the most powerful or wealthiest among us.
Thank you for always standing with me.
— Jocelyn

If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | | Together, we will make sure the power of the people stays in people’s hands,_ not just in the hands of the most powerful or wealthiest among us. Thank you for always standing with me. — Jocelyn

subject: Trump’s New Plan to Rig the Economy

body:
We cannot trust a single report from this new BLS appointee. | | [ ](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/u001.iIBo0N5fSFzEFL40Tn-vtbMETCUYClkOrOh9-SNJfqvUWHo9tkdcudztgboR-91DHuME981ndbnXme437mUP7VIaIjouBFzltpnDWivYZZLIsnK-uk3kQkccrOqDHf5hZ4U0XkpkERtHYIoP5AOd3Bi_ieLVgpJtsEKhZqA9ulMuvFt1QXLpzPKRxqhFVuPxXy5cz6mieLAitI__zhIjEwAx8qoPfy1O3KI4vaxikeyBlaTqKMs9CJo_h7fksoJYHjD1VFYKcwA5VmXoazF9nricFKlPgUKIT5bSNafxg2nXsu1hd_feVQq8G4MW5xaFxaZs3qBzFe1kH6w5krz7cj1hD6-YOH-DZH19edKZap_IRWuvctRS6agFTeq9lsyDOdro7kURM6VcFXlASdxfK5-R52j9OPp4gjODBXtuoEA/4j0/-_kJQUBJRM6ZQNVJzskuEQ/h0/h001.H_ZN19ZVk72QFA60SFdZtZ42lmT6gM2QBQFChrmmYho)
---
Friends, Donald Trump is gutting one of the most important pillars of our economy -- _the Bureau of Labor Statistics._ The BLS provides the monthly jobs reports and economic data that businesses, workers, and policymakers rely on to make decisions. But now Trump's handpicked nominee, far-right economist E.J. Antoni, wants to **suspend these reports entirely**.
---
| [ ](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/u001.iIBo0N5fSFzEFL40Tn-vtbMETCUYClkOrOh9-SNJfqvUWHo9tkdcudztgboR-91DHuME981ndbnXme437mUP7bADNuFA7KDaIy0P4y8_BVvMWHAefBHAjnjpYkukB-jLolmXXxEnI3pHC6yNjePRcyFlDjcZBVnxQ6IbM-SfMSHiza9dgXo5fymSTdfOsjbtayv99VyRc06jvajTSjfc8D-S9vxvy0-MKWyrdppw2QnHXn-GJGZRjLq_AdS_5LOEIXzcF6h-kPiAIndhJ1Uk0TRYwD5rcH6OOZliMZD4pbSU54_dJ-dTuGrDLvDnl38xT4VXE2qK65mXML_HuZwDSv13Z94XErFKo-MFfIzwkdSGoOd4CQJrMiVOhpGrGeNBt62_LVehEge6Z4BlAnZ1rTSmnW52qUnbiJ-fHskqwg4/4j0/-_kJQUBJRM6ZQNVJzskuEQ/h1/h001.4SbZ83wrX22ujG4sOz7tV1QY8eRoRUNnYwl2sSaMpjo)
---
If they succeed, job numbers will be released less frequently, less accurately, and more easily manipulated to make Trump look good -- no matter how badly working Americans are struggling. We've seen this before. During COVID, **Trump said to "stop testing" so the infection numbers wouldn't go up.** Now he's trying the same trick with our economy -- hiding the truth to sell a false narrative of "success" while the middle class falls further behind. Destroying the credibility of the BLS means destroying our ability to know whether jobs are growing, wages are rising, or the economy is actually working for us. **This is economic gaslighting at a time when working families are struggling and the gap between the wealthy and everyone else grows wider by the day.** We can't let Trump rewrite reality. The working class needs the truth, not propaganda. [**Donate $5, $15, $25 or whatever you can spare right now to fight back and protect the integrity of our economic data before Trump turns it into another tool for his own power.**](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/u001.iIBo0N5fSFzEFL40Tn-vtbMETCUYClkOrOh9-SNJfqvUWHo9tkdcudztgboR-91DHuME981ndbnXme437mUP7YGYlGfKZsHn-ceswRIVP5dI1CEsH0y6wDyvPsPaywPV8JfdKKew7LfUG_Pm1YVDicXuqNnynZaklQWJeJr-JC_fGOe6zSmz1iNlUYjKhrkhhk1yRpTtlZibBz82tjMgXvzwfMlUTq-8jAaZCvojCrmL8tvYZ1TgNMevrFv6KZIpis8ysy7jLqoK_RItp3aXFNHRpvHRQRL7EBZrrAf3NswJCb4lvS7c0AhPcnJNI35bGVzxlIQNvxhQYkquLxevAnubNSGfAMWWSnVddHUe77s6Gcr_d35gYPgfGChdUpFQldtejM3oywnjDiqfzINBDL5gBYREjXsDbNP9fbxmJq0/4j0/-_kJQUBJRM6ZQNVJzskuEQ/h2/h001.d4SZ5RZHly4E6TtA-RY6tOUyPh9h0o5dV1q-uFj9gA4)

clean_body: We cannot trust a single report from this new BLS appointee. | | Friends, Donald Trump is gutting one of the most important pillars of our economy -- the Bureau of Labor Statistics. The BLS provides the monthly jobs reports and economic data that businesses, workers, and policymakers rely on to make decisions. But now Trump's handpicked nominee, far-right economist E.J. Antoni, wants to suspend these reports entirely. | If they succeed, job numbers will be released less frequently, less accurately, and more easily manipulated to make Trump look good -- no matter how badly working Americans are struggling. We've seen this before. During COVID, Trump said to "stop testing" so the infection numbers wouldn't go up. Now he's trying the same trick with our economy -- hiding the truth to sell a false narrative of "success" while the middle class falls further behind. Destroying the credibility of the BLS means destroying our ability to know whether jobs are growing, wages are rising, or the economy is actually working for us. This is economic gaslighting at a time when working families are struggling and the gap between the wealthy and everyone else grows wider by the day. We can't let Trump rewrite reality. The working class needs the truth, not propaganda. | This MAGA power grab can be stopped, but it is up to us to band together and fight back. Join us in this fight today, No Dem Left Behind | | Mail checks to: No Dem Left Behind P.O. Box 15320 Washington, D.C. 2003 | Paid for by No Dem Left Behind PAC Not Authorized by Any Federal Candidate or Candidate's Committee. | | Sent via . name: Carol Obando-Derstine
subject: Ryan Mackenzie is putting the healthcare of families like mine at risk
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Carol for PA
body:
I’m running for Congress because we can’t afford to let politicians like Mackenzie dismantle the healthcare programs that are so vital to people like my parents, my aunt, and hundreds of thousands of people across the country.

| [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/113260289/563177388/1877634325?refcode=BLU_EM_CODC_2025-08-13_1&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNjIvMS8xMTc2MjgiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiMTdlNGYzMWEtNmQ3OC1mMDExLWI0ODEtNjA0NWJkZmU4ZTljIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=-VODoFQ6Mye3xzlmq8paOupPaJAa8Lpg7BrFcjN_RZw=)
---
| Peter,

For me, protecting vital programs like Medicare and Medicaid is personal.

My parents live with us and every day, I see the importance of making sure they have good health care as they age right here in our home. I also think about my aunt who was disabled and who relied on Medicare and Medicaid to live a full and fruitful life.
---
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/113260290/563177398/557239144?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNjIvMS8xMTc2MjgiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiMTdlNGYzMWEtNmQ3OC1mMDExLWI0ODEtNjA0NWJkZmU4ZTljIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=-VODoFQ6Mye3xzlmq8paOupPaJAa8Lpg7BrFcjN_RZw=&emci=46d46a13-6d78-f011-b481-6045bdfe8e9c&emdi=17e4f31a-6d78-f011-b481-6045bdfe8e9c&ceid=2418100) _My parents and I at my campaign launch event back in May __**♥️**_
These programs aren’t just lifelines – they’re essential to the well-being of millions of Americans. But Ryan Mackenzie is doing everything he can to undermine them. He’s voted time and again to cut Medicare and Medicaid, putting families like mine at risk.

I’m running for Congress because we can’t afford to let politicians like Mackenzie dismantle the healthcare programs that are so vital to people like my parents, my aunt, and hundreds of thousands of people across the country. It’s time to protect the health and security of our communities, not strip away the programs that allow people to thrive.

[_**I need your support to fight back against these harmful cuts. Will you add your name to stand with me in protecting Medicare, Medicaid, and the people who rely on them?**_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/113260291/563177400/557239144?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNjIvMS8xMTc2MjgiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiMTdlNGYzMWEtNmQ3OC1mMDExLWI0ODEtNjA0NWJkZmU4ZTljIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=-VODoFQ6Mye3xzlmq8paOupPaJAa8Lpg7BrFcjN_RZw=&emci=46d46a13-6d78-f011-b481-6045bdfe8e9c&emdi=17e4f31a-6d78-f011-b481-6045bdfe8e9c&ceid=2418100)
| [ADD YOUR NAME ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/113260292/563177401/557239144?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNjIvMS8xMTc2MjgiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiMTdlNGYzMWEtNmQ3OC1mMDExLWI0ODEtNjA0NWJkZmU4ZTljIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=-VODoFQ6Mye3xzlmq8paOupPaJAa8Lpg7BrFcjN_RZw=&emci=46d46a13-6d78-f011-b481-6045bdfe8e9c&emdi=17e4f31a-6d78-f011-b481-6045bdfe8e9c&ceid=2418100)
---
Thank you for being part of this fight. Together, we’ll make sure that no one is left behind when it comes to their healthcare.

Onward,

Carol Obando-Derstine

subject: re: Jamie Raskin’s plea >>>>
disclaimer_text: paid for and provided by End Citizens United Nonfederal, P
body:
| Fight for Reform is dedicated to electing Democrats, transforming our broken campaign finance system, and ending _Citizens United_ state by state. If you would like to get fewer emails, [**_click here._**](https://act.fightforreform.org/go/59469?t=1&akid=23285%2E4449941%2E11y3Ig) If you would like to unsubscribe, [**_click here._**](https://act.fightforreform.org/go/59470?t=2&akid=23285%2E4449941%2E11y3Ig) ❗BREAKING NEWS FROM _NBC_ ❗
_**“TRUMP JUST REALIGNED THE ENTIRE POLITICAL MAP. DEMOCRATS HAVE ‘NO EASY PATH’ TO FIX IT.”**_ We’ll get straight to the point, friend: [**Our Democrat Jamie Raskin is calling for an end to the Electoral College, but if he’s going to convince Congress to act, we need to help by proving that voters across the country agree with him. So please, sign our petition now!**](https://act.fightforreform.org/go/66120?t=3&akid=23285%2E4449941%2E11y3Ig) [](https://act.fightforreform.org/go/66120?t=4&akid=23285%2E4449941%2E11y3Ig)
| [100,000 SIGNATURE NEEDED: URGE CONGRESS TO ABOLISH THE ELECTORAL COLLEGE >>](https://act.fightforreform.org/go/66120?t=5&akid=23285%2E4449941%2E11y3Ig)
---

* * *
Hillary Clinton earned nearly **3 MILLION** more votes than Donald Trump in 2016.

But thanks to the Electoral College, he won the presidency anyway.

That’s not democracy — that’s dysfunction.

**THANKFULLY,** Rep. Jamie Raskin is speaking out:
[](https://act.fightforreform.org/go/66120?t=6&akid=23285%2E4449941%2E11y3Ig)
[Jamie Raskin is spot-on, friend. But now that Trump is in office, he and his Republican cronies will do everything in their power to uphold the Electoral College.](https://act.fightforreform.org/go/66120?t=7&akid=23285%2E4449941%2E11y3Ig)

If we don’t act, history could repeat itself... _and another unfit, unpopular candidate could steal another election._
[**If every Democrat reading this signs our petition, we’ll crush our 1OO,OOO signature goal within minutes and prove to Congress that the American People want to see the Electoral College abolished once and for all. So please, add your name immediately:**](https://act.fightforreform.org/go/66120?t=8&akid=23285%2E4449941%2E11y3Ig)
[TELL CONGRESS TO ABOLISH THE ELECTORAL COLLEGE >>](https://act.fightforreform.org/go/66120?t=9&akid=23285%2E4449941%2E11y3Ig)
---
Thanks for signing!

name: Mark Kelly
subject: Trump is kicking brave, qualified patriots out of the military
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Mark Kelly for Senate
body:
I can’t fathom how I would feel if I had been forced out of the Navy after 15 years for no good reason.. It’s hard to believe that anyone leading this country, from the President down, could do this to someone who signed up to serve.
#

Hey Everybody, it's Mark Kelly.
I wanted to write to you about something absolutely un-American.
It’s no secret that Pete Hegseth is not up to the job of Secretary of Defense. He’s firing good public servants, politicizing the force, and undermining both readiness and operational security to appease the guy sitting in the White House.
But this... this is really difficult to accept.
Active duty members of the United States Air Force who swore an oath to their country and served for anywhere from 15-18 years are being forced out of their jobs and denied early retirement benefits because they are transgender.
They are kicking brave, qualified patriots out of the military and robbing them of the benefits they’ve earned in service to our country.
I can’t fathom how I would feel if I had been forced out of the Navy after 15 years for no good reason. It’s hard to believe that anyone leading this country, from the President down, could let this happen.
These servicemembers made a commitment that might cost them their lives, and they’ve served honorably for nearly two decades. To Trump and Hegseth, that doesn’t matter.
But it matters to me. I’m grateful to every American who has spent time in uniform honorably serving our country.
I will not forget the service and sacrifice of these Americans — and neither should you.
Thank you.
Mark Kelly
Captain, United States Navy, Retired
United States Senator
**[DONATE](https://act.markkelly.com/go/1389?c0=mek-em-aug25.yz3v7m&refcode=em250813-1-f&t=1&akid=6149%2E6688874%2Ef1tC6V)**

Paid For By Mark Kelly for Senate
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is a very important way we communicate with supporters like you, but if you want to, you can [ unsubscribe here](https://act.markkelly.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe?t=2&akid=6149%2E6688874%2Ef1tC6V).
Mark Kelly was a Captain in the U.S. Navy and astronaut. Use of his military rank, job titles and photographs in uniform does not imply endorsement by the Department of the Navy or Department of Defense and reference to NASA does not imply endorsement by the National Aeronautics and Space Administration.
