This campaign is growing stronger by the day.
We’ve had a record-breaking fundraising quarter, hundreds of grassroots donors have already stepped up, and our message is resonating across Colorado. Travelling around the state, Jena is finding folks are energized to protect our rights, stand up to extremists, and keep Colorado moving forward.
But momentum alone won’t win an election — people power will. And that’s why we’re counting on you to help keep this campaign growing in every corner of the state.
We are approaching the middle of August, and we can’t slow down now. We’re asking that 150 more people make a contribution to fuel this campaign before midnight on Friday.

name: Voter Research [Voter Action Project]
subject: A new political census?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Integrity First Voter Action Project, www
body:
Voter Action Project [https://voteractionproject.org/]
Newsweek: Is Donald Trump's New Census Constitutional? [https://prod.cdn.everyaction.com/images/van/EA/EA007/1/89215/images/Newsweek_TrumpCensus.png]
Team: President Donald Trump is looking to change the way the U.S. Census Bureau collects data, posting on Truth Social that his new method would utilize " the results and information gained from the Presidential Election of 2024 ."
Though any efforts to change how the census is conducted are sure to face legal challenges, Trump's directive threatens to shift the balance of political power in the country.
We would like to hear from more voters in your area on this issue. Will you take our one-question poll right away?
Team: Do you support a new, mid-decade census based on the 2024 election?
By clicking a response below your answer will be automatically recorded:
YES [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ifvap-pollresponse?refcode=081325_1yes&amount=15] NO [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ifvap-pollresponse?refcode=081325_1no&amount=15]
https://voteractionproject.org/ [https://voteractionproject.org/]
https://www.facebook.com/voteraction [https://www.facebook.com/voteraction] https://bsky.app/profile/voteractionproject.org [https://bsky.app/profile/voteractionproject.org] https://www.instagram.com/voteractionproj/ [https://www.instagram.com/voteractionproj/] https://www.linkedin.com/company/voter-action-project/ [https://www.linkedin.com/company/voter-action-project/]
Integrity First Voter Action Project is dedicated to expanding ballot access and increasing voter participation across the country.
Since the Supreme Court gutted key provisions in the Voting Rights Act, extreme politicians have taken advantage to pass harsh laws that restrict access to the ballot box. These restrictions particularly affect disadvantaged communities and people of color. It’s our goal to bring awareness to these laws wherever they may crop up and organize voters to take action to ensure the right to vote is available to everyone in their states and communities.
Your support is crucial to our efforts. Will you donate today to help us protect voting rights? [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/integrity-first-voter-action-project-1?refcode=081325_1&amount=20]
Donate Now [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/integrity-first-voter-action-project-1?refcode=081325_1&amount=20]

name: Danielle Franz
subject: Conservatives don’t care about the environment
body:
[](http://links.freedomfirstalert.com/u/click?_t=9ca143e971904d26a973d002cb0ae7f7&_m=4712a043cf234791848874ee1770d996&_e=hfRlN7jhvviOLFvvof-BB1Avucmqm3fsA0Y7AliOU50z4B5lX7VDzf5s4TXriFrp_WSTzjQh-rKwvwGuJYElNuNNzw0Jf7HvqUv5gJf6puHJgY8MRdcP9hxxWHHgO2ry1jcudxlqm7KRoxGAMFRM4gx7LeJQZyoh3lRy5rp4WuhgmdQHC4uzaxOKJrJzAHEb_1egCBw-q94SczZu9L7BG47S6oJ4NPnAVWymzSMRQweUEXagqsAWYG9skmMUADzw0yVHNx8Fpq8AKXYLmn1a0QLuS9_eOIvvH6GH7B_C6eKqa4IfAaXXhhE73Vmf5zOZPFQVYeClsYw8kgxvqiL1aA%3D%3D)

Friend,

_" Conservatives don't care about the environment."_

That's what my liberal friend told me when I co-founded the American Conservation Coalition.

It's funny how this misperception has taken hold.

Because here's the truth...

Conservationists are overwhelmingly hunters and fishermen. The people in rural parts of our country are mostly conservative. The best environmental stewards I know are conservative.

So why does this misperception, this outright LIE, exist?

**ONE** : The liberal mainstream media has lied to the public for decades, and people have bought into it.

**TWO** : For the last few decades, the environmental movement has been hijacked by radical left-wing activists who put ideology over true conservationism. Instead of focusing on stewardship of our natural resources, they embraced anti-humanist, anti-capitalist, and alarmist ideas.

For too long, radical activists have used the environment as a means to their radical ends of socialism.

What if conservatives took back the environmental cause?

What if we built the largest environmental movement without a radical ideology?

What if we believed economic and environmental success go hand-in-hand?

_We can. _

**If you care deeply and passionately about stewarding our land and building a conservative environmental movement, then I am personally asking you to invest in our movement right now. **

[_**Can you chip in $10 or more today to support the American Conservation Coalition (ACC)? Click here to donate ANY amount >>**_](http://links.freedomfirstalert.com/u/click?_t=9ca143e971904d26a973d002cb0ae7f7&_m=4712a043cf234791848874ee1770d996&_e=hfRlN7jhvviOLFvvof-BB1Avucmqm3fsA0Y7AliOU50z4B5lX7VDzf5s4TXriFrp_WSTzjQh-rKwvwGuJYElNuNNzw0Jf7HvqUv5gJf6puHJgY8MRdcP9hxxWHHgO2ry1jcudxlqm7KRoxGAMFRM4rUyR3FEkLksAT5I35DfNJ2qm-HtvNtej0A92L-DOnxDrVB9XVOZ5NAtK7Ewq_S4ehS1Te8rhTbYm7yvOVsPuPCcD49h6nIsR1wYPMLX4lgzEHfBNtMvcCTj6z34jSwcTAEc41YPJQwBvHUBl8EwoFXQZN-WKrvail3uCBpVM2zKQ07I2Ll8hAtjcibTQAO_iQ%3D%3D)

ACC's mission is to build the conservative environmental movement. We have over 80,000 members.

And I am personally inviting you to join the team.

**Passion for conservation comes from patriotism.**

The United States is the most beautiful country. From the Smoky Mountains to the Pacific beaches, from Lake Michigan to the Gulf of America, we have boundless natural beauty and resources.

We _can_ be energy independent and protect our lands.

We can be the top economic powerhouse and enjoy the most beautiful National Parks.

_**We can leave a legacy for future generations. **_

But if I'm being honest, I sometimes wonder why the misperception of conservatives still exists.

And here's my answer.

Because we haven't built a big enough movement to rival the Sierra Club and other organizations that have, historically, dominated the environmental debate.

That time is over.

[_**Please support American Conservation Coalition today by donating $10, $35, $50, $100, $250, or ANY amount you can generously spare. **_](http://links.freedomfirstalert.com/u/click?_t=9ca143e971904d26a973d002cb0ae7f7&_m=4712a043cf234791848874ee1770d996&_e=hfRlN7jhvviOLFvvof-BB1Avucmqm3fsA0Y7AliOU50z4B5lX7VDzf5s4TXriFrp_WSTzjQh-rKwvwGuJYElNuNNzw0Jf7HvqUv5gJf6puHJgY8MRdcP9hxxWHHgO2ry1jcudxlqm7KRoxGAMFRM4unwL6WROuuxB8Pt7EBx3IZW7jQTYOvUR9-pu6r4FYY2qGI2zlE4ttLS7IUibL4uBv0qgKzbHOhCDL5ii9l69r7nG0x1id_dY-clLO87mqMZ7QnBcXeAH7gLMyq8-uH9yWy5URi7q9Xp9OWQ9U29HTTXE_D2ptz0HCbBegVSDcs_oEhIrdJOO6s_xOPcbZmIRg%3D%3D)

clean_body: Friend, " Conservatives don't care about the environment." That's what my liberal friend told me when I co-founded the American Conservation Coalition. It's funny how this misperception has taken hold. Because here's the truth... Conservationists are overwhelmingly hunters and fishermen. The people in rural parts of our country are mostly conservative. The best environmental stewards I know are conservative. So why does this misperception, this outright LIE, exist? ONE : The liberal mainstream media has lied to the public for decades, and people have bought into it. TWO : For the last few decades, the environmental movement has been hijacked by radical left-wing activists who put ideology over true conservationism. Instead of focusing on stewardship of our natural resources, they embraced anti-humanist, anti-capitalist, and alarmist ideas. For too long, radical activists have used the environment as a means to their radical ends of socialism. What if conservatives took back the environmental cause? What if we built the largest environmental movement without a radical ideology? What if we believed economic and environmental success go hand-in-hand? We can. If you care deeply and passionately about stewarding our land and building a conservative environmental movement, then I am personally asking you to invest in our movement right now. ACC's mission is to build the conservative environmental movement. We have over 80,000 members. And I am personally inviting you to join the team. Passion for conservation comes from patriotism. The United States is the most beautiful country. From the Smoky Mountains to the Pacific beaches, from Lake Michigan to the Gulf of America, we have boundless natural beauty and resources. We can be energy independent and protect our lands. We can be the top economic powerhouse and enjoy the most beautiful National Parks. We can leave a legacy for future generations. But if I'm being honest, I sometimes wonder why the misperception of conservatives still exists. And here's my answer. Because we haven't built a big enough movement to rival the Sierra Club and other organizations that have, historically, dominated the environmental debate. That time is over. Thank you for supporting our nation's beautiful outdoors. Danielle Franz, CEO P.S. I want to share these photos of our members, young conservatives, out there winning for the environment. ]() The American Conservation Coalition (ACC) is a 501(c)(3) nonprofit organization. Donations to the American Conservation Coalition are tax-deductible. The American Conservation Coalition 's tax identification number is 82-3815628.

name: Haley Stevens
subject: I really want to hear from you
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Haley Stevens for Senate
body:
This will take less than 60 seconds

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. [To unsubscribe from this email list, please click here.](https://act.haleyformi.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?&t=1&akid=581%2E49239%2EArjDcA)
| | | [](https://act.haleyformi.com/go/4463?t=2&akid=581%2E49239%2EArjDcA)
---
[](https://act.haleyformi.com/go/4464?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&t=3&akid=581%2E49239%2EArjDcA)
Hi null, it’s Haley!

Last week, I completed the first leg of my _Made in Michigan_ tour, where I spoke to so many incredible Michiganders. I had the privilege of getting to hear from local community leaders, manufacturing workers, educators, and labor organizers, each with a unique story, but all united by our deep love for the Great Lakes State.
Listening and learning from you all has made me more eager than ever to fight for working families across Michigan.
But I couldn’t talk to everyone in person, so I’d love to hear from you directly: **[Will you take 60 seconds to fill out my August Priorities Survey?](https://act.haleyformi.com/go/4464?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&t=4&akid=581%2E49239%2EArjDcA)**
| | [Take the Survey](https://act.haleyformi.com/go/4464?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&t=5&akid=581%2E49239%2EArjDcA)
---
Your feedback is critical in shaping the issues I elevate, the messages I share, and the voters we reach out to across the state.

On the tour, I heard concerns about rising prices, the reckless trade war, protecting reproductive freedom, the future of Michigan’s manufacturing jobs, and of course, people want to know what Trump is hiding in the Epstein files.
**But I truly want to know: What’s on YOUR mind, null?**[I need 60 responses from 18326 before midnight tonight, so take my August Priorities Survey now and let me know:](https://act.haleyformi.com/go/4464?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&t=6&akid=581%2E49239%2EArjDcA)
| | [Take the Survey](https://act.haleyformi.com/go/4464?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&t=7&akid=581%2E49239%2EArjDcA)
---
I’m glad you’re part of this team, null.

With gratitude,
Haley
|
* * *
**A note from Haley Stevens:** null, I’m proud to be a lifelong Michigander and the daughter of small-business owners. That’s why I’ve fought so hard for working families my entire life. Now, I’m running for Michigan’s open Senate seat to continue fighting for the people and communities I love. The path to the Senate majority runs right through Michigan, which means this race is shaping up to be the most competitive and expensive in the entire country. The GOP is already coming after me as a top target for defeat, so I’m counting on your grassroots support to fight back and win. [**If you’re in this fight with me, will you add your name to endorse my campaign?**](https://act.haleyformi.com/go/4465?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&t=8&akid=581%2E49239%2EArjDcA) | | | [](https://act.haleyformi.com/go/4463?t=9&akid=581%2E49239%2EArjDcA)
---
You can also text “JOIN” to 80242 to become a core member of our team and receive exclusive, real-time updates from my campaign.
Thank you,
Haley

name: Team Ilhan
subject: We have to take this threat seriously.
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY ILHAN FOR CONGRESS
body:
The Supreme Court will consider for the first time whether to take up a case asking them to overturn this landmark decision.
# [](https://act.ilhanomar.com/go/35?t=1&akid=1759%2E791427%2E0dE3wy)

[](https://act.ilhanomar.com/go/7?c0=io-em-aug25.m0VVrI&refcode=em250813-1-180&t=2&akid=1759%2E791427%2E0dE3wy)
Friend — 10 years ago the Supreme Court ruled in favor of same-sex marriages, allowing gay couples to finally get legally married across the country in the most significant moment for LGBTQ rights in American history. Love won.
But this fall, the Supreme Court will consider for the first time whether to take up a case asking them to overturn that landmark decision.
**We have to take this threat seriously.**
If you don’t believe us, just remember what happened to _Roe v. Wade._
_Roe_ was considered a bedrock legal precedent. Untouchable. Trump’s own appointees to the Supreme Court even told Congress that they believed the same.
But then, in 2022, those same Supreme Court justices gave into the wishes of the extreme far-right and overturned _Roe,_ ending the national right to choose, sending us back decades in the fight for access to reproductive health care, and condemning millions of Americans to dangerous state abortion bans.
So once again, **we have to take this seriously.** Especially as Republicans have increasingly embraced a far-right, anti-LGTBQ platform that targets transgender people, LGBTQ youth, and public education around the LGBTQ community.
Ilhan Omar stands in complete opposition to this platform, and has a proven record of defending gay and transgender rights as Republicans have put them at the center of their hateful crusades.
She is ready to fight to protect the right to marriage and everyone’s civil rights, no matter what happens at the Supreme Court.
**[If you’re with her, chip in $10 or whatever you can afford today to Ilhan’s campaign. Help power the work of our movement, a movement that will never abandon our LGBTQ neighbors despite whatever Trump and the far-right throw our way.**](https://act.ilhanomar.com/go/7?c0=io-em-aug25.m0VVrI&refcode=em250813-1-180&t=3&akid=1759%2E791427%2E0dE3wy)
_If you've saved payment info with ActBlue Express, your contribution will go through immediately:_
| | **[Donate $10](https://act.ilhanomar.com/go/771?c0=io-em-aug25.l9ypIT&refcode=em250813-1-180&t=22&akid=1759%2E791427%2E0dE3wy)**

body:
But the chaos in Washington shows why local leaders matter more than ever.

| [](https://click.everyaction.com/k/113262499/563185405/1328794144?refcode=ea.6f29c068-7378-f011-b481-6045bdfe8e9c&ms=ea.6f29c068-7378-f011-b481-6045bdfe8e9c&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxNi8xLzk2NzgyIiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjZmMjljMDY4LTczNzgtZjAxMS1iNDgxLTYwNDViZGZlOGU5YyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=t0Id7jC1wIaJp8T82F0UggGfsQAkbWqogKKCepewxNc=&emci=87a48b0e-5d78-f011-b481-6045bdfe8e9c&emdi=6f29c068-7378-f011-b481-6045bdfe8e9c&ceid=4823105)

I know your time is precious, but I need just two minutes for something that can't wait. **[My team set a $18,000 mid-August fundraising goal, and we have until Friday to reach it — or risk losing ground against Big Oil’s billions when our communities and our planet need us most. Can you join me by chipping in a few dollars right now to help us get there?](https://click.everyaction.com/k/113262500/563185406/2105508926?refcode=ea.6f29c068-7378-f011-b481-6045bdfe8e9c&ms=ea.6f29c068-7378-f011-b481-6045bdfe8e9c&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxNi8xLzk2NzgyIiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjZmMjljMDY4LTczNzgtZjAxMS1iNDgxLTYwNDViZGZlOGU5YyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=t0Id7jC1wIaJp8T82F0UggGfsQAkbWqogKKCepewxNc=)** [](https://click.everyaction.com/k/113262501/563185407/2105508926?refcode=ea.6f29c068-7378-f011-b481-6045bdfe8e9c&ms=ea.6f29c068-7378-f011-b481-6045bdfe8e9c&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxNi8xLzk2NzgyIiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjZmMjljMDY4LTczNzgtZjAxMS1iNDgxLTYwNDViZGZlOGU5YyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=t0Id7jC1wIaJp8T82F0UggGfsQAkbWqogKKCepewxNc=) I hate to be so direct, but the news out of Washington makes it painfully clear why our work matters more than ever. We're watching Trump embrace full-blown authoritarianism in real time. He **deployed** 800 National Guard troops to D.C. and ordered a federal takeover of the city's police without asking permission from _anyone._ He's actively working with Republicans in Texas and around the country to **rig electoral maps** and solidify his party's grip on power in 2026. And his constant attacks on climate science — from eliminating research programs to **firing scientists** and planning to dismantle life-saving agencies like FEMA — prove that Trump and his MAGA bandwagon have chosen campaign donations from fossil fuel corporations over the American people. I know this news is discouraging, but if there’s one thing I’ve learned from years of protesting, it’s that the toughest moments are when we are needed the most. **We must push back with everything we have and elect climate champions in places Big Oil thinks we’re not watching — from city halls and school boards to statehouses and beyond.** **[So I'll ask again because your support makes a tangible difference here, and I know you understand the stakes: Will you chip in a few dollars before Friday to help us reach our $18,000 fundraising goal?](https://click.everyaction.com/k/113262502/563185408/2105508926?refcode=ea.6f29c068-7378-f011-b481-6045bdfe8e9c&ms=ea.6f29c068-7378-f011-b481-6045bdfe8e9c&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxNi8xLzk2NzgyIiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjZmMjljMDY4LTczNzgtZjAxMS1iNDgxLTYwNDViZGZlOGU5YyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=t0Id7jC1wIaJp8T82F0UggGfsQAkbWqogKKCepewxNc=)** clean_body: But the chaos in Washington shows why local leaders matter more than ever. | I know your time is precious, but I need just two minutes for something that can't wait. = = I hate to be so direct, but the news out of Washington makes it painfully clear why our work matters more than ever. We're watching Trump embrace full-blown authoritarianism in real time. He deployed 800 National Guard troops to D.C. and ordered a federal takeover of the city's police without asking permission from anyone. He's actively working with Republicans in Texas and around the country to rig electoral maps and solidify his party's grip on power in 2026. And his constant attacks on climate science — from eliminating research programs to firing scientists and planning to dismantle life-saving agencies like FEMA — prove that Trump and his MAGA bandwagon have chosen campaign donations from fossil fuel corporations over the American people. I know this news is discouraging, but if there’s one thing I’ve learned from years of protesting, it’s that the toughest moments are when we are needed the most. We must push back with everything we have and elect climate champions in places Big Oil thinks we’re not watching — from city halls and school boards to statehouses and beyond. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | = | = ---|--- = | = = | = Onward, Jane Fonda = | = | = = Follow along: | | | | | ---|---|---|---|---|--- Paid for by Jane Fonda Climate PAC, not authorized by any candidate or candidate’s committee. name: The Ohio Dems
subject: Ohio Capital Journal: Republican Vivek Ramaswamy holds massive cash advantage in Ohio’s 2026 race for governor
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the Ohio Democratic Party and not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee
body:
and then one billionaire DOUBLED it.
|
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/113262745/563186111/-1426157924?refcode=ODP_ATA_EM_FR_MM1_250813_T1_1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84OTI0NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxNzRhNjk4ZC03NDc4LWYwMTEtYjQ4MS02MDQ1YmRmZThlOWMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Mt7wh3irJN64iRKUyaehYsLHUZUc-cNmnD9DZoXcehg=) Team,

We thought Vivek Ramaswamy couldn’t get any worse — then his campaign finance report dropped, and it revealed he's blowing $80,000 a month for a private plane to use in his campaign while Ohio families are struggling to make rent.

[**_If that makes you as angry as it makes us, help us hit our $15,000 mid-month goal so we can stop out-of-touch billionaire Ramaswamy from buying this election >>_**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/113262746/563186112/-1426157924?refcode=ODP_ATA_EM_FR_MM1_250813_T1_1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84OTI0NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxNzRhNjk4ZC03NDc4LWYwMTEtYjQ4MS02MDQ1YmRmZThlOWMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Mt7wh3irJN64iRKUyaehYsLHUZUc-cNmnD9DZoXcehg=)

Did we mention that in four months, Ramaswamy raked in $9.7 million? Or that then a single out-of-state billionaire donor wrote a pro-Ramaswamy super PAC a check for $10 million, doubling his fundraising haul in a matter of seconds?

And what is he spending it on? While working Ohioans juggle two jobs just to keep food on the table for our families, Ramaswamy is campaigning in a private jet — he’s taken 18 in-state trips already.

We can’t forget that he also spent $54,000 on a single block of Swiss cheese at the Ohio State Fair. _Yes, you read that right_.

Vivek Ramaswamy isn’t running for governor to represent us, he's running to hand Ohio over to billionaires like himself. Trump backs him. Elon Musk backs him. Right-wing special interest donors back him. _That should tell you everything_.

They’ll spend whatever it takes to buy the governor’s mansion — and we’re the only ones standing in their way.

[**_That’s why we’re asking: can you pitch in $5, $10, or whatever you can before our mid-month fundraising deadline so we can defeat Ramaswamy next year and flip the governor’s office blue?_**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/113262747/563186113/-1426157924?refcode=ODP_ATA_EM_FR_MM1_250813_T1_1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84OTI0NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxNzRhNjk4ZC03NDc4LWYwMTEtYjQ4MS02MDQ1YmRmZThlOWMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Mt7wh3irJN64iRKUyaehYsLHUZUc-cNmnD9DZoXcehg=)

Thank you,

Ohio Dems

name: Heidi Hall
subject: "carbon dioxide is not air pollution" What!!??
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY HEIDI HALL FOR CONGRESS
body:
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/hall-email?refcode=20250813_em_pet_b1_HH_standard [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/hall-email?refcode=20250813_em_pet_b1_HH_standard]
Friend,
When I worked at the EPA, I saw the devastating effects of climate change and how human actions can negatively impact our environment.
Whether it's companies dumping toxic waste to reduce costs or a lack of investment in proper recycling programs, it's the role of the federal government to intervene and protect people.
Trump and his head of the EPA, Lee Zeldin, are intervening alright... to make things worse.
They want to gut greenhouse gas regulations and allow carmakers to produce cars with no limits on the pollution they produce. Will you sign our petition to stand with us against this harmful proposal? [https://forms.oneswitchboard.com/heidi-hall-for-congress/epa-deregulation]
SIGN OUR PETITION [https://forms.oneswitchboard.com/heidi-hall-for-congress/epa-deregulation]
Friend, this decision is toxic in more ways than one.
By attempting to get rid of regulations that 1️⃣ limit how much pollution a vehicle can release while it's operating, 2️⃣ set a fuel efficiency standard across all new vehicles brought to market, and 3️⃣ mandate how many zero-emission vehicles carmakers must sell, the Trump administration is acting in the best interests of the oil and automaking industry, not ours.
In the last election, fossil fuel interests poured $96 million into Donald Trump’s re-election campaign, and now, a report from five scientists who reject the scientific consensus on climate change found that "carbon dioxide is not 'air pollution' as traditionally understood" and therefore cannot be regulated by the EPA.
It seems like their investment is already paying off.
Friend, corruption like this needs to be rooted out, and that means electing people to Congress who won't act as lapdogs for Trump.
But we also need to consistently oppose his actions. Will you join us in condemning the Trump-controlled EPA's decision to deregulate by adding your name to our petition today? [https://forms.oneswitchboard.com/heidi-hall-for-congress/epa-deregulation]
ADD YOUR NAME [https://forms.oneswitchboard.com/heidi-hall-for-congress/epa-deregulation]

Raised by parents who had persisted to make a middle-class life for their kids in Contra Costa County while lifting up others, Heidi was taught to push through and overcome challenges rather than complain about them. She learned to stick up for the vulnerable, to respect working people, and to value equal opportunity and justice.
After graduating from Pomona College and earning graduate degrees from Columbia and Rutgers, Heidi went to work for the Rockefeller Foundation promoting reproductive care and then began her career at the Environmental Protection Agency, stopping the dumping of toxic waste and holding corporate polluters accountable.
Today, Heidi chairs the Nevada County Board of Supervisors, where she’s taken on homelessness, expanded broadband access, and worked to reduce crime and illegal cannabis growth. Heidi flipped her seat from red to blue – and now she’s ready to do it again in Congress to take on toxic politics in Washington and put people first.

clean_body: [] Friend, When I worked at the EPA, I saw the devastating effects of climate change and how human actions can negatively impact our environment. Whether it's companies dumping toxic waste to reduce costs or a lack of investment in proper recycling programs, it's the role of the federal government to intervene and protect people. Trump and his head of the EPA, Lee Zeldin, are intervening alright... to make things worse. They want to gut greenhouse gas regulations and allow carmakers to produce cars with no limits on the pollution they produce. Will you sign our petition to stand with us against this harmful proposal? [] SIGN OUR PETITION [] Friend, this decision is toxic in more ways than one. By attempting to get rid of regulations that 1️⃣ limit how much pollution a vehicle can release while it's operating, 2️⃣ set a fuel efficiency standard across all new vehicles brought to market, and 3️⃣ mandate how many zero-emission vehicles carmakers must sell, the Trump administration is acting in the best interests of the oil and automaking industry, not ours. In the last election, fossil fuel interests poured $96 million into Donald Trump’s re-election campaign, and now, a report from five scientists who reject the scientific consensus on climate change found that "carbon dioxide is not 'air pollution' as traditionally understood" and therefore cannot be regulated by the EPA. It seems like their investment is already paying off. Friend, corruption like this needs to be rooted out, and that means electing people to Congress who won't act as lapdogs for Trump. But we also need to consistently oppose his actions. Will you join us in condemning the Trump-controlled EPA's decision to deregulate by adding your name to our petition today? body:
‘You Should Be Exposed’: We can’t let the Epstein Issue Fizzle
# [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/113263142/563187293/938567526?refcode=header&noskip=true&&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTcxOSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2MGY0YTFjMC03Njc4LWYwMTEtYjQ4MS02MDQ1YmRmZThlOWMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=rtin6NL7u_5xa2ZjJqJ1Y1tyGjl5qlGXpvDki8o17BY=)
Hi, it’s Robert Garcia. I'm writing today because there's no turning back.
As the top Democrat on the House Oversight Committee, I’ve made one thing clear: The fight for transparency around the Jeffrey Epstein files will not fizzle. Instead, we’re turning up the heat.
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/113263143/563187294/789508428?refcode=250810_RG_keepdreaminga&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTcxOSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2MGY0YTFjMC03Njc4LWYwMTEtYjQ4MS02MDQ1YmRmZThlOWMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=rtin6NL7u_5xa2ZjJqJ1Y1tyGjl5qlGXpvDki8o17BY=)
Here’s what we’re doing:
* We successfully subpoenaed the Department of Justice for the full Epstein files. The vote even passed with some Republicans breaking ranks, sending a message that we’re not backing down.
* We formally demanded that the Epstein estate release the so-called “birthday book,” a document that may contain messages from powerful figures and is crucial for accountability.
* **And when Republicans tried to delay and recess early rather than vote, we called them out for shielding the powerful instead of serving the people.**

This isn’t just politics. It’s about whether justice and truth matter, or whether privilege and power get them covered up. **We cannot lose momentum.**
**[So please: Will you chip in today to keep the pressure going and make sure transparency wins? We’ve started the fight. Now, with your help, we’ll see it through to justice and accountability.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/113263144/563187295/789508428?refcode=250810_RG_keepdreaminga&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTcxOSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2MGY0YTFjMC03Njc4LWYwMTEtYjQ4MS02MDQ1YmRmZThlOWMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=rtin6NL7u_5xa2ZjJqJ1Y1tyGjl5qlGXpvDki8o17BY=)**
[DONATE](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/113263145/563187296/-309737922?refcode=250810_RG_keepdreaminga&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTcxOSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2MGY0YTFjMC03Njc4LWYwMTEtYjQ4MS02MDQ1YmRmZThlOWMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=rtin6NL7u_5xa2ZjJqJ1Y1tyGjl5qlGXpvDki8o17BY=)
Thank you for standing with me,
Robert

It’s about whether justice and truth matter, or whether privilege and power get them covered up. We cannot lose momentum. = = Thank you for standing with me, Robert = Paid for by Robert Garcia for Congress Robert Garcia for Congress 65 Pine Ave #348 Long Beach, CA 90802 United States This email was sent to . We try to send only the most important information and opportunities to participate via email, but click to unsubscribe.

name: Nancy Mace for Governor
subject: Nancy Mace Wants to Hear from You
body:
Nancy Mace announced the launch of the People’s Agenda, a statewide effort to hear directly from residents about the issues they care about most. | | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/nancymace/nancy-mace-wants-to-hear-from-you?e=ddc57b5ede)
---
| |
---
| | **NANCY MACE WANTS TO KNOW YOUR PRIORITIES FOR SOUTH CAROLINA** _Mace’s ‘People’s Agenda’ Will Turn Hometown Priorities into Day One Wins_ Today, Congresswoman Nancy Mace announced the launch of the People’s Agenda, a statewide effort to hear directly from YOU about the issues YOU care about most. This feedback will help craft Mace’s top priorities for her first 100 days as Governor.
---
| [THE PEOPLE'S AGENDA](https://nancymace.us14.list-manage.com/track/click?u=f826f615915b06bdee33acac8&id=b50ef4bd79&e=ddc57b5ede "THE PEOPLE'S AGENDA")
---
|
---
| [DONATE](https://nancymace.us14.list-manage.com/track/click?u=f826f615915b06bdee33acac8&id=764f053c86&e=ddc57b5ede "DONATE")
---
| “I’ve held the line for South Carolina and our conservative values, now it’s time to hear from residents about the issues they feel are most important,” said **Congresswoman Mace.** “The best ideas don’t come from politicians, they come from the people.” Mace is asking YOU to visit [nancymace.org/local-issues](https://nancymace.us14.list-manage.com/track/click?u=f826f615915b06bdee33acac8&id=4e9194731d&e=ddc57b5ede) to provide feedback directly. Your needs will help shape action on Day One in the Governor’s office. Mace has outlined a bold, results-driven vision for South Carolina in her Path to Prosperity plan, including:

* **Five Years to 0** – Eliminating state income taxes in 5 years
* **Law & Order **– Ending sanctuary policies, enforcing laws, and supporting law enforcement
* **Education** – Returning to the basics and protecting parental rights
* **Women & Children** – Ensuring safety, opportunity, and fairness for all
* **Infrastructure** – Repairing and building the systems South Carolina needs
* **Energy** – Expanding affordable, reliable energy

---
| | [THE PEOPLE'S AGENDA](https://nancymace.us14.list-manage.com/track/click?u=f826f615915b06bdee33acac8&id=c24737c059&e=ddc57b5ede "THE PEOPLE'S AGENDA")
---
| “We’re building a South Carolina that answers to the people, not the politicians,” **Mace said.** “Your voice will help us get there.”
**About Nancy Mace**

Nancy Mace comes from a military family, as the daughter of a retired Army General and school teacher. She started working at Waffle House after dropping out of high school, and became the first woman to graduate from The Citadel Military College of South Carolina, 26 years ago. She built a business from the ground up, ran for office when others wouldn’t, and made history again as the first Republican woman elected to Congress from South Carolina. She fights for what’s right – balanced budgets, low to no taxes, deporting illegals, a government who answers to the people, and the rights of children. She’s not a fan of the trans. Faith guides her. Facts drive her. And she never backs down. Nancy Mace holds the line.
---
| [DONATE](https://nancymace.us14.list-manage.com/track/click?u=f826f615915b06bdee33acac8&id=35e83577b4&e=ddc57b5ede "DONATE")
---
|
---
| [THE PEOPLE'S AGENDA](https://nancymace.us14.list-manage.com/track/click?u=f826f615915b06bdee33acac8&id=eff30a644a&e=ddc57b5ede "THE PEOPLE'S AGENDA")
---
| **Team Mace**
campaign@nancymace.org
---
| _Copyright © 2025 Nancy Mace for Governor, All rights reserved._
You are receiving this email because you signed up on NancyMace.org.

**Our mailing address is:**
Nancy Mace for Governor295 Seven Farms Dr Ste C-186Daniel Island, SC 29492-8001
[Add us to your address book](https://nancymace.us14.list-manage.com/vcard?u=f826f615915b06bdee33acac8&id=b0fea72a45)

Want to change how you receive these emails?
You can [update your preferences](https://nancymace.us14.list-manage.com/profile?u=f826f615915b06bdee33acac8&id=b0fea72a45&e=ddc57b5ede&c=ef6529ba0d) or [unsubscribe from this list](https://nancymace.us14.list-manage.com/unsubscribe?u=f826f615915b06bdee33acac8&id=b0fea72a45&t=b&e=ddc57b5ede&c=ef6529ba0d).

name: Tobias Read
subject: The values that guide me:
body:
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/read-em-24?refcode=250813em-values-ob3 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/read-em-24?refcode=250813em-values-ob3]
Hi, folks. It’s Oregon Secretary of State, Tobias Read.
People often ask me why I still send out fundraising emails even though I was just elected. Trust me – asking for money is not my favorite part of being a candidate.
Here’s the bottom line: I love my job and I’m proud of the work we have done in the Secretary of State’s office. But even though the election is behind us, the work of building a strong, effective campaign never really stops. Maintaining a campaign apparatus is crucial in modern politics. Without it, I’d be vulnerable to a challenger. Raising money also allows me to build stronger alliances across Oregon and to support organizations and candidates who will fight to protect our democracy.
Most importantly, it allows me to maintain a consistent and aggressive communication structure with Oregon residents about what I’m doing to uplift our democracy and help make Oregon's government more accountable to voters.
To support my campaign, please consider pitching in $25 or more. [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/read-em-24?refcode=250813em-values-ob3]
DONATE NOW [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/read-em-24?refcode=250813em-values-ob3]
The principles that guide my time in office are the same ones that guided me during the campaign.
Democracy. The rule of law. Public service. Fairness and equality.
So when it comes to standing up to MAGA extremism and President Donald Trump’s illegal actions, it’s never a question of whether I’ll bow to political pressure.
I’ll choose my values and the bedrock principles of American democracy every time.
But as our country faces unprecedented challenges, I need your help to continue defending Oregon’s elections. >> [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/read-em-24?refcode=250813em-values-ob3]
I also wanted to share a quick update. I recently had the honor of sitting down with Southern Oregon’s Jefferson Public Radio to discuss the work that my office has been doing over the past few months.
You can listen to what I had to say by clicking on this link. [https://www.ijpr.org/show/the-jefferson-exchange/2025-05-14/thurs-9am-a-candid-conversation-with-oregon-secretary-of-state-tobias-read]
And then, if you’re able, chip in $10 (or whatever you can spare) to help my campaign stay strong in the face of these unprecedented attacks on our democracy. [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/read-em-24?refcode=250813em-values-ob3]
https://www.ijpr.org/show/the-jefferson-exchange/2025-05-14/thurs-9am-a-candid-conversation-with-oregon-secretary-of-state-tobias-read [https://www.ijpr.org/show/the-jefferson-exchange/2025-05-14/thurs-9am-a-candid-conversation-with-oregon-secretary-of-state-tobias-read]
Thank you,
Tobias Read
Oregon Secretary of State
P.S. Don’t forget! The Oregon Political Tax Credit allows you to donate $50 (if you file single) or $100 (if you file joint) to a candidate, PAC, or party, which will be fully credited back as a rebate — so it’s free to donate! For more information, click here. [https://www.oregon.gov/omd/ONG/Documents/SMFS/Personal%20Financial%20Counselor/Political-Tax-Credit.pdf?]
CONTRIBUTE [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/read-em-24?refcode=250722em-values-rs]
https://www.facebook.com/TobiasReadOR [https://www.facebook.com/TobiasReadOR] https://twitter.com/TobiasRead [https://twitter.com/TobiasRead] https://instagram.com/tobiasreador [https://instagram.com/tobiasreador]

Friends of Tobias Read (5208)
PO Box 42307
Portland, OR 97242
United States
If you believe you received this message in error or wish to no longer receive email from us, please unsubscribe: https://secure.ngpvan.com/p/IMahE5FQZEyEjGesjn_XSA2?unsubscribedata=54X748j60ov3D6JmEN%2Bqel1dqQ39P33xi8rbqhsrrDe7Weq9W8LhiwtZlINeuSFt8ukbEFlsbDLjuOu4jeueTrTiG6eP9zL4UBOTlM5Ca8yF2sqPp3vPEVjXKxAgKT%2BHgS1hPG2wUBpMxBDFsnmib4Z%2FuO9Y42DFkz7p2xw6XriQliEN6wz1EDIUx3d%2BhOQ2fwFmXH4SUd1b54Ic%2BwmGB3nYoYngabuWomWNztVyYAr0rmoEIU7SyJrG9nbv%2BmQAb0onsIIw3JjgygWdGR%2BqLzcEulyGMLTxLspLl239Zqo0OPidzaUQmhb8FCBk0eXSZxkx1p21mdHH7T5O6wbPgzGvjZPRIKhaJwcjIspnBNHx21J%2FPj1As6iMt%2FYtvZpdEOMqKjo2cYvXRFCXxezrUUNp6uaTMmbu18M3FIjvR%2Fi5c4TFtirk6VBgna1bISgH .

name: Michael Bennet
subject: Fighting back against Trump's crypto scheme
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Bennet for Governor
body:
Donald Trump recently signed the so-called GENIUS Act
| | | [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/113263527/563189270/-2054079050?refcode=jtk883-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjgvMS83NDc5MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzOWM4OGJiMS03Nzc4LWYwMTEtYjQ4MS02MDQ1YmRmZThlOWMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=b_9guBRBN5L_87e3g6bxSpT9ChL7t_iMrh9zanHFYB0=)
---
**Friend, Donald Trump recently signed the so-called GENIUS Act – a dangerous cryptocurrency bill – into law that opens the door for even more shady deals for Trump and his allies.**
I fought to stop it. I even used a rare procedural move to introduce an amendment banning the president and vice president from endorsing or issuing stablecoins. But Senate Republicans stripped it out, enabling Trump and his family to profit from unregulated pump-and-dump schemes.
Now Trump can continue his crypto grift – and his erosion of the public’s trust in our democracy.

**We need to fight back.[If you’re ready to stand with me against Trump’s corruption, will you chip in now?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/113263533/563189303/851209409?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk883-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjgvMS83NDc5MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzOWM4OGJiMS03Nzc4LWYwMTEtYjQ4MS02MDQ1YmRmZThlOWMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=b_9guBRBN5L_87e3g6bxSpT9ChL7t_iMrh9zanHFYB0=)**
| | [Donate](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/113263537/563189310/851209409?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk883-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjgvMS83NDc5MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzOWM4OGJiMS03Nzc4LWYwMTEtYjQ4MS02MDQ1YmRmZThlOWMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=b_9guBRBN5L_87e3g6bxSpT9ChL7t_iMrh9zanHFYB0=)
---
Trump is pumping up the value of his personal cryptocoin to make himself and his billionaire buddies even richer. He’s holding private dinners with his meme coin investors in a shameless pay-to-play operation – and he’s doing it while cutting taxes for the ultra-wealthy, gutting critical safety nets, and raising prices with his disastrous tariff policies.
In short, the president is abusing his public office for enormous personal gain. And the GENIUS Act just gave him a green light to keep going.
Everyone in Washington, D.C., knows where I stand: **Colorado will not be complicit.**
I’m running for governor because I believe Colorado must lead where Washington has failed. That means standing up to Trump at every level, especially when he tries to hide his corruption behind new tech like crypto.
People across Colorado and the country are fed up with Trump’s schemes. They’re ready for accountability. And we’re not backing down.
**_[If you're with me – if you're ready to take on Trump’s crypto corruption and help me fight for something better – will you chip in $5 today?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/113263542/563189314/851209409?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk883-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjgvMS83NDc5MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzOWM4OGJiMS03Nzc4LWYwMTEtYjQ4MS02MDQ1YmRmZThlOWMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=b_9guBRBN5L_87e3g6bxSpT9ChL7t_iMrh9zanHFYB0=)_**

clean_body: Donald Trump recently signed the so-called GENIUS Act | | | = Friend, Donald Trump recently signed the so-called GENIUS Act – a dangerous cryptocurrency bill – into law that opens the door for even more shady deals for Trump and his allies. I fought to stop it. I even used a rare procedural move to introduce an amendment banning the president and vice president from endorsing or issuing stablecoins. But Senate Republicans stripped it out, enabling Trump and his family to profit from unregulated pump-and-dump schemes. Now Trump can continue his crypto grift – and his erosion of the public’s trust in our democracy. We need to fight back.= | | = Trump is pumping up the value of his personal cryptocoin to make himself and his billionaire buddies even richer. He’s holding private dinners with his meme coin investors in a shameless pay-to-play operation – and he’s doing it while cutting taxes for the ultra-wealthy, gutting critical safety nets, and raising prices with his disastrous tariff policies. In short, the president is abusing his public office for enormous personal gain. And the GENIUS Act just gave him a green light to keep going. Everyone in Washington, D.C., knows where I stand: Colorado will not be complicit. I’m running for governor because I believe Colorado must lead where Washington has failed. That means standing up to Trump at every level, especially when he tries to hide his corruption behind new tech like crypto. People across Colorado and the country are fed up with Trump’s schemes. They’re ready for accountability. And we’re not backing down. = If you've saved payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | | = | | = | | = | | = Thank you for standing with me, Michael | Bennet for Governor PO Box 270117 Louisville, CO 80027 United States Paid for by Bennet for Governor. subject: Where we stand:
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Emerge America
body:
Peter,
I was proud to recently present our Mid-Year Report showing all of our momentum so far this year.

At a time when our rights, our democracy, and our public institutions are under attack, Emerge women are stepping up. And thanks to grassroots supporters like you, they’re winning.

👇 Just take a look at our impact:

70%+ win rate annually, 6,500+ women trained, 1,200+ alums in elected office, 13 members of Congress and counting, 85% seated together success rate, 6X higher first-time candidate win rate, 94% incumbent win rate, 157% jump in interest in 2025

SUPPORT EMERGE [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/blu-emrg-2025-em?refcode=BLU_EM_EMRG_2025-08-13_1&amount=25]

These numbers aren’t just statistics. They’re women on the front lines of the resistance. From school boards to Congress, Emerge alums are fighting back against Trump’s agenda and shaping the future of this country.

But this work isn’t over. We have a huge election year ahead, and we’re training the women who will rise to meet the moment.

Can you chip in $25 to help us train the women leading the resistance?DONATE NOW [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/blu-emrg-2025-em?refcode=BLU_EM_EMRG_2025-08-13_1&amount=25]

Thank you for being part of this movement. Let’s keep building.

In solidarity,
A’shanti F. Gholar
President & CEO, Emerge

| | Fellow American, You've been a part of this fight before. In fact, your past support helped put conservative firepower on the map when it mattered most. But here's the truth: **this is the moment we need our people the most** --when no one's watching. When the media is tuned out. When the other side is quietly laying groundwork and stockpiling cash. And right now, we're hitting a wall. Donations are slowing. Momentum is softening. And I'd be lying if I said I wasn't thinking about the people who helped us before. That includes you, ${Recipient.FirstName}. So, here's what I'm asking: **Can I convince you to send in $1 today to let me know that you 're still around? Not for the number--honestly, it's symbolic.**
**Really, consider your donation a signal to me and the team that you 're still here, that you still believe this fight is worth it, and that** you haven't tuned out. clean_body: | | | | | Fellow American, You've been a part of this fight before. In fact, your past support helped put conservative firepower on the map when it mattered most. But here's the truth: this is the moment we need our people the most --when no one's watching. When the media is tuned out. When the other side is quietly laying groundwork and stockpiling cash. And right now, we're hitting a wall. Donations are slowing. Momentum is softening. And I'd be lying if I said I wasn't thinking about the people who helped us before. That includes you, ${Recipient.FirstName}. So, here's what I'm asking: Can I convince you to send in $1 today to let me know that you 're still around? Not for the number--honestly, it's symbolic. Really, consider your donation a signal to me and the team that you 're still here, that you still believe this fight is worth it, and that you haven't tuned out. I'd rather have 10,000 conservatives chipping in $1 because it shows we have real Americans backing our efforts and not Hollywood Elites or Mega Donors like the Socialist Democrats depend on. I'm asking you to make a donation. Even just $1. Especially now. For liberty, Ted Cruz | | | Paid for by Ted Cruz for Senate | | PO Box 25400 Houston, TX 77265 | | | id: 2025-03-18-13:13:54:702t |

name: Stasha Rhodes, United for Democracy
subject: First they came for Roe, now they’re coming for Obergefell
disclaimer_text: Paid for by United for Democracy
body:
The Supreme Court has been formally asked to overturn gay marriage. | |
---
Peter, Remember Kim Davis, the Kentucky county clerk who made headlines when she refused to issue a marriage license to a gay couple? **She’s back—and she’s formally requested that the Supreme Court overturn _Obergefell v. Hodges_ , the case that guaranteed the right to marry the person you love, regardless of sex.** Davis is considered one of the only people in America with standing to challenge gay marriage, and the Supreme Court will decide whether to hear her case this fall. **This could be just the opening Justice Clarence Thomas is looking for.****** When the Supreme Court tore up Roe v. Wade, his concurring opinion specifically stated his desire to reconsider same-sex marriage as well. This is exactly the type of case right-wing power-brokers wanted the MAGA extremists they packed the Court with to rule on. **The MAGA movement has spent decades of work and billions of dollars manipulating our justice system so they can remake America to their liking.** It’s not about democracy for them—it’s about the type of society and economy they want to force on the rest of us. Stripping the right to same-sex marriage would affect hundreds of thousands of couples across the country. And it would mark another major blow for the rights and freedoms of Americans as guaranteed by the Constitution. **We’re leading the fight to keep the spotlight on the corrupt Supreme Court, mobilizing activists to hold them accountable, and disseminating materials to allies across the country to make sure every American knows about the MAGA justices’ attacks on our rights.** We’re standing up for the right to same-sex marriage now, before the Court even begins to decide whether they’ll hear Kim Davis’ appeal. Our rights and Constitution don’t belong to MAGA, they belong to us. **[We the People can take back our justice system and defend the right for any American to marry who they love, regardless of sex. But we have to get loud and ramp up our efforts right now. Chip in today to power our efforts!](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/u001.iIBo0N5fSFzEFL40Tn-vtbMETCUYClkOrOh9-SNJfqtCSwZZm7JHQLZ5tFvMZMzKMUMc8Tym1Nc61Wdz4NLd5aiQBLOMPqeqQmYGnHNbBuFTAGRjadQX4MdzZiIyJ6Gqh5rToCgbNpAM05NKfWQZLoyu4MSgGIdHOCKyDgJqcmh3oO8Kf0wtvZAhuIUXxMkMrp2q3Ia8tjHPqn6WZdh2H1RT5CEF96oTTSYKTCVlSEgDe_OTInfpXpNEhf5fSWJh5OHIz7dhiuloZe6OzZIOCP_TRI0CLwdJjsZmxn1KkFHJ3nMdhrO9BEzEuDZc8NagSwI7GS15rEmTmM8mE2Dfzj6g-PeiIZT28GE1USeqPuSN6QCUYBN7wkp5JVbwbqCgW6039998d_NV-zQPRTnGB_ioLIryiZV1SZ-CGDTg_9o/4j0/ug3xflOpRz-ML8LwW3Waug/h0/h001.Ef3J5rD5oU_mK0gyCHXKkJmcJxclovuzkbnMKN2Od9g)** Thank you for fighting our rights, Stasha Rhodes

name: Ryan Brummelen
subject: New Volunteer Opportunities - Atkins for Governor!
body:
[image: image.png]

Hi Supporter!

We are excited to launch our Coffee & Calls for Toni ☕📱
<https://docs.google.com/forms/d/e/1FAIpQLSfwrFMSXvQFi6-6274ZdK--QCUYK2RGdHkuzbixZuAWlgWBjw/viewform?usp=header>events
this *Sunday* at *10:00 AM. *
Last Saturday, Toni Atkins spoke to a packed room of supporters and
electeds at the opening of our campaign headquarters in Mission Hills, San
Diego.
We want to maintain our early momentum which is why we are launching our
first in-person volunteer opportunities!

*What: * Enjoy fresh coffee, connect with fellow supporters, and help us
reach voters for Toni!

*When: *Every Sunday from 10:00 AM - 12:00 PM

*Why: *It is important that we cut through the noise of this race early on
and remind our neighbors in San Diego who we stand with and why.

Click here
<https://docs.google.com/forms/d/e/1FAIpQLSfwrFMSXvQFi6-6274ZdK--QCUYK2RGdHkuzbixZuAWlgWBjw/viewform?usp=header>to
register for a Sunday that works best for you today!

If you are not based in San Diego, we have* two virtual opportunities* to
phone bank for Toni. Join us by registering below.

Thursday 8/14 6:00 - 7:30 PM
<https://us06web.zoom.us/meeting/register/TpVEy_XnRke7RaUH5Q9pig>
Tuesday 8/19 6:00 - 7:30 PM
<https://us06web.zoom.us/meeting/register/OT-egWAxQZuBdinhD5Mqog>

Thank you,
Ryan at Team Toni

subject: Vindictive Vile Villain

Fellow Conservative,

_**“Asshole. Buffoon. Mofo. Wannabe Hitler. Gangster. Vile villain.”**_

Those are just a few words Rep. Jasmine Crockett used to describe President Trump. But let’s be honest: those insults aren’t just about him. They’re about you. About me. About anyone who leans conservative, wears a uniform, or believes in this country’s founding values.

They think we’re backward. They believe we are in the way. And worst of all, they think we’ll take it.

**As a former Navy SEAL Officer and Marine Corps veteran, I’ve faced far worse than name-calling. I’ve deployed to over 70 countries. I’ve led warriors into battle. I’ve endured life-threatening missions.** And the most important lesson I’ve learned? Quiet professionalism always wins the day.

_[](http://links.g4yamerica.com/u/click?_t=cc7dda5c2cc64061900678c88bd3a18a&_m=269a56253f8c4808b41ade803903f371&_e=YMCRXpeWUjR5-Std0gCWs6KWyR9sN8m9q4X8vOI5ZXRC9y3FN6mULwP8cpgcFaLzWCmF2szuGVA5xEWelfmdKKQnO1WjvVU6FwgIt4S8PsyIkCKlY2WQiGlkh8Uu9r4TGUq8ARzC-TA_ylZw8_sj9rsuzd2fTKWeBWCjACayeAjxi6FmBUxqLaSO1lBIIC3NMhmCAsAVPXXf3MlYis3I52igWkatzGaCgt1p5KhjDmIo_RU1B4wCLE3uf5ote-6aQ5YiL1M21kLb62Y1VTRjbjzSwfMdLcFW5fmJXzL23zjblNSIxGSqNVzPie4yQq-8vSn3rg0kxJ0j7uMvwQoO13ay5nAusiF3R-GNH8oN7YKJuG2gon73a5hWrZ-bhjBUA7jWe1U2MGPLf3dFHbgwKtQsuhoPqojeJ8EnWRfZp0ppYxQqldGfinAzZhef5Dipet776pv3uxi5SfZDZqisSPWFxLri7yh-Eu69X6WtUM7MU7DgLhGF8elyoollob4HbtRSRT1tkxZK_T6VcCtwK2MRx4EStNqpqVGV_8tNhvx_oU3-lulA7LCrMJmCey3uhaVqg8_UYZQJzLPwO-6ZNbJnri3GLu7o_ogya3COt8sN7T6-kw02vb_2iXjlihwHE6WPICal0QuEviDiwiH_G6UB4fTUJv8RGYvauXuDNTeMMK94U8VUFXP35KpRsQvKP5qrhvdPgMa0SMy22ZKOPdwCFS7ps8J0uua9pbs4U8-Yyy_TVyFUNIFbz7VEejfm)_
That’s why I’m running for U.S. Senate in Minnesota — not to yell or mock, but to**fight with discipline, humility, and relentless purpose.**

I didn’t plan on entering politics. But the more I came home from deployment, the more I saw a Minnesota I didn’t recognize. Tim Walz’s lieutenant governor — the person I’m running against — isn’t just radically out of step with our values; she embodies the same hard-left extremism that’s trying to rewrite our entire society.

While Walz called for calm in 2020, she was preparing a lawsuit against the Minneapolis Police. As crime soared and businesses burned, she blamed the people trying to hold the line. These are the people in charge now — and they’re not moderating.

**You can close this email and forget my name. Or you can help send the second Navy SEAL to the U.S. Senate — someone trained for chaos, unafraid of the fight, and grounded in service, not ego. **

**[Will you chip in $1, $5, or even $50 to help me win this battle?](http://links.g4yamerica.com/u/click?_t=cc7dda5c2cc64061900678c88bd3a18a&_m=269a56253f8c4808b41ade803903f371&_e=YMCRXpeWUjR5-Std0gCWs6KWyR9sN8m9q4X8vOI5ZXRC9y3FN6mULwP8cpgcFaLzWCmF2szuGVA5xEWelfmdKKQnO1WjvVU6FwgIt4S8PsyIkCKlY2WQiGlkh8Uu9r4TGUq8ARzC-TA_ylZw8_sj9rsuzd2fTKWeBWCjACayeAjxi6FmBUxqLaSO1lBIIC3NMhmCAsAVPXXf3MlYis3I52igWkatzGaCgt1p5KhjDmIo_RU1B4wCLE3uf5ote-6aQ5YiL1M21kLb62Y1VTRjbu_xy54TbZyDtkyHJytS4sUmzHfC1MxePPYE-CXwSDmYJs7DlwkdK8x2F4zJje4vjA1ls_sJ89jzEoFcFOCBrttIJjqB0Ab9bWTYco6wy1ieRElExn4C29f7ydOZID5UDGKluPphOCSDKmQT41KLMmMpVudwecUpVNvWPUAvwVhtzSnu91wH7PmIbh6WuSvKlsi3uDlMJHlAkWCCAS1oqMSM9RggDy_mGmVP4JOynNcJMUwOM9Qlvpz7S_OCyD5IsLsPZuD4cWUF6IGGuUCcXbLE46dkPJtvrqUrrc5IavSWlrrNkNhOz6vt5RsWnUSxgzPlF6NjBhIEpNCxuDV83VbBNCNzELBToTO_Z_ngI8u7yJ-iGp3N7lkKEcjwxJ51132M5tCWuAPENj1wb4Xa-QzGXNCucJFZz4TD0cief86T-LeI6EwBKPZw0GTdOwSReQ9JOwnXS3w9pWXt_HMVFH_P45knbmtsqFKAR_Ayry2_)**

I grew up playing hockey. **I joined the Marine Corps on my 18th birthday in October 2001, less than two months after 9/11.** I served because I love this country, wanted to make my mom proud, and knew I had something to give. Twenty-four years later, I still feel that calling. It’s just a different kind of battlefield.

This won’t be easy. Minnesota hasn’t gone red in a presidential election since 1976. And I know I’m the underdog — just a regular guy from Minnesota who’s been asked to do extraordinary things one more time. With your help, I know we can flip this Senate seat for the Republican Party - but that will require you getting involved TODAY. And you have a choice.

__ I’ve earned advanced degrees from Harvard and Johns Hopkins. I’ve trained in nuclear deterrence. I’ve worked across cultures, built teams under pressure, and led calmly when it mattered most. But none of that compares to the challenge ahead of me now — earning your trust and building a movement powerful enough to flip this seat.

**I’m not asking for a blank check. I’m asking for a chance.**

[**CONTRIBUTE WHAT YOU CAN →**](http://links.g4yamerica.com/u/click?_t=cc7dda5c2cc64061900678c88bd3a18a&_m=269a56253f8c4808b41ade803903f371&_e=YMCRXpeWUjR5-Std0gCWs6KWyR9sN8m9q4X8vOI5ZXRC9y3FN6mULwP8cpgcFaLzWCmF2szuGVA5xEWelfmdKKQnO1WjvVU6FwgIt4S8PsyIkCKlY2WQiGlkh8Uu9r4TGUq8ARzC-TA_ylZw8_sj9rsuzd2fTKWeBWCjACayeAjxi6FmBUxqLaSO1lBIIC3NMhmCAsAVPXXf3MlYis3I52igWkatzGaCgt1p5KhjDmIo_RU1B4wCLE3uf5ote-6aQ5YiL1M21kLb62Y1VTRjbiuy2Gm56PeU5iz8qoZ_IP7ruFs4_Jipe1Ba9r23v38BQAR2YsS_AcD4W2ziaUs5BIx14CYJ_nniR-nJbTsx7vMPxB-6OAQrIdssiefYycNuRWupr-zUzIrWwVsZBSjbJZA5lY8hZatnfvneLFfn4Q_yJm8S416bJaLz88qg_xsT1tlykXKkY4BY2ekB_MSFhXneujwZy6WFH918vkskeSELtpJt5YjFCRRFoTIm119h3LKCbeH8cZBTX14pqbpoKhuncAm4ahfLtEKPjXzjZ1iQaprdIp0ceVxdVqYZs7vAX2suWplsZs7vU4e_xVzwl3RBGZs6G8yrAw-lH1n-FScX2k4fZJZOlT23eQOS6Xhn9A_v3Qjho23EXyrgLeez-VPyH_CbtpxSdrWnFbH9frm3Fg1yPZPH6wlxguypEE8Bhu_U8G-fLatZGPgbR9b1sUJ2t2je7ycsqwhOjKBWUpPLFOc894hTLY3jEax2FJJq)
Because we still live in a country worth defending. Respect and results still matter. And I believe people like you are ready to fight — not with insults, but with action.

name: Tammy Baldwin
subject: Before Friday, if you can
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY TAMMY BALDWIN FOR SENATE
body:
| This number says a lot about our campaign.
# [](https://act.tammybaldwin.com/go/67?t=1&akid=4919%2E35263%2E5Wnnff)
Peter, I have a time-sensitive update to share with you: **Friday marks a crucial milestone — our mid-quarter fundraising deadline.** Every dollar we raise this week makes an impact on my work for Wisconsinites in Washington. Right now, the average contribution made to emails like this one is just **$14.30.** That number says a lot about our campaign. Grassroots contributions of $5, $10, and $14.30 at a time allow me to focus on doing the work I was elected to do. I’d rather spend my time standing up for our farmers, protecting our health care, and defending LGBTQ+ rights — _**not worrying about our fundraising.**_ **[That’s why I’m hoping you can pitch in $14.30 or any amount before our deadline. Can I count on your support this week?](https://act.tammybaldwin.com/go/4710?c0=stb-em-aug25.Q6nOJJ&refcode=AU_STB_FR_GEN_MQG_AC_20250813_PM1_V1_S1&t=4&akid=4919%2E35263%2E5Wnnff)** _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_ | | [CHIP IN $5 NOW](https://act.tammybaldwin.com/go/3663?c0=stb-em-aug25.L5mwgg&refcode=AU_STB_FR_GEN_MQG_AC_20250813_PM1_V1_S1&t=5&akid=4919%2E35263%2E5Wnnff)

Hi, it's **Brigadier General (Ret.) Shawn Harris**. I led troops in combat overseas--never in my life did I think I'd have to fight to keep our military from being used against our own people here at home. But Donald Trump keeps pushing this dangerous idea--and Marjorie Taylor Greene cheers him on every step of the way. Troops should _never_ be used against American citizens. Period. I'm running for Congress to stop her, defend our Constitution, and make sure our military is never turned into a political weapon. We're building momentum, but MTG's big donors are flooding her with cash. [**Can you rush a contribution right now so we can take the fight to her? Every $15, $25, or $50 gets us closer to ending this embarrassment for our district.**](http://clicksp.shawnharrisforcongress.com/f/a/75Vw9eR5_qDVOmLNOKGNGg~~/AAPPABA~/Yc9pA1ixIbC0BZwHHeb2BgqidMDigDORb0zs0Iyt92Ifq7auI9VvyqybN5O9lvmRlMyQ7ZCAqM6EcdPLlXmg1aJid_xBwWiluIfFoT5ds7YGyt1RuPhhRIO6jb7zVsh-kV-3KDzGE2H4BORLSqvJynWFj9FTg7NpVlN_GEOmDuIRXEad3CL1xARNzAKEW7rlWBnttfVzhLUi54qOhI3Feg1fFlyw6JKMMvlGJ4RoXVObIzBEqlc-66xkFyQkDnIijexN4yUQAdRy596IbR_zTen-wblguPSHzQwR3_bOj60xhJcLKQLpjB3975VgyFKE)

Roy’s been making a few phone calls to supporters recently, and **[if you make a donation of $1 or more through this link,](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/113265295/563194751/-1168472266?refcode=ea.8b1c382d-7c78-f011-b481-6045bdfe8e9c&ms=ea.8b1c382d-7c78-f011-b481-6045bdfe8e9c&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODE3NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4YjFjMzgyZC03Yzc4LWYwMTEtYjQ4MS02MDQ1YmRmZThlOWMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=dRFpk8dP_v7khjF5Z-L_nWFrMrarN0GvW55FxTO3msg=)** you could be among them! * * *
**Begin forwarded message:**
\---------- Forwarded message ---------
From: Roy Cooper [(info@roycooper.com)](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/113265300/563194753/-1168472266?refcode=ea.8b1c382d-7c78-f011-b481-6045bdfe8e9c&ms=ea.8b1c382d-7c78-f011-b481-6045bdfe8e9c&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODE3NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4YjFjMzgyZC03Yzc4LWYwMTEtYjQ4MS02MDQ1YmRmZThlOWMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=dRFpk8dP_v7khjF5Z-L_nWFrMrarN0GvW55FxTO3msg=)
Date: Aug 12, 2025
Subject: I’d like to give some folks a call, Peter.
> Hello Peter, What an honor it is to have so many folks believe in our campaign. I can’t say this often enough, but I’ll say it again today: Thank you. I know that this campaign for the U.S. Senate, like every race I’ve run before, is only possible because of the countless people who join us in fighting for this state and our country. In the two weeks since we launched our campaign, more than 37,000 people have stepped up to invest in our work and help us win the fights ahead. I am grateful to everyone who has already contributed, but I want to do more than tell you that over email. This week I began randomly calling some of our grassroots donors and really enjoyed talking with you. I’d like to thank even more of you personally by giving you a call in the next week or so. Our team will pick a few names from among our grassroots donors, and maybe you could be among them. All you need to do is use this link to donate **$1 or more** and leave your name and phone number. Then you’ll be on the list of folks I could give a call. 👉 **[https://secure.actblue.com/donate/Talk_With_Roy](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/113265304/563194758/-1168472266?refcode=ea.8b1c382d-7c78-f011-b481-6045bdfe8e9c&ms=ea.8b1c382d-7c78-f011-b481-6045bdfe8e9c&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODE3NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4YjFjMzgyZC03Yzc4LWYwMTEtYjQ4MS02MDQ1YmRmZThlOWMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=dRFpk8dP_v7khjF5Z-L_nWFrMrarN0GvW55FxTO3msg=)** There’s nothing that brings me more resolution — and enthusiasm — than talking with folks about what we want to see in Washington. If you’re interested, here’s that link again. Democrat Roy Cooper is running for U.S. Senate to help take back the Majority for Democrats. North Carolina is Democrats’ best chance to flip a seat from red to blue — the path to stopping Republicans in Washington starts here.

National Republicans will target North Carolina as a key battleground and invest heavily in defeating us.

Cooper is a former state legislator, Attorney General, and most recently Governor of North Carolina. North Carolina will be the most competitive Senate election of 2026, and Cooper enters the race as the most formidable candidate of either party.

Cooper’s signature achievements include helping to expand Medicaid and helping make NC the top state for business by creating thousands of jobs and growing the clean energy economy.

name: Black Hate
subject: The truth Trump doesn’t want you to see
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY ISAIAH MARTIN FOR CONGRESS
body:
[https://prod.cdn.everyaction.com/images/van/NGP/NGP59/1/109386/images/IRM_wrapper-email.jpg]
friend, hey — it’s Isaiah Martin.
As you know, Donald Trump sent federal forces into D.C. claiming he’s “restoring order.”
Here’s the truth: every city he’s targeted has a Black mayor. Many of those same cities are actually seeing historic lows in violent crime. Baltimore, for example, is at a 50-year low in homicides.
Trump doesn’t want you to know that. Because if you knew the facts, you’d see right through his playbook:
* Paint Black-led cities as dangerous
* Ignore the data
* Use fear to justify his power grabs
This isn’t about safety, it’s about optics. Wannabe dictators manufacture “chaos” so they can ride in and play savior. It’s a distraction from the economy he wrecked and the democracy he’s dismantling.
We cannot let him turn our capital into a political stage for his authoritarian ambitions.
Stop Trump’s DC Takeover Trump is using showmanship instead of solutions to distract from the economy he wrecked. This is what wannabe dictators do. We have to push back now or this playbook spreads further. DONATE NOW TO FIGHT BACK → [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/klemail_imartin?] Every dollar helps protect our capital and our democracy.
If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:
Express Donate: $10 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/klemail_imartin?express_lane=true&amount=10&refcode=express_lane_10]
Express Donate: $25 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/klemail_imartin?express_lane=true&amount=25&refcode=express_lane_25]
Express Donate: $50 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/klemail_imartin?express_lane=true&amount=50&refcode=express_lane_50]
Express Donate: $100 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/klemail_imartin?express_lane=true&amount=100&refcode=express_lane_100]
Or, donate another amount [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/klemail_imartin?express_lane_other=true&refcode=express_lane_other]
In the fight,
Isaiah Martin
Texas’s 18th Congressional District
[https://prod.cdn.everyaction.com/images/van/NGP/NGP59/1/109386/images/29828EEA-D82D-4108-A24F-779E47077C54.png]

Isaiah Martin for Congress
PO Box 654
Houston TX, 77001
United States

I can barely stomach watching him speak. He’s the embodiment of everything that’s wrong with the Republican Party – spineless, shameless, and completely out of touch. He stands for nothing. That’s the opposite of me. I’m a pediatrician and a mom. I’m not a career politician. I’m running for Senate because I know exactly why I’m here: to fight for kids, healthcare, for our future. I know tough fights, and even if the path is hard, I believe Lindsey Graham has to be held accountable. He doesn’t deserve a free pass back to D.C. for six more years. | | | About Blue Amp Action: We cannot sugarcoat the current situation. Right-wing authoritarianism, defeated by a worldwide coalition during WWII, was only in hibernation. Over the past decade it has infected democratic societies--including ours. It is as simple as it is terrifying: What we do now will define the future of our country and world. We at Blue Amp Action are dedicated to liberal, open societies, where reason and science are applied to solve our problems; where civil rights--including voting rights!--are protected for all. We fight for these values every day. Speaking up on our platforms, raising the voices and the political prospects of liberal pols and pundits. **And savvy grassroots activists like you know, just like we do, that we can’t stop watching the people we help elect:_ after the elections, we have to keep organizing support for the policies we like and pushing back against the ones we don’t._** **__When the public tunes out between elections and the only people our elected officials hear from are the paid lobbyists of wealthy corporations, our government stops being accountable to the needs of ordinary families.__** **Democracy never sleeps, and neither can we.** So we ask that you support our work, so we can continue to engage in this fight every moment of every day. So our kids grow up in democracy, not dystopia. Thank you for your support for all we do! — _You're getting this message because you’ve supported good causes and Democratic candidates. We need your support to continue fighting for our democracy. We love having you in our network, but if you no longer wish to hear from us, you can[unsubscribe here](https://default.salsalabs.org/Ta843f2aa-178f-48e2-b415-cfcebd18037a/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)._

subject: How redistricting works
body:
This is how EMILYs List is fighting back |
---
[](https://click.everyaction.com/k/113266031/563197053/-140265690?refcode=WUEFE826_20250813_Redistricting_ALL_v1s2&sourceid=1056802&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9UU00vVFNNRUwvMS84NzA2OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhODc1NDY3Mi03Zjc4LWYwMTEtYjQ4MS02MDQ1YmRmZThlOWMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=q0cmUd0NZBN2w7I0HaMTYRDAiM523C-9sIhD76EO-5o=) Hi Peter,

Republicans have made it clear that their redistricting efforts in Texas are just the beginning.

They know their chances of maintaining the U.S. House majority are slim, and they're scared. So they're taking advantage of the fact that they control 59 of 99 state legislative chambers across the country to give themselves a leg up in 2026.

Because here's the thing: **Redistricting is largely reliant on who holds the majority in state legislatures.** In most states, the party in power gets to draw the districts, and in Texas, that means Republicans are drawing up new maps to save their dwindling U.S. House majority.

**That's why EMILYs List has made unprecedented investments in growing our State and Local Campaigns department over the last ten years.** Because recruiting, supporting, and electing more Democratic pro-choice women at the local level means building protections against GOP power grabs for years to come. ****[**Support our work as we fight to build and defend majorities in state legislatures across the country:**](https://click.everyaction.com/k/113266032/563197054/-877057620?refcode=WUEFE826_20250813_Redistricting_ALL_v1s2&sourceid=1056802&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9UU00vVFNNRUwvMS84NzA2OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhODc1NDY3Mi03Zjc4LWYwMTEtYjQ4MS02MDQ1YmRmZThlOWMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=q0cmUd0NZBN2w7I0HaMTYRDAiM523C-9sIhD76EO-5o=)**** | [DONATE NOW](https://click.everyaction.com/k/113266033/563197055/-140265690?refcode=WUEFE826_20250813_Redistricting_ALL_v1s2&sourceid=1056802&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9UU00vVFNNRUwvMS84NzA2OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhODc1NDY3Mi03Zjc4LWYwMTEtYjQ4MS02MDQ1YmRmZThlOWMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=q0cmUd0NZBN2w7I0HaMTYRDAiM523C-9sIhD76EO-5o=)

More than 50 Texas state legislators — including 13 EMILYs List women! — are putting it all on the line for our democracy. They left the state to break quorum and delay the passage of the GOP’s blatantly undemocratic gerrymandering bill.

We're proud to have helped elect them, and we're so grateful for their bravery in the face of threats and coercion from their state's Republican leaders.

**These women are why we do the work we do, and we need more state and local leaders who will show up for their constituents and defend democracy when it matters most.**

clean_body: This is how EMILYs List is fighting back | = Hi Peter, Republicans have made it clear that their redistricting efforts in Texas are just the beginning. They know their chances of maintaining the U.S. House majority are slim, and they're scared. So they're taking advantage of the fact that they control 59 of 99 state legislative chambers across the country to give themselves a leg up in 2026. Because here's the thing: Redistricting is largely reliant on who holds the majority in state legislatures. In most states, the party in power gets to draw the districts, and in Texas, that means Republicans are drawing up new maps to save their dwindling U.S. House majority. That's why EMILYs List has made unprecedented investments in growing our State and Local Campaigns department over the last ten years. Because recruiting, supporting, and electing more Democratic pro-choice women at the local level means building protections against GOP power grabs for years to come. **= | = More than 50 Texas state legislators — including 13 EMILYs List women! — are putting it all on the line for our democracy. They left the state to break quorum and delay the passage of the GOP’s blatantly undemocratic gerrymandering bill. We're proud to have helped elect them, and we're so grateful for their bravery in the face of threats and coercion from their state's Republican leaders. These women are why we do the work we do, and we need more state and local leaders who will show up for their constituents and defend democracy when it matters most. =** If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue, your donation will go through immediately: = | = ---|--- = | = = | = Thank you for fighting alongside us, Emily Parés (she/her/hers) Deputy Chief Campaigns Officer, State & Local Campaigns, EMILYs List = | | | | ---|---|---|---|--- Thank you for being a supporter of EMILYs List. This email was sent to: dpwillis67@gmail.com. Inbox overcrowded? Sign up to get less email . We'd hate to see you go, but if you want to stop receiving all email, unsubscribe . Have a question? Feel free to drop us a line at mailto:information@emilyslist.org or simply reply to this email. Contributions or gifts to EMILYs List or endorsed candidates are not tax deductible. EMILYs List P.O. | Western Wisconsin needs someone in D.C. who can get things done. That can’t be said about my opponent and our current incumbent Derrick Van Orden. And before you ask, yes, these are all real headlines: [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/113266057/563197218/-1192144335?refcode=2507810_MFC_Cooke_Opponent&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjUvMS83NDc1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5MzdkZWFmNy03ZTc4LWYwMTEtYjQ4MS02MDQ1YmRmZThlOWMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=LgmXxFAA6ePntCBrR_WAiggH-azHh2eMtH5yX97VRqI=) [**If you are sick and tired of seeing extremists keep their seats while only getting headlines like these, please split a donation between our campaign and Seth Moulton today. Van Orden is vulnerable, and our chances of unseat him are better than ever headed into the 2026 midterm.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/113266058/563197219/-1192144335?refcode=2507810_MFC_Cooke_Opponent&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjUvMS83NDc1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5MzdkZWFmNy03ZTc4LWYwMTEtYjQ4MS02MDQ1YmRmZThlOWMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=LgmXxFAA6ePntCBrR_WAiggH-azHh2eMtH5yX97VRqI=) At a time when our district, our farmers, small businesses, and veterans are all struggling, Van Orden is still making more headlines for his unhinged, inappropriate antics than actually helping our district as a legislator. Just take this line from _The Bulwark_ : _“Of the thirty-two bills and resolutions Van Orden sponsored in the 118th U.S. Congress (2023–24), exactly none became law; just three bills passed the GOP-controlled House before dying in the Senate.. a legislative titan he is not._ **_Despite this sorry record, Van Orden has nonetheless managed to make a name for himself in Congress... crudest, meanest, dumbest, and most obnoxious.”_** In the past month alone, he’s called local town hall participants Nazis and threatened online commenters to fight him. Maybe this is why Van Orden relies on dark money instead of grassroots support. And over the past few months, Van Orden has been cozying up to Elon Musk and his elite buddies – threatening career retaliation over anyone critical of Musk or this administration. [**Van Orden is NOT working for us, and we have a shot to elect a real, Wisconsin-first leader to Congress – but I can’t do it without your help. Will you split a donation of $15, or whatever you can, between Seth Moulton and our campaign to send Derrick Van Orden packing?**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/113266059/563197220/-1192144335?refcode=2507810_MFC_Cooke_Opponent&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjUvMS83NDc1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5MzdkZWFmNy03ZTc4LWYwMTEtYjQ4MS02MDQ1YmRmZThlOWMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=LgmXxFAA6ePntCBrR_WAiggH-azHh2eMtH5yX97VRqI=) I appreciate your support, friends. Rebecca [Donate](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/113266060/563197221/-1192144335?refcode=2507810_MFC_Cooke_Opponent&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjUvMS83NDc1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5MzdkZWFmNy03ZTc4LWYwMTEtYjQ4MS02MDQ1YmRmZThlOWMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=LgmXxFAA6ePntCBrR_WAiggH-azHh2eMtH5yX97VRqI=)

### Julie Smith is a sergeant in the Columbus Police Department who worked as a school resource officer in Bartholomew County Schools.
