Mike Braun](http://links.email.in-gop.com/s/c/tRnkPjCxPnXbF2iVodwuocoQWBCBu3QROvc63hCu-rFoSziBytd66UcwhoyCvlU6Avtb6NQSTH8_hDCyvraKovC9nTgn0j3MbVB_pq4Mjz6YFvV6dgFab271Feb794nX2eZqwCB6Ev0Xy__ppOU8szR7yYU3nwvN6qjW4Dmk4FyzrCLiN8GR6-yhNEeKM_tFZD5w0S4Hbo9ev0zggY5YoyS_Yp3NbL0PrBW1STJIg4kPW_x1bsSKIETmkqD6xunoWFOoizMlVOElLJF5DwBcTKRJB1bw92rFXrXpxMafGpSGlB1wFmoJjQZ69QvS9KuUB9zyJIVpY8FEckkILphNEt4lMEAGYvcRWw/HESm6UlCFDQKiWPIoRB0CyCbbOrgl76r/11) has appointed the state's first-ever director of the Office of School Safety. Sgt. Julie Smith, with the Columbus Police Department, was introduced as the director on Aug. 12. She has previously worked as a school resource officer for Bartholomew County Schools. Smith also works as an instructor for the National Association of School Resource Officers and the regional director for the Midwest, and the president of the Indiana School Resource Officers Association. "I've dedicated my career to keeping students safe," Smith said in a statement. "It's an honor to put my experience to work strengthening Indiana schools and communities as the director of the Office of School Safety. "School safety isn't just a career for me — it's a passion, and it's something that I hold dear to my heart," Smith said. "Indiana's Office of School Safety will be proactive, collaborative and relentlessly focused on the well-being of every student. If we ever get to a point where we say we know it all and we've done it all right, that's a real dangerous thing."
---
[](http://links.email.in-gop.com/s/c/qkfqbn__UUfi6Bd_xSkrR-wjoClzkXNhb_yx5BBwug1kN2YUWzMsaf43VUDQgddFEhNCUUzxNgJCYb95v_fYJDysBZGi_X8EAqSX8iO4-HCJv3_4fzxd3AlrHXfML3U7_g22A7cbxAF-luqZAQvqI72sykRXmba-Pr4OJ5xZNtBdNLHuICNnRK05bDw8gyqR0l9lyIOdNGbmYSxIQHM7PG5LTdvTlh546j3rN7OqpjoSjFhBMjwRvwJAFzZiyXr2HHMJ-IofBLLi_XGKXeoQbf5YwD4ZoWfmUrhuLj_kDgTe-TBaPrKzZYVjaVeVc9ZyQtvglSmDlmTQ7TT7xvfcH-xZTThwlKeSttJ5XydXWhvyYI3QtBr4sW1ivn6MjDYT24cZGXiYlJiriF7-eKzY0rKas00UPipf-zZfP8V3F2-cnT13l2ekh6O3vr0aHaMXoH9AxQIH95IL8IhMvWBYJcYf3VrLigEZSqYVacmdu76oK0HaCi5DVh5xUmREME5rmQi6smpoCg7ou4X5TU_F3wzfLnGWeHpOVhfMvEq76Cl__BUDNJPi2KZVRhBqQJBcN5YS1BNCmR12yHgkLEahvOx5Ev_g1qOdRHYi2z2PMQ4AVBYwncmYw0iniAlovJ_5Uf7LrC3n3L3n2VWCV7NEtHxtAMub5_O3cJgaLhRPVpU3gpEIz2t7RecgxZfAdNIQMpmvBt07ogIUhbBkLQW1X_mqofRZVCHNd7aLB9Te2b-gaJzYD8t1kAYX2zc9etthcx2ICg93xp9PIROusy5sd4YpdVc-MWPsQlIDWyK1W5m0_G0oIaFMf28zLfxZSQs_9X4q4ZNP3ZWbmNpSVOSf99QZi5jxYvg/75Ph3-CiMTEJ-dosdfGNwXLHHBEqSvFl/11)
---
The Office of School Safety was created by the state legislature in 2025. “Providing a safe and secure environment for Hoosier students to learn and grow is a top priority for me both as Governor and as a father and grandfather," Braun said in a statement. "Our Office of School Safety puts that priority into action, and Sergeant Julie Q. Smith is uniquely qualified and dedicated to this mission to strengthen our schools and help students thrive.” [According to law](http://links.email.in-gop.com/s/c/-f5r2b-dGJA-Y7uxns42k3FuQxl0qL7Uab1ohiHx4GVpREMxQWplA9axU-6Xco8VYDq6ezu4IOlXl_diWgXlKkzGf2JpJWzIABB1HyDSLV5sYA6fPLJAxwU7HVJPEm8hMm4bNQ7ggqtd22fd4HzkbccSamwYFOe-Sbk5nbG5a3judYrmFnhB6vDmZVj6AO7QrGwZNT5_raKMoALVh5e7-wSrsYAm34Ds8XMIqJfoxPloWFKcL7gLlqRS1qBU0-5hJ4baJ5ZEzO8KNOOMpn6pz0Bkhl0DaF6Q9yCytmsaFwLtJagllekHtRgLPMzPdLpa3HuysrE5ZHioo9B2NX5ywEaa0jn7yLd7vuCNHFEP08nLqQadZE2Hj19FjOko2KCMvbiuqYxsUKgiB23TjnmUTXzZgmKzgNmBzuLEG4TE5pITqyz_Rg/jo7REkby8MvYOOIdA-wvE-r_EwJShbr0/11), the Office of School Safety is part of the Indiana Department of Homeland Security (IDHS) created "for the purpose of coordinating and administering school safety resources." "In my State of the State address, I said there's nothing more important than Hoosiers' safety. That's especially true when it comes to safety. This office will bring all of our school safety efforts into one team with one mission: to keep Hoosiers safe," Braun said. "I think Indiana ought to be a place that embraces the best of what we've had in the past but is on the leading edge of what we can do better." A notice [on the IDHS website's school safety page](http://links.email.in-gop.com/s/c/QHPjrdWnFTu0keDHJfEkPJLKSXQACfhhy29VEOe_vxc8nidBIAYzvCeISIvYkZSouts8xFmnlNn8jlUvof96eWjTDgrfFqIRhO-vx-YMrrJ7PcRsrJnTPMuZo9VhOnoWUQcXeqWRci--b02ZEdIpEvTOXoEpAoxtX7F-OxdhL1x3X4d4axEX9nWIybjN9t4chzmDSGQ8sA453ZOv0ZvTFugpLLjPChgpqAHvt0MmD4OhR9SzwBNztcWhPKrRrXeLAHKTRDQmDmXj7KsPKv5Ql0ezNLEjWbKMP44kZaQDxM1SoZbgCIUNwhrrjiDgVRCbcQBeYZrhB31sfrKqk14a9VR_ovRk1UMKmGA2gByvTWwLPJUoVEAt1oQojCmHcywuJRyPEcIJYw/gBrSl9o35_z_4EjhIl3RAsRkc45MoiH4/11) says that school safety resources are transitioning to the Office of School Safety, including the Indiana School Safety Specialist Academy. The Office of School Safety website is not currently available. The agency started work on July 1.

The agency started work on July 1. | | Click Here to Read the Full Story | | | | PAID FOR BY THE INDIANA REPUBLICAN STATE COMMITTEE. | | NOT AUTHORIZED BY ANY CANDIDATE OR CANDIDATE'S COMMITTEE. WWW.INDIANA.GOP. | | 101 W. OHIO ST., SUITE 2200 INDIANAPOLIS, IN 46204 | | This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com | | |

name: Forward Party
subject: What's Really Going On In D.C. Right Now
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Forward Party and not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee
body:
Here's what's happening in the Forward world...

| | [ ](https://home.forwardparty.com/r?u=JgyyvCfQwldlSeD7KJl_Ih7269o_4hwqOhPs1_PHvgI&e=61868e7acdd36ae0ddf3e39aa8429171&utm_source=forwardparty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=fast_forward_75&n=1)
---
Wednesday, August 13, 2025 | Peter -- A quick message from Lindsey Williams Drath, Forward Party CEO proud Washingtonian: "What we are seeing in D.C. right now is a symptom of government dysfunction at multiple levels. When political games replace thoughtful problem-solving, the result is instability, lost trust, and a government that further divides us. Placing the D.C. police force under national control and the threat of an extended presence of the National Guard are warning signs of that dysfunction. Though the president has the legal right to take such actions, it should be incredibly rare and only in the face of dire public safety - not to make political statements. Yes, the D.C. government can and should do more to address crime and homelessness in the city, but the answers lie with cooperation, kindness, thoughtfulness and community engagement - not the deployment of the military in our nation's capital. Public safety must remain accountable to the people. The Forward Party believes the answer isn’t more force, it’s more trust built through transparency, fair representation, and leaders who solve problems instead of deepening divides. Real security comes from a functioning democracy, not from substituting soldiers for solutions."
**[Lindsey Drath on Expanding the Two-Party Political System](https://home.forwardparty.com/r?u=_BNtuvNT9V_JqWn2w6nllybg76_jEKRlGk5D0uhEsPoUHtRANk0xm9UUwpfFM1Bi&e=61868e7acdd36ae0ddf3e39aa8429171&utm_source=forwardparty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=fast_forward_75&n=2)** | **MSNBC** Forward Party CEO Lindsey Williams Drath joins MSNBC discussing a wide range of topics - in this clip, Lindsey details the corruption in our government. Americans are tired of it and it's time for something new. It's time to move Forward. **[Two Wrongs Don't Make A Right](https://home.forwardparty.com/r?u=RIHtn6w49bxOMGwRnhkk5sxc5Xm5M8_cKxS2jTOLBAoGZmeCIlqxhMmqaiX52b4F4lz-Rq752aSYMSAqt6Gd3SYEYXi8Jd334OVfSyO-rb0&e=61868e7acdd36ae0ddf3e39aa8429171&utm_source=forwardparty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=fast_forward_75&n=3)** | **Tri City Record** NM Forward Party Executive Committee member Jens Lange talks about the dangers of Gerrymandering and the need to find a better solution to our partisan infighting.
**August 13 | The Path to RCV in New Jersey
** Bringing Ranked Choice Voting to New Jersey won't happen on its own—it will take a strategic, sustained movement across communities, coalitions, and candidates. Join the Forward Party of New Jersey for a candid discussion on we can bring Ranked Choice Voting to New Jersey! **[Register →](https://home.forwardparty.com/12578/the_path_to_rcv_in_new_jersey?e=61868e7acdd36ae0ddf3e39aa8429171&utm_source=forwardparty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=fast_forward_75&n=4)** **August 13 | MA FWD Boston Meet Up
** Welcome Forwardists! Join us at Grafton Street Pub & Grill for happy hour on the 13th of August. Meet fellow Forwardists, learn about the movement in the state, get more deeply involved, and share a drink with new friends! Parties are built in person, no matter how convenient zoom is. We can't wait to see you there. **[Register →](https://home.forwardparty.com/forward_massachusetts_august_2025_boston_meet_up?e=61868e7acdd36ae0ddf3e39aa8429171&utm_source=forwardparty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=fast_forward_75&n=5)** **August 14 | Civic Engagement With The Young Forwardists
** Beliefs are only so much, but they lack conviction without action. If you are passionate for change and don’t want to wait to have an impact, then you’re in the right place. Join our Policy meeting to work with a passionate group of youth to tackle important issues, brainstorm legislation, propose it, and work to make it a reality. This is your chance to take initiative and create real change that matters. If you’re interested, then join us! **[Register →](https://home.forwardparty.com/civic_engagement_20250814?e=61868e7acdd36ae0ddf3e39aa8429171&utm_source=forwardparty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=fast_forward_75&n=6)** **August 15 | NOVA FWD Table at Arlington County Fair
** The NOVA Forward Party will have an indoor table at the Arlington County Fair for the second year in a row! Come by during the fair weekend and say hello to meet fellow Forwardists and talk to us about the movement we're trying to build in northern Virginia and beyond. **[Register →](https://home.forwardparty.com/nova_fwd_acf_20250815?e=61868e7acdd36ae0ddf3e39aa8429171&utm_source=forwardparty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=fast_forward_75&n=7)** **August 19 | National Volunteer Call
** Please join our director of volunteer engagement Carrie Anne for a 30 minute rundown of all things Forward Party! Meet other volunteers, hear what's happening in the committees and other states, and stay abreast of party news. This call is for any level of volunteer in any state, and is a great starting point if this is your first time getting involved! Zoom meeting link will be sent after you RSVP. **[Register →](https://home.forwardparty.com/national_volunteer_call_20250819?e=61868e7acdd36ae0ddf3e39aa8429171&utm_source=forwardparty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=fast_forward_75&n=8)** **August 19 | She Runs, We Win Forum
** Join us for our Second 2025 She Runs, We Win Forum and be inspired by the Forward Women are have already elected to office or are currently running! Hear their stories and then think about where you want to throw your hat in the ring! **[Register →](https://home.forwardparty.com/she_runs_we_win_forum?e=61868e7acdd36ae0ddf3e39aa8429171&utm_source=forwardparty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=fast_forward_75&n=9)** **August 20 | NOVA FWD Social
** Meet up with NOVA Forwardists for food, drinks, & conversation at a fun location in Arlington. Bring your questions, ambitions, and thirst! Why not grab a few friends to come with you, too? Bronson Bierhall is located within walking distance from the Ballston Metro Station and there are several parking facilities located nearby. You're encouraged to come wearing Forward Party shirts, hats, buttons - whatever swag you've got! **[Register →](https://home.forwardparty.com/nova_fwd_social_20250820?e=61868e7acdd36ae0ddf3e39aa8429171&utm_source=forwardparty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=fast_forward_75&n=10)** **August 21 | BVC Fireside Chat With Rep. Jermaine Johnson
** Join us for a powerful virtual fireside chat with South Carolina State Representative **Jermaine Johnson** , hosted by the **Forward Party Black Voters Committee**. This engaging conversation, moderated by **Larry Weathers** , will dive into Rep. Johnson’s journey from athlete to legislator, his alignment with Forward Party values, and his vision for coalition-driven political change. **[Register →](https://home.forwardparty.com/bvc_fireside_chat_with_rep_jermaine_johnson?e=61868e7acdd36ae0ddf3e39aa8429171&utm_source=forwardparty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=fast_forward_75&n=11)** **August 25 | BVC Fireside Chat With Rep. Jermaine Johnson
** Are you interested in becoming a leader in your community who brings politics back to the people? If so, this is your opportunity to take initiative by creating your own Young Forwardist Chapter. Join our National High School Chapter meeting. As part of our biweekly check-ins, we will be navigating ways the national Young Forwardists committee can best support our high school chapters. Whether it's providing club meeting materials to leadership training, we are here to help. Join us! **[Register →](https://home.forwardparty.com/national_high_school_chapter_meeting_20250825?e=61868e7acdd36ae0ddf3e39aa8429171&utm_source=forwardparty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=fast_forward_75&n=12)**
**[Lindsey Drath on Expanding the Two-Party Political System](https://home.forwardparty.com/r?u=6iERT1Nlll6fRjMoxjWR2xJL2HzcUOWgapdtsNr4nMMlWSksrOSGVcoQlNyCHfrj9OS-zFhX_IENy58w3CGBqdvO9eVeGlwOQ0EKuXZFfQGqkl_EAqX8Jvdz5nhcUCnymw53lpdKlnnaNnfB6yWvrYxjpy2lfK-a6giWHik5wcs&e=61868e7acdd36ae0ddf3e39aa8429171&utm_source=forwardparty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=fast_forward_75&n=13)** | **C-SPAN** **[Christine Todd Whitman, Forward Co-Founder, Joins Marcia Kramer on CBS](https://home.forwardparty.com/r?u=_KeSraPW0gSlxEBMOvJrEouH4SjeZmYtvTWulgNFAfZ0nlrCgTtaW7-3kuOoZ51o&e=61868e7acdd36ae0ddf3e39aa8429171&utm_source=forwardparty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=fast_forward_75&n=14)** | **CBS**
[ ](https://home.forwardparty.com/r?u=HN-VuZ6-MtyTZDOwpLeQohBI2w5n1fstLPCAOB1eS8pn49pgKy1KM2eEYboZkJaE&e=61868e7acdd36ae0ddf3e39aa8429171&utm_source=forwardparty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=fast_forward_75&n=15) [ ](https://home.forwardparty.com/r?u=HR9MoATtHgNjF_4kmlo5pN8R4zJ-fGDLgTAMST8PY6mgKwzOK4bTDEpy9KU5BOzg&e=61868e7acdd36ae0ddf3e39aa8429171&utm_source=forwardparty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=fast_forward_75&n=16) [ ](https://home.forwardparty.com/r?u=C67zBN9acu3ZSVmLPV47peHvpkNPm4HcBUGM4-0XJTPgmEVLc_dN12xbGWLIkZIR&e=61868e7acdd36ae0ddf3e39aa8429171&utm_source=forwardparty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=fast_forward_75&n=17) [ ](https://home.forwardparty.com/r?u=KO8ZOB0mq2gq63DvFrKfe08uhOv-byHfKpIIFrTtOpPikh4D0waR8pVrn6wFcdzO&e=61868e7acdd36ae0ddf3e39aa8429171&utm_source=forwardparty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=fast_forward_75&n=18) [ ](https://home.forwardparty.com/r?u=_KeSraPW0gSlxEBMOvJrEuogCR1FcLzdL_LSGKjfikF5BT1dZn3HN2gM4OEGEI0z&e=61868e7acdd36ae0ddf3e39aa8429171&utm_source=forwardparty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=fast_forward_75&n=19) Copyright © 2025 Forward Party, all rights reserved. Our mailing address is:
1701 Rhode Island Ave NW, Washington, DC 20036, United States Paid for by Forward Party and not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee.

As part of our biweekly check-ins, we will be navigating ways the national Young Forwardists committee can best support our high school chapters. Whether it's providing club meeting materials to leadership training, we are here to help. Join us! | C-SPAN | CBS Copyright © 2025 Forward Party, all rights reserved. # [Minnesota Supreme Court to Review Witness Requirement for Absentee Registrants](https://substack.com/app-link/post?publication_id=2066440&post_id=170915269&utm_source=post-email-title&utm_campaign=email-post-title&isFreemail=true&r=1hvr60&token=eyJ1c2VyX2lkIjo5MDUwMTE5MiwicG9zdF9pZCI6MTcwOTE1MjY5LCJpYXQiOjE3NTUxMTU1MTYsImV4cCI6MTc1NzcwNzUxNiwiaXNzIjoicHViLTIwNjY0NDAiLCJzdWIiOiJwb3N0LXJlYWN0aW9uIn0.DvAFZPV7mSx7oLr2fnR60BkJlhALALkODe6-qA2QjM8)
### Use of Envelope Checkbox Confirming Voter Registration Requirements Under Scrutiny
| | [Benda For Commonsense](https://substack.com/@bendasense)
---
| Aug 13
---
| [](https://substack.com/@bendasense)
---

---
| | | [](https://substack.com/app-link/post?publication_id=2066440&post_id=170915269&utm_source=substack&isFreemail=true&submitLike=true&token=eyJ1c2VyX2lkIjo5MDUwMTE5MiwicG9zdF9pZCI6MTcwOTE1MjY5LCJyZWFjdGlvbiI6IuKdpCIsImlhdCI6MTc1NTExNTUxNiwiZXhwIjoxNzU3NzA3NTE2LCJpc3MiOiJwdWItMjA2NjQ0MCIsInN1YiI6InJlYWN0aW9uIn0.sqyz0Qj9G4tay_lok8mHzNNtj4L5j-YxCss4CVC82qY&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=email-reaction&r=1hvr60)
---
| | [](https://substack.com/app-link/post?publication_id=2066440&post_id=170915269&utm_source=substack&utm_medium=email&isFreemail=true&comments=true&token=eyJ1c2VyX2lkIjo5MDUwMTE5MiwicG9zdF9pZCI6MTcwOTE1MjY5LCJpYXQiOjE3NTUxMTU1MTYsImV4cCI6MTc1NzcwNzUxNiwiaXNzIjoicHViLTIwNjY0NDAiLCJzdWIiOiJwb3N0LXJlYWN0aW9uIn0.DvAFZPV7mSx7oLr2fnR60BkJlhALALkODe6-qA2QjM8&r=1hvr60&utm_campaign=email-half-magic-comments&action=post-comment&utm_source=substack&utm_medium=email)
---
| | [](https://substack.com/app-link/post?publication_id=2066440&post_id=170915269&utm_source=substack&utm_medium=email&utm_content=share&utm_campaign=email-share&action=share&triggerShare=true&isFreemail=true&r=1hvr60&token=eyJ1c2VyX2lkIjo5MDUwMTE5MiwicG9zdF9pZCI6MTcwOTE1MjY5LCJpYXQiOjE3NTUxMTU1MTYsImV4cCI6MTc1NzcwNzUxNiwiaXNzIjoicHViLTIwNjY0NDAiLCJzdWIiOiJwb3N0LXJlYWN0aW9uIn0.DvAFZPV7mSx7oLr2fnR60BkJlhALALkODe6-qA2QjM8)
---
| | [](https://substack..bqPWyFfwjQSmJf2Ot7MkBWDL2zfzDQ5vdcwc6uf97V8?&utm_source=substack&utm_medium=email)
---
| | [READ IN APP](https://open.substack.com/pub/bendasense/p/minnesota-supreme-court-to-review?utm_source=email&redirect=app-store&utm_campaign=email-read-in-app)
---

Minnesota's absentee ballot witness requirement is again under legal attack--this time before the Minnesota Supreme Court. A coalition of left-leaning plaintiffs is attempting to usurp legislative authority by having Minnesota's highest court strike down the law requiring a witness to check the box for voters who register and vote absentee at the same time.
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/3be21c1a-36a2-40f2-90a6-f30e51827ac0?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
The current case, Minnesota Alliance for Retired Americans v. Simon (62-CV-24-854), was filed on February 23, 2024, in Ramsey County District Court. For more background on this case, read my [previous post](https://open.substack.com/pub/bendasense/p/absentee-ballot-witness-requirement?r=1rusnm&utm_campaign=post&utm_medium=web&showWelcomeOnShare=false) from April 1, 2024. The plaintiffs, represented by the Minneapolis law firm Greene Espel, and the Elias Law Group, argue that Minnesota's requirement--found in Minn. Stat. §§ 203B.07 and 203B.121--violates Section 201(b) of the federal Voting Rights Act (52 U.S.C. § 10501(b)) when applied to absentee voters who are also registering at the time of voting. The VRA prohibits voter qualification laws requiring proof "by the voucher of registered voters or members of any other class."

**Judge Sheu 's 2024 Ruling: VRA Violation for Absentee Registrants
**
On June 14, 2024, Judge Edward Sheu issued a declaratory judgment concluding that Minnesota's witness requirement, as applied to voters registering to vote absentee, violated the Voting Rights Act. Judge Sheu did not issue an injunction, but his ruling would have required the Minnesota Secretary of State to revamp election procedures--establishing a separate method for processing absentee ballots submitted with a registration form, without a witness attestation.

Judge Sheu reasoned that the witness requirement, in this context, amounted to impermissible "vouching," and therefore could not be enforced without violating federal law. This ruling was appealed to the Minnesota Court of Appeals.

**Court of Appeals Reverses: Witness is Not a Voucher**

On July 23, 2025, the Minnesota Court of Appeals unanimously reversed Judge Sheu's ruling. The appellate court clarified that Minnesota's mail-in voter registration process does not require a witness to "vouch" for a voter's eligibility or residence. Instead, the voter provides their own eligibility documentation, and the witness simply attests that the voter presented such documents.
| Minn802KB ∙ PDF file
---|---
| [Download](https://substack.com/redirect/7d70da12-8249-48ff-83a1-b47932d960fc?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
---

The appellate court held that this administrative attestation does not trigger the VRA's ban on voucher systems. It distinguished Minnesota's neutral, modern process from the discriminatory laws that Section 201(b) was designed to prevent--namely, laws in the Jim Crow South that required Black voters to obtain personal endorsements from white registrants to vote.

**Supreme Court Grants Review
**
The plaintiffs petitioned the Minnesota Supreme Court, which granted review on August 6, 2025. The case is now pending, with briefing scheduled as follows: Plaintiffs' brief: Due August 14, 2025; Secretary's brief: Due September 15, 2025; RNC/RPM amicus brief: Due September 22, 2025.

_RNC and RPM Relegated to Amici Status
_
The Republican National Committee (RNC) and Republican Party of Minnesota (RPM) sought to intervene at all stages of the case: district court, Court of Appeals, and Supreme Court. Each court denied intervention but allowed the political units to file amicus curiae briefs in support of the state's defense of the law.

As amici, the RNC and RPM have argued that the witness requirement is a reasonable and uniform election safeguard, enacted by the Minnesota Legislature to protect against fraud and ensure ballot integrity. They warn that carving out judicial exceptions could undermine public trust and burden election administrators with inconsistent standards.

**Not the First Challenge to the Witness Requirement**

This is not the first time Minnesota's absentee witness requirement has faced legal attack. In 2020, during the COVID-19 pandemic, similar plaintiffs--represented by the same Elias Law Group--filed suit against Secretary of State Steve Simon and negotiated a consent decree that temporarily suspended the witness requirement for the August and November elections.
When the RNC and RPM attempted to intervene to stop the suspension, Ramsey County Judge Sara Grewing denied their effort, and the Minnesota Supreme Court later dismissed a related case (Kistner v. Simon, A20-1486) on procedural grounds, invoking laches due to the delay in bringing the challenge. As stated in my previous post, they seem to keep running the same play until they can be stopped.

**What 's at Stake?**

If the Minnesota Supreme Court affirms the Court of Appeals, the witness requirement will continue to apply uniformly to all absentee voters, including those registering at the time of voting. If the high court reverses and reinstates Judge Sheu's ruling, the Secretary of State will be required to create a separate witness-free process for absentee voter registration--raising significant implementation concerns. Eliminating this simple registration requirement also makes it easier for mass registration and mail-in voting, without voter eligibility safeguards.

This case raises fundamental questions about the scope of federal voting rights law, the constitutional role of state legislatures, and whether modern election laws can be invalidated based on statutes originally aimed at dismantling segregation-era voter suppression.

name: Austin [via GVFC]
subject: How $2 dollars can make an impact
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Gabe Vasquez for Congress
body:

We’re preparing to fight back in every battleground, and flipping the Senate is our best chance to protect democracy and block Trump’s MAGA agenda for good. That’s why this moment matters. name: Dr. Raul Ruiz
subject: California’s maps could shift
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY DR. RAUL RUIZ FOR CONGRESS COMMITTEE
body:
Here’s why:

While Washington remains gridlocked, Dr. Raul Ruiz is committed to serving and helping constituents with the problems they have with the federal government and cutting red tape. If you’d like to unsubscribe, [click here.](https://secure.ngpvan.com/p/dAfRehWDrkq5GdVTndjWgA2?unsubscribedata=ZU3aQmDpi5lK8UWVhXjoKmiUbV1h417bEy2g4y2C0BcxiuDEc6%2FDrbsMF691%2BmjAu6gTn6hEQfvjYrTdwaP6n16QAMDxiSS9Xi2YYYBWuRtXq3YYwSdSPAaMDOHxbsber1npflOPzKysBd5SPJ5cerJCPohSYgNv%2BstxTX7wLp%2BNVK97uU6l5s9G2S4wpVbHvCtjblxOYdhpkkD4qOxpKSDQk2W1azzcIiXxL13b2%2FCW0ZxAvF9Y1UZUKYO5KSZyrBoZzSTNiKXbaADmGTuycLakZpNiRIRpNS6f6gHK3ww12sycrt8%2BzkwM8l0zkAJx1KPDApFBZrjjD%2Bzd08JWByxrDjXtMgwbPPUcVsnkexf9ALGHMsVrc3h3c3hG%2BcJr%2B5woekjwk9t77hkHG0q7Gk9i64iuSTZEdK4HgicNyuKOGmSHsP7yzp87%2BFE3TVF7)
---
| |
---
It’s Raul. I’ve been keeping a close eye on what’s happening with redistricting in Republican-led states — and it’s honestly pretty alarming. Simply put, Republicans across the country are trying to game the system. They’re working to redraw congressional maps in a way that could give them more seats, even in places where voters clearly aren’t with them. It’s all part of their plan to tilt the scales before voters even have a say. California has had one of the fairest redistricting systems in the country, and we’re proud of that. But if states like Texas, Florida, and others keep aggressively pushing their already gerrymandered maps even further to the right, California may have to respond. That uncertainty means we have to be ready for whatever comes next. CA-25 could shift. It could very likely become more competitive. And we need to be prepared, and not caught off guard. But right now, we’re heading into the toughest stretch of the year: the summer fundraising slump. Donations have started to slow down, just when we need to be building strength for whatever Republicans throw at us next. That’s why my team set a mid-month fundraising goal of $5,000 before Friday at midnight — to make sure we’re ready, no matter what the new maps could look like. [If you can, I’d be incredibly grateful if you chipped in $10 today to help us stay on track and gear up for what’s ahead. >>](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/113267476/563201991/-533936924?amount=10&source=SBD_RR_EM_FR_081325_MM1_D1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDcvMS8xMDc4NzAiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiZWMyNjc5NTUtODI3OC1mMDExLWI0ODEtNjA0NWJkZmU4ZTljIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=sc0Kr9-5c5mSg_yLbRfC_nLqsczdP4ulkcACQTiySp0=) | | **[DONATE $10 »](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/113267477/563201992/-533936924?amount=10&source=SBD_RR_EM_FR_081325_MM1_D1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDcvMS8xMDc4NzAiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiZWMyNjc5NTUtODI3OC1mMDExLWI0ODEtNjA0NWJkZmU4ZTljIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=sc0Kr9-5c5mSg_yLbRfC_nLqsczdP4ulkcACQTiySp0=)**

The son of hardworking farmworkers, Dr. Ruiz grew up in Coachella, CA and learned at an early age that the key to attaining the American Dream is hard work and a great education. In the summer of 1990, Raul walked in the desert heat from business to business in the Coachella Valley asking them to invest in their community by contributing to his education. With each investment for college, he made a promise to come back home and serve his community as a physician. In 2012, he decided to take his service to the community to the next level by running for Congress. **Dr. Ruiz needs our help to continue fighting for us in Congress.**

clean_body: Here’s why: While Washington remains gridlocked, Dr. Raul Ruiz is committed to serving and helping constituents with the problems they have with the federal government and cutting red tape. If you’d like to unsubscribe, | | It’s Raul. I’ve been keeping a close eye on what’s happening with redistricting in Republican-led states — and it’s honestly pretty alarming. Simply put, Republicans across the country are trying to game the system. They’re working to redraw congressional maps in a way that could give them more seats, even in places where voters clearly aren’t with them. It’s all part of their plan to tilt the scales before voters even have a say. California has had one of the fairest redistricting systems in the country, and we’re proud of that. But if states like Texas, Florida, and others keep aggressively pushing their already gerrymandered maps even further to the right, California may have to respond. That uncertainty means we have to be ready for whatever comes next. CA-25 could shift. It could very likely become more competitive. And we need to be prepared, and not caught off guard. But right now, we’re heading into the toughest stretch of the year: the summer fundraising slump. Donations have started to slow down, just when we need to be building strength for whatever Republicans throw at us next. That’s why my team set a mid-month fundraising goal of $5,000 before Friday at midnight — to make sure we’re ready, no matter what the new maps could look like. = | | = Every dollar helps us prepare for the fight over redistricting, protect California’s 25th district, and make sure we’re ready to win — no matter how the lines are drawn. = If you've stored your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will process immediately. | = | = | = | = | = | = Thanks for being in this fight with me, Raul | | | ---|---|--- = The son of hardworking farmworkers, Dr. Ruiz grew up in Coachella, CA and learned at an early age that the key to attaining the American Dream is hard work and a great education. In the summer of 1990, Raul walked in the desert heat from business to business in the Coachella Valley asking them to invest in their community by contributing to his education. With each investment for college, he made a promise to come back home and serve his community as a physician. In 2012, he decided to take his service to the community to the next level by running for Congress. Dr. Ruiz needs our help to continue fighting for us in Congress.** | = = PAID FOR BY DR. RAUL RUIZ FOR CONGRESS COMMITTEE If you would like to unsubscribe, click here: You can also =. Dr. Raul Ruiz for Congress Committee P.O. Box 1566 Indio, CA 92202 United States

clean_body: It will be a bare-knuckle fight to the finish because Montana could determine who controls the Senate Majority | Fellow American, I won’t sugarcoat this. I’m in the fight of my life. The attacks on President Trump and his most loyal defenders in the Senate have been relentless. They’re rushing millions of dollars into battleground Senate seats across the country. I’ve already taken it on the chin several times with their lies, and it will only get worse as we get closer to election day. It will be a bare-knuckle fight to the finish because Montana could determine who controls the Senate Majority. Fellow American, I know by the end of this campaign, I’m going to be black and blue from all the Left’s attacks and the media’s brazen anti-Trump bias. For America, Steve Daines PS: The attacks from Democrats and the biased news media will be unrelenting and they have an endless stream of money. name: Adam Schiff
subject: Corrupt
body:
|
# [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/113268132/563204269/-1384072709?refcode=em-header&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDE1MyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjNTI0MGZhOC04NDc4LWYwMTEtYjQ4MS02MDQ1YmRmZThlOWMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=FENTuwtrCodAqTEixS54q8nzFz53fB6lw4tJXzHXqsg=)
This is Adam Schiff. I have some important news to share with you, Peter:

**Attorney General Pam Bondi has reportedly asked a corrupt DOJ official named Ed Martin to lead a baseless investigation against me.**
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/113268135/563204272/-1336411514?refcode=em-8.13.25-all-b&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDE1MyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjNTI0MGZhOC04NDc4LWYwMTEtYjQ4MS02MDQ1YmRmZThlOWMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=FENTuwtrCodAqTEixS54q8nzFz53fB6lw4tJXzHXqsg=)
Ed Martin, if you don’t remember, was the Interim U.S. Attorney for the District of Columbia. A former defense lawyer for violent insurrectionists, he was patently unfit for that office — or any other — and I put a hold on his nomination, and successfully helped kill it.

Ed Martin is exactly the type of loyal attack dog Donald Trump adores. As Interim U.S. Attorney, he threatened perceived “enemies” of the Trump administration, fired January 6th prosecutors for simply doing their jobs, urged the opening of criminal cases without evidence, and used the powers of his office to deter free speech. Career prosecutors quit rather than follow his unethical edicts.

Before he was nominated to be a U.S. Attorney, Ed Martin had zero prosecutorial experience. Instead, he spent his time defending insurrectionists who broke into the Capitol on January 6 and advancing bogus claims of election fraud. He is close friends with an avowed neo-Nazi, appearing with and praising him repeatedly.

_Because of all of that, we were able to stop Ed Martin’s dangerous nomination._

When his nomination was defeated, Attorney General Pam Bondi appointed Martin to lead a “weaponization” task force at the Justice Department to go after the president’s enemies. I was at the top of the list.

**And now, Ed Martin is investigating me and carrying out not just the president’s political retribution, but his own, as well.**

**[Peter, this is going to get ugly. But I will not be deterred from speaking out, fighting back, and holding Trump accountable every single day. Will you have my back and split a contribution between me and George Whitesides to help me fight back against Ed Martin and his sham investigation?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/113268137/563204274/-1336411514?refcode=em-8.13.25-all-b&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDE1MyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjNTI0MGZhOC04NDc4LWYwMTEtYjQ4MS02MDQ1YmRmZThlOWMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=FENTuwtrCodAqTEixS54q8nzFz53fB6lw4tJXzHXqsg=)**

clean_body: | = This is Adam Schiff. I have some important news to share with you, Peter: Attorney General Pam Bondi has reportedly asked a corrupt DOJ official named Ed Martin to lead a baseless investigation against me. = Ed Martin, if you don’t remember, was the Interim U.S. Attorney for the District of Columbia. A former defense lawyer for violent insurrectionists, he was patently unfit for that office — or any other — and I put a hold on his nomination, and successfully helped kill it. Ed Martin is exactly the type of loyal attack dog Donald Trump adores. As Interim U.S. Attorney, he threatened perceived “enemies” of the Trump administration, fired January 6th prosecutors for simply doing their jobs, urged the opening of criminal cases without evidence, and used the powers of his office to deter free speech. Career prosecutors quit rather than follow his unethical edicts. Before he was nominated to be a U.S. Attorney, Ed Martin had zero prosecutorial experience. Instead, he spent his time defending insurrectionists who broke into the Capitol on January 6 and advancing bogus claims of election fraud. He is close friends with an avowed neo-Nazi, appearing with and praising him repeatedly. Because of all of that, we were able to stop Ed Martin’s dangerous nomination. When his nomination was defeated, Attorney General Pam Bondi appointed Martin to lead a “weaponization” task force at the Justice Department to go after the president’s enemies. I was at the top of the list. And now, Ed Martin is investigating me and carrying out not just the president’s political retribution, but his own, as well. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | **= | = ---|--- = | = = | =** Thank you, Adam Schiff | = = = George has spent his career solving problems. Now, he’s ready to deliver for the people of California's 27th Congressional District. = To learn more about George and his commitment to working families, please visit: = We'd hate to see you go, but you can click here if you'd like to . George Whitesides for Congress P.O. Box 221776 Newhall, CA 91322 United States

name: Donavan McKinney
subject: My opponent just violated the law
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY JUSTICE DEMOCRATS
body:
[1]Justice Democrats

Peter — you've got
to be kidding me...

[ https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jd-em-20250813-dm?refcode=em20250813-36925&amounts=10%2C27%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&refcode2=36925_1203867_WUvdug&akid=36925%2E1203867%2EWUvdug ]Tweet from Sludge: NEW: Rep. Shri Thanedar (D-Mich.), who sits on a
congressional subcommittee overseeing the crypto market, voted for
crypto-friendly bills this summer while secretly holding tens of thousands
of dollars in stock tied to Bitcoin’s price.

My opponent, Shri Thanedar, just broke the law by failing to disclose a
stock trade. [ https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jd-em-20250813-dm?refcode=em20250813-36925&amounts=10%2C27%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&refcode2=36925_1203867_WUvdug&akid=36925%2E1203867%2EWUvdug ]We don't need Democrats like this in Congress – chip in a
split contribution to help me defeat him >>

The STOCK Act, passed in 2012, is meant to prevent members of Congress
from participating in insider trading. Representatives are supposed to
disclose when they buy and sell stock.

Shri disclosed his purchase over 400 days late. Since then, the stock is
up 193%.

What's the consequence?

A $200 fine.

This is ridiculous, Peter –
working class people are thrown IN JAIL for far less, yet our corrupt
member of Congress gets to escape accountability. So much of our national
politics is based on a system where there’s one set of rules for rich
people and another set for the rest of us. But I know we deserve better,
and that’s why I’m running for Congress.

Here's the kicker: Shri has managed to stay in office only because he
funds his campaigns with money from Republican donors and these very same
stock investments. He's corrupt to the core and failing to represent us
and millions of Democrats across the country.

[ https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jd-em-20250813-dm?refcode=em20250813-36925&amounts=10%2C27%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&amount=5&refcode2=36925_1203867_WUvdug&akid=36925%2E1203867%2EWUvdug ]We've got to unseat him – Peter,
can you chip in $5 or whatever you're able
to my campaign and Justice Democrats to unseat law-breaking Shri Thanedar
and send a real working class progressive to Congress?

[ https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jd-em-20250813-dm?refcode=em20250813-36925&amounts=10%2C27%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&amount=5&refcode2=36925_1203867_WUvdug&akid=36925%2E1203867%2EWUvdug ]Contribute $5

In solidarity,

Donavan McKinney

Contribute to Justice Democrats: https://secure.actblue.com/donate/justicedemocrats?refcode=em20250813-36925-footer&t=1002&refcode2=36925_1203867_WUvdug&akid=36925%2E1203867%2EWUvdug

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way for us to reach you about opportunities to get involved. If you need to remove yourself from our email list, click here to unsubscribe: https://go.justicedemocrats.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=1003&akid=36925%2E1203867%2EWUvdug

1390 Columbia Ave #261
Lancaster, PA 17603

**TO: Gov. Gavin Newsom
FROM: A loyal Democrat
RE: Democrats stand with you ** Dear Governor Newsom,

**Thank you SO much for standing up for our democracy by suing the Trump Administration!**

Trump is clearly threatened by how you exposed him to his unconstitutional and authoritarian actions.

**His threat to jail you is not only baseless, it’s a power-grab and another attempt to launch us into a MAGA dictatorship.**

This marks a terrifying point in our nation’s history. That’s why I’m so grateful to have leaders like you who won’t back down in the face of these anti-democratic threats.

name: Dan Carr
subject: Biblical Truths for America’s Leaders
body:
Freedom Frontline

| |
---|---|---
|
# Biblical Truths for America's Leaders
### Freedom Frontline
| | | [Dan Carr](https://substack.com/@freedomfrontline1776)
---
| Aug 13
---
| [](https://substack.com/@freedomfrontline1776)
---
In this episode, we dig deep into what the Bible says about leadership, national morality, and the responsibility Christians have to choose leaders who fear God, uphold truth, and protect liberty. We unpack 7 powerful biblical truths about righteous and wicked leadership--supported by Scripture and thought-provoking quotes--and show how these lessons apply to America today. From the blessings of Godly authority to the dangers of corruption, this conversation is a call to action for Christians and patriots who care about the future of our nation.
[](https://substack.com/redirect/f597513e-eba5-457c-bfc9-8e6941d2e9e0?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
What you'll learn in this episode: How leadership shapes the morality of a nation: The dangers of wicked rulers and corrupt policies: The biblical responsibility of citizens to choose righteous leaders: How God holds leaders accountable for their actions: The blessings that come with godly authority: How God raises and removes leaders according to His will: [#FreedomFrontline](https://substack.com/redirect/2b5333a9-19f9-4f91-9b9a-928eb20a9e86?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) name: LeadersWeDeserve.com
subject: How old are you, Peter?
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY LEADERS WE DESERVE, LEADERSWEDESERVE
body:
We’re building a multi-generational coalition.
# [](https://act.leaderswedeserve.com/go/852?refcode=em20250813-1&t=1&akid=2516%2E587540%2Egu3xxW)
**How old are you, Peter?**
We know, we know... it’s not polite to ask.
But hear us out.
You might be surprised to learn that a lot of the people powering Leaders We Deserve’s work — donating, organizing, cheering us on — aren’t Gen Z or even Millennials. They’re older. Sometimes much older than the candidates we support.
_And that’s the point._
**This isn’t just a youth movement.**
It’s a multi-generational coalition of people who are sick of the status quo and ready to elect a new generation of Democratic leaders who actually give a damn.
So we’d love to know:
**[How old are you? And why are you part of this work? Take our brief survey now.](https://act.leaderswedeserve.com/survey/em_ms_lwd_20250813_1?source=em20250813-2516&akid=2516%2E587540%2Egu3xxW)**
**[Take the Survey »](https://act.leaderswedeserve.com/survey/em_ms_lwd_20250813_1?source=em20250813-2516&akid=2516%2E587540%2Egu3xxW)**
You and everyone who supports this movement are an integral piece of our team, and at Leaders We Deserve we think it’s important to get to know your teammates. The answers you share will help us better understand this community — and make sure we’re building something that reflects _everyone_ who’s all-in on change.
It’s going to take people from every generation to make this lasting change happen. So whether you’re Gen-Z and fighting for your future or a Baby Boomer who knows it’s time to shake up the status quo, **thank you for standing with us.**
Leaders We Deserve
* * *
**[Donate »](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/lwd-em-footer?refcode=em20250813-1&t=2&refcode2=2516_587540_gu3xxW&akid=2516%2E587540%2Egu3xxW)**
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is a critical way we communicate with grassroots supporters like you. However, if you would like to change your subscription preferences, here are some options:
* [Receive Fewer Emails](https://act.leaderswedeserve.com/signup/receive-fewer-emails/?t=3&akid=2516%2E587540%2Egu3xxW)
* [Update Your Information](https://act.leaderswedeserve.com/signup/update-your-information/)
* [Unsubscribe](https://act.leaderswedeserve.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=4&akid=2516%2E587540%2Egu3xxW)

To give by check:
Leaders We Deserve
611 Pennsylvania Ave SE
#192
Washington, DC 20003
Email us: [info@leaderswedeserve.com](mailto:info@leaderswedeserve.com)
PAID FOR BY LEADERS WE DESERVE, LEADERSWEDESERVE.COM, NOT AUTHORIZED BY ANY CANDIDATE OR CANDIDATE'S COMMITTEE

**[Will you join them by chipping in $33 (or any amount you can afford!) to our campaign today?](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em_ms_kp_20250813_1_ak?refcode=em20250813-40010&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&amount=33&refcode2=40010_3422442_XA7duk&akid=40010%2E3422442%2EXA7duk)**

name: Michael Whatley
subject: They think they can BUY the Senate
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Whatley for Senate _Copyright © 2025 Whatley for Senate_ **Our mailing address is:**
body:
Chuck Schumer is laughing at North Carolina. Let’s wipe that smile off his face.

| | | [](https://go.vbtrb.com/r/aWzb/?__vbtrk=MzA5MzUwOjEwMjk5MDQwNjpuZXdzbGV0dGVy&_uax=MzA5MzUwOjEwMjk5MDQwNg&ct)
---
| | Friend, I just got word about what the Democrats are saying behind closed doors and you’re not going to like it. They think THIS race is going to be **easy.** They think they can waltz into North Carolina, dump a mountain of cash from Hollywood and Wall Street, and BUY this U.S. Senate seat without breaking a sweat.
---
| | [ **FIGHT BACK** ](https://go.vbtrb.com/r/aWzb/?__vbtrk=MzA5MzUwOjEwMjk5MDQwNjpuZXdzbGV0dGVy&_uax=MzA5MzUwOjEwMjk5MDQwNg&ct)
---
| | Chuck Schumer and his liberal allies are already laughing about it. They believe you and I won’t fight back. They think North Carolina is for sale.
---
| | Let me be clear: **NOT ON MY WATCH.**
---
| | This is **Trump Country** , and I am running for Senate to defend our conservative values, secure our border, and put America FIRST. But if we’re going to win, I need YOU with me every step of the way. **__[_Can I count on you, friend? Step up RIGHT NOW and fight back against Chuck Schumer and Roy Cooper. I really need your support._](https://go.vbtrb.com/r/aWzb/?__vbtrk=MzA5MzUwOjEwMjk5MDQwNjpuZXdzbGV0dGVy&_uax=MzA5MzUwOjEwMjk5MDQwNg&ct)** The Left is pouring MILLIONS into this race because they know what’s at stake: the Senate majority. If they flip this seat, they control the agenda. name: Jason Crow
subject: I’ve lived this struggle
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Jason Crow for Congress
body:
Jason Crow For Congress [https://nvlupin.blob.core.windows.net/images/van/NGP/NGP21/1/88523/images/logoJC%20(1).png]
Friend,

My family was working class. I worked construction. I put in shifts at Arby’s.

So I know what it feels like when the rent is due, the car breaks down, and the grocery bill keeps going up. And I know that right now, millions of families across the United States are struggling to stay afloat under rising costs.

Child care is unaffordable. Housing is out of reach for too many. Prices keep rising, and while working families stretch every dollar, Republicans in Congress are handing tax breaks to the wealthiest Americans.

That’s not the America I believe in.

While Republicans protect the ultra-wealthy, Democrats are fighting to ease the burden on working families — and that fight starts with flipping the House.

We need leaders who know what struggle looks like, and who won’t forget it when it’s time to make decisions in Washington. If you’re with me, I hope you’ll chip in today to help us take back the House: [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jc-em-aug2025?amount=]

If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:

DONATE $10 NOW [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jc-em-aug2025?amount=10&express_lane=true]

ANOTHER AMOUNT [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jc-em-aug2025]

Thanks for being in this fight,

Jason

8547 E Arapahoe Road, STE J-543
Greenwood Village, CO 80112
United States

name: Charlie Kirk, Turning Point USA
subject: You’d never doubt it again, Friend...
body:
[Unsubscribe](http://trk.victorymailings.com/?xul=2qq8ny363wdaxf3eu1ztoj206vcy3ecnztra6wtv0bwdkdenv8u90nj3h75ooq2y10w43oad9fqav38wepls2w8h0z2oifsqw87i1h1be&__stmp=t0yao5&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh)

These students aren't going home the same.

| | | [](http://trk.victorymailings.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=t0yao5&__onlt=h)
---
Friend, It felt like 1776 in Tampa. _Not even kidding._ You could feel it — in the chants, in the flags, in the energy crackling through the room. And for a moment... You knew the future of our country wasn't lost... _it's waking up._ That's what happened at the 2025 Student Action Summit. And if you've ever wondered whether your support can truly make a difference — _let me be clear:_ **If you had been there, you'd never doubt it again.**
---
[](http://trk.victorymailings.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=t0yao5&__onlt=h)
---
**More than 7,000 attendees packed into Tampa — many of whom patriots like YOU helped sponsor to be there.** They've lived through the lockdowns. The lies. The Leftist propaganda. They've seen what happens when America forgets her roots. And they've had ENOUGH. All weekend, I heard the same thing: _“We want our country back.”_ **And I told them what you and I both know is true:****_“These students are the vanguard for saving this country.”_** These young people — they've sacrificed. They've been kicked out of class. Smeared. Cancelled. Mocked. All for simply standing for truth. But at SAS? They weren't alone. They weren't isolated anymore. They were part of something bigger... They heard from the BOLDEST voices in the movement today... They met fellow fighters... made lifelong friends... met mentors and even future spouses (_yes, that's happened at SAS!_)... And more than anything... they saw what's possible — and left with a mission. **That's what patriots like you helped give them, Friend.** Not just a seat at an event — _but a vision of what their future can be._
---
[](http://trk.victorymailings.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=t0yao5&__onlt=h)
---
13 years ago, we dreamed of this... **Of real change led by young patriots... of students rejecting the “Woke” lies and choosing truth... of America-loving Gen Z leaders rising up across the country.** At SAS 2025 — it all came together. It wasn't just the largest Student Action Summit in history... It wasn't just the most passionate, most energetic, most hopeful crowd we've ever hosted... _It felt like a revival._ And now... I believe the next generation sees what's possible... They see a movement worth joining... They see a cause worth sacrificing for... _And they see a future for their country worth fighting for._ **Friend, patriots like YOU are the reason why.** Because let's be clear: Only our generous supporters could make the Student Action Summit happen. **Patriots like you helped sponsor these students... grew this movement... And helped ignite the most patriotic generation in 50 years.** And this part matters most... these students are going back different... They're heading home stronger. Bolder. Clearer on who they are and what they're called to do. _They're not waiting on Washington to fix this country..._ They're going to fight for it — starting now. And they're going to be the tip of the spear in the American Culture War.
---
[](http://trk.victorymailings.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=t0yao5&__onlt=h)
---
**But here's the thing Friend... _We can't stop here._** A new school year is almost here... we have new chapters to support, more American flags to put in classrooms, more activism kits to ship.

The American Comeback Tour is hitting campuses again soon... and I'm telling you now, it's going to be BIGGER than ever before.

We still have major events left this year... like Believer's Summit and AmericaFest.

And more students than ever reaching out saying, _“I want to lead.”_

We need to fuel this momentum.

Because Friend, _we've been given a gift._

The culture shifted. The youth vote shifted. And we've built a movement that can save this country. **Let's not waste a second. Let's make this moment permanent. Let's never let the Left regain a foothold in the hearts of our youth.**

I can't thank patriots like you enough, Friend.

For your belief. For your generosity. And for your love of this country.

You didn't just help us put on a great event... You helped spark a movement we'll be talking about for the rest of our lives.

Let's build what comes next. Onward!
---
For America, Charlie Kirk
Founder & CEO
Turning Point USA
---
[](http://trk.victorymailings.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=t0yao5&__onlt=h)
---
**P.S.** The 2025 Student Action Summit was proof... Proof that our culture is waking up. That Gen Z is shifting. That our campuses can be taken back. That we can win the American Culture War — _if we keep going._ The 7,000+ attendees who packed SAS? They're ready. They're leading. And they're heading home with one mission: SAVE AMERICA. **But Friend, we need to keep the wind at their backs.** Like I mentioned... The American Comeback Tour will be back in action before you know it... And I want to make sure we go even BIGGER than we did in the spring. To reach more campuses and break more Leftist strongholds. We've got new chapters waiting for support. Activism kits that need shipping. Believer's Summit and AmericaFest around the corner. And most of all, thousands of students stepping up right now, asking, _“how can I be part of this?”_ **Let's not let this opportunity slip away. Not with the Left on the ropes and so much more work to do to restore American Greatness.** **[If you believe in what just happened — if you believe we can DEFEAT the Left for good and SAVE our great nation — will you double-down on our momentum with a generous gift today?](http://trk.victorymailings.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=t0yao5&__onlt=h)**
---
[ **Make Your Gift &**
**Support Turning Point USA**](http://trk.victorymailings.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=t0yao5&__onlt=h)
---
4940 East Beverly Road
Phoenix, Arizona 85044
---
[Unsubscribe from messages sponsored by Turning Point USA.](http://trk.victorymailings.com/?xul=2qq8ny363wdaxf3eu1ztoj206vcy3ecnztra6wtv0bwdkdenv8u90nj3h75ooq2y10w43oad9fqav38wepls2w8h0z2oifsqw87i1h1be&__stmp=t0yao5&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh)

To Unsubscribe by email, please reply to this message with Unsubscribe as the Subject Line. [Privacy Policy](http://trk.victorymailings.com/?xtl=14oag80vul0by77g0ehrw8wpc0olsjg7bsgtvxooema8ytiifzpvbec9g6r801y75q4cboyyqks2rwl0gxfzmdeambuv468idx1gz6ln45fc6ml2nlwjhprenv7wvrgkrru4csij2p0fs&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=t0yao5&__onlt=h)

name: Karen Hamilton
subject: The Secret Scandal that Shook Virginia
body:
Hamilton for Delegate!
| | **Can't see this message?_[View in browser](https://hamiltonforvirginia.com/so/b4PYacvbP/c?w=0dUFnMHLmzJi1UJijB3sEMEw94VzpAszd4-A7AAu0dM.eyJ1IjoiaHR0cHM6Ly9oYW1pbHRvbmZvcnZpcmdpbmlhLmNvbS9zby9iNFBZYWN2YlA_bGFuZ3VhZ2VUYWc9ZW4iLCJtIjoibWFpbCIsImMiOiI0NDI4ODkzMy1lNGNjLTRmMTItOGYzZS02ZjQ1ZjM3NjIxZjQifQ)_**
---
| | |
---
| | [](https://hamiltonforvirginia.com/so/b4PYacvbP/c?w=go_F5tzz_I9OTAA74NOxR6y5CvbhNhLL0F5FBrN8eDY.eyJ1IjoiaHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuaGFtaWx0b25mb3J2aXJnaW5pYS5jb20vbWVldC1rYXJlbiIsInIiOiJiYjFlMzJkNy02NDA3LTQ1NTQtOTgzYy1hOTRjYzYwYmUwODMiLCJtIjoibWFpbCIsImMiOiI0NDI4ODkzMy1lNGNjLTRmMTItOGYzZS02ZjQ1ZjM3NjIxZjQifQ)
---
| | | |
---
| | VIRGINIA IS FOR PATRIOTS!
---
| |
---
| | | |
---
| | The Scandal that Revealedan Inconvenient Truth
---
| | | |
---
| | Last week, an explosive story revealed that two students in Fairfax County Public Schools were allegedly taken to get abortions by school officials, WITHOUT parental notification.This catapulted the already controversial topics of abortion and parental rights front and center of the political conversations happening in Virginia.
---
| | [](https://hamiltonforvirginia.com/so/b4PYacvbP/c?w=FgFJgkPqp0gH4H_iWImHlagNClTlsBUG_oWwuN0nkKU.eyJ1IjoiaHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuZm94bmV3cy5jb20vdXMvcHVibGljLXNjaG9vbC10ZWFjaGVyLXJldmVhbHMteWVhcnMtbG9uZy1lZmZvcnQtZXhwb3NlLWFsbGVnZWQtc3R1ZGVudC1hYm9ydGlvbi1zY2FuZGFsIiwiciI6ImNmZDNjODU5LTEyMjktNGJhYS04NTNlLTg0N2E5ZWM0ZmI0NSIsIm0iOiJtYWlsIiwiYyI6IjQ0Mjg4OTMzLWU0Y2MtNGYxMi04ZjNlLTZmNDVmMzc2MjFmNCJ9)
---
| | Here's what we know so far:
* Fox News has reported that the statement from one student involved detailed what allegedly happened: In 2021, a school social worker arranged and paid for the abortion of a 17-year-old student at Centreville High School, without parental/guardian notification.
* This is corroborated by teacher Zenaida Perez, who claims she warned Fairfax County school officials SEVEN times about this incident since May 2022, only to be ignored and retaliated against.
* Fairfax County Schools denies knowledge and involvement.

---
| | Protecting our children shouldn't be a partisan issue. Unfortunately, this story was met with silence from Abigail Spanberger and fellow Virginia Democrats. Her campaign continued, in a tone-deaf manner, laying out her “plans” to make Virginia public schools the best in the nation but offering little detail and zero condemnation or even mention of the secret abortion scandal that left parents feeling uneasy on the first week back to school.
---
| | As Democrats often say, "Silence is Compliance". Perhaps this explains their complete avoidance of this story. As illustrated in their prize piece of legislation, Virginia Democrats don’t object to minors undergoing life-altering and dangerous medical procedures without parental consent.
---
| | | |
---
| | In fact, Democrats are currently working to get “secret abortions” such as this, without parental consent, codified into the Virginia Constitution. The "Right to Reproductive Freedom Amendment" would:
* Legalize abortion until birth
* Eliminate parental consent
* Nullify informed consent, ultrasound requirements, and health & safety regulations
* Allow for sterilizing, wrong sex “treatments”

---
| |
---
| | In January, EVERY SINGLE DEMOCRAT in both the House and Senate of the Virginia Legislaturevoted YES on the “Right to Reproductive Freedom Amendment" (HJR 1 and SJR 247), which would leave our young children, in addition to the unborn, without protection. Whether you believe there are instances where abortion should be allowed or not, the reality is, this amendment would allow a child rapist to take his young victim to get an abortion, without her parents ever knowing. This proposed amendment is a gift to human traffickers and sex offenders.
---
| | | |
---
| | While shocking, this is par for the course, given their extreme track record. In previous legislative sessions, every single Virginia Democrat in the House of Delegates voted against giving care to a baby that survived a botched abortion. This isn't pro-choice, this is pro-death.
---
| | Additionally, their legislation isn't "pro-woman", as they frequently claim.
---
| | [](https://hamiltonforvirginia.com/so/b4PYacvbP/c?w=p33TCWFJGrPhtbr8HezOd6bu_zbXx5hfjdD26x3obzk.eyJ1IjoiaHR0cHM6Ly9lcHBjLm9yZy93cC1jb250ZW50L3VwbG9hZHMvMjAyNS8wNC8yNS0wNC1UaGUtQWJvcnRpb24tUGlsbC1IYXJtcy1Xb21lbi5wZGYiLCJyIjoiMDUwNTU3YjktZGRhYi00MzM2LTk0MzgtODIwZDJhMzEyMmQ0IiwibSI6Im1haWwiLCJjIjoiNDQyODg5MzMtZTRjYy00ZjEyLThmM2UtNmY0NWYzNzYyMWY0In0)

| | A recent study released by the Ethics and Public Policy Center revealed another disturbing truth: 1 in 10 women experience serious adverse events after taking a chemical abortion pill. These risks, downplayed by the FDA, include sepsis, infection, or hemorrhage within 45 days of taking the drug. This Democrat legislation subjects young girls to life-threatening risks and calls it “freedom”.
---
| | I have been clear from the beginning of this campaign that I will fight to protect EVERY innocent human life, from the moment of conception. The first step in doing that is sounding the alarm on how dangerous this amendment is for all children, born and unborn. Please help me spread this critical message. Share this newsletter and inform concerned patriots in your church, community, and family of what is at stake in November. If we flip the House of Delegates, we can stop this atrocious legislation in its tracks and protect our children.

Co-founder of Home Depot & Republican billionaire Ken Langone **[sounded off at socialist Sen. Elizabeth Warren](https://substack.com/redirect/0f3ebc0a-0e0d-4862-8dc7-b167f74086f5?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)** during a heated live CNBC interview.
Langone had a surprise for Warren she wasn't ready for... Watch below:
[](https://substack.com/redirect/0f3ebc0a-0e0d-4862-8dc7-b167f74086f5?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
Warren has partnered with left-wing radicals like socialist NYC mayoral candidate Zohran Mamdani to support a wealth tax on unrealized gains for appreciating assets.
**["I paid my taxes!" Langone snapped.](https://substack.com/redirect/0f3ebc0a-0e0d-4862-8dc7-b167f74086f5?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)** "A wealth tax is negative compound interest. I made all the money, what I had left, I put at risk, I could have lost it all!"
The billionaire then demanded Warren and other Democrats "have the courage" to fix entitlement programs like Social Security making payouts to Americans who don't need them.
"How do you rationalize giving me $3,000 a month, with all my wealth?!" he pressed the senator. "I shouldn't get Social Security!!"

# **This stock soared 2,900%. Is it in your portfolio?**
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/b3cbbe0b-4ef5-44e7-bd14-32760c779336?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
When you top Deloitte's "Fastest-Growing Software Companies" list and earn 50M+ customers, people notice.
No wonder **[Mode Mobile's stock is up over 2,900%](https://substack.com/redirect/b3cbbe0b-4ef5-44e7-bd14-32760c779336?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)**[.](https://substack.com/redirect/b3cbbe0b-4ef5-44e7-bd14-32760c779336?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
Mode is completely rethinking the $500B smartphone industry, letting users earn and save money simply by using their phones. Their customers have earned and saved over $325M, generating $75M in revenue and an **[eye-popping 32,481% 3-year revenue growth](https://substack.com/redirect/b3cbbe0b-4ef5-44e7-bd14-32760c779336?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)**.
Over 50K people have invested, as they leverage partnerships with **Best Buy and Walmart** to reach even more of the world's 7 billion smartphone users.
With their Nasdaq ticker $MODE reserved, you have a limited time to invest in Mode before their potential IPO.
**🚨[Their offering is nearly full - along with the chance to become a shareholder at $0.30/share](https://substack.com/redirect/b3cbbe0b-4ef5-44e7-bd14-32760c779336?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)**[.](https://substack.com/redirect/b3cbbe0b-4ef5-44e7-bd14-32760c779336?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
[Learn More](https://substack.com/redirect/b3cbbe0b-4ef5-44e7-bd14-32760c779336?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
* * *
# Trump seeks to extend DC takeover, says the capital will be "a beacon" for other American cities
President Donald Trump plans to request **["long-term extensions"](https://substack.com/redirect/a7ceaa9f-e728-48f3-8c45-81165ca9591e?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)** from Congress to maintain federal control over DC's 3,400-officer Metropolitan Police Department beyond the current 30-day limit under the 1973 Home Rule Act.
* **The proposed crime bill will include expanded anti-crime powers and infrastructure funding** for DC, covering everything from law enforcement authority to "finest grasses" for city parks and road repairs, with Trump vowing the capital will become a "beacon" for other cities.
* **US Attorney Jeanine Pirro is demanding policy changes** to undo parts of DC code that allow judges to set aside jail time for defendants under 25, release offenders after 15 years, and seal criminal records.

* * *
# New York Times reporter who attacked Trump's DC crime crackdown challenged to walk through the streets at night alone
A conservative media executive challenged New York Times correspondent Peter Baker **[to walk unarmed through Washington, D.C., at night](https://substack.com/redirect/a508d567-847e-4b7c-a393-5c15bc9f6e55?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)** after Baker criticized President Donald Trump's crime crackdown in the nation's capital.
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/dd586e61-a0bb-49ae-a585-3f3c92b0486e?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
* **NYT correspondent Peter Baker criticized Trump's DC crime crackdown on X** , claiming there's a "nonexistent crime crisis" and that violent crime in DC is at a 30-year low, while attacking Trump's deployment of National Guard and federal control of police.
* **Grabien founder Tom Elliott challenged Baker to prove his safety claims** by walking unarmed through DC streets after 9 PM on a weekend night, initially pledging $300 and creating a GoFundMe that quickly grew to over $1,000.
* **Elliott created escalating incentives based on fundraising milestones** , including a GoPro at $500, matching T-shirts that read "D.C.: Safest Streets in America" for him and his cameraman at $1,000, gold chains at $2,500, and expanding to two nights of walking at $5,000+, with all proceeds going to Baker's charity of choice.
* **The challenge includes Elliott offering to double his pledge if Baker sends his wife instead,** and promising to find another "high-profile believer in the 'no crime crisis' narrative" if Baker declines the challenge.

name: Brent Hennrich
subject: No one should need a loan to eat dinner
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Brent Hennrich for Washington
body:
| | [ ](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/u001.XaF8mXqsA6b2dSPmhsleMU_BeZcmRBr16dPjlrMKhhjiC51ataw3Peft1wIO87ITpzYiedWcQb4xp54cVUxmYzjO2Fe-y0wSPuRzIHMVgq4xxPR8ZMTO8fdzKB2InJ8sRb2ZHttwp-0pqNGf_sn0ARRKE9sjsX4EpJJHIpSqi-1490mGGi2QDMY2mxvbMXVMmITcopQfoZC1a2tILzfwDKruL2aAYALCiszEdTyVl-NYEi3NfB-eJsiIzHmOsZV2Kz7tHf4HVa13tny7fMNMyg/4j0/Z93UjDGOQtmi5C3_o5yYYA/h0/h001.ZgwZozYmeEQKDmka7gQTiDorE7ecZp5lVUzFuLJu0c8)
---
Peter,

In the wake of The Donald choosing to escalate the Trump Tax on the middle class, more and more Americans are being pushed to the brink - financing their groceries with buy-now-pay-later loans and falling behind on those payments.
---
| [ ](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/u001.iIBo0N5fSFzEFL40Tn-vtbMETCUYClkOrOh9-SNJfqv6r8GR7zKbLdKY8JcRsBH8aQhQzL-6XFLiJ1IzrYZqHcVu3_2xEWSSvdjjDmkiSUBFweSQUWyPL0_bL_BcWB2-VQJli25SOcjYvksjw-d1MtdMCM8eNujkl96qtfvYqtbSj7QeyVV9oRgTMXoJoqVdiV3WdFyqPIBhTjyMOmo1tNcLkDP32WQIuUjSw2sS274XurNZUWKNI5xu0txxPgrOGCmf37SFEIKWdvMGYmmR5oyEpv4dVQCpg_uKOcOVgJHu_bZePWP8xOVblw1oq_cFx12zrUCHgzfJ92EPfzIXBzBaoahH7nOmTQ1o0gMjRL-Ho3OKCY9aq_BHhtxcgcZAvKs590SSAKYXihryHu-tXz9XHyf4PCNRoO_E5jlz8IM/4j0/Z93UjDGOQtmi5C3_o5yYYA/h1/h001.WGrQBuzWhcss6dUFaqeDhCbLVZhpVWKCQM4rQePR5WI)
---
This survey from LendingTree published in April found that 25% of grocery shoppers are relying on short term loans to put food on the table. And that was BEFORE the tariffs started hitting our grocery bills - which means it's going to get worse. I know how quickly the basics can slip out of reach. I have sat at the kitchen table figuring out which bills can wait and what corners we can cut. That is life for too many families in Southwest Washington: parents deciding whether to buy meat or stretch the week with pasta, whether the gas in the tank will last until payday, whether they can skip the co-pay because the rent is due. **While working people do their grocery math, Marie Gluesenkamp Perez is making a different kind of calculation.** She aligns with MAGA votes, praises ICE, backs bills that target immigrants, and chases headlines with ableist proposals like letting Congress decide who is "cognitively fit" to serve. It is politics as "bipartisan" theater while families fight to put dinner on the table. [**Help me end this politics of distraction and capitulation. Chip in now to build a campaign rooted in the struggles of working people, not in whatever polls well with the consultant class.**](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/u001.iIBo0N5fSFzEFL40Tn-vtbMETCUYClkOrOh9-SNJfqv6r8GR7zKbLdKY8JcRsBH8aQhQzL-6XFLiJ1IzrYZqHcVu3_2xEWSSvdjjDmkiSUBFweSQUWyPL0_bL_BcWB2-VQJli25SOcjYvksjw-d1MtdMCM8eNujkl96qtfvYqtbSj7QeyVV9oRgTMXoJoqVdJo83Ragc_4Mkm8uJSDT6-HQedsFFdMQIkisl6gDGrQVEwGHjHbrLx1p5uYlMsNdUm9yQbM6TsZY0roI__gmZyz1_xg7YUeBKv3nOTjxBivTgUgIStjDTlDlNwSVb8BpmVeDaU7wBzUy6p070ELyB96_yJVzUhde_VqeSFvXGvQYSXOmrqH47KfITsEJfb8eXYfeieWRihTmIKghf_WEyZNkBHtgci02Xat1BveuRqfY/4j0/Z93UjDGOQtmi5C3_o5yYYA/h2/h001.3Y135W_nu6-lV39KIlS6ak7zQj5W35Ba2OHnPEhJ0o0) We do not need more triangulation or centrism that mistakes MAGA mimicry for strategy. We need leaders who fight unapologetically for housing, healthcare, fair wages, and food security so no one has to take on debt to feed their family. **Because a government where families finance groceries is a moral failure.** It is the result of an economy designed for the wealthy and well-connected, while working people are told to tighten their belts. Leaders like Zohran Mamdani have shown that investing in material improvements for everyone's lives is not only morally right, it has always been a winning strategy. Neoliberalism and DC politics have spent decades convincing Democrats to speak in half-measures to court a handful of swing voters, but the truth is that real investment in people can rewrite electoral maps, rebuild trust, and deliver change that lasts. The alternative is exactly what we have now: Marie's brand of MAGA appeasement that leaves working families behind. I am running to put working people first and deliver leadership that changes lives. [**Become a monthly donor today so we can plan, build, and win together.**](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/u001.iIBo0N5fSFzEFL40Tn-vtbMETCUYClkOrOh9-SNJfqv6r8GR7zKbLdKY8JcRsBH8aQhQzL-6XFLiJ1IzrYZqHcVu3_2xEWSSvdjjDmkiSUBFweSQUWyPL0_bL_BcWB2-GMxMz1hbCGl3KlgvZRzNPrnH8m6DbRxltxOj4NrPdNWcop8Yb7h6UxpU7Vomr3nXncHDUSQ9gQY5WU_3mxWR1zyP22lxMMzCfq3iRTDPTtyDZlCE0YATL8qtM1WCcT8yorEygIpwOD-1wv49S41-YxvYj9xZkM0UnOTeb-Oi0MozBveNwAzKs9A6XOXYtY5KUrad_y3b4nM5eFUNb-Z6WIqZJgqBL3Tw2za1ZvJ4soN5F9M4miLo0xKSRTfx-8C3dlmYt3EVpCdK1t8nVRGdeIXOn0jcDz5Rz3F4bz8f5zw/4j0/Z93UjDGOQtmi5C3_o5yYYA/h3/h001.IOY-Xb8UQZO7OAsqwwAChWHsrhSKOH0j2vNouLxhENc) Let's Heal Washington! Brent Hennrich
---
[ **SUPPORT BRENT TODAY** ](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/u001.iIBo0N5fSFzEFL40Tn-vtbMETCUYClkOrOh9-SNJfqv6r8GR7zKbLdKY8JcRsBH8aQhQzL-6XFLiJ1IzrYZqHcVu3_2xEWSSvdjjDmkiSUBFweSQUWyPL0_bL_BcWB2-VQJli25SOcjYvksjw-d1MtdMCM8eNujkl96qtfvYqtbSj7QeyVV9oRgTMXoJoqVd6bRZa52DiIeNIkUfebTrD2liot90Qa77slrqNRo797-wKCNEMmtWRtirWG67nzQetyP-Shou9Z33V4tjnwbcRdZ0kQXWTJ1Zfw7nV4DpN5jhKEUGFUtVWq2----LDYfFgT2lzu_-_P11f6tlsZERAjqqmjvWG_DeV4bTTgnhk3jBEz0JV9bQDN3p69zEItNxq1P26YNFvFeVnCH_WGr1tRbwn64271LlJRraQWRlh4E/4j0/Z93UjDGOQtmi5C3_o5yYYA/h4/h001.AN0nRpC_RA4n9OfxpR75dlbnkRx4-H-P7D-oficrBV8)

Brent will be answering direct questions from those in attendance. Event starts at 6PM arrive early to order food and drinks. Venue is Heathen Brewing Feral House in downtown Vancouver.

clean_body: | | Peter, In the wake of The Donald choosing to escalate the Trump Tax on the middle class, more and more Americans are being pushed to the brink - financing their groceries with buy-now-pay-later loans and falling behind on those payments. | This survey from LendingTree published in April found that 25% of grocery shoppers are relying on short term loans to put food on the table. And that was BEFORE the tariffs started hitting our grocery bills - which means it's going to get worse. I know how quickly the basics can slip out of reach. I have sat at the kitchen table figuring out which bills can wait and what corners we can cut. That is life for too many families in Southwest Washington: parents deciding whether to buy meat or stretch the week with pasta, whether the gas in the tank will last until payday, whether they can skip the co-pay because the rent is due. While working people do their grocery math, Marie Gluesenkamp Perez is making a different kind of calculation. She aligns with MAGA votes, praises ICE, backs bills that target immigrants, and chases headlines with ableist proposals like letting Congress decide who is "cognitively fit" to serve. It is politics as "bipartisan" theater while families fight to put dinner on the table. We do not need more triangulation or centrism that mistakes MAGA mimicry for strategy. We need leaders who fight unapologetically for housing, healthcare, fair wages, and food security so no one has to take on debt to feed their family. Because a government where families finance groceries is a moral failure. It is the result of an economy designed for the wealthy and well-connected, while working people are told to tighten their belts. Leaders like Zohran Mamdani have shown that investing in material improvements for everyone's lives is not only morally right, it has always been a winning strategy. Neoliberalism and DC politics have spent decades convincing Democrats to speak in half-measures to court a handful of swing voters, but the truth is that real investment in people can rewrite electoral maps, rebuild trust, and deliver change that lasts. The alternative is exactly what we have now: Marie's brand of MAGA appeasement that leaves working families behind. I am running to put working people first and deliver leadership that changes lives. Let's Heal Washington! Brent Hennrich | Quick note about upcoming events for those in the area: Friday August 15th Brent will be at the SW WA Fair in Lewis County at the Lewis County Dems booth from 5-8PM Tuesday September 2nd Brent will be a guest at Drinking Liberally Vancouver candidate Q&A forum. Brent will be answering direct questions from those in attendance. Event starts at 6PM arrive early to order food and drinks. Venue is Heathen Brewing Feral House in downtown Vancouver. | | Marie Gluesenkamp-Perez has betrayed Democrats and the voters of WA-3 by repeatedly voting with MAGA against women's rights, immigrants, and more. Brent Hennrich is a lifelong Washingtonian, a proud working class dad, and lifelong Democratic activist. name: Ron Wyden
subject: Why I’ve teamed up with AOC:
disclaimer_text: Paid for and authorized by Wyden for Senate
body:
Palantir is helping Trump build a mega-database of Americans' private information so he can target and spy on his enemies, or anyone.
| | [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/113269863/563209831/2140832878?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDEvMS84OTQxMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5NjliOWJmMy04Yjc4LWYwMTEtYjQ4MS02MDQ1YmRmZThlOWMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=4pG8BOSm4Heo3wsRKFHB_J4m-9LvjLUbAqYetQ5YmWs=&emci=401a67a7-6278-f011-b481-6045bdfe8e9c&emdi=969b9bf3-8b78-f011-b481-6045bdfe8e9c&ceid=9818364)
---

| | **Palantir is helping Trump build a mega-database of Americans' private information so he can target and spy on his enemies, or anyone.** That's why I'm partnering with Representative Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez and 8 other members of Congress to demand information regarding reports that Palantir is enabling and profiting from serious violations of federal law. From our letter: _"The unprecedented possibility of a searchable, 'mega-database' of tax returns and other data that will potentially be shared with or accessed by other federal agencies is a surveillance nightmare that raises a host of legal concerns, not least that it will make it significantly easier for Donald Trump's Administration to spy on and target his growing list of enemies and other Americans"_ **The full scope of Palantir's work for the Trump Administration is unclear, but publicly available contracts indicate its tendrils are reaching nearly every corner of the federal government.** Recently, the Department of Defense awarded Palantir a $795 million contract that could increase to $1.3 billion to lead data fusion and artificial intelligence programs throughout the U.S. military. The Trump administration has already deployed Palantir's software at the Department of Homeland Security, Department of Health and Human Services, Food and Drug Administration, Centers for Disease Control and Prevention, and National Institutes of Health. From day one of his presidency, Trump and his cronies have been weaponizing every corner of our federal government against American citizens and immigrants. This mega-database will help make it easier for them to do it. It's also a flagrant privacy violation. I take a backseat to nobody in the Senate when it comes to protecting Americans' fundamental and constitutional right to privacy. I'm fighting this every single step of the way, and I'm proud to have Representative Ocasio-Cortez as a partner in this battle. More soon, _Ron_ |
---|---|---

| | Paid for and authorized by Wyden for Senate.
---

name: Team Kaptur
subject: Not the best time
body:
Summer isn't a great time for political campaigns, friend, but our work is more urgent than ever.

| |
---
Friend, Summer isn't the best time for grassroots fundraising. Folks are out and about, and the 2026 election feels like it's a long way away. **But our opponents are already attacking Marcy with every chance they get. If we wait until next year to fight back, it will already be too late.** Friend, we need to start now if we want to build a grassroots campaign that can win. We need to hire organizers, build out our digital infrastructure, start mobilizing volunteers, and make a plan to knock tens of thousands of doors in our district. clean_body: Summer isn't a great time for political campaigns, friend, but our work is more urgent than ever. | | Friend, Summer isn't the best time for grassroots fundraising. Folks are out and about, and the 2026 election feels like it's a long way away. But our opponents are already attacking Marcy with every chance they get. If we wait until next year to fight back, it will already be too late. Friend, we need to start now if we want to build a grassroots campaign that can win. We need to hire organizers, build out our digital infrastructure, start mobilizing volunteers, and make a plan to knock tens of thousands of doors in our district. = | = | = ---|--- = | = = | = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your secure donation will go through immediately.
