name: Rev. Raphael Warnock
subject: Can I count on you to vote in the midterm elections?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Warnock for Georgia
body:
| | |
---
Friend,
At every turn, Donald Trump and Senate Republicans have made it clear as day: They are _not_ working for everyday folks.
But at no point was this _more_ clear than when they passed their disastrous budget bill – raising costs on virtually every American, stripping millions of their health care, and taking food away from hungry children. The same bill that includes a multi-trillion-dollar giveaway to billionaires and corporations.
It’s shameful.
Trump and his Republican allies in Congress truly believe they can sell out the American people to deliver a windfall to the special interests who fund their campaigns – all without paying any political consequences. **The midterm elections are our opportunity to prove them wrong. **
But if we’re going to vote them out so we can finally put a stop to their reckless and dangerous agenda, each and every one of us needs to raise our voices at the ballot box. **That’s why I’m asking every supporter I have to sign their name by midnight and commit to voting in the midterm elections. I’m counting on you, friend.**
[**So please: Add your name now to commit to voting in the 2026 midterm elections to help Democrats retake the Senate, flip the House, and put a stop to Trump’s Project 2025 agenda.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/113270311/563211055/1650889216?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&ask=5&amounts=250,100,50,25,5&code=jtk5570-su-nd&refcode=jtk5570-su-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTEvMS85MDkwMSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjYWY1OWZhOS04Yzc4LWYwMTEtYjQ4MS02MDQ1YmRmZThlOWMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=MsqVnpcO5z6rSYMQioT1474GJUkti40vwcXIxgvimnM=&emci=b4c7002c-fd72-f011-8dc9-6045bda9d96b&emdi=caf59fa9-8c78-f011-b481-6045bdfe8e9c&ceid=1586379)

Rev. Raphael Warnock

clean_body: The poll also found that Ciattarelli’s false attacks are working | Peter, Another poll just came out showing a tight race between Mikie and her "100%" MAGA opponent, Jack Ciattarelli. 🔵 Sherrill 48% 🔴Ciattarelli 42% Undecided/Other 9% —Insider NJ While some may think New Jersey is solidly blue, this poll shows that we need to be doing everything we can to set Mikie up for success on Election Day. With less than 100 days to go, whether or not New Jersey stays blue will come down to a series of choices. Our campaign’s choices. Our opponent’s choices. The choices of far-right dark money groups in DC. And your choices. You see, this campaign is powered by grassroots supporters like you. = | | | = | = | = | = | = Thank you, Team Mikie * | | = Paid for and authorized by Gillen for NY. Hi Peter, I live by the Golden Rule: **“Do unto others as you would have them do unto you.”** From a little girl growing up during segregation to now serving in Congress, this mindset has served as a timeless reminder to stay grounded and connect with my peers, despite how they may treat me. Everyone I encounter is greeted with a smile — and if it’s not returned, I do not let that stop me from greeting the next person with another smile. Because through my years I’ve learned that if you treat people fairly, they tend to reciprocate. And when you care about others, people take notice — it can catapult you to heights you could have never imagined, like Congress. [To keep our campaign on track, my team has set a $5,000 fundraising goal to reach by Friday at midnight. Will you please pitch in $10 or anything you can today?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/113270466/563211610/1675519574?amount=10&source=SBD_VF_EM_FR_081325_MM01_180DO_D1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzMvMS85NTc5MyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2YzVkMjM3ZC04ZDc4LWYwMTEtYjQ4MS02MDQ1YmRmZThlOWMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=GFIN6cbjM2opiiRIZqtF3buijpVhbKVANzZGAssvC_E=) | If you've stored your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will process now.

My work in Congress is guided by the principles I grew up on. I’ll never lose sight of what it means to look out for your neighbors and ensure everyone has a seat at the table.
In a district as diverse as NC-04, it takes a whole lot of perseverance to usher in progress that accounts for everyone. And Peter, that is exactly why I do what I do.
[I will never stop fighting for a brighter future for my home district. But I can’t do this on my own — can I count on you to donate today? clean_body: Do unto others as you would have them do unto you. If you’d like to unsubscribe, | | = Hi Peter, I live by the Golden Rule: “Do unto others as you would have them do unto you.” From a little girl growing up during segregation to now serving in Congress, this mindset has served as a timeless reminder to stay grounded and connect with my peers, despite how they may treat me. Everyone I encounter is greeted with a smile — and if it’s not returned, I do not let that stop me from greeting the next person with another smile. Because through my years I’ve learned that if you treat people fairly, they tend to reciprocate. And when you care about others, people take notice — it can catapult you to heights you could have never imagined, like Congress. = | If you've stored your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will process now. | = | = | = | = | = | = My work in Congress is guided by the principles I grew up on. I’ll never lose sight of what it means to look out for your neighbors and ensure everyone has a seat at the table. In a district as diverse as NC-04, it takes a whole lot of perseverance to usher in progress that accounts for everyone. And Peter, that is exactly why I do what I do. = = Thank you, Valerie * | | | ---|---|--- = Valerie is fighting to protect access to health care, working families, and to reform our criminal justice system. But she needs your help to continue to do this great work in Congress. | | Dear Friend of Liberty,

**You have been selected to represent citizens in your state in Hillsdale College's National Survey on Socialism. You can complete your survey at the link below: **

[**https://info.hillsdale.edu/socialism-survey**](http://links.redconservatives.com/s/c/x8wUYZzlamRrLnxnAZbvWwS8WuHtIWepkBnAgxM6kOoB1mv3Mg8ww9Lg3Mq0V1uiQwH_t6-YRlCIJUwuLwlx_UZLpfCttmLwJidL46QjAx5l1JouON1AatghZTclHyTSXyFO_5K_SiMk_IldqQq2YADveTjH9gaZWNY4yP6Rkxlecau81q9w30b9E7tQOpFtpb5BamOhYfqUHBD2w9DHjF4m_Bn_mAFIzkFuSSptrCUTKhPseMecpybGSyjWhUvZfGzO9hUFOEixHbT_2ma4O1HD7gZis1KvciQ5ORWuUiIwFl2rF0LKz6BOgBJSUoxpQ7-qH3aggdXUnzLk9aR9iDv4HxYlaNfnnL_YATTKPaQsLVJgI9ybrEcFRM9qyjQfrBgXCY7h_6dvfUVn_e7S-ONIRucDQGm4sgL41dIYgMf0HC0f-kbJdr8LF8mreYLH81Tq0XwcMkA8xUdPklSipH9IDx3wsGTRYkZl-l1DYY-8jl6f-7k_e2jQCWXhEWa4Sfv1cHOO0cpY1hLVoia0Qj4a1IVBbMVGxpdiVgvcghjBMkqcwwU1qJWHqS3_lTgb2z6AvVpGkHbJtxNnaZfLdHdrZ9U_FvsVQqJp7bcXlwGosBqY9KBwJReUr9uTgGcZVKBMM69xJ9Z5EQcXYU_oKHlEDDKdyUzmKF4pW7epj3-YrGQVXt66HQw-GuuQVkbP8n1ZZ0dkAQj_OJYohNajRrkvTHzU2CQ/MduLYy5nAs5Hb8BMnUHfu3lVA5HLtavD/11)

With your response, you will represent your state as part of a major sampling of opinion that can help us more clearly understand real Americans' views--views that will interest policymakers and opinion leaders.

A recent poll showed that over half of Generation Z is likely to vote for candidates with socialist positions. We have seen some of this in recent elections.

Recently, voters in America's largest city nominated a self-avowed socialist to be mayor. Some of his proposals include...
* Banning ICE agents from city limits

* Establishing city-owned grocery stores

* Instituting a $30-an-hour minimum wage

* Replacing the police with social workers

**In short, this candidate will bring _real, unapologetic socialism_ to America.**

**Why did this happen? **

For one thing, too many young Americans have not been taught what socialism really means or the dismal history of its failures wherever it has been tried.

For another, too many are no longer being taught about America's great heritage of liberty and the importance of the Constitution to freedom.

This is because of the "progressive" Left's increasing success in hijacking American education at both the K-12 and college levels. **So, it 's no surprise that those who support socialist candidates tend to be college-educated!**

In the face of these efforts to indoctrinate the young and undermine informed patriotism, **Hillsdale 's educational outreach is needed now more than ever.**

By responding to **Hillsdale College 's National Survey on Socialism**, your honest opinions will help us understand the rise of socialism and form the most effective strategy to **reach** and **teach** increasing millions of Americans on behalf of liberty.

We hope to hear from friends representing every part of the country--Americans like you, who still revere our founding principles of liberty, as set forth in the Declaration of Independence, and which form the foundation of our Constitution.

If you agree, please represent your state and take **Hillsdale College 's National Survey on Socialism** today.

[**https://info.hillsdale.edu/socialism-survey**](http://links.redconservatives.com/s/c/a8xE3eXItBnb6kILH4HHdvKqcU9uMijYujlbAV4AKTkUdCJynrC6_dBbzQKdH1axwDiQzrf0ggTfu32JL8d4iubgOx_naRWq0tbN3ZScs_buQA7RVyN8LkYNon7OLIXF2fpfMVcbOxaX4iUeuKe8_uHuqZSUZIHEiuzl21W067O6_2HGMes-jWl_Xn6K_D0YPSmd4XCSVm8S6OWL8wRFRalC0CHN6aJTW0Tw1HJQoWzrJqLMcc3HGbPnbYBJxoNxlyc8N8U3zWrTt6oxXSoQOch53EweG4MjgQMc6xM7G_epjD_Zc-qtB4FGBtfrkO1XY1Q1zMbeBa7Tw1kW9Dzb9LZBWT1Z8dSP8mCyo-4-JyvWJ_rosP9Q7zHKmv126aVjoYgjahYT-swxxSs6TO-0uRWa6dAM3YHmQuo7ONYjjPGU2R12g2xfm0O11865Ocslxn45JW_LhQzLOgZqEWPyApucA3AHJR5YW7RCPYV_YLz6s8s8lqVCtAVB7zM44rYA_cShuHpYYoP5G_t6pDH3M9J7D-iSXukAUGl5y_L7YZ0FYefafdlx9knU0exDyBr1YregT5N2tuW_kky11NkBDiZ6LkQKS7l9-G5oLQvm3I1-tLOcTP30S5Wk_sEjzgfVkXFak6Mpnmpimk_TDnICHWeyGhL4kNWsUjKMtwI4agTwh8zu3psyy0tngKIQYkKWW2C9-RvDc_sNXYWHNMurtmK-eyQFY40/kZKbvSlNP4rv4HYcAma3NPqyAJ9lbuBT/11)

In the face of socialism's recent success, we must remember: **it is never too late to preserve and defend liberty through education.**

clean_body: You have been selected to represent citizens in your state in Hillsdale College’s National Survey on Socialism. | | Please see a special message from our sponsor. If you would like to unsubscribe, visit this | | | | Dear Friend of Liberty, You have been selected to represent citizens in your state in Hillsdale College's National Survey on Socialism. You can complete your survey at the link below: With your response, you will represent your state as part of a major sampling of opinion that can help us more clearly understand real Americans' views--views that will interest policymakers and opinion leaders. A recent poll showed that over half of Generation Z is likely to vote for candidates with socialist positions. We have seen some of this in recent elections. Recently, voters in America's largest city nominated a self-avowed socialist to be mayor. Some of his proposals include... Banning ICE agents from city limits Establishing city-owned grocery stores Instituting a $30-an-hour minimum wage Replacing the police with social workers In short, this candidate will bring real, unapologetic socialism to America. Why did this happen? For one thing, too many young Americans have not been taught what socialism really means or the dismal history of its failures wherever it has been tried. For another, too many are no longer being taught about America's great heritage of liberty and the importance of the Constitution to freedom. This is because of the "progressive" Left's increasing success in hijacking American education at both the K-12 and college levels. So, it 's no surprise that those who support socialist candidates tend to be college-educated! In the face of these efforts to indoctrinate the young and undermine informed patriotism, Hillsdale 's educational outreach is needed now more than ever. By responding to Hillsdale College 's National Survey on Socialism, your honest opinions will help us understand the rise of socialism and form the most effective strategy to reach and teach increasing millions of Americans on behalf of liberty. We hope to hear from friends representing every part of the country--Americans like you, who still revere our founding principles of liberty, as set forth in the Declaration of Independence, and which form the foundation of our Constitution. If you agree, please represent your state and take Hillsdale College 's National Survey on Socialism today. In the face of socialism's recent success, we must remember: it is never too late to preserve and defend liberty through education. You can easily make your gift after completing the National Survey on Socialism, which you can access at this secure link: Warm regards, Labin Duke, Th.M. Associate Vice President National Donor Outreach Hillsdale College | |

name: Working Families Party
subject: THIS SATURDAY: Fight the Trump Takeover
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Working Families Party PAC (77 Sands St
body:
| | | Peter, Donald Trump is testing how far he can go to rig the 2026 midterm elections in his favor — **and he’s starting in Texas.** Right now, Republicans in Texas are trying to ram through a gerrymandered congressional map that would hand Trump _five_ more seats in Congress. Not because voters asked for it, but because they know the actions of the Trump regime are incredibly unpopular and that they can’t win fair and square. And Trump’s made it clear: **if he gets away with this in one state, he’ll take the same playbook to Missouri, Ohio, Florida — any other red state where he can bully the GOP to twist the rules to keep himself and his allies in power.** But we aren’t backing down. Texas Democrats have left the state to block the vote, risking fines and arrest to defend our democracy and highlight the stakes of this Trump power play. They’re standing up for their constituents, and for every single one of us. **Now it’s our turn to stand with them.** [**This Saturday, August 16th, we’re joining a National Day of Action to rally national attention and do all way can to stop Trump’s takeover before it spreads. >From state capitols to city halls, we’ll rally for fair maps, free elections, and a government that works for the people.**](https://an.workingfamilies.org/ss/c/u001.XaF8mXqsA6b2dSPmhsleMbGj-ca0TYSsYMZBvIweYdJkalgGDBvre74NDkUbsqI77O2q6wBPqRkSnaieMQL5GmIrjfdVhYYbzDBGtWkpky-88FIp6LFOh5Tb_YojJ_j9s0FfgbhFkX9_LHlXhvUcY67qt-DqP47IHE7qORakZFO_tTOVAcX7AivHQKqgybF9mopsQapplZnTc59cHuzSIYfRHp5ojUV5RM3Hjn3GSJGHFJlNMhHycj4lXyQV0MoErObbQ9TftskunnA7hYVNH5tcdu1CqOWQBqRYA15OAdHaDcYQ65z3r_cXOR2r_bSbQdJ6FvSGJtjvodv6xDqADuLhZ9LZA8JfHm8ulIBWD83S2Cv3M-TW1POI6KwaBlvqL5lu6ea70hjXDQF4cnYC_zLFkeMrgic8PB6C_YRPcoEBU7HQNRNAqkP61qKfXevtuPgZ5t7GsOwkchafKTL7oNE8pHPPglSxHSq5YSmxPKTHI8j6rApWBxzqI67pk81p/4j0/3JqdzrrfT8q6fWSWFM5YKA/h0/h001.tVzamJM5rVkYRUqlmyFcUwUlIz4VeG45T30QR9BGDZA) Trump and his allies are betting that we’ll be too distracted, too divided, or too tired to fight back. But they’re wrong. We’ve stopped them before, and together, we’ll do it again. clean_body: | | | Peter, Donald Trump is testing how far he can go to rig the 2026 midterm elections in his favor — and he’s starting in Texas. Right now, Republicans in Texas are trying to ram through a gerrymandered congressional map that would hand Trump five more seats in Congress. Not because voters asked for it, but because they know the actions of the Trump regime are incredibly unpopular and that they can’t win fair and square. And Trump’s made it clear: if he gets away with this in one state, he’ll take the same playbook to Missouri, Ohio, Florida — any other red state where he can bully the GOP to twist the rules to keep himself and his allies in power. But we aren’t backing down. Texas Democrats have left the state to block the vote, risking fines and arrest to defend our democracy and highlight the stakes of this Trump power play. They’re standing up for their constituents, and for every single one of us. Now it’s our turn to stand with them. Trump and his allies are betting that we’ll be too distracted, too divided, or too tired to fight back. But they’re wrong. We’ve stopped them before, and together, we’ll do it again. When we rise together — across states, zip codes, and neighborhoods — we become the check on a system being twisted to serve Trump and his allies. We decide our future. Not them. Not any politician who treats democracy like their personal property. Let’s make that message loud and clear this Saturday. In solidarity, Working Families Party Thoughts? Feedback? We want to hear it. Reply directly to this email and let us know. This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. If you received this email as a forward and want to get the latest updates from the Working Families Party directly, The Working Families Party is the party of the multiracial working class, fighting for a nation that cares for all of us. Wanna learn more? And if you need to update your contact information, Other political groups have corporate donors. But we can pool our resources too. Paid for by Working Families Party PAC (77 Sands St. #6, Brooklyn, NY, 11201). | | Sent via . name: Team Blue Dogs
subject: The path to a majority
body:

When Democrats have a problem such as laundering money, commiting crimes or other nefarious activities, the response is to launch investigations into Donald Trump. This pattern emerges with Hillary Clinton and the protection racket surrounding Hillary just as the FBI was called off from their criminal investigation of her and the Clinton Foundation. This led to the Russian collusion hoax on Trump. When Joe Biden had a problem with Hunter Biden and his dealings in Ukraine, Democrats presented their first impeachment on President Trump. When Joe Biden had classified documents in his garage, they raided Mar a Lago. As the Russiagate hoax unravels even more, twenty whistleblowers have come forth confirming that Barack Obama, his chief of staff and CIA Director John Brennan created the false Russia hoax and doctored intelligence to overthrow the duly elected president of the United States in 2016. A former Democrat Intelligence Committee staffer turned whistleblower says that in 2017 Adam Schiff personally approved leaking classified information on Russia to smear Donald Trump. Even worse, Barack Obama gave an interview to NPR saying that Russia helped Donald Trump win the election before the CIA had even begun its report. Is this the smoking gun on Obama's treason? Investigative reporter John Solomon is back today with a bombshell, Solomon reports that in the coming days Kash Patel and the FBI will be able to name names on what government officials were protecting Hillary Clinton and her foundation as the FBI had reason to believe the Clinton Foundation was a back door for corruption. Most importantly, can Kash Patel and the FBI along with Pam Bondi and the Trump DOJ navigate these waters efficiently to tie 2016 Russia hoax to 2024 Trump lawfare and successfully execute the grand conspiracy case so that history doesn't repeat itself?

body:
You're not going to believe this, Peter.

Again and again, Donald Trump has celebrated the January 6th insurrectionists who stormed the Capitol and beat up cops in his name. He even made it his top priority to pardon these cop beaters and rioters on his first day in office.
_Now, he’s got one of them working in the Justice Department._
Instead of condemning the violence of one of their employees, the Trump administration called Wise a “valued member of the Justice Department.”
Pathetic.
I’ve spent much of my life serving this country—first in the Navy, and now in Congress. So I won’t sit by while Trump and his administration undermine our democracy and threaten our freedoms.
[**I’m committed to fighting for this country and pushing back on any Trump administration betrayal—and I need your help. clean_body: MSNBC: New video shows Justice Dept. official urging Jan. 6 rioters to ‘kill’ police officers Police bodycam footage from the January 6th insurrection shows Jared Wise berating police officers. Want to know what he yelled repeatedly as cops protecting the Capitol were attacked? “Kill ‘em.” Today? This guy is a senior advisor for the Department of Justice. Derek, insurrectionists should be nowhere near the DOJ. This administration is rotten to the core. Patriotic Americans like those here in Western PA have nothing but disdain for cop beaters and killers and want to defend our democracy—and we’ll never let Trump and these extremists live this betrayal down. = | | = Again and again, Donald Trump has celebrated the January 6th insurrectionists who stormed the Capitol and beat up cops in his name. He even made it his top priority to pardon these cop beaters and rioters on his first day in office. Now, he’s got one of them working in the Justice Department. Instead of condemning the violence of one of their employees, the Trump administration called Wise a “valued member of the Justice Department.” Pathetic. If you find value in these unfiltered deep dives into Trump's playbook and the fight for democracy, become a paid subscriber today](https://substack.com/redirect/acb9d263-987d-4abf-978f-62cac23cdfbf?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) [👇](https://substack.com/redirect/acb9d263-987d-4abf-978f-62cac23cdfbf?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)**
[Upgrade to Paid](https://substack.com/redirect/acb9d263-987d-4abf-978f-62cac23cdfbf?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
Hey folks,
Don Lemon and I dig deep into Trump's dangerous power plays -- from militarizing D.C. to redistricting on steroids -- and why it's all about clinging to power, not helping people or improving their lives. We also get real about what Democrats must do right now: clarity, authenticity, and some damn fire in the belly.
Here's where the action kicks in:
* **00:01:25** -- Why Trump's militarized D.C. stunt is more about distraction than safety -- and how it's pulling the FBI off actual crime fighting.
* **00:03:29** -- The GOP's mid-game redistricting scheme: how it warps democracy and why it signals deep political weakness.
* **00:08:56** -- The "Epstein derangement syndrome" effect -- depressing Trump's base and igniting the opposition.
* **00:14:01** -- The candidates voters are willing to take a risk on -- and the brutal truth about why establishment types keep losing.
* **00:22:01** -- Shocking scenes from Georgetown's empty streets -- camo-clad federal agents strolling while real crimes go uninvestigated.

If hearing the unvarnished truth about all this matters to you -- if you believe in arming yourself with the kind of context you won't get on cable news -- **[become a paid subscriber right now. It keeps this work independent, urgent, and fearless.](https://substack.com/redirect/acb9d263-987d-4abf-978f-62cac23cdfbf?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)**
[ Upgrade to Paid](https://substack.com/redirect/acb9d263-987d-4abf-978f-62cac23cdfbf?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
With urgency,
--Mike

name: Dr. Robert Jeffress
subject: What if Jesus Taught Your Next Bible Study?
body:
Please read the following message from our sponsor.
-------------------------

[https://click.em.dcdailyjournal.com/t/c/2cf88683e6b64a50afb02d2f453bcd9b-e06517f64fc14b3e82b010b985b9d0f3/63]

Dear Friend,

What would you do if Jesus Himself taught your next Bible study? What
if the greatest preacher who ever lived laid out—in just a few
minutes—exactly what matters most in life?

That’s what He did in the Sermon on the Mount.

In just 18 minutes, Jesus delivered the most powerful, practical, and
profound message ever preached. And that message is still changing
lives today.

That’s why I wrote _18 Minutes with Jesus_
[https://click.em.dcdailyjournal.com/t/c/2cf88683e6b64a50afb02d2f453bcd9b-e06517f64fc14b3e82b010b985b9d0f3/63].
In this book, I walk you through Jesus’ Sermon on the Mount with
fresh insight and real-life application. You’ll discover what Jesus
said about anxiety, forgiveness, ambition, relationships, and eternal
reward—and how His words can transform your life starting today.

I want to send you a copy as my thank-you when you give a generous
gift to support _Pathway to Victory_.

When you support this ministry, you are doing more than receiving a
book—you are helping share the unchanging truth of Scripture with
people across 193 countries who desperately need to hear the gospel.

Make your gift today and request _18 Minutes with Jesus_:

https://secure.ptv.org/18minutes-with-jesus-generousgift-1

It’s time to hear directly from the Savior.

In Christ,
Dr. Robert Jeffress

clean_body: | | | ** Elizabeth Guzman just got an “F” ... from the National Rifle Association. As a former VA State Delegate, Elizabeth Guzman helped pass some of the strongest gun safety laws in Virginia’s history - including universal background checks and a crackdown on interstate gun trafficking. Now, she’s running to return to the VA House of Delegates against Ian Lovejoy - who proudly sports an NRA “A.” Democrats are defending a 51-49 majority in the Virginia House of Delegates this November. The nonpartisan election forecasters at State Navigate say Elizabeth has a good chance to FLIP VA-HD22 blue.** Instead of the NRA, Elizabeth is a proud Moms Demand Action Gun Sense Candidate. We need your help to win. If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately. Thanks for your support, Team Guzman | Democrat is running for Delegate in Virginia's 22nd District. She came to America as a single mother, becoming a union leader and one of the first Latinas in the Virginia General Assembly. She passed stronger gun safety laws, expanded collective bargaining rights and paid sick leave, and protected reproductive rights. To donate by check, send to: Friends of Elizabeth Guzman PO Box 74, Nokesville VA, 20182 \- \- Paid for by Friends of Elizabeth Guzman. name: Trent Staggs
subject: Defend the Caucus. Restore Our Elections. Lead the Revolution
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Trent Staggs_
body:
| | | [ ](https://trentstaggs.us21.list-manage.com/track/click?u=b4d3a67df0780c81313473198&id=190abc4569&e=048116bc24)
---
| | Friends,

Just weeks after launch, _Heirs of the Revolution: Our Civic Duty to Restore Our Republic_ has become a **#1 New Release** —and it’s still holding strong in the bestseller rankings. I’m humbled by your incredible support and the overwhelming response from patriots across the country.

In the book, I make it clear—if we want to save this nation, we must start by securing our elections. That begins right here in Utah, with us.

The answer is **restoring and defending the caucus system** \- a system that empowers neighbors to select the best candidates through real conversations, genuine vetting, and accountability. The caucus ensures that you, not big-money interests or outside influencers, determine who represents our values.

As delegates, you are the front line. By standing strong for the caucus, we protect our elections, our candidates, and ultimately, our Republic.

As evidenced by its best seller rankings, this message is resonating across the country. And it’s not just readers taking notice—some of the nation’s most respected conservative voices are standing with us:
* **Kash Patel** , Director of the FBI and author of Government Gangsters: “I’ve long known Trent as an America First champion with the backbone to do what we need to have done. With Heirs of the Revolution, he sheds light on important issues while displaying his strength, tenacity, and love for his country.”
* **Charlie Kirk** , Founder of Turning Point USA: “He will never cave to the establishment DC cabal in his quest to restore our republic.”
* **Kari Lake** , Trump Administration Official: “Trent outlines what American patriots must do to make sure our country is free and prosperous for future generations.”
* **Senator Mike Lee** , Utah’s leading constitutional conservative: “In this can’t-miss book, he explains exactly what our founders intended—and more importantly, how we get back to that today.”

**Here’s how you can help right now:**
* **Buy your copy today** and help keep [_Heirs of the Revolution_](https://trentstaggs.us21.list-manage.com/track/click?u=b4d3a67df0780c81313473198&id=f6822d3df6&e=048116bc24) at the top of the charts. [AMAZON LINK](https://trentstaggs.us21.list-manage.com/track/click?u=b4d3a67df0780c81313473198&id=ecf45f5c73&e=048116bc24)
* **Leave a review on Amazon** \- your voice helps get this message into more hands.
* **Stand for the caucus system** \- speak up in precinct and county meetings.

Our founders intended for _We the People_ —not political elites—to chart the course of this nation. The caucus is our strongest tool to make that vision a reality. Let’s defend it, let’s grow this movement, and let’s show America that Utah leads the way in restoring our Republic.

Yours in freedom,
**Trent Staggs**
---

body:
Unlike our opponent, our strategy to flip Virginia blue depends on the small donations of people like you.

[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/113271651/563215639/830632682?refcode=BLU_EM_ASFG_2025-08-13_2&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjQvMS8xMDM4NTgiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiNzkyMTY1ZjgtOTE3OC1mMDExLWI0ODEtNjA0NWJkZmU4ZTljIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=YhWl8shcQtzpeco0fVvkVb50Q225UHKVffS0GlOa9R4=)
👋 To all of our supporters,
We know you're receiving loads of emails and texts asking for money right now, but we kindly ask that you read this message from beginning to end.
Here's the key point: **Virginia has no limits on how much an individual can donate to a candidate.**
That means megadonors aligned with Donald Trump can commit millions of dollars to Winsome Earle-Sears for her campaign to spend on attack ads. _And that's precisely what they've done._
Unlike our opponent, our strategy to flip Virginia blue depends on the small donations of people like you.
_And when we say small donations, we mean it._
This month, our average gift is around $30. It adds up fast when everybody who is in a position to give rises to the occasion.
But now, with less than three months until Election Day, we need a surge of contributions to keep airing ads, organizing on the ground, and reaching the pivotal voters of this election.
**[Will you stand with Abigail today, Peter? clean_body: Unlike our opponent, our strategy to flip Virginia blue depends on the small donations of people like you. = 👋 To all of our supporters, We know you're receiving loads of emails and texts asking for money right now, but we kindly ask that you read this message from beginning to end. Here's the key point: Virginia has no limits on how much an individual can donate to a candidate. That means megadonors aligned with Donald Trump can commit millions of dollars to Winsome Earle-Sears for her campaign to spend on attack ads. And that's precisely what they've done. Unlike our opponent, our strategy to flip Virginia blue depends on the small donations of people like you. And when we say small donations, we mean it. This month, our average gift is around $30. It adds up fast when everybody who is in a position to give rises to the occasion. But now, with less than three months until Election Day, we need a surge of contributions to keep airing ads, organizing on the ground, and reaching the pivotal voters of this election. = = = = = = = We appreciate your support! 💙 Spanberger for Governor HQ By submitting your phone number you're agreeing to receive periodic text messages from the Spanberger for Governor campaign. Message & data rates may apply. Text HELP for more info. Text STOP to stop receiving messages. . Paid for by Spanberger for Governor Spanberger for Governor P.O. name: Team Gillibrand
subject: Defend love, dignity and justice — chip in to protect equality
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Gillibrand for Senate
body:
Ten years after marriage equality, the Supreme Court may undo it all.
Ten years ago, the Supreme Court gave millions of LGBTQ+ Americans a victory that felt like freedom — the right to marry who they love. Now, that victory is on the line. Kim Davis — the clerk who refused to issue marriage licenses to same-sex couples — is asking the Court to overturn _Obergefell v. Hodges_ , threatening the dignity and freedom of millions. If the Court takes up this case, it could pave the way for states to strip away marriage rights from millions of Americans — including nearly 600,000 couples who have wed since the ruling and the countless families they’ve built. This is not just a legal battle — it’s a direct assault on our dignity, our families and our future. Senator Kirsten Gillibrand has been a fierce champion for LGBTQ+ rights her entire career, fighting discrimination and standing up for love and equality. [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/113271681/563215783/246949951?amount=10&refcode=LOC_EM_FR_2025.08.13_Gay-Rights_B2_F1_S1_C1_45AC_N-T0&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTkvMS83MjcyMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0MDczNzU0MC05Mjc4LWYwMTEtYjQ4MS02MDQ1YmRmZThlOWMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=bsP0G9PxU9K9X8UEVcYtAD5EtC-6Y6aVjIeN3bWgdeU=) **But she can’t do it alone.** With your support, Kirsten and Democrats across the country will fight back — pushing for laws, policies and candidates who will defend equality and justice. name: Hunter, Team Miyares
subject: DC crime is in the news — here’s the part they missed
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Miyares for Virginia |
body:
Jay Jones’ failed record is in the headlines again| | | Friend,
You’ve probably seen the headlines this week about Washington, DC’s crime crisis — and how the federal government is taking action.

But here’s what those headlines aren’t saying: **this problem didn’t start last week.**

**Jay Jones** was part of the ‘dream team’ that helped pave the way during his stint as Assistant Attorney General in DC. He served less than a year — but in that short time:
---
* 📈 Violent crime rose **24.3%**
* 🚨 Murders jumped **28.5%**
* ⚠️ Folks were carjacked nearly **every single day**
* 🛑 DC became **America's most dangerous city** — with a crime rate **207% higher** than the national average

And now? We’re seeing the full consequences of his failed policies on the national stage.
---

subject: Have you seen our just announced bold new plan?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the New Democrat Coalition Action Fund
body:
This is how Democrats can lower costs, create jobs, and keep America competitive. Look:

| [ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/113271837/563216291/-2140435400?refcode=header-img&amount=25&&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS84Mjc1NSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlZTNhMDMwNy05Mzc4LWYwMTEtYjQ4MS02MDQ1YmRmZThlOWMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=R3pHbM6O3u9jW3lQEOggFSx74_P5flWwdNaHNHI7wXM=)
---
**Team, families are being squeezed by rising health care costs, soaring housing prices, and the growing impacts of climate change.** **[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/113271838/563216292/-93286155?amount=10&refcode=NDCAF_20250813_EMDF_E2_T0_AC&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS84Mjc1NSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlZTNhMDMwNy05Mzc4LWYwMTEtYjQ4MS02MDQ1YmRmZThlOWMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=R3pHbM6O3u9jW3lQEOggFSx74_P5flWwdNaHNHI7wXM=)** | **[CHIP IN $10 BEFORE MIDNIGHT TO HELP US ELECT A NEW DEM MAJORITY IN 2026](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/113271839/563216293/-93286155?amount=10&refcode=NDCAF_20250813_EMDF_E2_T0_AC&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS84Mjc1NSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlZTNhMDMwNy05Mzc4LWYwMTEtYjQ4MS02MDQ1YmRmZThlOWMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=R3pHbM6O3u9jW3lQEOggFSx74_P5flWwdNaHNHI7wXM=)**
---
That’s why New Dems just unveiled The Innovation Agenda, a forward-looking plan to:

✅ Create high-quality jobs in every community
✅ Lower costs for families
✅ Expand equitable access to education & workforce training
✅ Keep America on the cutting edge of research & technology

We plan to do all this _without_ leaving working people behind by building a regulatory environment that fosters competition and protects consumers.

**At a time when Democrats are looking for a path forward, New Dems are stepping up to offer a concrete vision for the future, and a plan to achieve it.**

And we’ll work across the aisle to deliver results. But to fully realize this vision, we _must_ elect a New Dem Majority in 2026.

name: Team Bynum
subject: Republicans cut funding for NPR and PBS
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Janelle Bynum for Congress
body:
Last month, Republicans voted to cut $1.1 billion in funding for NPR, PBS, and thousands of other public radio and television stations nationwide.

[ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/113271977/563216748/-629675555?refcode=email-header&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTkvMS8xMDY3MjEiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiYjlkOTkxNTgtOTQ3OC1mMDExLWI0ODEtNjA0NWJkZmU4ZTljIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=nst6TEr9tf-B7VqLdzkrM1Ms5ap9sNrUhLQbUssleSc=) _**Reuters: Corporation for Public Broadcasting to close after funding cut, in blow to local media**_ Last month, Republicans voted to cut $1.1 billion in funding for NPR, PBS, and thousands of other public radio and television stations nationwide. These funding cuts could affect more than 1,500 stations across the country and dozens here in Oregon. This is a disservice to the millions of Americans who rely on these media outlets for news and information — including Oregonians who depend on these programs for emergency alerts, especially during wildfire season. _And it’s all because Republicans want to cut spending they deem “wasteful.”_ **Providing information to people across the country isn’t wasteful — it’s essential to the safety and success of our communities.** This decision was dangerous and short-sighted, and it puts Oregonians in harm’s way. Janelle Bynum is standing up to these cuts and Republicans’ disastrous agenda every chance she can. And she won’t stop fighting to keep our communities safe. **[She’s fighting back against the attacks on our public media and working to hold Republicans accountable for their policies that hurt Oregonians. If you’re with her, please chip in now to support her fight to keep our communities safe and continue to amplify the needs of Oregonians in Congress.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/113271978/563216749/-629675555?refcode=email_081325_media&amounts=5,15,25,50,100&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTkvMS8xMDY3MjEiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiYjlkOTkxNTgtOTQ3OC1mMDExLWI0ODEtNjA0NWJkZmU4ZTljIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=nst6TEr9tf-B7VqLdzkrM1Ms5ap9sNrUhLQbUssleSc=)** _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_ | | | | [Donate $5 →](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/113271979/563216750/-629675555?refcode=email_081325_media&express_lane=true&amounts=5,15,25,50,100&amount=5&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTkvMS8xMDY3MjEiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiYjlkOTkxNTgtOTQ3OC1mMDExLWI0ODEtNjA0NWJkZmU4ZTljIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=nst6TEr9tf-B7VqLdzkrM1Ms5ap9sNrUhLQbUssleSc=)

# CHUCK NORRIS

|
# CHUCK NORRIS:
---
# **Fear Won’t Protect You, But This Will...**
---
| | **Fear Won’t Protect You, But This Will...**
---
| | Howdy, friend. In these uncertain times, fear is a common emotion. **But fear won't protect us, action will.** As devoted Christians, my wife Gena and I know the importance of trusting in God, but we also understand the importance of being responsible for ourselves and our families.
---

name: Elizabeth Warren
subject: Add your name if you’re with me: Private equity firms should not be allowed to gamble with Americans’ retirement savings.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Warren for Senate
body:
How is any of this good for Americans?

| | | [ ](https://act.elizabethwarren.com/go/216?t=3&akid=2617%2E4032634%2EBDOmpJ)
---
Are you saving for retirement with a 401(k)? If so — private equity billionaires want to make money off of you. If you’ve got a 401(k), the vast majority of it is probably invested in stocks and bonds. These are assets that are publicly traded, where companies are required to provide you with clear information about your investments. They also have to follow strict guardrails to protect your money from frauds and scams. Private equity firms, on the other hand, aren’t required to follow strong rules. They don’t have to give you clear information about their investments. And here’s the kicker: They charge huge fees and take a big cut off the top — sometimes as much as 20 percent. It would be one thing if these expensive, risky investments paid off. But recent data shows that private equity is _not even making their clients more money_ than just plain old stocks and bonds. So to sum it up: These private equity billionaires want to rake in even more cash by using your 401(k) to make their secretive investments. And they’re coordinating with the firms who manage 401(k)s to do it. The data shows it won’t make you richer — but it will make the private equity guys richer. **I’m fighting back. I’ve got some serious questions about how any of this is good for Americans saving for retirement. That’s why I’m probing Empower, one of the largest workplace retirement plan recordkeepers, about their recent decision to allow employers to include private equity firms as an investment option — and I won’t back down until the American people have answers.** [**Add your name if you’re with me: Private equity firms should not be allowed to gamble with Americans’ retirement savings.**](https://act.elizabethwarren.com/signup/ew-em-401kPE/?source=EMZ27B_FIN_E_20250813_V1S1&t=8&akid=2617%2E4032634%2EBDOmpJ) | [**ADD YOUR NAME**](https://act.elizabethwarren.com/signup/ew-em-401kPE/?source=EMZ27B_FIN_E_20250813_V1S1&t=9&akid=2617%2E4032634%2EBDOmpJ)
---
I’ve been raising the alarm about what private equity is doing to our economy for a while now. From beloved stores like Joann’s Fabrics, Party City, and Toys R Us, to neighborhood staples like Red Lobster, private equity firms bought up these businesses and hollowed them out. And each time they follow the same playbook.
Step one: A private equity firm buys a business like Red Lobster.
Step two: They strip the company of its assets to turn a profit. In the case of Red Lobster, this meant selling the land that their restaurants were built on.
Step three: Red Lobster starts drowning in debt trying to pay rent on the land it used to own and trying to pay off the private equity companies’ expensive fees.
Step four: Red Lobster, now saddled in debt, is forced to file for bankruptcy. Workers lose their jobs, people lose their retirement savings.
So why haven’t you heard about this whole scheme? Well, these private equity firms have also mastered the art of the cover-up. Private equity is one of the great unknown shapers of our economy — a handful of Wall Street firms that suck huge amounts of money out of industry by industry. And most people have never even heard of them.
With Red Lobster, they tried to tell us the restaurant just gave away too much shrimp. Or take Joann Fabrics — they claimed people don’t care about crafts anymore. Huh?
Private equity doesn’t discriminate when it comes to its looting wherever it can. Sometimes it’s a beloved franchise like Red Lobster or Toys R Us. Sometimes it’s a life-or-death industry, like firetruck manufacturing, hospital systems, nursing homes, or veterinary clinics.
**This time, it’s our 401(k)s, which is how countless Americans are able to retire with dignity and financial security.**
[**I’ll keep fighting to raise the alarm about these powerful, secretive forces shaping our economy. Add your name if you’re with me: powerful interests like Wall Street private equity firms should stay far, far away from retirement funds.**](https://act.elizabethwarren.com/signup/ew-em-401kPE/?source=EMZ27B_FIN_E_20250813_V1S1&t=10&akid=2617%2E4032634%2EBDOmpJ)
I’ll continue to use every tool in our toolbox to hold them accountable, fight back against their anti-competitive behavior, and protect consumers.
Thanks for being a part of this,
Elizabeth

---
| | | |
---
| [DONATE](https://act.elizabethwarren.com/go/3099?t=14&akid=2617%2E4032634%2EBDOmpJ)
---

name: Team Fetterman
subject: folks need to know exactly who's to blame
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Fetterman for PA
body:
# [](https://act.johnfetterman.com/go/50678?t=1&akid=10252%2E434096%2EuxlSfF)
| | |
---
Hi, Derek – Team Fetterman here with an update:
**First,** Trump and Republicans jammed through their Big, Ugly Bill – now _law_ – gutting Medicaid to pay for tax cuts for their rich buddies.
**Then,** word got out that 17 MILLION people will lose health insurance because of it. Folks started flooding GOP town halls, demanding answers.
**Now,** the damage is about to hit home:
👉 Sky-high medical bills – and a lot of people don’t even realize their insurance is backed by Medicaid.
👉 Rural hospitals forced to shut down – since Medicaid funding is critical to keeping them running.
👉 Seniors pushed out of nursing homes – because they can’t afford care anymore.
Republicans can’t defend this mess. So they’re doing what they always do: muddying the waters, stirring up culture war nonsense, and hoping voters are too confused and distracted to see what’s going on.
_So that’s where you come in._
Your donation helps us tell the truth far and wide so voters know exactly who’s to blame and what’s at stake.
**But we only have until Friday at midnight to hit our critical $30,000 mid-month goal, and we need your help.** We _can’t_ let Republicans off the hook. We need to show up strong – loud, clear, and fired up.
**[So we have to ask: Can you chip in $5, $25, or even $50 today to help us close the gap before Friday night?](https://act.johnfetterman.com/go/51531?t=2&akid=10252%2E434096%2EuxlSfF)**

## BLUE LETTER

We Need You. Help Us Save Our Democracy**_

### **In This Letter!**
**😁 David Shuster's Great video**
**👊 My Column**
**🥃 NYT Pitchbot's Hilarious Pitches**
**Cliff 's Note:** _**Next week we 'll try splitting this into two Wednesday letters, as some of you have told me this one's too long. You'll get my column + some Pitchbot. And you'll get a separate email w/ David's video + some pitchbot. We're doing all we can to make your experience the best possible! We'll send out a survey to that end, likely Friday**_
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/52a6695c-7d35-473e-8d1f-0ec2aa789f6d?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
Bakeries cannot be forced to sell cakes to gay couples. But farmers
market vendors can be forced to sell pierogis to pedophiles. by Samuel
Alito, Neil Gorsuch, Brett Kavanaugh, John Roberts, and Clarence
Thomas
### **DAVID SHUSTER VIDEO, EXCLUSIVELY FOR YOU!**
_**WATCH as David Shuster 's video shows us [J.D. Vance in all his glory](https://substack.com/redirect/35fa9ef0-4d4d-41a8-993b-01641c4f15e5?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)--supposedly defending Trump, yet ensuring the Epstein story keeps going!--and also proving Trump's brain is...mush.**_
[](https://substack.com/redirect/28e40433-db3f-4913-a607-6a23b89b736f?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
* * *
### **Cliff 's Note: Trump & MAGA Believe in the Sanctity of Their Marriage! And Their 2nd. And 3rd...**
Remember Kim Davis!? The Kentucky Fried corn hole who became a right-wing folk hero a decade ago for refusing to issue marriage licenses to gay couples. **Because** _**God**_**told her** she could ignore the Supreme Court.
God sure does work in mysterious ways. And by mysterious, I mean, maybe she/he should cast a wider net when choosing who to chat with.
This time, Kimmy is trying to drag her [super-duper crusade](https://substack.com/redirect/5d807e3f-e690-4e72-bc64-7c513e907a4b?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) against gay couples all the way to our _Opus Dei Court_! Where upside-down-flag Alito and the rest of the robed Republican thugs will likely try to rip away the rights of millions of LGBTQ Americans.
Trump, of course, has had zero to say about it, and that'll likely stay the same, [unless a bribery angle](https://substack.com/redirect/0ad07437-952d-42ac-9258-4bdc92b36d17?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) presents itself. Or he can [impose a tariff on it. Then TACO](https://substack.com/redirect/84de6309-f7b4-4dbd-b267-54df96f8d8b5?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg).
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/efc55ba2-b50c-4af4-b79c-a98cef05a20a?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
Because, remember, there is nothing--nuuuuuthing--as important as the _sanctity_ of **their** marriage (ok, [at least tied with sending in troops to try to get people to forget](https://substack.com/redirect/8a6b8f20-592e-48fb-877b-b798d335724d?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) **you 're Donald Trump and you're in the Epstein Files!)**
And whoa, does Kim-Kim know a thing or two about marriage! In fact, if we accept that one gains experience through the practice of an activity over and over again, Kim Davis is nothing short of the LeBron James or Tom Brady of marriage.
You see, Davis, who again is very concerned about the sanctity of marriage, has been married not once, not twice, not three times--but _four_ times! It's like she gets new husbands every time she calls out "bingo!" at the local Rowan County, KY rec center.
_Seriously, I was unaware one could turn getting married into a hobby._
But it gets better, as it always does with these masters of projection. Who pilot the bombardier of justice right through the cumulus clouds [to drop into the lives of others](https://substack.com/redirect/a911e159-ed3a-41a3-8b0f-95ff044fc344?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg), _while turning their own into an East Palestine, OH style train wreck_.
So ya see, Kim conceived twins with Husband #3 while she was still married to Husband #1. (Side note: what was Husband #2 doing during all this? Listening in next door and getting it all wrong like he was Chrissy from _Three 's Company?)_.
But this is ok when like Kim, you possess the silken image of class, kindness and an old world charm that bedevils the rest of us.
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/a0e7ce3d-09a0-4a05-ad05-a6ddf247756b?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
And this paragon of virtue has a lot in common with the perpetually moral Republican Party! Take Donald Trump, ya know, [the guy who speaks circular thought these days](https://substack.com/redirect/83e2e0fb-0065-4880-b776-0160ce9dff7b?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg).
He had five kids with three wives, publicly convinced a newspaper to put on its cover that his mistress, who'd become Wife #2, thought it was the "best sex ever." One moment, please, while I throw up everything I've eaten and not eaten the past 4 days.
Ok, back to our story. Later, Trump cheated on Wife #3, a nude model, with a porn star--all while his newborn son was just a few months old.
_How truly sanctity-like_!
Or how about Newt Gingrich, former GOP Speaker of the House and Trump Clown 1.0, who's had three wives. He served one divorce papers while she was in a hospital bed battling cancer, cheated on another with a staffer while impeaching Bill Clinton for...cheating on his wife.
_Sanctity of marriage, baby!_
And how about Rudy Giuliani? No, we're not talking about that crap dripping down his face. Or his audible farts that made it sound like Louis Armstrong was on trumpet to provide theme music while he was testifying--or shall we say falsifying?--election claims in Michigan.
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/afb71a33-2f57-4429-bfb2-578b948a5465?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
Rudy's also had three wives, the second of which he divorced by announcing it on live television--_without telling her_! As one does. And his first wife was his _cousin_.
_Sanctity-Level 5 Unlocked!_
But wait--there's more. This is the same crowd that shouts about imaginary "Democratic pedophile cabals" while covering for their own predators. The longest serving Republican House Speaker, Denny Hastert, went to prison for fondling teenage boys.
And then there's the one Trump's trying to distract his way out of,[ the Epstein files](https://substack.com/redirect/b6cdcf7c-ff6f-448a-b4c2-4582efc0ea8b?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)--btw, I haven't said it yet today: Release The Epstein Files! We know he appears in them prominently, he's an adjudicated rapist, was accused of rape by a 13-yr old and sexual assault by another 25 or so women.
_How sanctity-ish!_
The same politicians pushing _child marriage_ laws in Republican-led states. The same states and localities in our fine nation that don't vote Democratic, yet one can find a giant Lion's Den adult superstores right next to a huge cross (like when I was driving through Indiana to get from Chicago to Cincy on Monday).
**Which, btw, is** _**totally**_**the best metaphor for Kim Davis: an Adult Superstore next to a cross.**
Finally, how can we forget the gay Republicans who voted for [the tyrant Trump](https://substack.com/redirect/8a6b8f20-592e-48fb-877b-b798d335724d?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg), swearing he'd never go after marriage equality. Welcome to the FAFO Club, kids! You get to join Muslim Republicans in Michigan and Latinos for Trump like the "Trump burger" guy in Texas who just knew Trump would only deport the "criminals" but is [probably being taken to El Salvador by Dean Cain right now](https://substack.com/redirect/5d807e3f-e690-4e72-bc64-7c513e907a4b?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg).
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/e0e6e012-d66f-41a1-bd5f-c98ce3b3a43c?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
**Turns out, he wasn 't going to be **_**your**_**retribution. He was[always ever going to be retribution ](https://substack.com/redirect/4f9575cc-a856-4e38-b16e-f2d939cae962?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)**_**[against you](https://substack.com/redirect/4f9575cc-a856-4e38-b16e-f2d939cae962?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)**_**.**
So enough of the GD right-wing sanctimony and self-loathing that present themselves as life's losers who just can't leave the rest of us alone. Utterly exhausting.
I don't want to know the gross story of your four marriages, Kim. You, and the phlegmatic, ideologically geriatric, colony of agra beetles with whom you surround yourself. Want me to believe in God? Fine.
How about you all just f*king disappear? DONE.
Live your lives of dung-heaped, dope-saturated pretense, of non-stop failure and futility, somewhere... _anywhere the rest of us who developed along the lines projected for normal homo sapiens need not be cursed with the knowledge you exist._
But you won't, so we'll fight your attacks on our friends who love each other without apology. You know, those who don't need religion to render their love valid because they're busy shacking up with any warm body they happen to trip over.
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/52a6695c-7d35-473e-8d1f-0ec2aa789f6d?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
NIH scientists say that mRNA vaccines have saved untold thousands of
lives. A heroin addled nepo baby whose brain was partially eaten by a
worm says mRNA vaccines are worthless and even dangerous. For busy
medical patients, it can be hard to know who to trust.

name: James Carville
subject: I’m not BS-ing
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Jon Ossoff for Senate
body:
#

Peter, it’s James Carville.
Most people know by now I have a reputation for being a straight shooter.
_So you know I’m not BS-ing you when I say, the Georgia Senate race is going to be the**MOST IMPORTANT** election in the country in 2026. _
Republicans know this too — and they’re going ALL IN to defeat Jon Ossoff.
We don’t know yet who Jon’s opponent will be, but far-right extremists are jumping into this race left and right. _And it doesn’t take a genius to see that none of the options look good..._
→ Far-right extremist Mike Collins has a history of antisemitic, racist, and _downright offensive_ posts on social media — including a video where he **SHOT a fake voting machine.**
→ Fired and failed former Tennessee football coach Derek Dooley recently jumped into the race... and folks, he has no _**political experience_** and **failed to vote** in multiple presidential elections... Total bull.
→ And, ultra-rich MAGA loyalist Buddy Carter nominated Trump for the Nobel Peace Prize. This is the bozo behind the bill to **rename Greenland** “Red, White, and Blueland.”
_Where the hell did they find these guys?!_
Look, we can’t let ANY of these MAGA extremists near the Senate. But I won’t sugarcoat it: No matter who wins the GOP primary, this will be the most expensive and competitive Senate race in the country.
MAGA is going to throw everything but the kitchen sink at Jon to try and defeat him, so he needs supporters like you and me to step up and pitch in.
**[Peter, I’m going to be helping Jon shut down his Republican opponents before any of these extremists can get within spitting range of the Senate. Can I count on you to join me by chipping in $5 to his reelection campaign?**](https://act.electjon.com/go/32?c0=ossoff-em-august25.AuYWG3&refcode=em250813-1-f&t=1&akid=636%2E5691347%2EhhxyR_)
There couldn’t be a more important time for you to get off the sidelines. Thank you for stepping up today.
\- James Carville

Paid for by Jon Ossoff for Senate
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Thank you for supporting Jon Ossoff. Email is a critical way to keep up with Jon and his work in the US Senate, but you can click [here](https://act.electjon.com/signup/fewer-emails-signup/?t=2&akid=636%2E5691347%2EhhxyR_) to sign up to receive fewer emails, or click [here](https://act.electjon.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=3&akid=636%2E5691347%2EhhxyR_) if you'd like to unsubscribe.

name: Adam Schiff
subject: I’ve never needed you more
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR AND AUTHORIZED BY SCHIFF FOR SENATE
body:
[ https://act.adamschiff.com/go/62?t=1001&akid=8896%2E5257348%2EPqxWHw ]Adam Schiff for Senate

Derek, the
Trump administration is in panic mode. Approval ratings are dropping,
costs are rising, the latest jobs report was lousy, and reporters are
still asking about the Epstein files.

And they fear that the work I’m doing to expose the President’s corruption
is causing them real damage.

So Trump is doing what he does when backed into a corner — attacking his
rivals. Namely, me.

[ https://act.adamschiff.com/go/1014?c0=q32025_abs_em.sQXYU5&refcode=AU_ABS_FR_GEN_RES_AC90_20250813_PM1_V1_S1&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&t=1004&akid=8896%2E5257348%2EPqxWHw ]In the last few weeks, I have faced a raft of baseless accusations and
attacks. Online, in the White House press room, on Fox News (so many
times), and in the halls of the Justice Department. I’ve never needed you
more. Please, pitch in to stand with me and help me respond.

If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your
donation will go through immediately:

[ https://act.adamschiff.com/go/1015?c0=q32025_abs_em.yMOq2I&refcode=AU_ABS_FR_GEN_RES_AC90_20250813_PM1_V1_S1&email=&t=1005&akid=8896%2E5257348%2EPqxWHw ]EXPRESS DONATE $10

[ https://act.adamschiff.com/go/1016?c0=q32025_abs_em.Buknaj&refcode=AU_ABS_FR_GEN_RES_AC90_20250813_PM1_V1_S1&email=&t=1006&akid=8896%2E5257348%2EPqxWHw ]EXPRESS DONATE $25

[ https://act.adamschiff.com/go/1017?c0=q32025_abs_em.uHcj1U&refcode=AU_ABS_FR_GEN_RES_AC90_20250813_PM1_V1_S1&email=&t=1007&akid=8896%2E5257348%2EPqxWHw ]EXPRESS DONATE $50

[ https://act.adamschiff.com/go/1018?c0=q32025_abs_em.JaOjw6&refcode=AU_ABS_FR_GEN_RES_AC90_20250813_PM1_V1_S1&email=&t=1008&akid=8896%2E5257348%2EPqxWHw ]EXPRESS DONATE $100

[ https://act.adamschiff.com/go/1019?c0=q32025_abs_em.9BFHaA&refcode=AU_ABS_FR_GEN_RES_AC90_20250813_PM1_V1_S1&email=&t=1009&akid=8896%2E5257348%2EPqxWHw ]EXPRESS DONATE $250

[ https://act.adamschiff.com/go/1014?c0=q32025_abs_em.sQXYU5&refcode=AU_ABS_FR_GEN_RES_AC90_20250813_PM1_V1_S1&email=&t=1010&akid=8896%2E5257348%2EPqxWHw ]ANOTHER AMOUNT

Donald Trump called for me to be investigated and jailed on Truth Social:

[ https://act.adamschiff.com/go/1014?c0=q32025_abs_em.sQXYU5&refcode=AU_ABS_FR_GEN_RES_AC90_20250813_PM1_V1_S1&t=1011&akid=8896%2E5257348%2EPqxWHw ]Trump on Truth Social: Adam Schiff is a THIEF! He should be prosecuted,
just like they tried to prosecute me, and everyone else — The only
difference is, WE WERE TOTALLY INNOCENT, IT WAS ALL A GIANT HOAX!

Attorney General Pam Bondi revealed that none other than corrupt political
appointee Ed Martin would be investigating me after I blocked his
nomination for U.S. Attorney:

[ https://act.adamschiff.com/go/1014?c0=q32025_abs_em.sQXYU5&refcode=AU_ABS_FR_GEN_RES_AC90_20250813_PM1_V1_S1&t=1012&akid=8896%2E5257348%2EPqxWHw ]Pam Bondi

Then, FBI Director Kash Patel — a man with one of the most outrageous,
right-wing records of recent memory — spread defamatory lies about my
service as Intelligence Committee Chair during the Trump impeachment.

[ https://act.adamschiff.com/go/1014?c0=q32025_abs_em.sQXYU5&refcode=AU_ABS_FR_GEN_RES_AC90_20250813_PM1_V1_S1&t=1013&akid=8896%2E5257348%2EPqxWHw ]Kash Patel attacks Adam

And Press Secretary Karoline Leavitt added fuel to the fire by attacking
me by name during a White House press briefing:

[ https://act.adamschiff.com/go/1014?c0=q32025_abs_em.sQXYU5&refcode=AU_ABS_FR_GEN_RES_AC90_20250813_PM1_V1_S1&t=1014&akid=8896%2E5257348%2EPqxWHw ]Karoline Leavitt attacks

It even made the front page of Fox News’ website. (Not to mention on Fox
News television 20 times in just 24 hours, and counting...)

[ https://act.adamschiff.com/go/1014?c0=q32025_abs_em.sQXYU5&refcode=AU_ABS_FR_GEN_RES_AC90_20250813_PM1_V1_S1&t=1015&akid=8896%2E5257348%2EPqxWHw ]Karoline Leavitt attacks on Fox News website cover

These smears recycle false attacks from the first Trump Administration
that even the Barr Justice Department rejected as unfounded.

Derek, all of
these old, false, and recycled attacks are meant to distract people from
the real, pressing issues in our country. And of course, the Epstein
files.

And it’s payback. I once again have a target on my back for doing my job
and holding Trump and his team accountable — by leading Trump’s first
impeachment, serving on the January 6th Committee, and bringing down unfit
nominees like Ed Martin.

I won’t back down from this important work — but as the attacks escalate,
I need to respond to set the record straight. [ https://act.adamschiff.com/go/1014?c0=q32025_abs_em.sQXYU5&refcode=AU_ABS_FR_GEN_RES_AC90_20250813_PM1_V1_S1&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&t=1016&akid=8896%2E5257348%2EPqxWHw ]Please, pitch in to help

name: James Carville
subject: what the heck are you waiting for!?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Heartland Patriots (LucasKunce
body:
it’s going to take every one of us to pull off a big upset
[](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/93343?refcode=em20250813-heartland-patriots-rob-sand&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1&akid=9269%2E614464%2EqXgIQi)
Peter, if you’ve been following Iowa’s pivotal governor’s race, and you’ve yet to join Rob Sand’s campaign, I’ve got only one question for you:
**What the heck are you waiting for!?**
_I mean c’mon, Rob checks all the boxes: Born and raised in Iowa, a bowhunter, a dedicated public servant and, let’s get real —**Democrats' only shot at winning the Iowa Governor’s race.**_
Rob’s building a grassroots movement that’s growing by the day, and he’s doing that by speaking directly with Iowans in their communities, having the tough conversations.
**I’ve got plenty to say about this race, but before I go on:[Rob’s fundraising has taken a dip recently, so if you’ve been waiting to chip in to his campaign, well there’s no time like the present. Rob’s campaign has some big budget decisions coming up, so chipping in a split grassroots donation would go a long way!](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/93343?refcode=em20250813-9269&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=2&akid=9269%2E614464%2EqXgIQi)**
**[Split a Donation!](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/93343?refcode=em20250813-9269&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=3&akid=9269%2E614464%2EqXgIQi)**
Peter, it’s no freakin’ secret: Iowa has been trending in the wrong direction.
And if you’re looking for the root cause, then look no further than the national Republican insiders who have been calling the shots for years.
Iowa Republicans are a mess right now, and they’re clambering over one another to try and lock down the backing of the same special interests who want to drag Iowa backwards.
**I’m not just blowing smoke, Peter: This is very much a winnable race, and Rob’s currently in the driver’s seat.**
_But that won’t count for diddly squat if he doesn’t have the resources to fight back against partisan attacks. They know Rob’s a threat, and they’ll spend millions to try to stop him._
But going head to head with these partisans and the special interests backing them won’t be easy, and it ain’t going to be cheap, either.
**[So will you help Rob’s campaign get their fundraising back on track by splitting a $25 donation with Heartland Patriots today? We’ve got a chance to do something pretty special in Iowa, but it’s going to take every one of us to pull off a big upset.](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/93343?refcode=em20250813-9269&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=4&akid=9269%2E614464%2EqXgIQi)**
If you've stored your info with ActBlue Express, we'll process your contribution instantly:
[Contribute $10](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/93344?refcode=em20250813-9269&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amount=10&t=5&akid=9269%2E614464%2EqXgIQi) [Contribute $25](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/93344?refcode=em20250813-9269&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amount=25&t=6&akid=9269%2E614464%2EqXgIQi) [Contribute $30](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/93344?refcode=em20250813-9269&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amount=30&t=7&akid=9269%2E614464%2EqXgIQi) [Contribute $50](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/93344?refcode=em20250813-9269&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amount=50&t=8&akid=9269%2E614464%2EqXgIQi) [Contribute $100](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/93344?refcode=em20250813-9269&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amount=100&t=9&akid=9269%2E614464%2EqXgIQi) [Contribute $250](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/93344?refcode=em20250813-9269&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amount=250&t=10&akid=9269%2E614464%2EqXgIQi) [Give another amount](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/93343?refcode=em20250813-9269&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=11&akid=9269%2E614464%2EqXgIQi)

name: VoteVets.org
subject: 🪖 An important message for every VoteVets supporter... 🇺🇸🫡
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY VOTEVETS, VOTEVETS
body:
Peter - please, don’t click away before reading.
#
Peter - please, don’t click away before reading.
When we think about the people who have done the most to support VoteVets over the years, it’s not the people who write the biggest checks who come to mind.
It’s the people who were there when everything was on the line.
Like you, Peter.

Your support, voice, and participation have helped us run some of the most powerful and impactful ads out there. It has helped us continue to be one of the most impactful and effective organizations in politics, even with all that Trump throws our way.
Your support helps us win races that otherwise wouldn’t even be competitive.
It’s helped us fight for things that matter most to Veterans. It has stopped more efforts to privatize the VA than we can count. It won things like the PACT Act, ensuring Veterans suffering from toxic exposures could get the treatment they need and deserve.
And now, it’s a huge part of how we are fighting back against Trump and Doug Collins as they work to dismantle the VA, piece by piece.

But here’s an interesting fact: out of almost 2 million people who have taken action with VoteVets, only 1% have made a donation online to support our work.
Today, we’re asking you to join that select group.

Our average donation is $25. Some give more, many give less. But with Trump coming for everything we hold dear, all that matters is that you’re choosing to power our work with a donation.
We’ll put it right to work fighting and fighting back against these liars and hypocrites, and defending our Constitution at a moment when it is in extreme peril.
[**If helping VoteVets lead this fight from the front seems worth an $5 donation to you, we’re humbly asking you to make a donation today. We really need you. Thank you.**](https://act.votevets.org/go/2927?c0=vv-pac-em-august25.hEpWPc&refcode=em250813-1-60&t=1&akid=34525%2E3013755%2EEGWoXP)
_If you 've stored your info with ActBlue, we'll process your contribution instantly:_

---
****
| **[Rush $25 now](https://act.votevets.org/go/2935?c0=vv-pac-em-august25.c9qBG4&refcode=em250813-1-60&t=21&akid=34525%2E3013755%2EEGWoXP)**

| | **[Rush $50 now](https://act.votevets.org/go/2928?c0=vv-pac-em-august25.MB143d&refcode=em250813-1-60&t=22&akid=34525%2E3013755%2EEGWoXP)**

****
| **[Rush $100 now](https://act.votevets.org/go/2929?c0=vv-pac-em-august25.d8LsYA&refcode=em250813-1-60&t=23&akid=34525%2E3013755%2EEGWoXP)**

| | **_Meet Russell:_** Born and raised in Surfside Beach, SC, Congressman Russell Fry is the proud and homegrown Representative for South Carolina’s 7th Congressional District. Growing up in a cinder block home with no heating or air conditioning, Russell learned at an early age that hard work and perseverance pave the only true path to the American Dream. He watched his parents work day in and day out to make ends meet. And the values they instilled in him during his upbringing led Russell to self-fund both his undergraduate education at the University of South Carolina, and later his law studies at the Charleston School of Law. At Charleston, Russell served as the President of the Student Bar Association and even helped the school achieve its American Bar Association accreditation. He went on to practice law in the Grand Strand area for over a decade before entering the political arena to serve in the South Carolina House of Representatives for State House District 106 (Horry County). During his seven-year tenure in the SC House, Russell fought to safeguard Constitutional liberties, lower taxes, and put the best interests of South Carolina families above all else. He climbed the ranks to become Chief Majority Whip, and also chaired the House Opioid Prevention Study Committee. Under Russell’s leadership, 18 policy initiatives to combat the opioid crisis were signed into law. Since the first day he stepped foot in Washington, Russell has strived to shake up the corrupt status quo and deliver real change for the American people. He believes adamantly that so long as the American people stand united, we can keep the American Dream alive for every citizen of our great nation. Russell is a dedicated husband to his wife, Bronwen, and a loving father to his son, James. The family lives in Murrells Inlet with their chocolate lab, Jasper.
---

Peter – Donald Trump deployed the National Guard in Washington, D.C. this week, needlessly overriding local leaders in a blatant show of authoritarian power.

If D.C. were a state, he couldn’t seize control like this, and we’d gain **two new Democratic Senators** to help block his MAGA agenda.

_**But if we don’t build overwhelming support for D.C. statehood now, we’ll lose this golden chance to stop Trump’s power grab.**_

That’s why we need you to take our official D.C. Statehood Poll today.

name: Brad Finstad
subject: They stole your money….again.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Finstad for Congress
body:
| | | | |
---
| Dear Friend, Another day, another scandal in the Walz administration. This time, state officials have been forced to shut down a taxpayer-funded housing program after uncovering “ _serious fraud concerns,”_ which translates to millions of your hard-earned dollars gone with no oversight, no accountability, and no consequences (yet). Let me be clear: Minnesota has a housing crisis, and Democrats used it as an excuse to funnel money into a broken program that may have been riddled with fraud and abuse. And when the truth started coming out? They quietly pulled the plug and hoped no one would notice. **Well,_I noticed_. **And I won’t stop sounding the alarm! In Congress, I’ve fought for real oversight, transparency, and conservative values that respect taxpayers—not reckless giveaways disguised as “solutions.” We need more accountability in Minnesota, not more coverups. If you’re tired of seeing your money wasted and liberal politicians dodging responsibility, stand with me now.
---
| | [👉 Chip in here to fight back »](http://link.finstadforcongress.com/api/LinkHandler/getaction2?%3d)
---
| Thank you for your support—and for demanding better from those in power. Gratefully,
Brad Finstad

[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/113273248/563220884/-1196202961?refcode=em-8.13.25-all-a&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNjIvMS8xMTc1MjUiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiMmQ0ZDFjNjUtOTk3OC1mMDExLWI0ODEtNjA0NWJkZmU4ZTljIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=GbGEhML6Pwvb1wWx3yaOA9S8qvUWc5QmUYo6KbFA3y4=) Hi there, My mom used to tell me: **“Dime con quien andas y te digo quien eres.”** It means, “Tell me who you’re with, and I’ll tell you who you are.” It’s true in life, and it’s definitely true in politics. When you see who’s backing a candidate, you understand exactly who they’re working for. My opponents – both Republican _and_ Democrat – have taken hundreds of thousands of dollars from the same corporations that are ripping us off, polluting our air and water, and gutting the programs working families rely on. That’s who they’re with. And that’s who they are. **I’m with the Valley.** With teachers, farmworkers, small business owners, students, and working families – the folks too often left out of politics, even though we’re the ones holding this country together. **And I’m not taking a dime from corporate PACs.** This campaign is built from the ground up, powered by small-dollar donors who believe the Central Valley deserves better, and are ready to fight for it. **[If that’s you, I hope you’ll stand with us by chipping in $3 to help us keep this campaign powered by the people, not corporate PACs. When you see who’s backing a candidate, you understand exactly who they’re working for. My opponents – both Republican and Democrat – have taken hundreds of thousands of dollars from the same corporations that are ripping us off, polluting our air and water, and gutting the programs working families rely on. That’s who they’re with. And that’s who they are. I’m with the Valley. With teachers, farmworkers, small business owners, students, and working families – the folks too often left out of politics, even though we’re the ones holding this country together. And I’m not taking a dime from corporate PACs. This campaign is built from the ground up, powered by small-dollar donors who believe the Central Valley deserves better, and are ready to fight for it. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | | = | = | | = | = | | = | = Thank you, Randy | With deep ties to our community and a lifelong commitment to justice and equity, Randy is running for Congress in California’s 22nd District to bring bold, compassionate leadership to Washington. To support Randy's campaign = We'd hate to see you go, but you can click here if you'd like to . Paid for by Villegas for Congress Villegas for Congress PO Box 1346 Visalia, CA 93279 United States

This is Adam Schiff. I have some news, team: **_Fox News_ anchor Laura Ingraham broke the news last week that Trump had successfully badgered the Justice Department into targeting me with a criminal investigation. This kind of baseless abuse of the justice system is just what dictators do.** And it is meant to distract the American people from the terrible jobs numbers that came out last week, Trump’s deepening involvement in the Epstein files mess, and his attacks on our health care. It’s also meant to try to intimidate me or to stop me from holding Trump accountable. But I have some breaking news for them: It won’t stop me. Not for a minute.
